name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: We can't sit this out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
body:
Don’t do it.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4877%2E552475%2EK5a4gx)
Peter,
**With a razor-thin margin between Bob Casey and his opponent, we can’t sit this out.**
Our democracy only works if voters’ voices are heard. If we want this done right and done fairly, it’s on us to show up and fight for it.
**Bob’s never stopped fighting to ensure every single Pennsylvanian has their voice heard, and he won’t stop now — but he needs you by his side.[Fund the fight in Pennsylvania's critical Senate race with a donation of $5 or more right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241119-5?refcode=em20241119-5&refcode2=4877_552475_K5a4gx&akid=4877%2E552475%2EK5a4gx)**

name: National Democratic Redistricting Committee
subject: Election update for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
News from key races across the country
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97350902/513142084/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyMTVhMmQzLWQ0YTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BO0wVYFP2m7TI2yAQg0YChKqfS1xwXRN3TvVierq4sc=&emci=1c3df3a0-bba6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f215a2d3-d4a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=8431045)
---

Hi Peter — Like most of us, you’re probably still processing the election results — searching for answers, supporting your friends and loved ones, and making plans to keep fighting and moving forward. **We are right there with you.** It’s incredibly difficult and painful to accept that Donald Trump has once again been elected as president of the United States, knowing what he and his extreme MAGA agenda will attempt to do to our fundamental freedoms. There are going to be difficult fights ahead, and we must not waver. **But know this, Peter, all is not lost.** Our movement for fair maps won some key victories — and more races are still yet to be called. We are continuing to lay the groundwork for fair representation and the election of leaders who will defend, not undermine, our democracy. **Here’s what we know so far about some critical races for state legislatures and state supreme courts:**
* **At least 92 of the NDRC’s Democracy Defenders have already won their elections —** and other races have not yet been decided as votes continue to be counted. These candidates have fought and won important victories that will help create and defend fair electoral maps for future elections. We congratulate them on their wins and thank all of the NDRC supporters like you who helped propel them to victory.

* **With new fair legislative maps in Wisconsin, Democracy Defenders broke a Republican supermajority in the state senate and flipped seats in the state assembly,** creating a path to win majorities in 2026.

* **In Alabama, a newly fair map helped enable the election of two Black Congress members, Shomari Figures and Terri Sewell,** for the first time in history, and they will truly reflect the political desires of Alabamians. As former Attorney General Eric Holder said, “It is because of the heroism of previous generations that a tenacious group of Black Alabama voters challenged the State of Alabama in court to enforce protections enshrined in the Voting Rights Act of 1965, and took that fight all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court — and won.”

* **In Michigan, two pro-democracy candidates defeated ideological extremists to win seats on the state supreme court —** Kyra Harris Bolden and Kimberly Ann Thomas will both play key roles in defending a fair electoral system in this critical battleground state. A.G. Holder celebrated this outcome, declaring that “Michigan will have independent and fair-minded state supreme court justices who will protect their most cherished freedoms.”

* **And in other battleground states, Democracy Defenders flipped key seats blue — like Floyd Griffin,** who was elected to Georgia’s state house, and **Patty Kim** , who won a state senate seat in Pennsylvania.

We’re working to analyze the results and implications of the elections, but no matter what, we know that we’ll remain ready for the next round of fights for fair maps and the candidates who support them. Thank you for making these state-level victories possible, and for the work we will do together in the months and years ahead. Much more to come, The National Democratic Redistricting Committee | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97350903/513142085/1464966451?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_WhatWeKnow_email_20241119-NDRC-Tier1-WhatWeKnow_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241119-NDRC-Tier1-WhatWeKnow_&utm_campaign=WhatWeKnow&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyMTVhMmQzLWQ0YTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BO0wVYFP2m7TI2yAQg0YChKqfS1xwXRN3TvVierq4sc=)

clean_body: News from key races across the country | Hi Peter — Like most of us, you’re probably still processing the election results — searching for answers, supporting your friends and loved ones, and making plans to keep fighting and moving forward. We are right there with you. It’s incredibly difficult and painful to accept that Donald Trump has once again been elected as president of the United States, knowing what he and his extreme MAGA agenda will attempt to do to our fundamental freedoms. There are going to be difficult fights ahead, and we must not waver. But know this, Peter, all is not lost. Our movement for fair maps won some key victories — and more races are still yet to be called. We are continuing to lay the groundwork for fair representation and the election of leaders who will defend, not undermine, our democracy. Here’s what we know so far about some critical races for state legislatures and state supreme courts: At least 92 of the NDRC’s Democracy Defenders have already won their elections — and other races have not yet been decided as votes continue to be counted. These candidates have fought and won important victories that will help create and defend fair electoral maps for future elections. We congratulate them on their wins and thank all of the NDRC supporters like you who helped propel them to victory. With new fair legislative maps in Wisconsin, Democracy Defenders broke a Republican supermajority in the state senate and flipped seats in the state assembly, creating a path to win majorities in 2026. In Alabama, a newly fair map helped enable the election of two Black Congress members, Shomari Figures and Terri Sewell, for the first time in history, and they will truly reflect the political desires of Alabamians. As former Attorney General Eric Holder said, “It is because of the heroism of previous generations that a tenacious group of Black Alabama voters challenged the State of Alabama in court to enforce protections enshrined in the Voting Rights Act of 1965, and took that fight all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court — and won.” In Michigan, two pro-democracy candidates defeated ideological extremists to win seats on the state supreme court — Kyra Harris Bolden and Kimberly Ann Thomas will both play key roles in defending a fair electoral system in this critical battleground state. A.G. Holder celebrated this outcome, declaring that “Michigan will have independent and fair-minded state supreme court justices who will protect their most cherished freedoms.” And in other battleground states, Democracy Defenders flipped key seats blue — like Floyd Griffin, who was elected to Georgia’s state house, and Patty Kim , who won a state senate seat in Pennsylvania. We’re working to analyze the results and implications of the elections, but no matter what, we know that we’ll remain ready for the next round of fights for fair maps and the candidates who support them. Thank you for making these state-level victories possible, and for the work we will do together in the months and years ahead. Much more to come, The National Democratic Redistricting Committee | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, Suite #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States ** if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

**236.** That’s the number of donations we need TODAY from Cresco to begin building the resources to hold Trump and his cabinet accountable and defend the progress we’ve made these past four years. But we’re running out of time. We need this grassroots team to help raise the resources we need to defend our democracy and ensure that we can hold Trump and his cabinet accountable. **60 seconds.** You can make your first contribution to the Harris Fight Fund program in less than 60 seconds. Even a quick donation of $50 is enough to help us in this fight. And with only hours left to hit our goal today, NOW is the best time to rush your support. **It might not seem like $50 will make the difference, but if everyone reading this email pitches in what they can, we’ll be able to go toe-to-toe with Donald Trump every step of the way and show him what he’s up against. name: Jenna Burns
subject: It’s basically a death sentence
body:
For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.
Dear Peter,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=13976931d6fd498f80f7e8d235a0015b&_e=kAou2LGrQhbxcN5WYDNQHevkHi4F3BAASLutEyX7-ntf4xUUn3h5ANSQ-6lMFTOybEtN7c8EroXUXb7ias65qs_Hej7dpfe-ga8Rujlu61hYDTN-6_xKSlQ5vxTIzyp7OS-8p77lun3CNHT74IcdCSujhPGMqR_8f2CUo5qnPTu9BIbvK9x7-PiOmbYZnA38v3_blhekpFdGQL1R40Q0BDTmY9M0iCEd2GcGFABGcWDJu3FwSNcuPvKTOdKx3q6-J8gxo5U--xt8i_62AjllaJ0MbrkdSS0esda-vK06Uby4uzAEFOaTsaKB4ufKUismwtVgHL01eQns6K7GBnrDa2R8EKe7YejpQZhf9zp4yXb6MUBGHk5iAUb4JgJqGCR0)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=13976931d6fd498f80f7e8d235a0015b&_e=kAou2LGrQhbxcN5WYDNQHevkHi4F3BAASLutEyX7-ntf4xUUn3h5ANSQ-6lMFTOybEtN7c8EroXUXb7ias65qs_Hej7dpfe-ga8Rujlu61hYDTN-6_xKSlQ5vxTIzyp7OS-8p77lun3CNHT74IcdCSujhPGMqR_8f2CUo5qnPTu9BIbvK9x7-PiOmbYZnA38v3_blhekpFdGQL1R40Q0BDTmY9M0iCEd2GcGFABGcWCOD_hqqPzrUTGWRD6B4JP8OXnzWd9qo6iQbvHB2zyX6dGI32EvKP0cSTxLqBWHg-fI9T4MBdrvasg1zSUXxPGBaFQvJ47WCQH03FUsYGgo2apx3H2ZG03CbD0FoW91BSpnwjmQ3txG79DKRRjG6CMm)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=13976931d6fd498f80f7e8d235a0015b&_e=kAou2LGrQhbxcN5WYDNQHevkHi4F3BAASLutEyX7-ntf4xUUn3h5ANSQ-6lMFTOybEtN7c8EroXUXb7ias65qs_Hej7dpfe-ga8Rujlu61hYDTN-6_xKSlQ5vxTIzyp7OS-8p77lun3CNHT74IcdCSujhPGMqR_8f2CUo5qnPTu9BIbvK9x7-PiOmbYZnA38v3_blhekpFdGQL1R40Q0BDTmY9M0iCEd2GcGFABGcWCh1B7Q-3AZwVK7CgnHSAiWdupXYH2pKnHk1Nn1v62zXpOGLlRB48LrcFZsFMZTYNZ5bc_0FnD7O7sPfD6K7S7IqDtGAufvIN2l91LqZfL8i7TLtlD0V8X3K-M0y9qyhsPd1KNwRX8kKGPqqsvNd7R9)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=13976931d6fd498f80f7e8d235a0015b&_e=kAou2LGrQhbxcN5WYDNQHevkHi4F3BAASLutEyX7-ntf4xUUn3h5ANSQ-6lMFTOybEtN7c8EroXUXb7ias65qs_Hej7dpfe-ga8Rujlu61hYDTN-6_xKSlQ5vxTIzyp7OS-8p77lun3CNHT74IcdCSujhPGMqR_8f2CUo5qnPTu9BIbvK9x7-PiOmbYZnA38v3_blhekpFdGQL1R40Q0BDTmY9M0iCEd2GcGFABGcWDol1YwYw2BmMWB3QrOVB6V72JsrqwYmSiirhin77K32797SpYu39wj-Bwd-m9S5g7lBHKBHAfNmwwfkgW-2BNKzwB6YKBByxyFroCpHHcgu2Gc8XqjbZiOgFl4izasGvsN_nxH1kSysYHWrmPP-MM5)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=13976931d6fd498f80f7e8d235a0015b&_e=kAou2LGrQhbxcN5WYDNQHevkHi4F3BAASLutEyX7-ntf4xUUn3h5ANSQ-6lMFTOybEtN7c8EroXUXb7ias65qs_Hej7dpfe-ga8Rujlu61hYDTN-6_xKSlQ5vxTIzyp7OS-8p77lun3CNHT74IcdCSujhPGMqR_8f2CUo5qnPTu9BIbvK9x7-PiOmbYZnA38v3_blhekpFdGQL1R40Q0BDTmY9M0iCEd2GcGFABGcWAO2Idu-V8DwVm2-RQAjvwbc8KcTOBGDOYigUJVaWabWWWZ7qF_PCrMDU1BjEFlQhPFWzhGItWJgDTZxfvZ3A7098id16S5TUM5GL_nB1mtjVmNCnoqR0Xiq4R3Z0A4NRZV1lEpHvP8faBuOZ4S7m2d)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=13976931d6fd498f80f7e8d235a0015b&_e=kAou2LGrQhbxcN5WYDNQHevkHi4F3BAASLutEyX7-ntf4xUUn3h5ANSQ-6lMFTOybEtN7c8EroXUXb7ias65qs_Hej7dpfe-ga8Rujlu61hYDTN-6_xKSlQ5vxTIzyp7OS-8p77lun3CNHT74IcdCSujhPGMqR_8f2CUo5qnPTu9BIbvK9x7-PiOmbYZnA38v3_blhekpFdGQL1R40Q0BDTmY9M0iCEd2GcGFABGcWAUNcZjgon88yQhrvONvG7fovdkSjnbV8udjmCTL1NPH9lZNYuq0JWXxZKTq21YdiIkeq1hJF9PC2xSPoJxzyClyejpFn-EzrzVJ9yQfQdfDQIjjmCcRqqrAR55FpGpLsBT0b7JGjDEB9zYtJY_6j-q)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=13976931d6fd498f80f7e8d235a0015b&_e=kAou2LGrQhbxcN5WYDNQHevkHi4F3BAASLutEyX7-ntf4xUUn3h5ANSQ-6lMFTOybEtN7c8EroXUXb7ias65qs_Hej7dpfe-ga8Rujlu61hYDTN-6_xKSlQ5vxTIzyp7OS-8p77lun3CNHT74IcdCSujhPGMqR_8f2CUo5qnPTu9BIbvK9x7-PiOmbYZnA38v3_blhekpFdGQL1R40Q0BDTmY9M0iCEd2GcGFABGcWDUy-XVvb36V_qzoDKTq6c8hAxW5QCUgJWZr7JhvhhedajUteJNIVqQNJF5a2Ye2vkpL8qA9fW2OBCBMKHCgNE0VEcs9t3MseXaNIS8e-L5oBJQ-zNNqb89dhC9Dq1py1uLaEQhi0fBvDs3DQzS7e8o)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

I know these emails, texts, phone calls, and letters can get annoying, but I promise you that this is crucial for our mission. Let me explain: | | | | | | "Derrick Van Orden" Hey you know I'm not firing off these emails at random, right, Peter? This is Derrick Van Orden. Seriously, sometimes it seems like people think I just pulled their email out of a hat and sent something random. Well, Peter, I can assure you that I know "dpwillis67@gmail.com" belongs to you and I meant to contact YOU! I know these emails, texts, phone calls, and letters can get annoying, but I promise you that this is crucial for our mission. Let me explain: I am a retired US Navy SEAL of 26 years. My Team and I have successfully defended this seat from radical Democrats. What we do now will determine whether or not we capitalize on the red wave we saw on November 5th - that 's no exaggeration, Peter! | | "DEFEND DERRICK VAN ORDEN" | | "HELP MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!" | "Derrick Van Orden" Look, my Team and I flipped this seat red for the first time in over two decades. Think about that - the last time a Republican held this seat was when Bill Clinton was President! After that hard-fought battle, the Democrats doubled down and threw more dark money and more smear campaigns my way for the next race. But my Team and I stood tall and fought off their attacks. Now, we MUST fix the damage the radical Left has done to our country! We've fought too hard and for too long to let this moment slip from our grasp. Losing as badly as they did this year has been a pretty embarrassing blow to the Democrats' egos, so now they're doing EVERYTHING they can to stop our fight to undo all of their insane programs and moves. Peter, they want to DESTROY us! | | "DEFEND DERRICK VAN ORDEN" Right now, my Team and I are on pace to fall short of our critical first End of Month Goal since Election Day. I wish I could tell you we were off by just a few dollars. Man, I wish I could tell you we were off by a couple hundred dollars even. But the fact is, we are falling short of our Goal by THOUSANDS of dollars! | | | "HELP DERRICK SALVAGE THIS DEADLINE >>" If we miss this Goal, the Democrats will look at me, my Team, and our fantastic grassroots supporters and say that we 're weak. They'll say we're not serious about getting things done. They'll even say we're not committed to America First values! But you and I know that's not true, Peter. That's why I'm personally asking you to help me prove the liberal media and liberal cabal wrong about us! "I’ve set an internal deadline for my Team and my supporters to raise $3,702 to help us get back on track to reach our Goal before midnight! Please chip in now:" | | | "DONATE $750" | | | "DONATE $500" | | "DONATE $250" | | | "DONATE $100" | | | "DONATE $50" | | | "DONATE $35" | | | "DONATE ANYTHING YOU CAN >>" I cannot thank you enough for reading this email, Peter. Again, I want you to know that I'm emailing YOU directly because you are a reliable supporter and a fantastic member of my Team. Thanks again - I can't wait to see your donation process! -Derrick | "May God bless you and your family. - DVO" * | "Thanks to your help, I'm able to work for you every day, but a donation of any amount will go a long way!" | | | USE OF MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY, THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY, OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE. | Paid for by Van Orden for Congress | Hey, Peter! clean_body: I know these emails, texts, phone calls, and letters can get annoying, but I promise you that this is crucial for our mission. Let me explain: | | | | | | "Derrick Van Orden" Hey you know I'm not firing off these emails at random, right, Friend? This is Derrick Van Orden. Seriously, sometimes it seems like people think I just pulled their email out of a hat and sent something random. Well, Friend, I can assure you that I know "%%Emailc%%" belongs to you and I meant to contact YOU! I know these emails, texts, phone calls, and letters can get annoying, but I promise you that this is crucial for our mission. Let me explain: I am a retired US Navy SEAL of 26 years. My Team and I have successfully defended this seat from radical Democrats. What we do now will determine whether or not we capitalize on the red wave we saw on November 5th - that 's no exaggeration, Friend! | | "DEFEND DERRICK VAN ORDEN" | | "HELP MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!" | "Derrick Van Orden" Look, my Team and I flipped this seat red for the first time in over two decades. Think about that - the last time a Republican held this seat was when Bill Clinton was President! After that hard-fought battle, the Democrats doubled down and threw more dark money and more smear campaigns my way for the next race. But my Team and I stood tall and fought off their attacks. Now, we MUST fix the damage the radical Left has done to our country! We've fought too hard and for too long to let this moment slip from our grasp. Losing as badly as they did this year has been a pretty embarrassing blow to the Democrats' egos, so now they're doing EVERYTHING they can to stop our fight to undo all of their insane programs and moves. Friend, they want to DESTROY us! | | "DEFEND DERRICK VAN ORDEN" Right now, my Team and I are on pace to fall short of our critical first End of Month Goal since Election Day. I wish I could tell you we were off by just a few dollars. Man, I wish I could tell you we were off by a couple hundred dollars even. But the fact is, we are falling short of our Goal by THOUSANDS of dollars! | | | "HELP DERRICK SALVAGE THIS DEADLINE >>" If we miss this Goal, the Democrats will look at me, my Team, and our fantastic grassroots supporters and say that we 're weak. They'll say we're not serious about getting things done. They'll even say we're not committed to America First values! But you and I know that's not true, Friend. That's why I'm personally asking you to help me prove the liberal media and liberal cabal wrong about us! "I’ve set an internal deadline for my Team and my supporters to raise $3,702 to help us get back on track to reach our Goal before midnight! Please chip in now:" | | | "DONATE $750" | | | "DONATE $500" | | "DONATE $250" | | | "DONATE $100" | | | "DONATE $50" | | | "DONATE $35" | | | "DONATE ANYTHING YOU CAN >>" I cannot thank you enough for reading this email, Friend. Again, I want you to know that I'm emailing YOU directly because you are a reliable supporter and a fantastic member of my Team. Thanks again - I can't wait to see your donation process! -Derrick | "May God bless you and your family. - DVO" * | "Thanks to your help, I'm able to work for you every day, but a donation of any amount will go a long way!" | | | USE OF MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY, THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY, OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE. | Paid for by Van Orden for Congress | Hey, Friend! name: Sarah Kline
subject: What can 3 cents a day do?
body:
We’re here to fight for our climate in 2025, and you can join us at just 3 cents a day! | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97352271/513172756/2043095679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczM2U1NmYxLWRlYTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X9FPbU1TVRE3LnrLEsxevd2Au5aUIH-hRVNgysorU9U=&emci=7de13772-dca5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=733e56f1-dea6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, 3 cents a day. That’s right. That’s all it takes to be an invaluable part of our organization and the fight for Oregon’s future. [**With 3 cents a day you become a member of OLCV’s Sustainer Circle!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97352272/513172757/2043095679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczM2U1NmYxLWRlYTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X9FPbU1TVRE3LnrLEsxevd2Au5aUIH-hRVNgysorU9U=&emci=7de13772-dca5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=733e56f1-dea6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Our monthly donors are extremely valuable parts of our community, because a recurring commitment we can count on allows us to put more of your contribution towards protecting Oregon’s natural legacy. A monthly donation ensures that we spend less on fundraising, administrative costs and other resources, saving trees in the process! To put it simply, a monthly gift of any amount has a _larger impact_ on our ability to fight for Oregon’s climate, clean air and water, and environment we all depend on. It doesn’t take much to become a member of our Sustainer Circle. [**You can start at $5 or $10 a month, which is less than the cost of most streaming services! And did you know that a gift of $10 a month is just about 3 cents a day?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97352273/513172758/2043095679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczM2U1NmYxLWRlYTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X9FPbU1TVRE3LnrLEsxevd2Au5aUIH-hRVNgysorU9U=&emci=7de13772-dca5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=733e56f1-dea6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) These **smaller recurring donations are easier for you to manage** , and great for us to budget properly towards funding candidate campaigns, recruiting volunteers, building community, and doing the important work of getting climate bills passed. If you haven’t already heard, we’ve made some changes to our Sustainer Circle this year, to offer our monthly donors exclusive benefits such as a subscription to the Sustainer E-Newsletter which details all of our work and progress, insider access to the OLCV Election Report and Environmental Scorecard, and timely opportunities to take action on urgent and important issues. I know many of us are still feeling the uncertainty and fear after the results from the presidential election, but we’re not afraid to step up in this fight like we have before. It’s during times like these that we need to turn to our communities and rise up. This is why our Sustainer Circle members are invaluable for us - they are a central part of our community who make a large impact every day. Our community members remind us that as long as we have each other, there is still hope. That’s why all of us are still in this fight. [**Would you join us?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97352274/513172759/2043095679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczM2U1NmYxLWRlYTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X9FPbU1TVRE3LnrLEsxevd2Au5aUIH-hRVNgysorU9U=&emci=7de13772-dca5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=733e56f1-dea6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) The work ahead of us is going to take all of us doing whatever we can. [**OLCV is ready to fight relentlessly for our climate, and you can join us at just $5 or $10 a month! Are you with us?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97352275/513172760/2043095679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczM2U1NmYxLWRlYTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X9FPbU1TVRE3LnrLEsxevd2Au5aUIH-hRVNgysorU9U=&emci=7de13772-dca5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=733e56f1-dea6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97352276/513172761/2043095679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczM2U1NmYxLWRlYTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X9FPbU1TVRE3LnrLEsxevd2Au5aUIH-hRVNgysorU9U=&emci=7de13772-dca5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=733e56f1-dea6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) By joining our Sustainer Circle, your donation will go towards:
* Passing a transportation package that centers climate and equity;
* Advancing solutions for more affordable clean energy, including funding popular climate programs and protecting Oregonians from sky-high rate hikes;
* Tackling the climate crisis by strengthening our communities’ climate resiliency and protecting Oregonians from extreme weather;
* And, fighting for life sustaining essentials like our clean water – from what we drink to our rivers and streams to the ocean that hugs our coastline.

[**A monthly gift will help fuel the fight for climate action in 2025. Your gift will fund our work to safeguard the future of our family, friends, animals, and natural places. None of our work is possible without you.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97352277/513172762/2043095679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczM2U1NmYxLWRlYTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X9FPbU1TVRE3LnrLEsxevd2Au5aUIH-hRVNgysorU9U=&emci=7de13772-dca5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=733e56f1-dea6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Think of what your gift can do today. I hope you’ll join us! Sincere gratitude,
Sarah Kline

name: Jenna Burns
subject: She’s prosecuting Trump AND my husband
body:
Dear Peter,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=519c9679d79248169a2da2a641d3eb4a&_e=AhkYIEVHzefpmuOgivSvtmZtWleO-TEa23S1Rebf_LV08IWGVm8k7_95fpgdCSDvuP6pYP8WfqbaaE23ox_ykt67qM2Qas5c4dtzOx6Vg13yaagZqaAqpxSPmBKFpwTC_Jjw3PogQBT14A96wYNdg85RxSHkjslYQnS-ZFBcwbjTpBTYXaywRG2K8O2zDjNXlP1G03KS98jc3AxStPZ8EKTqiywz87EdYZvTsmWGsM8mN0miw4umXAcVmkFGqz4fMqzFxK7jdRaYFsXg1-IgXnCgpgji8PV08-Q6fNlW5ZywpkROEsfIQPP4StP8_UfFwAWLpmKFqilg60pADcjPnMhl_q-x8douEsTBlJCuWPAByFsBNvsq3QJNGk08cG8y)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=519c9679d79248169a2da2a641d3eb4a&_e=AhkYIEVHzefpmuOgivSvtmZtWleO-TEa23S1Rebf_LV08IWGVm8k7_95fpgdCSDvuP6pYP8WfqbaaE23ox_ykt67qM2Qas5c4dtzOx6Vg13yaagZqaAqpxSPmBKFpwTC_Jjw3PogQBT14A96wYNdg85RxSHkjslYQnS-ZFBcwbjTpBTYXaywRG2K8O2zDjNXlP1G03KS98jc3AxStPZ8EKTqiywz87EdYZvTsmWGsM8nXywvWI8onujGXqpAwaALt5AtzrLxlZUHqrBQLCgVBqaE4kuDuYbJ5pg9xm2mYb92OzntCSfybXHVql8fa6u46JdEfT9DLFzqiH1D9fsIAarU7rbq_Q5ILWtGI-pL4MvPJH6XzQ2oAZHTTHoc5SNy)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=519c9679d79248169a2da2a641d3eb4a&_e=AhkYIEVHzefpmuOgivSvtmZtWleO-TEa23S1Rebf_LV08IWGVm8k7_95fpgdCSDvuP6pYP8WfqbaaE23ox_ykt67qM2Qas5c4dtzOx6Vg13yaagZqaAqpxSPmBKFpwTC_Jjw3PogQBT14A96wYNdg85RxSHkjslYQnS-ZFBcwbjTpBTYXaywRG2K8O2zDjNXlP1G03KS98jc3AxStPZ8EKTqiywz87EdYZvTsmWGsM88gwYQGgBmvP7KyiYSKjsnYHdB1x9IYmZikZPxMleJEAt5cGgNJISuF9siamFR921UkTCopT6iKtVa19Cmq91D6JPebyFHT2K2sAVzprWbtCKMF8Ya4JzmghuDfJ6B8bn4_JWt1Of2YKj6pr_N6qRz)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=519c9679d79248169a2da2a641d3eb4a&_e=AhkYIEVHzefpmuOgivSvtmZtWleO-TEa23S1Rebf_LV08IWGVm8k7_95fpgdCSDvuP6pYP8WfqbaaE23ox_ykt67qM2Qas5c4dtzOx6Vg13yaagZqaAqpxSPmBKFpwTC_Jjw3PogQBT14A96wYNdg85RxSHkjslYQnS-ZFBcwbjTpBTYXaywRG2K8O2zDjNXlP1G03KS98jc3AxStPZ8EKTqiywz87EdYZvTsmWGsM899EGQt9_SBGNkjN60_Z_6A8K1KclRnn3W9LVb-ypD9qvrsbgcScvHg_12TjIxxZXN5Y3X59R93flAkwj6DaX0RsnyaDkjM4H0iEc-fEYadWUDyEC_lJvYW_FS3-0iNhH0NmPYlZyIJ5aq-UdW4x2k)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=519c9679d79248169a2da2a641d3eb4a&_e=AhkYIEVHzefpmuOgivSvtmZtWleO-TEa23S1Rebf_LV08IWGVm8k7_95fpgdCSDvuP6pYP8WfqbaaE23ox_ykt67qM2Qas5c4dtzOx6Vg13yaagZqaAqpxSPmBKFpwTC_Jjw3PogQBT14A96wYNdg85RxSHkjslYQnS-ZFBcwbjTpBTYXaywRG2K8O2zDjNXlP1G03KS98jc3AxStPZ8EKTqiywz87EdYZvTsmWGsM_jph5D4iPGotjOiAa03I7XozZg52OXl1TYBkyhMSheCz41cq4taPBsXYYIGlSkGQ7oGBaiT7RO03RhY2OopWDOFCy9V4UfxQp7gDpmKSSpU0DDXE-LSJ0teGNvPpkH6Ghr07cQP7YNBy_NBIUmhuwb)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=519c9679d79248169a2da2a641d3eb4a&_e=AhkYIEVHzefpmuOgivSvtmZtWleO-TEa23S1Rebf_LV08IWGVm8k7_95fpgdCSDvuP6pYP8WfqbaaE23ox_ykt67qM2Qas5c4dtzOx6Vg13yaagZqaAqpxSPmBKFpwTC_Jjw3PogQBT14A96wYNdg85RxSHkjslYQnS-ZFBcwbjTpBTYXaywRG2K8O2zDjNXlP1G03KS98jc3AxStPZ8EKTqiywz87EdYZvTsmWGsM8aU6zQEB_DvnvwGK8ikL_W4mS9vLkusgLlOOrzWIz3K0Nsv1NVnxB59VFlRqZjoejHHLFu_mtpCYWd-znYY-m_Ka0_lHD0leqHrFDxeWxxWP2p2mNuhArAAtQV3jrVwzzipH6pk2snJfMqmgVKX0Ew)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=519c9679d79248169a2da2a641d3eb4a&_e=AhkYIEVHzefpmuOgivSvtmZtWleO-TEa23S1Rebf_LV08IWGVm8k7_95fpgdCSDvuP6pYP8WfqbaaE23ox_ykt67qM2Qas5c4dtzOx6Vg13yaagZqaAqpxSPmBKFpwTC_Jjw3PogQBT14A96wYNdg85RxSHkjslYQnS-ZFBcwbjTpBTYXaywRG2K8O2zDjNXlP1G03KS98jc3AxStPZ8EKTqiywz87EdYZvTsmWGsM9mgIOEtLVEFwvqwr2zLphkF2XGz6uz4tkoJfFLWsyEV7edYTX-LMplfWfTVRp2IHFQuoGGJpZU-4_QQhgmIYe-Piz8ZgfyTlyzba8bCx_jApDW4Xs_thYfKJsLDc3aobcQfGuzwAv4argnqdnGs0Cw)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. clean_body: Dear Peter, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! ---

But time is running out. The Left has already begun attempting to sabotage President Trump's agenda, and their propaganda machine is in full swing. We must act now to counter their lies and promote our values.

Participating in the **[America First Agenda Survey](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ddf7799558ed4d678739bfbe4a5769be&_e=wjMwxWS6CnT5KAmc8Y3zDBbMHktoiy0Gwd4EeKQN3HsphQlP4F7daA-RsObkfUZsm_AKjfLq68RxVqCEwrOtQQeR6lFznpK2rVJypSHgpdmOjXa55yjks_8eFgJh8GpC8YnBubG5c0pKXgx5i6wSjJVwkt0phXCc0AHytpGkF238CObhqEq19ZAGGcmrmg9akdD7u7iQFakPWPRq4hzPGvTD2vMUjHX8AahnlPE9eGd-RwdoDPbp3EBKJIYLc9U-IqBNJmU3Ot5Bvu0QCYDXN7zPB6OaMuT-ltWgzs9Gw4kllGSNmG4xTi0J04ubphEHLLhBh_GpoyG6boFRqbbekEsxDbkPUB65ZqPuhrd_E3dqYIBgs--XDINYfNHAfyuAbzGwz0DJLAtDYAEiLuwNvwrv-wpYE1XzQW_AvY6f-AA%3D "America First Agenda Survey")** will contribute to House Republicans' comprehensive strategy to reclaim our nation's sovereignty and security, restore our economy, create new jobs, and reassert our values and principles.

name: James Carville
subject: Urgent Senate Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Friend, Bob Casey needs your help in Pennsylvania RIGHT NOW.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mw_dmp_4_casey_recount?refcode=jtk2541-bu-text&amounts=5,25,50,100,250

This race is still too close to call, and we need to act fast to make sure that Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard. Bob’s team needs urgent resources to keep this work going.

I’m not $#!ting you when I say this is the most important race in the country now. We cannot afford to lose another Senate seat. Bob Casey MUST be re-elected to stand up to Republicans and Donald Trump in the Senate.

That’s why it has NEVER been more important than now for you to split $5 or more between Bob Casey and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. Your donation will immediately go to work to make sure Bob’s team has the resources they need to run through the finish line.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mw_dmp_4_casey_recount?refcode=jtk2541-bu-text&amounts=5,25,50,100,250

Thank you,
James Carville

subject: Something is seriously wrong in our nation’s schools
body:
My name is Larry P. Arnn, and I serve as president of Hillsdale College.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | Dear Fellow American,

My name is Larry P. Arnn, and I serve as president of Hillsdale College. I'm writing to you today because you're a concerned American who keeps up with current events.

That means you know something is seriously wrong in too many of our nation's schools.

You know a fierce ideological battle is raging in classrooms across the country, and our children are at risk.

**This is no accident.**

The far-Left, guided by a Marxist vision of a radically transformed society, has strategically targeted education, including K-12 classrooms across America.

That's why I'm asking you to complete the **NATIONAL OPINION SURVEY ON THE MARXIST HIJACKING OF AMERICAN EDUCATION.**

You can take your survey at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/marxist-hijacking-of-american-education-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e74ee791c7ab49c3bd2a9721647eaf62&_e=MJpuwAv_D_O395yAg4JfVZ9TsE0aCVEwAtOHiY1tnDvb7vMFxjlWxtkSqP0mX9IXNrVzJLGM5Wgnb-mowbaf4TimgqtOFla8riYcpFXWDhvbIa3VrCYI_UGXUWLNR9kMDPNYP8gV2Ukvxxd9_h2HY9Fxxq9B9Oo9fMTJDPmt7xtBFCWlFT4aobRslIErqp4GfZbRnBh8Sc-BG19OMDXjsruasuaUsPpDPFMUUROIGFPhz8SfSTr15O3jP9f4JEweBq4yTFE5Q6bdBBrSLr24E_2wbW31TmNvdlcjxe0ktri8Iz6OlKen1b67IKsuUewW5kLNzcnz4uljCYDy9omC6SEUKFFmhfjcIWna5C_jJfFFh_vK5KpEiwAabqT0lYwvwgWX8K-TCecYYRIES_KwZmVzc89pQyh4aHMGXVJ2-YSihpBW_BTu3RquKx1gfh3K)

Thank you in advance.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: President Donald J. Trump
subject: Do you have all of my books?
body:
Thank you for your support!
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JD3KXH19QNYY09M5ZPT3ATS0_0)

| Dear Patriot, I am already hard at work for YOU - I have made many important appointments and I have greatly expanded my team. We will hit the ground running in January as we work to [SAVE AMERICA](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JD3KXH19QNYY09M5ZPT3ATS0_3)! **I love and appreciate all of you for your FIGHT and unwavering support!**
---
| | [ SHOP TRUMP COLLECTION ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JD3KXH19QNYY09M5ZPT3ATS0_4)
---
| Have you had a chance to pick up [SAVE AMERICA](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JD3KXH19QNYY09M5ZPT3ATS0_5) and my other two books? [SAVE AMERICA](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JD3KXH19QNYY09M5ZPT3ATS0_6) is my third book, but my first two books, [OUR JOURNEY TOGETHER](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JD3KXH19QNYY09M5ZPT3ATS0_7) and [LETTERS TO TRUMP](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JD3KXH19QNYY09M5ZPT3ATS0_8), were great successes and are available at [45books.com](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JD3KXH19QNYY09M5ZPT3ATS0_9). [OUR JOURNEY TOGETHER](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JD3KXH19QNYY09M5ZPT3ATS0_10) was my first book. It takes you back to my first Presidency - this was a special time and this book shows many of my great accomplishments. My next Presidency will be EVEN BETTER!
---
| | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JD3KXH19QNYY09M5ZPT3ATS0_11)
---
| | [ ORDER YOUR TRUMP BOOKS HERE ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JD3KXH19QNYY09M5ZPT3ATS0_12)
---
| [LETTERS TO TRUMP](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JD3KXH19QNYY09M5ZPT3ATS0_13) is an intimate collection of personal letters that I have received over the years from many prominent people. Some of the most influential individuals of our time, including Nixon, Princess Diana, and even Oprah, took the time to send me personal letters. This book shows the true appreciation that everyone has for me! **I hope you will pick up one of my books today at[45books.com](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JD3KXH19QNYY09M5ZPT3ATS0_14). ** GOD BLESS AMERICA!

name: Senate Republicans Key Voter Outreach
subject: Please complete the linked Transition of Power survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We took it ALL back! Now, we need to get to work. Please complete your Transition of Power survey TODAY to help our GOP leaders get to work on day one. | This won’t be a long email, Fellow American.

**_First_ - thank you for all your help with the campaign to take back the Senate. Without your help, we couldn’t have built this strong Republican majority.**

_Now, we need to ask for your help again, but we’re not asking for money today._

We need your help to let our GOP leaders know what issues matter MOST to the Republican voters who elected them to this new majority.

[**We’re counting on you to complete your official Transition of Power survey today.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=08031c41bd044ef2884c5107fdf463a1&_e=dcNWwWtm4CThM6ZTLAjaOu7eQxUXgmu9X4pWxpGs3E8HbgXw0dsvUyVcG8LbTvJGTVSjdjLx9mSaL-0b5DQgWpJzjeAEYiotjwIZ7T1JtsBmD4p5TNTY1sRQYmP6IWpz4qSA2h1n8boq_ty9bOH4BM5LEE1cVhD2V50z3woj5mpXWbX-iwF1itfsFr_A-1B-gotK_zKrPpKJifohtFZqNMpi0p9sbKfzDHQM_JH31ZEH15g6HxjeBqoLiPpc7mCxH8n503NHJwQmDbYUL_Nmr-M6dvyETlSk9iq2tl87uDqKG6uUIS8BL-mGqISSCwq9lZVQXASF51LBMI3aU8U6zqW0kViawecGXVMadGouD9KjlIHu5Olvpo1ND_2PdQGwmIFRofomyj0PP0ni-Ib3U9rGl75jgW0s6_nMbJxp6TD3quXpAU7iNk1Zb8BpnLltgysRp-I7k80viv53XkQnMveWBIv8OUPEqLxv3PU0tMw%3D) _The survey has 14 questions that address the heart of our country's challenges and opportunities._

Thank you,
Senate Republicans

name: Bob Casey
subject: We must value democracy more than expediency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4878%2E552475%2ENG4qAK)
Peter,
As a public official, including serving Pennsylvania for three terms in the United States Senate, my top priority and only consideration has been what is best for the Commonwealth.
Right now, counties across Pennsylvania are still tabulating the results of our November election for the first time. As Pennsylvanians wait to learn the final result of this very close Senate election, there has been extensive commentary about why I have not yet conceded.
**The answer is simple: Pennsylvanians deserve to have their voices heard, and the worth of someone’s vote is not determined by how long it takes to be counted.** When a Pennsylvanian takes the time to cast a legal vote, often waiting in long lines and taking time away from their work and family, they deserve to have their vote counted, whether it is the first ballot counted or the last.
The current margin of this race is a quarter of one percent, and it will take time to determine the final result. The slim margin has drawn more attention to this process than in recent elections, but the process itself is not unusual. Our dedicated county election officials are moving through the same democratic process they undertake after every single election, whether the margin is slim or large. Unlike in past elections, the votes in this election could determine the outcome.
There are thousands of eligible voters who cast their ballot but made small errors that would have disenfranchised them if they weren’t able to correct them by their county’s deadline. Most counties allow up to a week for voters to correct these minor errors in a process known as curing ballots. In one case in Allegheny County, a 100-year-old woman who had voted in every election since she had become eligible to vote was able to fix an error on her ballot after Election Day and make sure her vote was counted.
Still, other voters across the Commonwealth went out to vote and did everything right, but because of small mistakes and understandable human error – on the part of the voter or due to election officials – their votes have to move through a lengthier process.
While this process has been lengthy and will still take time, I have remained committed to one clear goal:**Letting the voices of Pennsylvanians be heard and standing up against efforts to silence and disenfranchise voters in the Commonwealth.**
This principle stands in stark opposition to Washington Republicans, who have interrupted this process and filed numerous lawsuits to disenfranchise thousands of voters. Attorneys representing my opponent in this race and national Republicans have argued to disqualify ballots where the voter did everything right, but an election official forgot to counter-sign the ballot envelope.
Poll workers and election officials work very hard, but they are human – and voters should not be penalized for any mistakes they make.
This close race has also put a spotlight on undated mail ballots, as my opponent and his allies have filed an appeal with the Pennsylvania Supreme Court to disqualify mail ballots where a voter has accidentally written the date wrong or didn’t write a date at all.
Undated mail ballots have long been at issue in Pennsylvania’s elections. Gov. Wolf’s administration advocated to have these ballots count, as has Secretary of State Al Schmidt, and even my opponent himself. The Commonwealth Court of Pennsylvania has ruled twice in 2024 alone that throwing out these ballots violates Pennsylvania’s constitution.
At its core, this is a debate about the constitutionality of disenfranchising thousands of voters due to a requirement that has no bearing on a voters’ eligibility and has no impact in deterring fraud. The Pennsylvania Supreme Court has been asked to take up this issue and come to a resolution for a question that has been at issue long before the 2024 election, and which will reverberate far beyond this race.
Unfortunately, this democratic process has been subject to repeated right-wing misinformation and allegations of foul play. I urge the people of Pennsylvania and across the nation to have patience and allow this constitutional process to play out. We cannot set the dangerous precedent that the desire of a political party or election forecasters to declare a race as settled should overrule the voices of the voters who participated in the election – for whom the results have real consequences in their daily lives – or the election officials who work through a painstaking process to tabulate the votes.
I served the people for ten years as Auditor General and State Treasurer in the Finance Building in Harrisburg. The following is inscribed on that building: “All public service is a trust, given in faith and accepted in honor.”
I want to make sure that trust and faith is upheld. Pennsylvanians deserve to trust that when they cast a vote legally, it is counted. They deserve to trust they will not be disenfranchised due to mistakes made by poll workers or election officials. They deserve to trust that expediency will never be valued more than democracy.
Regardless of the final result, I am committed to ensuring Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=4878%2E552475%2ENG4qAK)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=4878%2E552475%2ENG4qAK)

To give by check:
Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
PO Box 15845
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

name: Jenna Burns
subject: It’s basically a death sentence
body:
For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=97fa4bd5e8a8408fbc5a5673c73af746&_e=jpj2WVkKk8a8n4lvdLluU3cfnufwhwbAF8hPX6KUfqgQJFpl3cfJ5stUjI0XbyXthGR65hC7arQzw9YZyM70gjSnN7PavqQj8PFuDNcKMpcA6nW2fMKZ97SkMg31-tWia6FceQi5_hJrefksYHFauDzmy8aO_-MSgww6rGVQDLYqr62KTXp9Q83101zJD8xWckEXucOzHABdKzuUs82Ux4B050HMs_qYVRSVowBidu4_Kmhi9apgPEyLaaIyWcbI1h7jDpZOcZ37Vwd0Jh-s-vbQapaWRf2O-z6C6nR0ADy-e50hWQ2MXkjsreJEy8_zDEwpK9jaN1FU8KPZ9kQPUpwGd3ytjifGn50jlOO3f6PSCKfF4shVaVKuAMwUGW2Rvau5HdqVDjbuKr0hUhBLog%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=97fa4bd5e8a8408fbc5a5673c73af746&_e=jpj2WVkKk8a8n4lvdLluU3cfnufwhwbAF8hPX6KUfqgQJFpl3cfJ5stUjI0XbyXthGR65hC7arQzw9YZyM70gjSnN7PavqQj8PFuDNcKMpcA6nW2fMKZ97SkMg31-tWia6FceQi5_hJrefksYHFauDzmy8aO_-MSgww6rGVQDLYqr62KTXp9Q83101zJD8xWckEXucOzHABdKzuUs82Ux4B050HMs_qYVRSVowBidu6YQhjSmARlKlCtDaaeONOluJK4XnrsQwojptfSvGygbxQAGT7z6m9j5YJYJJnIGyoP0zT5IH6FlDAQJErmYBNzRBX-5hnaJZVY86zcwa6lE2OvZGDqix1WSikB4_4hA3P4MsQRY8iSF0eKBN3luTdheZq2X0JwviX0MZuFPp_Rpg%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=97fa4bd5e8a8408fbc5a5673c73af746&_e=jpj2WVkKk8a8n4lvdLluU3cfnufwhwbAF8hPX6KUfqgQJFpl3cfJ5stUjI0XbyXthGR65hC7arQzw9YZyM70gjSnN7PavqQj8PFuDNcKMpcA6nW2fMKZ97SkMg31-tWia6FceQi5_hJrefksYHFauDzmy8aO_-MSgww6rGVQDLYqr62KTXp9Q83101zJD8xWckEXucOzHABdKzuUs82Ux4B050HMs_qYVRSVowBidu6WDYA8gja0wqdzHrkzGFqLB-voVLneNI2eecTR0c01znSIE3XHpDaFG5WiU5eIOlBb6nlVlDQuWyCV9W3YVRj562AWXATd_z4FQsAVzBz7k85ydtmj0SQ9s7qvLDImQIMekjG_1ze5fLQOCRPgZlZbXj6p4pStl_iGbSIIj131tg%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=97fa4bd5e8a8408fbc5a5673c73af746&_e=jpj2WVkKk8a8n4lvdLluU3cfnufwhwbAF8hPX6KUfqgQJFpl3cfJ5stUjI0XbyXthGR65hC7arQzw9YZyM70gjSnN7PavqQj8PFuDNcKMpcA6nW2fMKZ97SkMg31-tWia6FceQi5_hJrefksYHFauDzmy8aO_-MSgww6rGVQDLYqr62KTXp9Q83101zJD8xWckEXucOzHABdKzuUs82Ux4B050HMs_qYVRSVowBidu72MYTlTqcT3uu4E76RomHmbu-tPvJAX0x1zp2t8VAyFzdpU1s490JnrU41kg-w53EJtc99fihNNCVYnfYjIYY1zF5Y_Cp0VM_PHSD30QoSOb38f5N1X3KI2aV8vzBCyUohtDVLM35Io6i_Dh17Q-sMQcPAh6LAxzT9EQ75L8smwQ%3D%3D)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=97fa4bd5e8a8408fbc5a5673c73af746&_e=jpj2WVkKk8a8n4lvdLluU3cfnufwhwbAF8hPX6KUfqgQJFpl3cfJ5stUjI0XbyXthGR65hC7arQzw9YZyM70gjSnN7PavqQj8PFuDNcKMpcA6nW2fMKZ97SkMg31-tWia6FceQi5_hJrefksYHFauDzmy8aO_-MSgww6rGVQDLYqr62KTXp9Q83101zJD8xWckEXucOzHABdKzuUs82Ux4B050HMs_qYVRSVowBidu6dftPQFTMDbKTq_K4e-2b_b0ai3CKZdSucvvfixmKqz-oitmFUMtnTaapfSp6010GwT_iK1ffCQnMPWn1doi8rnG2iCBhTbSj36ZGvw69mUrT31mVhOj31wgnWYsIt1hosSD5lHKy61v2vnBN4df_pYRUCqwqZhqRkHhqKLOKtfQ%3D%3D)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=97fa4bd5e8a8408fbc5a5673c73af746&_e=jpj2WVkKk8a8n4lvdLluU3cfnufwhwbAF8hPX6KUfqgQJFpl3cfJ5stUjI0XbyXthGR65hC7arQzw9YZyM70gjSnN7PavqQj8PFuDNcKMpcA6nW2fMKZ97SkMg31-tWia6FceQi5_hJrefksYHFauDzmy8aO_-MSgww6rGVQDLYqr62KTXp9Q83101zJD8xWckEXucOzHABdKzuUs82Ux4B050HMs_qYVRSVowBidu4wiS_sqYlmrJVJ0jZ_OG6sI7o8NL9aFhu_Reyf91JycWeS97rnysBv3qU4RdyTE0rVmJpKSfeq6_DEoCTsz76jAsyJo5vgT8MO3gq6lg3mkZAYWa3pVF58jEjsxIKXA4e726Oo_XyazdIlblO8mzFr2KmzKdJK0cO2tJ5aYqSSjA%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=97fa4bd5e8a8408fbc5a5673c73af746&_e=jpj2WVkKk8a8n4lvdLluU3cfnufwhwbAF8hPX6KUfqgQJFpl3cfJ5stUjI0XbyXthGR65hC7arQzw9YZyM70gjSnN7PavqQj8PFuDNcKMpcA6nW2fMKZ97SkMg31-tWia6FceQi5_hJrefksYHFauDzmy8aO_-MSgww6rGVQDLYqr62KTXp9Q83101zJD8xWckEXucOzHABdKzuUs82Ux4B050HMs_qYVRSVowBidu5KwKLRXR_WV3ESSxnuOx8bMuDbcYBZGcT8Z2nvh_1r3pm-kB0O0ZqdXfqCD309O0vmdlh1qNvAxyc-oXMh4axvq9wS_X6t9SZNGyuq2uCyrNEnEbHiad3SZh28NHYLzM0cXVAYjQ1F64_wyHwGP40T6XMSp9FBFs_Z_EcMqM7POg%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.

That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong.
