name: Bob Casey HQ
subject: Fighting for our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Pennsylvania is on the frontlines of the fight for voting rights.
Pennsylvania’s Senate race **is not over.** We need your help to re-elect Bob Casey. **[Donate now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84332?refcode=em20241119-8677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8677%2E614464%2ErYPnhs)**
---
If we’re going to protect our fundamental freedoms, we must re-elect Bob Casey. Bob has always stood up for women’s rights, workers’ rights, and voting rights — and he’s not going to stop now.
Our democracy only works when every voice is heard. As tens of thousands of votes are still being counted across the Commonwealth, we need the resources to fight back against efforts to disenfranchise Pennsylvania voters.
**[So please, split whatever you can between Bob Casey’s campaign and Lucas Kunce today so we can keep up the fight to protect voting rights and our democracy.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84332?refcode=em20241119-8677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8677%2E614464%2ErYPnhs)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84333?refcode=em20241119-8677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=8677%2E614464%2ErYPnhs) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84333?refcode=em20241119-8677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=8677%2E614464%2ErYPnhs) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84333?refcode=em20241119-8677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=8677%2E614464%2ErYPnhs) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84333?refcode=em20241119-8677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=8677%2E614464%2ErYPnhs) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84333?refcode=em20241119-8677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=8677%2E614464%2ErYPnhs) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84333?refcode=em20241119-8677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=8677%2E614464%2ErYPnhs) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84332?refcode=em20241119-8677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=8677%2E614464%2ErYPnhs)

body:
This is Senator-elect Tim Sheehy, Friend.

I wanted to personally thank you for everything you did to help Republicans take back the Senate. With your support, we won in Montana and across the country.

_We 've ensured that President Trump will have an America First Senate Majority -- and I'm ready to get to work when it comes to passing his agenda._

**[But there's a hitch, Friend. Before we can do that, we have one more fight we need to win.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/PO6QFbCc3xDcNhbo7W7qYg~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpIGXUP0TpaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3BhLXJlY291bnQtYmF0dGxlcy10cy1hZWRnZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlZGdlX25yc2NfQUxGJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTExOF9uYV9yYy1sZWdhbGZ1bmQtc2hlZWh5bnJzYy12MV9BTEZfdHNoZWVoeV9ucnNjJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWZ1bmRyYWlzaW5nJmFtdHBvc2l0aW9uPTQmYW10ND0xMDAmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWVXA3NwY0IKZzsrVD1n748ydlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8mplf9rvhg1sfgd1c4vdq301vb5ku1epg9od5r8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1ie9pr5c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgcs145p5ugd5rihlkbc5t6ifrkig5iakv98hjl0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1ie9pr5c1h2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z64rd83jivtg3s8dk89584ppec7vi4lh3hq0dq4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1ie9pr5c1h2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z26f9m4ive1gvbf6gkl589akv3nkcpf4it5khsb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob2c9h2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zqbphborgjubno73hkua5m3sri0nglkt0j0s0838_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob2c9h2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zcors3m50dm53tridt1l39cmffiehrdglfib9qoo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob2c9h2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zsjr5m241460quhca0cehvarf5k43nsuf19uhldg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob2c9h2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Can you think of a $44 billion joke?
body:
When Elon Musk bought Twitter, he sent me a DM that said, “Do you want the Babylon Bee restored? There will be no censorship of humor.”

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zb34art2n88okp0gumuorjlqi0dc6mh3hrje4bbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob6cjh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend, When Elon Musk bought Twitter, he sent me a DM that said, "Do you want the Babylon Bee restored? There will be no censorship of humor."
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqjiq1hu45878lm2962os3mrqvk5elub8c69e7rg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob6cjh2bs)
---
We've been trying to write a joke worth $44 billion ever since. But, in all seriousness - free speech is no joke (not even a multibillion dollar one). The Bee would know - not only did Twitter deplatform us, but other woke Big Tech firms have tried to silence our voice as well.
---
* **Facebook** has deleted our posts and deactivated our account on several occasions.
* **Front** , our internal email service at the time, terminated our account and left us unable to communicate with each other and wider world.
* And, in a particularly ironic move, **Vimeo** permanently suspended the David Horowitz Freedom Center's account because they posted a talk **I gave on censorship. **

---
**It 's clear woke, left-wing tech elitists can't abide by satire that dares mock their progressive orthodoxy**. We're not the only attempted victims of their censorship regime, either. They've gone after our First Amendment ally Musk, too - Disney, Apple, IBM, and Sony are just some of the companies who have pulled their advertising from X to protest the fact that it platforms the Bee and others accused of "wrongthink." All this amounts to a sustained, coordinated attack on free thought and expression. These pillars are central to our mission of speaking truth through humor. **No matter how much pressure they exert, the Bee will never back down. Free speech is worth more than whatever they can take from us**. To people with integrity, like Musk, principles are worth more than money. **But we won 't give them what they want. **We won't stop telling jokes. More importantly, we won't stop telling the _truth_.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zp9chkb6q9scrom7l8v5ggjb88bfsp4lnu88a8c0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob6cjh2bs)
---
Sure, you may be thinking, a billionaire like Musk can afford to take the hit when radical Leftists try to force X into conformity and submission. That's what we thought, too, but we noticed something in the midst of the censorship campaigns waged against us - we had a superpower progressives couldn't see. And that's our subscribers. **The Bee could not have taken the stand it did against Twitter if we did not have the support of each and every subscriber**. These are people who appreciate humor, yes, but also believe in free speech. Who appreciate debate, dialogue, and discovering new ideas. **[If that sounds like you, I hope you'll consider subscribing to the Babylon Bee. We'd love to have you in the fight for freedom of expression.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd1l59esutr5apadvopb8d0hk0j3i9sn56ldedq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob6cjh2bs)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfndia863gkrufq2qovhtn0j9760kavb8vj9db7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob6cjh2bs)
---
They can hurt us, smear us, reduce our reach; but they can never silence us with free speech supporters like you in our corner. **[Join the fray with us by becoming a Babylon Bee premium subscriber today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zs90prm87f7sdt1e44m2i90tvojohrhfm9bps8rg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob6cjh2bs)** Thanks for considering standing with us. We'll stand with you, too.
---
Seth Dillon
CEO | The Babylon Bee
Pronouns: Bee and Beeself
---
|
---
_Copyright(C) 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved._
**Our mailing address is:**
The Babylon Bee, LLC

Jupiter, FL 33468

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb9klk86u9pve1cnai8nmlgimsmiiol0h2jcdvrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob6c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdsepflph0pgro79cdgst8es9fp6lsr4e76q3bk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob6c3h2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zckalc5i3lh27i2tnjooja75sl4l0tii9k3ivcd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob6c3h2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq75fcav7g7bg4p1cqs70biqssuljvq27vgp79bg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob6c3h2bs)

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Can you think of a $44 billion joke?
body:
When Elon Musk bought Twitter

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za7u6nvlfcie7ca8c6ojish9me8hpaqehfeu0hjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob1cdh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend, When Elon Musk bought Twitter, he sent me a DM that said, "Do you want the Babylon Bee restored? There will be no censorship of humor."
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc8vqonui4q0ib60q393s9e4am5ki156k6ukd6ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob1cdh2bs)
---
We've been trying to write a joke worth $44 billion ever since. But, in all seriousness - free speech is no joke (not even a multibillion dollar one). The Bee would know - not only did Twitter deplatform us, but other woke Big Tech firms have tried to silence our voice as well.
---
* **Facebook** has deleted our posts and deactivated our account on several occasions.
* **Front** , our internal email service at the time, terminated our account and left us unable to communicate with each other and wider world.
* And, in a particularly ironic move, **Vimeo** permanently suspended the David Horowitz Freedom Center's account because they posted a talk **I gave on censorship. **

---
**It 's clear woke, left-wing tech elitists can't abide by satire that dares mock their progressive orthodoxy**. We're not the only attempted victims of their censorship regime, either. They've gone after our First Amendment ally Musk, too - Disney, Apple, IBM, and Sony are just some of the companies who have pulled their advertising from X to protest the fact that it platforms the Bee and others accused of "wrongthink." All this amounts to a sustained, coordinated attack on free thought and expression. These pillars are central to our mission of speaking truth through humor. **No matter how much pressure they exert, the Bee will never back down. Free speech is worth more than whatever they can take from us**. To people with integrity, like Musk, principles are worth more than money. **But we won 't give them what they want. **We won't stop telling jokes. More importantly, we won't stop telling the _truth_.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbaupfhogn4h70p1n1keis937tsk483lesatieb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob1cdh2bs)
---
Sure, you may be thinking, a billionaire like Musk can afford to take the hit when radical Leftists try to force X into conformity and submission. That's what we thought, too, but we noticed something in the midst of the censorship campaigns waged against us - we had a superpower progressives couldn't see. And that's our subscribers. **The Bee could not have taken the stand it did against Twitter if we did not have the support of each and every subscriber**. These are people who appreciate humor, yes, but also believe in free speech. Who appreciate debate, dialogue, and discovering new ideas. **[If that sounds like you, I hope you'll consider subscribing to the Babylon Bee. We'd love to have you in the fight for freedom of expression.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zenh2v18r11qe8tcutcfd6ulg8jqmbdel9hlje0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob1cdh2bs)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zovi8h19sef6d6071o7u26loeikkm1ob3le6fsf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob1cdh2bs)
---
They can hurt us, smear us, reduce our reach; but they can never silence us with free speech supporters like you in our corner. **[Join the fray with us by becoming a Babylon Bee premium subscriber today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zofr019re3kt1jheam41l785g24jgp7qn9rsiqg8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg60ob1cdh2bs)** Thanks for considering standing with us. We'll stand with you, too.
---
Seth Dillon
CEO | The Babylon Bee
Pronouns: Bee and Beeself
---
|
---
_Copyright(C) 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved._
**Our mailing address is:**
The Babylon Bee, LLC
PO Box 546
Jupiter, FL 33468
---

GOP Presidential

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Participate in our national CRT Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze8ar4oil14m926pi3nk3dfe3a0hb3mjlg1gvdfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg64oj6clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm0aopm716t5ikcfuim334lisioi5llhc3q8nb6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg64oj6clh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z82pimb6okk9uk5lgdd50bmlvtga2ve6451m9k38_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg64oj6clh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0pm0qck862pfc5tcuke7ca20fogugi9un6qdps8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg64oj6clh2bs)
---
| |
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood has done enough
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi7f42igkc3pm0julpkb5uavet07fj0okiaijp18_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg62o32clh2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq1hqk4246r88jtgmckpl04mqdqjf061setl0o8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg62o32clh2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1pecn7jmabkj7puilfs5v9s98db5orjn64plgto_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg62o32clh2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsrn34gg4kfukhv0cvnas4uuoec3o4qkangdtl90_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg62o32clh2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6pc8emc8kr676ope685ht33f7bu8dv0u08s99c0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg62o32clh2bs)

But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you** all ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron**Actor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmc1k880r7dkphap2v5ccna0ktjlo5nccmiudmdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg62o34c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znlb2bie08nkpu67rsk8eab8cvmjuba26r9jr2h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg62o34c5h2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3437g08p2i7mjo3njfef4s3rl98nqjmkltubc08_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg62o34c5h2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3uai5sg79pindauoqd9akfph8kme11f9i6k4b0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chg62o34c5h2bs)

# **[J.K. Rowling Slams John Oliver For Supporting Trans Athletes](http://trk.libertyledger.-QKe6nIEmNhfsLTeQIHw)**

> **The Left wants to ERASE me** and _**ERASE this bill**_. But with YOUR support, we can make history.
> Time is running out, will you stand with me?

subject: Know Your Rights
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsqvPAtWdN

If you take a step back and look at global events through the
lens of someone who isn't a Christian,

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osqvPAtWdN

Hello
Friend,
The Book
of Revelation can be one of the most challenging books of the
Bible to understand, but its message is critical for every
believer. That's why I've created Final Conquest: A
Verse-by-Verse Study of the Book of Revelation-a clear and
accessible guide that breaks down complex prophecies into
practical, easy-to-understand insights.

This
resource is designed exclusively for those who want to deepen
their understanding of the end times and live with greater
purpose in light of Christ's return. Whether you've studied
Revelation before or are approaching it for the first time, Final
Conquest offers clarity on what's to come and how to prepare your
heart for the future.
As the
Senior Pastor of First Baptist Dallas and Pathway to Victory,
I've spent years studying and teaching through Revelation,
ensuring that this book is both biblically sound and grounded in
trustworthy scholarship. You can be confident that Final Conquest
will provide a credible and reliable exploration of the final
book of the Bible.

For your
gift of any amount to Pathway to Victory, I'd be honored to send
you this exclusive resource. It's an invaluable tool that will
help you navigate the future with confidence and hope, all while
deepening your walk with Christ.

Request
your copy here:
https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1

Thank you
for joining us in sharing the truth of God's Word. Together, we
can help others live with clarity and purpose as we look forward
to Christ's return.

Sharing
the truth of God's Word,
Dr.
Robert Jeffress

name: Amanda Chase
subject: CORRECTION: BREAKING NEWS Details for the Senate District Special Election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
| | | | (as of 11/19/24) SPECIAL ELECTION TO BE HELD
WHEN? TUES, DEC 12, 2024
WHERE? to be determined
---
---
| Well folks, Never send out an email late at night without allowing your staff to check your email. My apologies. Lesson learned. My sincerest apologies for the confusion on the date in my last email. But it's about to get more confusing, so please stay with me.
Please save the date for the evening of Tuesday, December 12.
IN ADDITION....
Please also save the date for Saturday, December 14, which is the date we are trying to get the Special Election changed to, so that more people can participate. This is common sense and allows more opportunity for We the People to vote, not just party activists.
Many of you have asked, who are the people on this Senate District 10 Committee who are making the decisions on this Special Election for Republicans? The names are on the Republican Party of Virginia website but we have included a link withe their emails for your convenience. Click[ here](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jXkuv9wULK0EzNSLhl91LzUK27ij3pAbk16QUU9sPMeO_vn-Ivopx1Pmt9v84_XlzudAMSLtkluVnnxhor0q9CdWFpqF_ismk-dV8ir2Q_anpJbbMusC4_4nBlRaa-3xG9rQpfxBbDEzZV4za5TIpEtLGdHdeV38Zqh69oQics0lHXoOxGXfKg==&c=p7bzpcXd2L3Shn571kLVQzEa6ubjw-bgtkNuU2cTfbGrr1gQ2WpPdg==&ch=1pJrR4du5x4k-TagTRwKbc6cJv7jOZPtzw1DjHoaZ2LMN1f2wHtQwg==) or you can simply click the links below by county.
For those who missed my midnight email last night. Here's the corrected email. I've highlighted the error and changed "November 22" to "December 22." My hope is that the date will ultimately change to a Saturday, so that the majority of people can vote.
### I finally have some news for you.
Tonight, the Senate District 10 Committee chose to have a Republican Mass Meeting on Thursday, December ~~22~~ with registration beginning at 5:30pm, with only those in line by 6:30pm being eligible to vote.
My concern is that most working people will be driving home from work on a weekday and unable to participate in the Special Election.
It was brought to my attention that many of the hunters in Senate District 10 did not want a Special Election on Saturdays, because that's when they hunt.
While I am all for hunters, I believe we should adopt a firehouse primary on a Saturday like they did in Loudoun County in the 32nd district. That seemed to work and they already have their candidate.
Instead, the senate 10 District Committee chose a Republican Mass meeting instead of a Firehouse primary. So now, instead of simply casting your vote at a location in your county and then leaving, you drive a distance to one location and then have to stick around until your candidate wins with 50 percent plus one.
With 6 candidates in the race, this is going to take awhile, folks.
My experience is that most of these mass meetings last hours, unless a candidate wins on the first ballot.
Will you please commit to voting for me no matter what obstacle comes our way?
Your commitment on this one day will determine who represents you in the Virginia Senate for the next 3 years.
I truly hope this committee has a change of heart.
As of tonight, they didn't have a location for us to publish so that we could get the word out to you.
The Senate District 10 committee is scheduled to have a 2nd meeting on Tuesday, November 26 at 6pm at the Goochland County Administration Building.
I truly hope Republican leadership intervenes before we have hundreds of people try to participate in the process and instead are turned away. We need to avoid that at all cost. We want to grow the Republican Party.
This is exactly why I voted to make these confusing party processes that limit voter participation and frustrate voters illegal. I was successful. Effective this past July, these practices were made illegal with the exception of Special Elections.
The Senate District 10 Committee chose a Republican Mass Meeting. This is similar to the Republican Convention that many of you participated in 2023, only there are no speeches and you don't have to fill out and turn in paperwork to participate in voting. You must simply be a registered voter.
The first candidate running who receives 50% plus one percent of the votes is declared the winner. So there could potentially be multiple rounds of voting to declare victory.
If the choice to have a Republican Mass Meeting is sustained, you may want to pack some snacks, water and even a lunch. It's such a small price to pay for our freedom.
My hope is that enough of my supporters come out to vote so that we win on the first round of voting. So please share the word about the Special Election with all of you conservative neighbors and friends who live in Senate District 10, so the process goes more quickly.
Senate District 10 includes Amelia, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Hanover, Powhatan and the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico County.
As many of you know, I've always supported primaries, because they allow voters to quickly cast their vote and then be on their way. However, that option is not available with Special Elections. The next best option is a firehouse primary. You vote and then leave. No speeches. No waiting around. It's the method closest to a General Election Primary.
---
|
---
We the People made a difference in November and now we have an opportunity to make a difference in December.
As it stands, f you would like to vote for me, you:
1. Must live in Senate District 10
2. Be a registered voter
3. Be willing to drive to the voting location to be determined on November 26 by the Senate committee, which is hopefully centrally located in Senate District 10.
4. Know that after you vote the first time, we really need you to stick around if you can through the last round of voting.
5. Just bring your driver's license to vote.

Most importantly, please stay tuned. My experience with party processes is that the information changes continually. So from now through our Republican Special Election, please be vigilant about checking your emails so you will have the most recent information.

---
|

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Amanda Chase
subject: CORRECTION: BREAKING NEWS Details for the Senate District Special Election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
| | | | (as of 11/19/24) SPECIAL ELECTION TO BE HELD
WHEN? THURS, DEC 12, 2024
WHERE? to be determined
---
---
| Well folks, Never send out an email late at night without allowing your staff to check your email. My apologies. Lesson learned. My sincerest apologies for the confusion on the date in my last email. But it's about to get more confusing, so please stay with me.
Please save the date for the evening of Thursday, December 12.
IN ADDITION....
Please also save the date for Saturday, December 14, which is the date we are trying to get the Special Election changed to, so that more people can participate. This is common sense and allows more opportunity for We the People to vote, not just party activists.
Many of you have asked, who are the people on this Senate District 10 Committee who are making the decisions on this Special Election for Republicans? The names are on the Republican Party of Virginia website but we have included a link withe their emails for your convenience. Click[ here](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dq7ysQs3kTPreTrafpIdE0bLrZCRkjyDT6rG9WF3sUNu_nLBinH2ThZRBuquavEtN_bGI-AdMuFWMyrij-mxOKqSUze0HcUM0CpAVlxsEtrJ8YT2xR1fSIyeJac42VTwl4k0GXD2V5sYXAFKZLV78Ue_Q0lpCi_DANEcTbPntC9T2gSqexZX_Q==&c=1IAd8J5K0HJNueUSoqxA9LOMFpkuOO_UnDiTZpyj2bDjp_kBQWOyXw==&ch=3fW4_bZiGmnmPVzPBb5NH2JuMHkSCPjDhCb6gmdgZb7xMTz_Nxt7lw==) or you can simply click the links below by county.
For those who missed my midnight email last night. Here's the corrected email. I've highlighted the error and changed to "December 12." My hope is that the date will ultimately change to a Saturday, so that the majority of people can vote.
### I finally have some news for you.
Tonight, the Senate District 10 Committee chose to have a Republican Mass Meeting on Thursday, December 12 with registration beginning at 5:30pm, with only those in line by 6:30pm being eligible to vote.
My concern is that most working people will be driving home from work on a weekday and unable to participate in the Special Election.
It was brought to my attention that many of the hunters in Senate District 10 did not want a Special Election on Saturdays, because that's when they hunt.
While I am all for hunters, I believe we should adopt a firehouse primary on a Saturday like they did in Loudoun County in the 32nd district. That seemed to work and they already have their candidate.
Instead, the senate 10 District Committee chose a Republican Mass meeting instead of a Firehouse primary. So now, instead of simply casting your vote at a location in your county and then leaving, you drive a distance to one location and then have to stick around until your candidate wins with 50 percent plus one.
With 6 candidates in the race, this is going to take awhile, folks.
My experience is that most of these mass meetings last hours, unless a candidate wins on the first ballot.
Will you please commit to voting for me no matter what obstacle comes our way?
Your commitment on this one day will determine who represents you in the Virginia Senate for the next 3 years.
I truly hope this committee has a change of heart.
As of tonight, they didn't have a location for us to publish so that we could get the word out to you.
The Senate District 10 committee is scheduled to have a 2nd meeting on Tuesday, November 26 at 6pm at the Goochland County Administration Building.
I truly hope Republican leadership intervenes before we have hundreds of people try to participate in the process and instead are turned away. We need to avoid that at all cost. We want to grow the Republican Party.
This is exactly why I voted to make these confusing party processes that limit voter participation and frustrate voters illegal. I was successful. Effective this past July, these practices were made illegal with the exception of Special Elections.
The Senate District 10 Committee chose a Republican Mass Meeting. This is similar to the Republican Convention that many of you participated in 2023, only there are no speeches and you don't have to fill out and turn in paperwork to participate in voting. You must simply be a registered voter.
The first candidate running who receives 50% plus one percent of the votes is declared the winner. So there could potentially be multiple rounds of voting to declare victory.
If the choice to have a Republican Mass Meeting is sustained, you may want to pack some snacks, water and even a lunch. It's such a small price to pay for our freedom.
My hope is that enough of my supporters come out to vote so that we win on the first round of voting. So please share the word about the Special Election with all of you conservative neighbors and friends who live in Senate District 10, so the process goes more quickly.
Senate District 10 includes Amelia, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Hanover, Powhatan and the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico County.
As many of you know, I've always supported primaries, because they allow voters to quickly cast their vote and then be on their way. However, that option is not available with Special Elections. The next best option is a firehouse primary. You vote and then leave. No speeches. No waiting around. It's the method closest to a General Election Primary.
---
|
---
We the People made a difference in November and now we have an opportunity to make a difference in December.
As it stands, f you would like to vote for me, you:
1. Must live in Senate District 10
2. Be a registered voter
3. Be willing to drive to the voting location to be determined on November 26 by the Senate committee, which is hopefully centrally located in Senate District 10.
4. Know that after you vote the first time, we really need you to stick around if you can through the last round of voting.
5. Just bring your driver's license to vote.

Most importantly, please stay tuned. My experience with party processes is that the information changes continually. So from now through our Republican Special Election, please be vigilant about checking your emails so you will have the most recent information.

---
|

THURS, DEC 12, 2024 WHERE? to be determined | Well folks, Never send out an email late at night without allowing your staff to check your email. My apologies. Lesson learned. My sincerest apologies for the confusion on the date in my last email. But it's about to get more confusing, so please stay with me. Please save the date for the evening of Thursday, December 12. IN ADDITION.... Please also save the date for Saturday, December 14, which is the date we are trying to get the Special Election changed to, so that more people can participate. This is common sense and allows more opportunity for We the People to vote, not just party activists. Many of you have asked, who are the people on this Senate District 10 Committee who are making the decisions on this Special Election for Republicans? The names are on the Republican Party of Virginia website but we have included a link withe their emails for your convenience. Click== or you can simply click the links below by county. For those who missed my midnight email last night. Here's the corrected email. I've highlighted the error and changed to "December 12." My hope is that the date will ultimately change to a Saturday, so that the majority of people can vote. I finally have some news for you. Tonight, the Senate District 10 Committee chose to have a Republican Mass Meeting on Thursday, December 12 with registration beginning at 5:30pm, with only those in line by 6:30pm being eligible to vote. My concern is that most working people will be driving home from work on a weekday and unable to participate in the Special Election. It was brought to my attention that many of the hunters in Senate District 10 did not want a Special Election on Saturdays, because that's when they hunt. While I am all for hunters, I believe we should adopt a firehouse primary on a Saturday like they did in Loudoun County in the 32nd district. That seemed to work and they already have their candidate. Instead, the senate 10 District Committee chose a Republican Mass meeting instead of a Firehouse primary. So now, instead of simply casting your vote at a location in your county and then leaving, you drive a distance to one location and then have to stick around until your candidate wins with 50 percent plus one. With 6 candidates in the race, this is going to take awhile, folks. My experience is that most of these mass meetings last hours, unless a candidate wins on the first ballot. Will you please commit to voting for me no matter what obstacle comes our way? Your commitment on this one day will determine who represents you in the Virginia Senate for the next 3 years. I truly hope this committee has a change of heart. As of tonight, they didn't have a location for us to publish so that we could get the word out to you. The Senate District 10 committee is scheduled to have a 2nd meeting on Tuesday, November 26 at 6pm at the Goochland County Administration Building. I truly hope Republican leadership intervenes before we have hundreds of people try to participate in the process and instead are turned away. We need to avoid that at all cost. We want to grow the Republican Party. This is exactly why I voted to make these confusing party processes that limit voter participation and frustrate voters illegal. I was successful. Effective this past July, these practices were made illegal with the exception of Special Elections. The Senate District 10 Committee chose a Republican Mass Meeting. This is similar to the Republican Convention that many of you participated in 2023, only there are no speeches and you don't have to fill out and turn in paperwork to participate in voting. You must simply be a registered voter. The first candidate running who receives 50% plus one percent of the votes is declared the winner. So there could potentially be multiple rounds of voting to declare victory. If the choice to have a Republican Mass Meeting is sustained, you may want to pack some snacks, water and even a lunch. It's such a small price to pay for our freedom. My hope is that enough of my supporters come out to vote so that we win on the first round of voting. So please share the word about the Special Election with all of you conservative neighbors and friends who live in Senate District 10, so the process goes more quickly. Senate District 10 includes Amelia, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Hanover, Powhatan and the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico County. As many of you know, I've always supported primaries, because they allow voters to quickly cast their vote and then be on their way. However, that option is not available with Special Elections. The next best option is a firehouse primary. You vote and then leave. No speeches. No waiting around. It's the method closest to a General Election Primary. | We the People made a difference in November and now we have an opportunity to make a difference in December. As it stands, f you would like to vote for me, you: 1. Must live in Senate District 10 2. Be a registered voter 3. Be willing to drive to the voting location to be determined on November 26 by the Senate committee, which is hopefully centrally located in Senate District 10. 4. Know that after you vote the first time, we really need you to stick around if you can through the last round of voting. 5. Just bring your driver's license to vote. Most importantly, please stay tuned. My experience with party processes is that the information changes continually. So from now through our Republican Special Election, please be vigilant about checking your emails so you will have the most recent information. | SENATE DISTRICT 10 COMMITTEE | | mailto:reatwilliams@gmail.com | | mailto:phillipamiss@gmail.com | mailto:robin.wolfskill@protonmail.com | | mailto:ramonachristian862@gmail.com | mailto:gopccrc@gmail.com | mailto:dianacshores@gmail.com | mailto:dbyers203@gmail.com | mailto:buddy.bishop@1791.com | mailto:newsletter@hanovergop.com | mailto:unitchairman@henrico.gop | mailto:louisacountygop@gmail.com | mailto:Robinsonadavid@gmail.com | MORE INFORMATION HERE: | == | | == | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811 | Midlothian, VA 23112 US | | | | | |

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zcr887mpQj2Vt4_zujlbcw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIEiwP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyMFcDc3BjQgpnO9qwPWf4RAtxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zcr887mpQj2Vt4_zujlbcw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIEiwP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyMFcDc3BjQgpnO9qwPWf4RAtxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zcr887mpQj2Vt4_zujlbcw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIEiwP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyMFcDc3BjQgpnO9qwPWf4RAtxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zcr887mpQj2Vt4_zujlbcw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIEiwP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyMFcDc3BjQgpnO9qwPWf4RAtxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/m-8D1IQNOW7XuUcEjQd5pg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIEiwP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmc72rA9Z_hEC3FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ycOZek_EdEtAlNzIC8-Eeg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIEiwP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnO9qwPWf4RAtxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. Team Mace, 824 S. Milledge Ave., Ste. 101, Athens, GA, 30605 Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c5aff57fccc94277b6cf256a93b6059d&_e=G8G2ZZy5HUKHt3Etr56FO1PmwWSJDcmyXoikNqtrJ0IY8lPvNNhc_vIm0TC5Kr2_AQc22QoX2Pw4NGkXDaQxzAdU5qc6VEsKTPFthMQ3vAjysswfo9EqYw05xlGisqBwoY30iVdGvbYfKx-jq7x48IZR9xQyUqPoz1GEb7n49Wi-brBWbM4sy90b3TwVdehzpCdoI5Yqob_vYX0hw8abVvQ6TjoBsk-152BxAdV0rn2cK_-oCof5VIx63-Y8kELP4IJNM8lwkfq6XuMVncVA7zmW1A61_cOB4dnA3ycsRaSTcjNUA6qfoCu-WfOo81LLvbt7PnVJlhllNhLcYgSS09kAT28zObOt1SH_nHTSA0FSMF2_ttonn8K9z2lm_-_C)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c5aff57fccc94277b6cf256a93b6059d&_e=G8G2ZZy5HUKHt3Etr56FO1PmwWSJDcmyXoikNqtrJ0IY8lPvNNhc_vIm0TC5Kr2_AQc22QoX2Pw4NGkXDaQxzAdU5qc6VEsKTPFthMQ3vAjysswfo9EqYw05xlGisqBwoY30iVdGvbYfKx-jq7x48IZR9xQyUqPoz1GEb7n49Wi-brBWbM4sy90b3TwVdehzpCdoI5Yqob_vYX0hw8abVvQ6TjoBsk-152BxAdV0rn3VUiOVNLzk_ZTHuOi-iTTw75Rjnrq3hU0ujss_moenEtKTAvBbUtnTYlyeXzvSpqcwcS_-Wm78STJhn0hR9743U4EbH2QnB3WX74lxr29weye8JCWtLdyaU1UaZuoIMAx82r6a8LhH_cLM11DrDKpq)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c5aff57fccc94277b6cf256a93b6059d&_e=G8G2ZZy5HUKHt3Etr56FO1PmwWSJDcmyXoikNqtrJ0IY8lPvNNhc_vIm0TC5Kr2_AQc22QoX2Pw4NGkXDaQxzAdU5qc6VEsKTPFthMQ3vAjysswfo9EqYw05xlGisqBwoY30iVdGvbYfKx-jq7x48IZR9xQyUqPoz1GEb7n49Wi-brBWbM4sy90b3TwVdehzpCdoI5Yqob_vYX0hw8abVvQ6TjoBsk-152BxAdV0rn2lib3KjqQWAqsHXzH0fL72uwMq9hi_fbp-v_VayFgCJm9eB1bzGNaRlXrnwSiaha1dtjxL4L5aUMm1mxtCbyCWFlKNe5Ofcx5w6lSSnrNH0XXk5twgFL4q0J1-Gt44PbvwkJyzZt6DfNdxgBoqWFaJ)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c5aff57fccc94277b6cf256a93b6059d&_e=G8G2ZZy5HUKHt3Etr56FO1PmwWSJDcmyXoikNqtrJ0IY8lPvNNhc_vIm0TC5Kr2_AQc22QoX2Pw4NGkXDaQxzAdU5qc6VEsKTPFthMQ3vAjysswfo9EqYw05xlGisqBwoY30iVdGvbYfKx-jq7x48IZR9xQyUqPoz1GEb7n49Wi-brBWbM4sy90b3TwVdehzpCdoI5Yqob_vYX0hw8abVvQ6TjoBsk-152BxAdV0rn33L9Ar2sqYQepBoueSO94aPn_C7TvVQuF-DtcEK8eSb3OAokNYj9xZ-RxiAdWyFPaJROsDVTq4cCJXiEbmt4PipuQVCqVW_NvznX2aopE2UQFbgGVqZPq6dqVNqluzae42NY1OlCuz-70HID81EzTo)
---

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Can you think of a $44 billion joke?
body:
It’s clear woke, left-wing tech elitists can’t abide by satire that dares mock their progressive orthodoxy.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=48a84a5a1964463c91d2facc90ec4e29&_e=sDOnP26Ic8F8i-ZEX9DzOkRe-2VVLcM-GVCtBdkKLiCk3jEMbbNimXitqKCa8wiEm8UpNkdffNIhXMEUCg604GsbzTsjmP4_EtP6ij4fxvxAjbICQ82fjEYyTZCYAzoUWWHmMD3wII7FxF-rdQGWIF23XAGMUr3gwhleqLdktzsRmvgWAVuj7l80bedVJW679c6O8zIjlZ9v1uVMRXpEgUAJWGqarF06JPfRKjbwkS9WyPBcQF37IqgJx91foNi8YYEuZUNhh76SJKLIz4AbaQ%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Friend, When Elon Musk bought Twitter, he sent me a DM that said, "Do you want the Babylon Bee restored? There will be no censorship of humor."
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=48a84a5a1964463c91d2facc90ec4e29&_e=sDOnP26Ic8F8i-ZEX9DzOkRe-2VVLcM-GVCtBdkKLiCk3jEMbbNimXitqKCa8wiEm8UpNkdffNIhXMEUCg604GsbzTsjmP4_EtP6ij4fxvxAjbICQ82fjEYyTZCYAzoUw-4aAH9tGTTADSowiWxac6Y6p_NMeobPgbp66CMnDUCXEVI2VhrbD2DJ6K-a42ubQeOG126hjksMvqYUIijSaFI3OzF1ux1WZGL4MPY9CU1JERu-gLe48jqrmamIbEqA2SqtyC51vNcTOz4dMkPl0w%3D%3D)
---
We've been trying to write a joke worth $44 billion ever since. But, in all seriousness - free speech is no joke (not even a multibillion dollar one). The Bee would know - not only did Twitter deplatform us, but other woke Big Tech firms have tried to silence our voice as well.
---
* **Facebook** has deleted our posts and deactivated our account on several occasions.
* **Front** , our internal email service at the time, terminated our account and left us unable to communicate with each other and wider world.
* And, in a particularly ironic move, **Vimeo** permanently suspended the David Horowitz Freedom Center's account because they posted a talk **I gave on censorship. **

---
**It 's clear woke, left-wing tech elitists can't abide by satire that dares mock their progressive orthodoxy**. We're not the only attempted victims of their censorship regime, either. They've gone after our First Amendment ally Musk, too - Disney, Apple, IBM, and Sony are just some of the companies who have pulled their advertising from X to protest the fact that it platforms the Bee and others accused of "wrongthink." All this amounts to a sustained, coordinated attack on free thought and expression. These pillars are central to our mission of speaking truth through humor. **No matter how much pressure they exert, the Bee will never back down. Free speech is worth more than whatever they can take from us**. To people with integrity, like Musk, principles are worth more than money. **But we won 't give them what they want. **We won't stop telling jokes. More importantly, we won't stop telling the _truth_.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=48a84a5a1964463c91d2facc90ec4e29&_e=sDOnP26Ic8F8i-ZEX9DzOkRe-2VVLcM-GVCtBdkKLiCk3jEMbbNimXitqKCa8wiEm8UpNkdffNIhXMEUCg604GsbzTsjmP4_EtP6ij4fxvxAjbICQ82fjEYyTZCYAzoUEVAQF9sCUg8gRRxKwU5ApM6pt2ME0ys71ELg8PaldtKd9y1xZ61Krm86ib9NjeHdMbCgSaOzG-rZ_xeYhFjhBLRwIfK3yDagb_6Y5jWnV4Qzkx1Lt1FDujk05VOiznNxPU6kRCebSsKoz4vzgFd3aw%3D%3D)
---
Sure, you may be thinking, a billionaire like Musk can afford to take the hit when radical Leftists try to force X into conformity and submission. That's what we thought, too, but we noticed something in the midst of the censorship campaigns waged against us - we had a superpower progressives couldn't see. And that's our subscribers. **The Bee could not have taken the stand it did against Twitter if we did not have the support of each and every subscriber**. These are people who appreciate humor, yes, but also believe in free speech. Who appreciate debate, dialogue, and discovering new ideas. **[If that sounds like you, I hope you'll consider subscribing to the Babylon Bee. We'd love to have you in the fight for freedom of expression.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=48a84a5a1964463c91d2facc90ec4e29&_e=sDOnP26Ic8F8i-ZEX9DzOkRe-2VVLcM-GVCtBdkKLiCk3jEMbbNimXitqKCa8wiEm8UpNkdffNIhXMEUCg604GsbzTsjmP4_EtP6ij4fxvxAjbICQ82fjEYyTZCYAzoULnm-wooZw4-zpP0d6HGTMGFlLwQ-7J74ewit2CLft7E3ma2P6jxDQofx0-oCac_EAYZYeEtht-TfeNGDUCmgLeMRa1PM6if2PtKpaWqmYJ7WOYJVojLwvSgl0JgLRReLTFeqRw10gxhWTa1W6pEVzQ%3D%3D)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=48a84a5a1964463c91d2facc90ec4e29&_e=sDOnP26Ic8F8i-ZEX9DzOkRe-2VVLcM-GVCtBdkKLiCk3jEMbbNimXitqKCa8wiEm8UpNkdffNIhXMEUCg604GsbzTsjmP4_EtP6ij4fxvxAjbICQ82fjEYyTZCYAzoU1wM279FO6559AfUZRmAtLdtA0wUhV5SCNiYiDgIhVKpGZXbp4H8lKyv8ZAZUj2dxp9mATNC-qNx1_ZnJW75z1L23yxzvCuqXIocgcgV7NIXdoScqsnEncg54pZbrxtXc5NTZkNx8pvcd3Jlfhzf-Eg%3D%3D)
---
They can hurt us, smear us, reduce our reach; but they can never silence us with free speech supporters like you in our corner. **[Join the fray with us by becoming a Babylon Bee premium subscriber today.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=48a84a5a1964463c91d2facc90ec4e29&_e=sDOnP26Ic8F8i-ZEX9DzOkRe-2VVLcM-GVCtBdkKLiCk3jEMbbNimXitqKCa8wiEm8UpNkdffNIhXMEUCg604GsbzTsjmP4_EtP6ij4fxvxAjbICQ82fjEYyTZCYAzoU2Catll-2dRiZN64pb3T_RPMz1yGrYfPYOWIpDPj06mdn3dJ7BMQYSDeCJEku_Zu6mflHxs1V3sAMl5VSMQr0iy8zp8Igpsn4n51HN5ZofDqBOewTvPkRLnRwWknQUdEtFmNCan3FRI2vsMsCp6jm8Q%3D%3D)** Thanks for considering standing with us. We'll stand with you, too.
---
Seth Dillon
CEO | The Babylon Bee
Pronouns: Bee and Beeself
---
|
---
_Copyright(C) 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved._
**Our mailing address is:**
The Babylon Bee, LLC
PO Box 546
Jupiter, FL 33468
---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=48a84a5a1964463c91d2facc90ec4e29&_t=kZNj0qQAkjSIS8CGmpnJTZyyWqHQsMf6Cv2rIU-1yclA-8YGBwcI8GycCqlqKerc3RNA1Qrkc9QQvRjQ_RoGoJgxq4QyjuhBC308KTtntDQpXBxeJ5sqVcObR5xDKt3ewraMAcO-jR4YJPRrvCPR90zyq1fBTAU4FIS5SuY3j9A%3D)

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Share your thoughts on CRT and its influence
body:
I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bbeff3dad2284e09a3bb94088a4f1461&_e=S7ACv8vk4WoJMk5F43xN_2DEltSEiyKGPBDKixpI67HWc-DtGK-VqvB7AYy-6VNx95vtq7Q34v9R7PEZVFdpYrf3ekYIsjl7RKgKYUGAphNvk9hx1UkD9fuBNGKEnJPmbEYYrvaBMkuZlO6h2WqAuBDn_H3WvgdXL2MsggxHexXzs5HhDeDy3qYOcP0dbharCsDKLTKY1z4QyWx22Bc-JZWfBBD2QNxVxEO2K1NTYsY9aRlrOScA2YmDNQ3YmjVmmAHMRvnDNYfMLIfcQXqh5wNsN668V-NVDcTAs7gipsm_fFiLi5RZY5IHxsVLRVQ56MtGfYnhYJn8V2kfgrKaR3rknd3s4WLRT5LNerUt_ZaI1NnD925Xx_bLQ8p8Wkq-)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bbeff3dad2284e09a3bb94088a4f1461&_e=S7ACv8vk4WoJMk5F43xN_2DEltSEiyKGPBDKixpI67HWc-DtGK-VqvB7AYy-6VNx95vtq7Q34v9R7PEZVFdpYrf3ekYIsjl7RKgKYUGAphNvk9hx1UkD9fuBNGKEnJPmbEYYrvaBMkuZlO6h2WqAuBDn_H3WvgdXL2MsggxHexXzs5HhDeDy3qYOcP0dbharCsDKLTKY1z4QyWx22Bc-JZWfBBD2QNxVxEO2K1NTYsYNgcLf56qha-IY8fwX3XndtIGuhx6yccnrC3j3scOCHXKR4fCCMWqTVU8vdt9M56hWHzLkZ13WOco4yPnLjoSoUvaezhzjXrR8c9dMS_CSm2awNbjzEbqU1ZsNSVrOMxwRLyIpPYdb4vgJtT7qSv1q)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bbeff3dad2284e09a3bb94088a4f1461&_e=S7ACv8vk4WoJMk5F43xN_2DEltSEiyKGPBDKixpI67HWc-DtGK-VqvB7AYy-6VNx95vtq7Q34v9R7PEZVFdpYrf3ekYIsjl7RKgKYUGAphNvk9hx1UkD9fuBNGKEnJPmbEYYrvaBMkuZlO6h2WqAuBDn_H3WvgdXL2MsggxHexXzs5HhDeDy3qYOcP0dbharCsDKLTKY1z4QyWx22Bc-JZWfBBD2QNxVxEO2K1NTYsZsc5y1ExriyyY7SDDzW1S4g3OAf5CfQNbnNLyBUEwmv6lZHzJaDiy2dbJTC-ukfOUr9RJYccT9gZO6e_gCuFouu3A1u8RLOLqh9FqAdIR6DxqH3Q9BChBisbU8bhbsh397cEZRP7axl4gH_FOI2vw2)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bbeff3dad2284e09a3bb94088a4f1461&_e=S7ACv8vk4WoJMk5F43xN_2DEltSEiyKGPBDKixpI67HWc-DtGK-VqvB7AYy-6VNx95vtq7Q34v9R7PEZVFdpYrf3ekYIsjl7RKgKYUGAphNvk9hx1UkD9fuBNGKEnJPmbEYYrvaBMkuZlO6h2WqAuBDn_H3WvgdXL2MsggxHexXzs5HhDeDy3qYOcP0dbharCsDKLTKY1z4QyWx22Bc-JZWfBBD2QNxVxEO2K1NTYsaRbNt2FB25TWG_TnI-sPu1Ad41wc_l-AkC90UB4ft-4OSmKBSEgJs6xbEp2FT5huL-qI98YMKGUj5K-JbkbuqXXQD_yO5pIkRUBhN1v45c5je7MwrXeLM7DlwbtR3teQoCgJwQboVDCgZTJws6y0km)
