name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3CkjJBOgXHVGV_uiJXTzKA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIFbAP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyMFcDc3BjQgpnO9W-PWfvr05BUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3CkjJBOgXHVGV_uiJXTzKA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIFbAP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyMFcDc3BjQgpnO9W-PWfvr05BUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3CkjJBOgXHVGV_uiJXTzKA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIFbAP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyMFcDc3BjQgpnO9W-PWfvr05BUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3CkjJBOgXHVGV_uiJXTzKA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIFbAP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyMFcDc3BjQgpnO9W-PWfvr05BUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---

body:

| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f66041a978f44a93b7ca5d52ca9a27a1&_e=BaRTKeovrKBxE6w6kn_L9-_LokZjjaAqBdz0pIxB61HqvR5E7eD5WBNKZNF6YmhonFUuXJ5Xj7e3SjXA1_t3ZL3VvHLTe3DXMucJ8yz589AVTxZ5nX82csOb7FG5AL_LGjJ1mcettYbQTTqHaAvV-Jc-HmGTnEXHTfC9kb-bNNDc-lYVFmRH-SmYOKvRMotpgbA4P-McS0bDPj4XEudau5E0GepQCd2DPcha-2GL9CbqSv-zQtF7dbaIdm-6kPXT3-VgePDcjDJxBPIPWLyge0hu9L_kMoa-M_Nw5b9VM18iIcgZKC9_iGSboUISJrQAncl0bVeShZZMbA_9HS6QZebRqdhO90p4XxUHhsSoSDcJDIrP4rOaqaEbfxs91mqAdtljN6cZK67foTSFj48laojgVF_fS1Z1FGE0UgAFGG4%3D)

An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f66041a978f44a93b7ca5d52ca9a27a1&_e=BaRTKeovrKBxE6w6kn_L9-_LokZjjaAqBdz0pIxB61HqvR5E7eD5WBNKZNF6YmhonFUuXJ5Xj7e3SjXA1_t3ZL3VvHLTe3DXMucJ8yz589AVTxZ5nX82csOb7FG5AL_LGjJ1mcettYbQTTqHaAvV-Jc-HmGTnEXHTfC9kb-bNNDc-lYVFmRH-SmYOKvRMotpgbA4P-McS0bDPj4XEudau5E0GepQCd2DPcha-2GL9CbqSv-zQtF7dbaIdm-6kPXTWA_DRUZs5SHIKYA4lJi7T7zHpEDk2x_ljYiaIwjTC79M3AhbR3HSbU12cTa6t2wbFM3v0Zl52HKHbQnkRtD3FYrGDDszPz-TeaZadhxPI7WHEIBoozUvDr4An4EYKgspuICyvgxp9RmYd2WqUELeZgd-YxXh85DTCj241SVulM4%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d26b18fe8694b92bd2382e3fdd60faa&_e=FhJV7ToY3YXUWvLCD-WFwMNzevbvrziyc5M1u7B2vt8qCF2f7uPlp8qh-s8spGPWLmOb14EcqxZ5K0MOuSPST_lYZ-_1Xqz9zRCieWP1vxK6FxADlbDiV2vx63GLqQisyxW9BuYXufawC2mBQyiI_w6-4m0s9c0Zv3nkG8QnjWuObhYwp1T6Dk0qeEuoZmzeumbFI_nhzLYLo5q9DH2eJJPxNsDXpiWQRi42bGR3ENRCoPHDiCxeSp3KjWj6gcWX5GQAKuuEsLwrQ6I6tzOLEVSywv6scBBeldiNwLbVS7hipfLbxnt0Gb7QjFk5w5b6_JtFDakoetoQam3CZQJSrHCzILFpO8Pc7D2cCue93k5JETBWcmXoKnXnvIXRj4bJ)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d26b18fe8694b92bd2382e3fdd60faa&_e=FhJV7ToY3YXUWvLCD-WFwMNzevbvrziyc5M1u7B2vt8qCF2f7uPlp8qh-s8spGPWLmOb14EcqxZ5K0MOuSPST_lYZ-_1Xqz9zRCieWP1vxK6FxADlbDiV2vx63GLqQisyxW9BuYXufawC2mBQyiI_w6-4m0s9c0Zv3nkG8QnjWuObhYwp1T6Dk0qeEuoZmzeumbFI_nhzLYLo5q9DH2eJJPxNsDXpiWQRi42bGR3ENSpio_QCtdwEG9nhmJm3FKpjmPMXzfE2CZ0YiwTu9CCE1CO9tCV9Hkky02DVwmHXgUiIHa41htSy5DQtqJjHvSFtNur-SKypOE-ysAMHcwNhsrZfPGj-AJla2h9Fo1AcUJ3WePG_G-Yprw6xoKn789I)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d26b18fe8694b92bd2382e3fdd60faa&_e=FhJV7ToY3YXUWvLCD-WFwMNzevbvrziyc5M1u7B2vt8qCF2f7uPlp8qh-s8spGPWLmOb14EcqxZ5K0MOuSPST_lYZ-_1Xqz9zRCieWP1vxK6FxADlbDiV2vx63GLqQisyxW9BuYXufawC2mBQyiI_w6-4m0s9c0Zv3nkG8QnjWuObhYwp1T6Dk0qeEuoZmzeumbFI_nhzLYLo5q9DH2eJJPxNsDXpiWQRi42bGR3ENSR_9sFdrEWe2pPhRSZe4vofWY9aisa3ugHI3-pTl0Te37VzIUB5r35-5QlS0RTajSoKTlQ63LK-zX4yp87nQJJmzsppZ0c6ANA_WXrqJrPM1nh_mPw_zUUEviS__rNK9Gdiauy7WeMn_-v549W0isl)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d26b18fe8694b92bd2382e3fdd60faa&_e=FhJV7ToY3YXUWvLCD-WFwMNzevbvrziyc5M1u7B2vt8qCF2f7uPlp8qh-s8spGPWLmOb14EcqxZ5K0MOuSPST_lYZ-_1Xqz9zRCieWP1vxK6FxADlbDiV2vx63GLqQisyxW9BuYXufawC2mBQyiI_w6-4m0s9c0Zv3nkG8QnjWuObhYwp1T6Dk0qeEuoZmzeumbFI_nhzLYLo5q9DH2eJJPxNsDXpiWQRi42bGR3ENS6r_NBVVe0KlKiOrTd5xBfcLYQuTUf89lKqaep5j9CPO8dKzoedlWrPoVKRyNV-lmvCbPaNIV25od8TqNHd6IxwL9YvxtRctUwCsT0zSaJN-_RkQU9AlgucACDQhxNfsIfu17NL64MYK8kB0CfrRks)

## Trump Drafts Oz and Lutnick for Cabinet
President-elect Donald Trump on Tuesday [nominated Dr. Mehmet Oz](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQhX8NbI7sO8AweOiSLV07oos5J9caGxknUf59Rfdu7-lJT5--r8t8IYmSbp-0sqshz6ChU8Yo0PNCEt9z1y4uMANjy85YBKMBx6m9u05bTcS2x8mEgB49TR15HqdhNBr7VtzxZgxoYxB6ferN1A804MLDGCxOTad5kZrL6TtLqncO8Z2fXE4-r21091q3vcGPBs4NnGlL_NqP6Silio_cwLmWx7opn9eVi2cVHzWJ_1Ec2VfJaVe1UNrlyMrTVRJXZSe_LIR2ZKAQrmNvARDQDBr1cEXdFrdsL4lR9sE2nb6tJPEPqv4n6engNwAA__-hmmhB) to oversee federal health insurance programs and Wall Street executive Howard Lutnick as commerce secretary. Surgeon and [TV personality Dr. Oz](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvhSAUBeBfgxsGLoo6MHRxe107GiqX521RiNBHX399Y_eu5yTfSc7bbblZCnTcX-2Opvi4gICOS8lBLM5SeC5d44xHBFQNGjkokALUODWb6Qc9Oi38OjoUq3Xrezf0HrRCmJy1oiFzaVKCkFJBL9peTr22WjnUox_UxDqBjko8249IR9nQh2d84NmucW-C2UpJmakXBjODudba-vh9YM1Xz2BOMVChNTOYy_m1J25TupzM3cnjD__EJ9-2zFPMVCge_MDKrdvpoFxOe0XNaVyqFAJlPbBO3HdL4W--_HfHw8BvAAAA__8r6mTG), a former Pennsylvania Senate candidate, has been nominated to lead the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services. Trump announced Oz would collaborate closely with Robert F. Kennedy Jr., his nominee for Secretary of Health and Human Services. Lutnick is the CEO of [investment firm Cantor Fitzgerald](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO4yAUAL8Gd1jwADsuKE46ucvpui0tDM_xS7CxgCTy36-y_dYjjUbzdZ2ujiLtt39uQ1uXNIEAzaXkIKbgKJ6TboJdEAFVg1b2CqQAdRma1Rrhe617b7pZaDN7GczgAzgZBo2LGBqyH5uUIKRUYERr5GA616mA3WXp1cC0wEA15faeaK8rLvFML8ytT1sT7VrrUZj6w2BkMLrZ7_gu7S19MIPxf4pUyRcGY83P7eAH-Ufha3q7HHh81p38g_u0bZg98oI-Y3X55Pc0MxhLTflkaqTA1F8pOwHCQN9kG443xUil65kWt81R_Ompv_15WfgOAAD__8SaZ0M) and has been serving as co-chair of the Trump transition team alongside Trump's former Small Business Administrator Linda McMahon. You can view an updated list of Trump’s [cabinet picks here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvwyAQBeBfY29EcGfAHhi6ZEvXjhaFI74GjGXTRPn3VbJ3_PSkp6f3dZkvnjOv109fyLVUZ5AwCKUEyDl6zs956KNLREDYk1MWQUnAceoXB5ZCmELQIO0IYDBqIm0RLMZIxvbsXm1KgVQKQcuTVpM23mAkMyaLUzdIitzqfvqpvLaFUn7WO-2nUEuf3dLadnT40cG5g7PfVnocr-iFvXHI1MG57b9lE0fzKYmNw-0QR6PkV76JB2d6c1toFYVzpl20WsRSi18FDBgtGiW_JXokUmMYok5mtNr4ZEO_u7g9OGc-jO0GeS2e83ta---qu4O_AAAA__8iYmpm).
## FEMA Denies Anti-Trump Policy
FEMA Director Deanne Criswell [appeared before House lawmakers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OnTAQhZ_GdEZ4zG_h4kYR3aaJopTIFw8wkfEQ24D27SPSbzUjnaNPOt_vj-nDkqew_rA7mrzwBBXUUikJ1eQs-c-pLpxZEAF1gUZ1GlQFuh-Kzaj-DXXzdj0sWoPCeZixVrPVPSxvaKAg89CUgkopDU1VNmpoWttqh22_dHoQdYWOMsfyD1PIGy7-ky-M5cx74c2W85GEfgkYBYz3fZd7Ck8mYMQgzyRgDHg_52BPmebnXXC30lHEOXOUF99JZpYR_56YsqRVUrgwZVptJg6SQmbJ0WF8avZicjLHcz9kOo-DY8aY5MZnwgduo3y91Bm67pfQI8_khP7-7RGId_qJ8SiiccdN3lNqO1FX627J_9-Tv_J7GfgXAAD__-gggCM) on Tuesday and called for an investigation into why workers avoided homes of Trump supporters during Hurricane Milton relief efforts. The House subcommittee questioned Criswell over claims that at least one senior FEMA official allegedly [directed staffers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp_G7ohmBgN2QXGbdLntlhY2Qzwr_CNMEuXtV9l-y0-fdHR0vm7jLUiW7f4_rOxr2kcC6hSiIhhjkPweuzb6xEysW_boNCGQ7od28U4jgKE4J3J2TowWzJCM63QfosbUiv_QEAkQNRm4GByMDVZHtn1yemg64Ch1L5fvXba6cMrv_cnlMu9rm_1S63E2-l9D14au4dj4dX6uzyhV5swNXROvQdXyWA91yn071fIoReawsSqchZMyYdJT4snaIQH2CEAMLsxp0E5jP7XFx-MlOctpXdPBfQ2SfxXqX0menn4CAAD__6-MYQs) to avoid homes displaying pro-Trump signs during relief efforts. Criswell disputed claims that FEMA had a widespread policy [to avoid pro-Trump homes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL-K4zAQxp9G7mQ0I1mOCxUhd-I4SK64XbY0SjSOtciWsZWYvP2i7bcZGD74fX8-zv3ZhRjm-8VNZPKQehSoOABH0XsX4qtXlTcDEZKsyEArEQTKQ1eNRqB2yqFHPfhb61RzHa4eQWrloOsEVsEUGgAKAImNqBvoGu209KQPQys7pgT5kNNaf6Yw55GG-EpPWutbmqpoxpyXjckjQ8vQ7vteP5ZQNIb2LS39hfaNoX3_z9AWJ4YWoJyOobW_z0f-i9w8Ez-tYdspRv4nPTbi_560buE-Zn5K0xRyJuJ_3URb-WkthIMoVYUCpQVDW63GL3uIMWy6ZUrcJxfid8r802pPg18BAAD__6IVad8), stating it was the isolated action of one employee who has since been terminated. She vowed to ask the Inspector General's office to investigate. In a Monday interview, fired FEMA employee Marn’i Washington claimed she was being framed, insisting [she followed orders](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8GNiK4YDsMDF3Y0rWjRcwlvhU_FkGp_PZVunf6hk86Rzpft_UWKFN9fIaCbqS2ggQjlBIg1xgon6vh0SVEQM3RqUWDkqCvlu_uekeT7ksEE7f33q3VW0QT0erZqJmTe9OUAqmUhkleJmWnOcw64nxNi7bMSIw0Wr98N6pjx5TP9sJ-2Vrh2e1jHE-mPxh4Bn7suFPO74-BP1qm7WTgsWJ_nALri3qrBetg4I21y2SsSFiCwHLkdiKKLQcqGEXqoWBk4Hl38fihnOk5L8zIRwn0J-DjvxgvB78BAAD__8GKYY8) and did not create agency policy.
## Congress Readies Battle Over Bathrooms
Rep. Nancy Mace announced plans Tuesday to [introduce legislation banning](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUhJ8GOiI4gDEFxW3c5bZbWsQcAit-IptNlLdfOf12I83MV3xf1_Xqc8nt_t9XdCP2FTgoJgQDvgafy3tVNLiICCgpOmEkCA5ytjQ5iLPRk9iillqF6SYD19rcrI9cQZRAsztpQgAXQoLmFy2snvwkA05zNNISxTHk0ffLd89tJIzl3Z-4X7ZeaXFpjMdB5D8CC4FlJEy5lLMjsKReseHr-MSfAwksytrZcGDNt-3Nqt-Qjd23g73OLbv5kfbe63mhuwuPVy4lH5Mhit-rzx8yHX9ZeDr4DQAA___Q112o) biological men from using women’s restrooms and changing rooms in federal buildings and schools. The proposed [legislation coincides](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHK5CAUhZ_GdAa9ajIWFtukm223DDd6nbiYOKhMmLdfsv1fnQMHDh_fn-f6xJTT-fqNB7keywoCNJeSg1gDpvxd9RBcJAJSAzk5K5AC1MMOu3soJC0mlNFotFYIPVtrPBq5RaOjGJK736QEIaUCI0YjrZlwUoGmR5yVZVpQSL3U8W9JZ98p5m_5UB19OYbs9t7fjalfDBYGy3Vdo9_aSVe7dwbLXe_A03_5gZ54r3i2F52BKt-w77WUo3GP79RL5nvKmTesuPPDbzUFYrAM1YX3lXJObZqZFq8DU_4P0H8S8nHwLwAA___SCmOG) with Rep.-elect Sarah McBride preparing to be sworn in as the first representative who was born male but now identifies as a woman to serve in Congress. Mace, the first female graduate of The Citadel, argued that allowing biological men who identify as transgender women into women’s restrooms and locker rooms threatens the safety and dignity of female lawmakers, officers, and Capitol Hill employees. House Speaker Mike Johnson called for treating all individuals with dignity and respect while supporting Mace’s proposed legislation, stating [men don’t belong](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3O4yAQRZ_G7ohg-LFdUGyTLttuaU08Q0wWgwUoUd5-le2_8upKR0fnz229YUwxP37jwb6HsoIEI5QSIFfCmD6rGckHZmA9sleTBiVBz8u4e5bWTDNLmK1VhvSGwQIbuRChZQ1j9F-aUiCV0mDlxarFOnSa2M1h0stgJFPspV6eJea-c0if8uJ62coxJr_3frZB_xrgOsAVz8zv9r2-o_a4JR7g2rDiLo7tXiOxaCfjX67iWfbcSha9Ym4PzsRV3LHvtZRDMFl0NJnF6WBn2miBcCdnYTLgDOuxejrfMaXY3DQY-Tgwpv9O_adGLw__AgAA__8jb2ge) in women’s bathrooms.

clean_body: President-elect Donald Trump on Tuesday to oversee federal health insurance programs and Wall Street executive Howard Lutnick as commerce secretary. | | | | | | Wednesday, November 20, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1982, UC Berkeley defeated Stanford with kickoff return involving five lateral passes and running through the prematurely celebrating Cardinal marching band. We ran a Tuesday Travel item yesterday about driving along one of the world's most ancient routes in the Caucasus Mountains. Unfortunately, the link we supplied with the story was faulty. Allow us to correct that . Enjoy the drive! Later today, we'll be sending you a special message featuring our sponsor, , and their strategies to help safeguard your savings. We hope you'll find their insights valuable and timely. Be part of the AI revolution with today's sponsor, . | Trump Drafts Oz and Lutnick for Cabinet President-elect Donald Trump on Tuesday to oversee federal health insurance programs and Wall Street executive Howard Lutnick as commerce secretary. Surgeon and , a former Pennsylvania Senate candidate, has been nominated to lead the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services. Trump announced Oz would collaborate closely with Robert F. Kennedy Jr., his nominee for Secretary of Health and Human Services. Lutnick is the CEO of and has been serving as co-chair of the Trump transition team alongside Trump's former Small Business Administrator Linda McMahon. You can view an updated list of Trump’s . FEMA Denies Anti-Trump Policy FEMA Director Deanne Criswell on Tuesday and called for an investigation into why workers avoided homes of Trump supporters during Hurricane Milton relief efforts. The House subcommittee questioned Criswell over claims that at least one senior FEMA official allegedly to avoid homes displaying pro-Trump signs during relief efforts. Criswell disputed claims that FEMA had a widespread policy , stating it was the isolated action of one employee who has since been terminated. She vowed to ask the Inspector General's office to investigate. In a Monday interview, fired FEMA employee Marn’i Washington claimed she was being framed, insisting and did not create agency policy. Congress Readies Battle Over Bathrooms Rep. Nancy Mace announced plans Tuesday to biological men from using women’s restrooms and changing rooms in federal buildings and schools. The proposed with Rep.-elect Sarah McBride preparing to be sworn in as the first representative who was born male but now identifies as a woman to serve in Congress. Mace, the first female graduate of The Citadel, argued that allowing biological men who identify as transgender women into women’s restrooms and locker rooms threatens the safety and dignity of female lawmakers, officers, and Capitol Hill employees. House Speaker Mike Johnson called for treating all individuals with dignity and respect while supporting Mace’s proposed legislation, stating in women’s bathrooms. ## Utility Report Pushes for Nuclear Energy
The Public Utility Commission of Texas released a report Monday recommending the [expansion of nuclear power](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j72SgyAURp8GOxy4_GlBsY1dtt3SIXKNzBJwhATz9jtJv_33nTPn5zJfXIgh3b7dHW091zwDA0k5p8Bm70J8zbLz9sr8yDu03AjgDJRW3WYFGDkOWohx0NqhWEY3MI1-EcJwZnQX7BvGOTDOhVKyN0ZKp9hVr2Iwg3JEMvSh5qOvG1Y8XVnjKz_x6Jd876Ldat0LEV8EJgJTa61f8wl6y49Sc3qPCEwJWyEwfe405vxbKJ67SyXkRNNjiegOuueGR3dYv7cQYyjaEMludxfiR1X_bX9a-AsAAP__rZlcHQ) to meet the growing demand for electricity in the state. According to the report, energy needs could nearly double over the next six years due to population growth and the proliferation of AI data centers and cryptocurrency mining operations. Acting on a [directive from Gov. Greg Abbott](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2urCAURp8GOybsLchYUNyGbm57SgOCSoJicM-Pb3_i9KdZ1cqXle_nMTxcymmb_7s1GvpMZUCBkgNwFENwKZ-DbILxIvTQRAO6RRCoOtUsRrRB-c5L1KAhSgGoLvRKBt2Dl00y1xgACoBWKXnTWkqnhO-m9q7vyjEpYkhU6o2WSPHjjimf5RXrbSxrk81CtB-s_cfQMrTHHkeqzzWX0eUtvo_LYmjpw9AGl7M7-FQq8XeptDC0l8PQXhEMLcCFnqF13hcivj9H4ttzzNFVHrdY55Pv2W38W8LnmkJTTdjfKed0dJpJMa8u5W8c_fnWy-BvAAAA__9wAms6), the commission identified 61 potential sites for advanced nuclear reactors, including 21 former coal sites, concentrated in the Rio Grande Valley, Central Texas, Dallas-Fort Worth, and Houston. In 2022, the state’s two nuclear power plants in Glen Rose and Bay City [accounted for 10% of the electricity output](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAURb8GOwwgiBYU29jNtluapzxmyDJgAEf9-81Mv_VN7jk5P7f5Bj74eP-GJ5p6ujQLJiTlnAo2W_DhmmVjzcLsyBs0XHeCM6F61TzMiHZxzOllHLtVOiX5uHDbD4PupVpBNd68zzgXjPNOKdlqLSUotvSuG_SggEiG1teU2_rAiicUF670wtyu6dkE86h1K6T7ImIiYjqOo_09Ib5HIqaIRyFiKqvHuCIRU8Yt5UoDXIWmvdItQKQuZYrnBtH6eKcfBo37GhAy9dHupeaLiKnJxm6HD8GXXhPJ7k_w4WNR_83yMuIvAAD__-mxZnw) on ERCOT’s grid. An analysis by the University of Texas predicts that building small modular reactors could create 148,000 jobs and contribute $50.6 billion in economic output. "_Texas is the energy capital of the world, and we are ready to be No. 1 in advanced nuclear power_ ," said Gov. Abbott in a statement.
## Shaken Baby Syndrome Conviction Overturned
Andrew Wayne Roark, a 48-year-old Dallas County man convicted in 2000 for injuring a child based on shaken baby syndrome, was exonerated after prosecutors determined he was “actually innocent,” acknowledging that current scientific standards [would not support a conviction](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLEOnDAQRL_GdEb2eo25wkUaukubEi32clgxcMLOcfx9RPqUo9GMnt6v5_iklNP2-kkr-_qd9xEUoNRaghojpXyN2EQ_qfjQDXvtDGgFtrPN4sGyYYXTFFWnHqAmbbB_mNmiATcH1yR_n2kNSmtjLbbOIZJVUzeb3vWWBCqOqe5HWxeu_KUy52v_8NGGfW2yX2p9F2F-CBgEDOd5tudMdJcCBjpqCpkFDBufRcAQjrTeMVLOVGTY_2z1kvzdNz6ocpFlod-8yYmmS5Zri8e-suRPiryFewi9kzaQchhIasYosVez7C0H6VAzYBeRwDSHj-8z5ZxK5wSq10op_0Ou_3X48fA3AAD__4wmcX8) based on the evidence presented during his trial. Sentenced to 35 years, Roark was [released on bail in 2012](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQAL_GdEa7i42hcPEaurz2SrTEm2CdwRG2QvL3p1x_9Ugz0nxd5gvHFPf7f97E19ctzwRkNKImmAPH9J5NE_wCYcRGPLqOEMj2tlk9h9Fe0TI6yz0gWMSe7LBIz4LL1TbRf2SIBIidtaZ1zhi2sPS3bnCDZWVAQqz5aOsqVV5cbumdn3K017w1ya-1Porq_imaFE3nebZvXnP-UEXTLmdRNAVOiYveeNfyyrscXCVoAgBdVv6WXQOYEc0wunatW2oOHx5nTCmW3ikD941j-g3WPw88Pf0EAAD__5J3W9g) after his lawyers presented new evidence, including a prior fall that could explain the child’s injuries. Last month, the Texas Court of Criminal Appeals overturned his conviction, citing outdated science and circumstantial evidence. Roark’s exoneration highlights the challenges faced by those involved in the defense and prosecution of Robert Roberson, the 58-year-old East Texas man convicted of his two-year-old daughter’s 2002 death by shaken baby syndrome. Roberson was scheduled to be executed last month, but he was temporarily spared when legislators subpoenaed him to testify on the state’s “junk science” law. The Texas Supreme Court ruled that [Roberson’s execution can proceed](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00D2LxCAYBOBfYzqDvmpMCouDI91ecxxXBj_e7AomLmr2498fu_1VUww8DPN7Wk42prifv-yGpj3WvAADSTmnwJZgY3ousgvGsTDxDg3XAjgDNajuYga7rky4dZQM_eSEdxyFk3KcpAaLrIvmhXEOjHOhlOy1ltIq5oZVjHpUlkiGIbZc-nbBhg9b1_TMNyy9z1uXzKW1ayXig8BMYLbO73iv_Tm_agLzzzeBuWSHpdF31LxXig_0R4t5pwXrsSF9w7Qe14IbUp-P0mhAn2zBSmCuLZcnEXMMRHxyribGlYaumHC9x5RiHTSR7LzZmN6z2r8_3Qz8BQAA__8CXWs2), but a new date has not yet been scheduled.
## Cowboys Mocked Over Stadium Mishap
Before the Dallas Cowboys’ embarrassing 34-10 loss to the Houston Texans on Monday Night Football, a large piece of sheet metal fell from the roof of AT&T Stadium as it was being opened. Check out a video of the frightening moment [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OwyAQBOCnwR0WrME4BcU17nLtldZilgQJhyhsfvz2J19__egbzfyclzPmkm-Xb9zI8yfVBRQYqbUEtUTMZV9MF31Q8aQ78toNoBXY0XZXv-IULCUalcEVTwGDDW6YlKFBGZNcl_2BaQ1K68Fa0ztnDFoVxjRMbrIojKKYuT56vhLTB1sqe33Ro1_r1hV_Zb43MXwJmAXMid_9syHXiPsREDAfvoBZawEztftNvnKkKjdiLDJhOaZJZJaNMebnJtf6DnVv8pZK9_Dx_s6l5DY6YdRlw1z-ivnfJ14efgMAAP__c3Bgrg). Staff [closed the roof](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd1gwBpwUFK9xl9duaY3NkCANITJsSP5-le23u8XVOdL5uqwXTJzu1_-YybdXLCsoMFJrCWoNmPi9miH4TYWzHsjreQKtwDo73Lyzm3N71HvQdjImOHfezxECRAuBZjUk_4FpDUrryVozzrMxaNXm4nSaTxaFURRSK8fYbtTohTXyuzzpGPeSB_a31h5VTP8ELAKW3vsYy8vcqdfPQcDymQKWTA1ZRmSuMh4lS2xN1oYhfWd5lBLlRrEcJAMyY5V76Vt5V3nFTMPhw6Mn5lTdLIy6Zkz8629_Bnl6-AkAAP__exBkdw) after the incident. It would have been the Cowboys’ first home game in over two years played under an open roof. The mishap elicited a [flood of mockery](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQhJ8GukX2YjAULq5Jl2uvRBu8JlaMjbADydufuOK6v5nq08zo-3Of7uSDj8tvWtmUj0sTClQgJaCYLPnwnVRtzUPYUdZspG5RCuz6rn4a3aPsdd_2bhTjoMd2GCzOQiEK5sFi7c1VJiUKKduuU43WSlEnHr1rBz10VCnB1pe0N-XJhT-UXfimg_dmTmsdzLOULVftrwpvFd7O82zylvaSX8yWLqbCW3ThSj4zRBfAUcywpvkFczof6Ztho70AFSiQC1n_XiHDnpIDRyFkuGZjhoVWBj44_qcWf_i4wHurd2O304fgc68rJZaVfPj3sPyo7DD4NwAA___0o3Al) for the Cowboys, team owner Jerry Jones, and their home field, which has been criticized in recent weeks for a glare that can make it hard for players to see when looking into the sun. Former Houston Texans linebacker J.J. Watt [relished the moment](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAUhJ_GdCCf4z8oXNyGLrfdEhlsgiMTI3w2Tt5-xfbbjTSa-aTv6zbdXEzxef_v9mDpveYJOcoWoEU-eRfTZ5KNtzP3AzTBghEIHJVWzWYdF6CNBFwHPa9CBi8Q9Kxn7k3fS9VEe50BIAcQSsnOGCmd4rNeRW965ZjkwUfKZ0dboPB2ZU2f_Apnt-S9SXYjOgoT_xiODMdaa7dsZ35eLcOxHPmkwnC8ls8ruJPikgLD8fFoqyNql1zn_CltIefj997CMKARvO-O7WhO648aU4pFGyb5fXcx_ZLpTxUviz8BAAD__xB8X9E) during an appearance on the national broadcast. “ _The stadium’s falling apart_ ,” he joked.
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00D9rwzAQBfBPI28x-ud_g4ZCyJbSraM56y7OgWQFSUmTb1_cpVDoevfj8Xif5_kMHHhb3yGSq89LmrXU9qDUQcsZgcNrtg26ReKkGnJqMFpJ3fVdc3Xj1ANaK42cJHnjLSw4jmoxnnDw4Bt2e5hSWiplus62w2AtdHLpL2Ycxg6ElYRcU27rlSo9oVzCKz0otz7FJrhrrbcizJvQJ6FPvD2o1DYmpJgWDrSr_WVO9xrnku7ZkzBHjPnXBNiQt_UGKwnd7y4S8j0Kc_yAXDfKZjpIJXRfN4hU_tyb7PD2xSFw6Qdh5RqBw0-7-u9cD6e_AwAA__8tcm3c) **This tech company grew 32,481%...** No, it's not Nvidia... It's [Mode Mobile](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFqwzAQxvGnkbcY3cmynEFDS8iW0q2jOVtnRyBZRlbS5O2LO7RQ6Pz_cRzfx6W_kA9-md8osi2PKfUosTkAHFD2jnx49k3l7CDdESq2YBSCRN3q6mpdNzHCiB2Q1mo0MCozIPAAxpiJpsrb_RgASgCldVMb0zSk5dBOqjOdJtFIdr6kXJcrF37QNoVnunOuxxSrYK-lrJtQLwLPAs9-ufNW6pgcxzT4wLvakzrfSuy3dMsjC3VyMf-aQIvzy7zSzAJbiqtQr7uO7PwtCnV6p1wWzup4kPAjykKRtz-1ytatnz4Ev7VGNHKO5MP3p-Xf6e4WvwIAAP__ADBxMA), last year's fastest-growing software company according to Deloitte.2 And [you can invest for just $0.25 a share](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFqwzAQxvGnkbcY3cmynEFDS8iW0q2jOVtnRyBZRlbS5O2LO7RQ6Pz_cRzfx6W_kA9-md8osi2PKfUosTkAHFD2jnx49k3l7CDdESq2YBSCRN3q6mpdNzHCiB2Q1mo0MCozIPAAxpiJpsrb_RgASgCldVMb0zSk5dBOqjOdJtFIdr6kXJcrF37QNoVnunOuxxSrYK-lrJtQLwLPAs9-ufNW6pgcxzT4wLvakzrfSuy3dMsjC3VyMf-aQIvzy7zSzAJbiqtQr7uO7PwtCnV6p1wWzup4kPAjykKRtz-1ytatnz4Ev7VGNHKO5MP3p-Xf6e4WvwIAAP__ADBxMA). Mode's disruptive $martphone, has already helped consumers earn and save $325M+ through simple, everyday use. That led to 32,481% revenue growth between 2019 and 2022 and presence in 170+ countries. But with a market worth over $1 trillion and partnerships with Walmart and Best Buy, Mode's not stopping there. William Dean Hawkins of El Paso-- for their heroic actions in the battle for the Pacific island of Tarawa. Abilene ☀️ 61/38° | Amarillo ☀️ 54/26° | Austin ☀️ 69/45° | Brownsville ☀️ 80/58° | Corpus Christi ☀️ 77/56° | DFW ☀️ 64/45° | El Paso ☀️ 65/37° | Houston ☀️ 68/52° | Lubbock ☀️ 57/30° | San Antonio ☀️ 69/47° | Texarkana ☀️ 63/44° | Utility Report Pushes for Nuclear Energy The Public Utility Commission of Texas released a report Monday recommending the to meet the growing demand for electricity in the state. According to the report, energy needs could nearly double over the next six years due to population growth and the proliferation of AI data centers and cryptocurrency mining operations. Acting on a , the commission identified 61 potential sites for advanced nuclear reactors, including 21 former coal sites, concentrated in the Rio Grande Valley, Central Texas, Dallas-Fort Worth, and Houston. In 2022, the state’s two nuclear power plants in Glen Rose and Bay City on ERCOT’s grid. An analysis by the University of Texas predicts that building small modular reactors could create 148,000 jobs and contribute $50.6 billion in economic output. "Texas is the energy capital of the world, and we are ready to be No. 1 in advanced nuclear power ," said Gov. Abbott in a statement. Shaken Baby Syndrome Conviction Overturned Andrew Wayne Roark, a 48-year-old Dallas County man convicted in 2000 for injuring a child based on shaken baby syndrome, was exonerated after prosecutors determined he was “actually innocent,” acknowledging that current scientific standards based on the evidence presented during his trial. Sentenced to 35 years, Roark was after his lawyers presented new evidence, including a prior fall that could explain the child’s injuries. Last month, the Texas Court of Criminal Appeals overturned his conviction, citing outdated science and circumstantial evidence. Roark’s exoneration highlights the challenges faced by those involved in the defense and prosecution of Robert Roberson, the 58-year-old East Texas man convicted of his two-year-old daughter’s 2002 death by shaken baby syndrome. Roberson was scheduled to be executed last month, but he was temporarily spared when legislators subpoenaed him to testify on the state’s “junk science” law. The Texas Supreme Court ruled that , but a new date has not yet been scheduled. Cowboys Mocked Over Stadium Mishap Before the Dallas Cowboys’ embarrassing 34-10 loss to the Houston Texans on Monday Night Football, a large piece of sheet metal fell from the roof of AT&T Stadium as it was being opened. Check out a video of the frightening moment . Staff after the incident. It would have been the Cowboys’ first home game in over two years played under an open roof. The mishap elicited a for the Cowboys, team owner Jerry Jones, and their home field, which has been criticized in recent weeks for a glare that can make it hard for players to see when looking into the sun. Former Houston Texans linebacker J.J. Watt during an appearance on the national broadcast. “ The stadium’s falling apart ,” he joked. | This tech company grew 32,481%... No, it's not Nvidia... The department released drone footage of an operation they busted in August of this year. () ➤ Austin: The city’s public transportation authority is pulling 46 new electric buses off the road because the manufacturer went bankrupt and was acquired by a different company, complicating maintenance and warranty issues. () ➤ Dallas: Former police officer Amber Guyger, convicted of killing her neighbor Botham Jean in 2018, is being sued by Jean’s family for millions in “unliquidated damages” that could be acquired through a book deal after the conclusion of Guyger’s 10-year sentence. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b6e72af169349418dcdceac3cfff213&_e=PBnegPiKmeDIMuI4Me_F0H7Tae8QmdiFB_tI4VBN1gEF_oMjknyYrmz_kzr5_VHijfg0VoDz4vIQUMundRbT0pS6S9jVa9KmwINH-xWG8QPbU6NWDC6s63qeZdOPqDpnLEEQrDjeFh8ZH0E2ro3YA6QpItlBi2Qyr0r1d54zu7kNAw5Nc4zrvm6IXc72bL9bXosZPFnbi_LKBOILc0qkmep0g0__JSPnAr9Y2cAM_raHl9Lta1bqtuu4U7s6YPrI7wOnwXasBB1PtEwhq8hQJcZpLnnqWIhE5hpbWzDqWln7V2MZlZZtSQrGh-A54v2xJ0h6Tul0tUy45159EFNuy1uRtapVZEYzSOxYRkUYxTHrRexa5x9qcpsZPpyJg4_KJozQtUuYMnG2HbqbEV_An5gr1LLTnkAaftk9_RIHQfA%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b6e72af169349418dcdceac3cfff213&_e=PBnegPiKmeDIMuI4Me_F0H7Tae8QmdiFB_tI4VBN1gEF_oMjknyYrmz_kzr5_VHijfg0VoDz4vIQUMundRbT0pS6S9jVa9KmwINH-xWG8QPbU6NWDC6s63qeZdOPqDpnLEEQrDjeFh8ZH0E2ro3YA6QpItlBi2Qyr0r1d54zu7kNAw5Nc4zrvm6IXc72bL9bXosZPFnbi_LKBOILc0qkmep0g0__JSPnAr9Y2cAM_raHl9Lta1bqtuu4U7s6YPrIBlIUfQFjzUfLQyp-FCf6ZlbNetz71-8ZX45RZQc-xHNg1I6Cz_rHh_pOXFvhrX2yZ53pJlvhrqiDadPgzV2ZZyCg0S0COyNpqbH2609nUZIJsV7CytgDUoZsRR4vWnPcavDLsp2p3JEUCNW9plEV6x_1wrX-fOmSe3f5fFSB-fs%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b6e72af169349418dcdceac3cfff213&_e=PBnegPiKmeDIMuI4Me_F0H7Tae8QmdiFB_tI4VBN1gEF_oMjknyYrmz_kzr5_VHijfg0VoDz4vIQUMundRbT0pS6S9jVa9KmwINH-xWG8QPbU6NWDC6s63qeZdOPqDpnLEEQrDjeFh8ZH0E2ro3YA6QpItlBi2Qyr0r1d54zu7kNAw5Nc4zrvm6IXc72bL9bXosZPFnbi_LKBOILc0qkmep0g0__JSPnAr9Y2cAM_raHl9Lta1bqtuu4U7s6YPrIzVmHTfU-BA94N_kii5v9_gnR-7xVT9bsnqbYbV6OTPZTwKeQRj4WqD0TSVlCL878Gubk6V6xws32fWY6IC7hSW6X1HK73FsXrfzV_J_Cc5pdCsGwbIZvTAmvbnH5lGcI2tI8RbSS492HGy6YyusFPJzdIB4y0wZ8YrqYydx7j7s%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b6e72af169349418dcdceac3cfff213&_e=PBnegPiKmeDIMuI4Me_F0H7Tae8QmdiFB_tI4VBN1gEF_oMjknyYrmz_kzr5_VHijfg0VoDz4vIQUMundRbT0pS6S9jVa9KmwINH-xWG8QPbU6NWDC6s63qeZdOPqDpnLEEQrDjeFh8ZH0E2ro3YA6QpItlBi2Qyr0r1d54zu7kNAw5Nc4zrvm6IXc72bL9bXosZPFnbi_LKBOILc0qkmep0g0__JSPnAr9Y2cAM_raHl9Lta1bqtuu4U7s6YPrIDNPttdryGzT9o_jTd8LgyO9HTSAzNynaOeU46ODlCe-rDDel697x1G67x5j3dmjvgL0QYvjIwm3wREEOYJYkkBCcc7K6HI7RcuJrgDpiTcYWx-4MntzrZPGfjAM-XXKdI9yelAo4ezIYlFM4iRCiH1QAXahhPaXpd5RQjAX3ycA%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’ve seized all my money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcoo1guig9gupckpe1orb0303eitd2rhcdqbg78g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chh64o32clh2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there’s one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That’s a LIE.**_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---
And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story.
---
But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen.

[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, because even after EVERYTHING the Left has done to me, I will _NEVER_ SURRENDER the fight for freedom and justice. **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0fd7drp9sd54m5u7isgb011erfgcnp9nhbco1k0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chh64o32clh2bs)

name: History Facts
subject: Which came first: alcohol or the wheel?
body:
Few inventions have shaped the course of history more than the wheel, which dates back to roughly 3500 BCE. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68bfwwiuzq5ava6ldfptywiail82ookm533mmhz64l31vnkobyhru684jb2wnw6lxegvbbpmlw8dyt2i3lmjujs3j955ul6f43vx35ape1hirrpw44rfp09s8z6206krvs3hsu6xg0r9f10fy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn90jw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Humans invented alcohol before we invented the wheel.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn90jw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn90jw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn90jw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| F ew inventions have shaped the course of history more than the wheel, which [dates back](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn90jw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to roughly 3500 BCE. That may seem ancient (and it is, by definition), but it’s positively fresh-faced compared to what was apparently a higher priority for our ancestors: alcohol, which is at least [9,000 years old](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn90jw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). That knowledge comes to us from Qiaotou, China, where pottery containing alcohol residue was discovered in 2021. Also found at the site were two skeletons, suggesting it was a burial pit and that consumption of beer — in this case made from rice, tubers, and pearl barley — has long been a part of funerals.
---
Though alcohol comes in many forms, there’s only one kind that humans can consume safely: ethanol, which is present in every boozy beverage we drink. The other types include methanol and isopropyl, which are poisonous to humans even in small doses because they’re metabolized as toxins. Both have their uses, however: Isopropyl, the primary ingredient in rubbing alcohol, is widely used in cleaning products and disinfectants, while methanol is used in everything from fuel and antifreeze to plastic and construction materials.

## Women were the first beer brewers.
Women are responsible for countless inventions and firsts, some of them older than others. And while the fact that they were the first beer brewers might not seem as important as pioneering chemotherapy or the computer algorithm, fermented beverages have played a vital role in human culture for nearly as long as humans have _had_ culture. Unlike some other innovations that have murky beginnings, this one is beyond dispute: “Women absolutely have, in all societies, throughout world history, been primarily responsible for brewing beer,”[ said](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn90jw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Theresa McCulla, who curates the Smithsonian’s American Brewing History Initiative, in an interview with Wine Enthusiast. This tradition dates back to at least 1750 BCE, when the Code of Hammurabi, a set of laws from ancient Babylon, gave women sole jurisdiction over not only beer brewing but also tavern ownership.

clean_body: Few inventions have shaped the course of history more than the wheel, which dates back to roughly 3500 BCE. | F ew inventions have shaped the course of history more than the wheel, which to roughly 3500 BCE. That may seem ancient (and it is, by definition), but it’s positively fresh-faced compared to what was apparently a higher priority for our ancestors: alcohol, which is at least . That knowledge comes to us from Qiaotou, China, where pottery containing alcohol residue was discovered in 2021. Also found at the site were two skeletons, suggesting it was a burial pit and that consumption of beer — in this case made from rice, tubers, and pearl barley — has long been a part of funerals. Though alcohol comes in many forms, there’s only one kind that humans can consume safely: ethanol, which is present in every boozy beverage we drink. The other types include methanol and isopropyl, which are poisonous to humans even in small doses because they’re metabolized as toxins. | | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=609819a9cda54f36b46e4557202c9a95&_e=ebmFg2gJyqm9OAb2KcU44nZKgcdVcAadlzTVuOCHRrsAcr1Geq0Xgz6xqYk4hsd5fBlj_LxuSnCvv2N1_TJ5ypGBYVhsxVNEZKolyTKAQC3AtLE2iwIYxI7NuWiQ2asN4d8IH1JVLvW3S7AdaAhmmwxB9uGgHJ0PwEwtfYuy20jV0nJNgMjKIw2bPdV5dpkQbcFJcMntRnBcHuJoqaTK4i7g_4en3SGgL3qqd4LcDtu2m4BpOR2k4jxXpsmkualV2vdfcfI86HIIOEE2dE_KqTVSRkshvVGeHWfreylK48BJqGPHUGd7T-QQI-QiO-SaOlr4GoUpcNaDyqf-okbsNitUbT6lOrM710dF-6kypnfJ3f58Plc59OoCtBYdjBE_aHnVfrAi7vbKevkTYFVlqKN-S0K_kqMOpRJxE0lRZ00%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=609819a9cda54f36b46e4557202c9a95&_e=ebmFg2gJyqm9OAb2KcU44nZKgcdVcAadlzTVuOCHRrsAcr1Geq0Xgz6xqYk4hsd5fBlj_LxuSnCvv2N1_TJ5ypGBYVhsxVNEZKolyTKAQC3AtLE2iwIYxI7NuWiQ2asN4d8IH1JVLvW3S7AdaAhmmwxB9uGgHJ0PwEwtfYuy20jV0nJNgMjKIw2bPdV5dpkQbcFJcMntRnBcHuJoqaTK4i7g_4en3SGgL3qqd4LcDtu2m4BpOR2k4jxXpsmkualV4YTPkxtTgw4ED5cTi1Ho1ifavx7-_5c30c5JGPkySlDaR9rdFV5vQA3kCJ8scBPZy5m_1ofsJwidtqA9ifO0YIArfs-SY1apPAuX3ttq-UDhP7xhtYLR0jCtbVLpi7y1OLABl2_HKaxmRaz8W2DHnJL0sCMEKuINyRp6SVQZEgM%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/20/2024
body:
Colorado Gov. Jared Polis, lawmakers spar over proposed budget
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Here’s what to expect in today's newsletter:

**Here in Colorado:** A rift between the Governor's office and the Joint Budget Committee over conflicting priorities for [balancing the state budget](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) sparks debate on how to fund critical needs while maintaining fiscal responsibility, while the Colorado Chamber of Commerce calls for urgent regulatory reform as the state faces a [decline in business rankings](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).

**Nationally, lots to unpack:** Prosecutors request to [push Trump’s New York case to 2029](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), even as his defense team plans to file a motion for dismissal. The tragic story of Laken Riley's murder continues, with the accused killer reportedly [entered the U.S. on a humanitarian flight](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). And on the international stage, Putin lowers the nuclear-strike threshold amid escalating tensions as [Ukraine launches long-range missiles](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) into Russian territory.
**Trump's Latest Leadership Picks:** Dr. Mehmet Oz has been selected to head the [Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while Sean Duffy has been nominated for [Secretary of Transportation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).

Lastly, don't miss a special Rocky Mountain Voice original commentary from Sean Verhoeff, who takes a thought-provoking look at how [some companies exploit veterans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) under the guise of support sheds light on the need for genuine efforts to honor those who served.
Dive into these stories and let us know your thoughts—we love hearing from you! This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, November 20, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Colorado Gov. Jared Polis, lawmakers spar over proposed budget](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
The Colorado legislature’s budget drafting body, stung by criticism from the governor over hiking Medicaid provider rates last spring higher than what he wanted, bit back when Gov. Jared Polis met with the committee last week to discuss his 2025-26 budget proposal.
Gov. Jared Polis and members of the Joint Budget Committee sparred over the size of his proposed cuts. Polis effectively argued that his proposal responsibly makes budget reductions, while lawmakers questioned his decision to fund projects or services — such as landscaping for the governor’s mansion — when the state is practically in “recession” mode when it comes to budgeting.
A veteran legislator said the governor’s budget proposal is not serious; the governor’s budget chief argued that the proposed budget reduces or eliminates programs that aren’t the “best use of dollars.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[In one of most regulated states, Colorado chamber calls for reform as business rankings decline](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [KOAA-TV NBC 5](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Colorado Chamber of Commerce revealed a sharp decline in the state's business rankings due to over 165,000 regulations.
* “The data that they came back with was pretty shocking. What they found is that Colorado is the sixth most regulated state in the nation,” said Furman. “We have over 165,000 regulations implemented through law. And 45% of those regulations are deemed excessive or duplicative.”
* The Chamber calls for audits, cost-benefit analyses, and legislative changes to improve the state's economic competitiveness while maintaining safety standards.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Prosecutors request stay in Trump NY case until 2029 as defense plans motion for dismissal ‘once and for all’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* New York prosecutors have requested a stay in the case against Donald Trump until 2029, acknowledging the complexities of prosecuting a sitting president. Trump’s legal team plans to seek a complete dismissal, citing immunity and other legal precedents.
* Trump’s attorneys argue that evidence presented during his trial violated the Supreme Court's doctrine of presidential immunity, as it related to official acts protected from legal scrutiny.
* The case has raised questions about legal precedent and the balance between the judicial process and political implications, with both sides preparing for a prolonged legal battle.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Laken Riley’s alleged killer arrived in Georgia on ‘humanitarian flight,’ roommate testifies](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE DAILY SIGNAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Jose Ibarra, the accused murderer of nursing student Laken Riley, arrived in Georgia through a "humanitarian flight" request after illegally entering the U.S. and being released on parole due to detention space shortages.
* Ibarra is accused of causing fatal blunt force trauma to Riley's head in February 2024 and was identified in surveillance footage by his roommate, who testified in court.
* The Biden-Harris administration's immigration policy, which allows for the parole of migrants for "humanitarian reasons," has faced criticism as details of the case emerge.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Putin lowers nuclear-strike threshold as Ukraine launches long-range missiles into Russia](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [NATIONAL REVIEW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Russian President Vladimir Putin has lowered Russia's nuclear-strike threshold, allowing the use of nuclear weapons in response to non-nuclear state attacks supported by nuclear powers, directly referencing U.S. aid to Ukraine.
* Ukraine launched U.S.-supplied long-range ATACMS missiles into Russia's Bryansk region, targeting an ammunition depot and causing significant damage, though claims from both sides remain unverified.
* The Biden administration declined to comment on policy changes related to Ukraine's missile use, emphasizing Russia's continued escalation, including recruiting North Korean soldiers to fight on the front lines.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Verhoeff: Are veterans being exploited by companies claiming to support them?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SEAN VERHOEFF, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Veterans are pillars of our society, honored for their sacrifices and service. Companies like USAA and Navy Federal Credit Union have built their brands around serving military families, often positioning themselves as trusted allies._
_However, recent legal actions reveal troubling alleged practices that seem to exploit veterans rather than support them._
_From overcharging to surprise fees, these institutions have faced serious accusations of prioritizing profits over their commitment to the military community._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Tina Peters appeal filed while justice awaits Jena Griswold](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY HEIDI GANAHL | STATE | NOVEMBER 18** _The legal journey of Tina Peters, former Clerk and Recorder of Mesa County, Colorado, has become emblematic of the contentious debates surrounding election integrity and judicial fairness. Peters now seeks bond pending appeal, citing significant procedural and constitutional concerns in her trial._
**[Colorado voters approve Prop. KK, imposing new 6.5% excise tax on firearms and ammunition sales](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY AMANDA HARDIN | STATE | NOVEMBER 18** _On Nov. 5, 2024, Colorado voters approved Prop. KK, a ballot measure that introduces a 6.5% excise tax on the sale of firearms, ammunition and specific firearm parts._ __
[**Daniel: Eventually, you run out of other people’s money**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY BOBBIE DANIEL | COMMENTARY |****NOVEMBER 18** _Colorado, long admired for its breathtaking landscapes, vibrant outdoor culture, and once-thriving economy, finds itself at a crossroads. Rising living costs, unaffordable housing, stagnant wages and increasing business closures are eroding the state’s appeal._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** The name **"Uncle Sam"** comes from Samuel Wilson, a meat packer who supplied barrels of beef to the US Army during the War of 1812. The barrels were stamped with the initials "US" for United States, but soldiers recycled the initials to mean "Uncle Sam".
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY**
“Government is not the solution to our problem, government is the problem.” – Ronald Reagan
|
---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’ve seized all my money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zfii89sf7eaq2lage1c89lsd1ohsuh94nvmavrfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chh6aor2c1h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there’s one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That’s a LIE.**_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---
And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story.
---
But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, because even after EVERYTHING the Left has done to me, I will _NEVER_ SURRENDER the fight for freedom and justice. **](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zqph1v41i74s3irl59cbq0f5k91v72iafp81ev8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chh6aor2c1h2bs)

body:
He’s charging ahead to finish sentencing President Trump after his term ends.

| |

| | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5q8t2cv4b1c5fvne7mftkr14nu3mqbu6jhvbdt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chh6aor2c1h2bs "Trump Sentencing Update")
---

**Radical DA Alvin Bragg just moved to keep his sham case alive! He 's charging ahead to finish sentencing President Trump after his term ends.**

What a disgrace to our country.

Now that Radical Democrats lost their grip on our country, Alvin Bragg is so desperate for political power that he's willing to wait FOUR YEARS in an attempt to imprison President Trump for phony crimes.

A corrupt DA may have convicted President Trump in a kangaroo court... But the American People are the __real__ jury - and the __real__ verdict was issued on November 5th.

**_[That's why we're launching an emergency petition calling on the judge to DISMISS THE ENTIRE CASE against President Trump once and for all.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsivt27gchhhdqqrfri6fbhnteq64lhqtbv0c620_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chh6aor2c1h2bs "That’s why we’re launching an emergency petition calling on the judge to DISMISS THE ENTIRE CASE against President Trump once and for all. ")_**

---

Listen:

There's no time to spare. The presiding judge is debating whether or not to drop this case AS WE SPEAK.

If we can get **1,000,000 strong Americans** to sign our petition within the first 72 hours of Alvin Bragg's Hail Mary motion, we'll send a message that can't be ignored. With President Trump's freedom on the line - it's time the __real__ jury speaks once again.

**_[We'll be on the lookout for your signature.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr6logeqf4tfeknl66g842f7i6agr3ntt9a0j0fo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chh6aor2c1h2bs "We’ll be on the lookout for your signature.")_**

Team Scalise

**Radical DA Alvin Bragg just moved to keep his sham case alive! He 's charging ahead to finish sentencing President Trump after his term ends.**

What a disgrace to our country.

Now that Radical Democrats lost their grip on our country, Alvin Bragg is so desperate for political power that he's willing to wait FOUR YEARS in an attempt to imprison President Trump for phony crimes.

A corrupt DA may have convicted President Trump in a kangaroo court... But the American People are the __real__ jury - and the __real__ verdict was issued on November 5th.

**_[That's why we're launching an emergency petition calling on the judge to DISMISS THE ENTIRE CASE against President Trump once and for all.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z3gjmof399fnrabnka641rpmcg605hprrpu60ue0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chh6eob4cth2bs "That’s why we’re launching an emergency petition calling on the judge to DISMISS THE ENTIRE CASE against President Trump once and for all. The Los Angeles City Council approved an ordinance Tuesday designating the city as a “sanctuary city” following President-elect Donald Trump’s mass deportation plan.
http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9ruth8o86eju2sin5kpc683ji0rb6801l12336g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chh6eob2chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cti69qbacpkmerj79hnmmrq3dtmemi37dpl66qjctd0egr7ct9memj78ctm65qn8cjkumj39cbkumjr4s9kmeq37dhl6mib7dd7egrbadd7mcqq2sjlemo7ctd16ko7fcjhegon9dtjmmg73d1jmuh2bs

Los Angeles Passes ‘Sanctuary City’ Ordinance In Wake Of Trump’s
Deportation Plan

The Los Angeles City Council approved an ordinance Tuesday designating

| Peter – it’s President Biden’s BIRTHDAY TODAY! 🥳 [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T09d32404-a18b-4948-ad41-765bf63a52a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) SUPPORTER: dpwillis67@gmail.com BIRTHDAY CARD SIGNATURE: MISSING DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. 11/20/2024 We want to wish him a great birthday after all he’s done for us and this country over the last four years, and we need YOU to sign this card.
---
| | [SIGN THE CARD](https://default.salsalabs.org/T460ce195-4070-48de-817d-b31585f568d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| This is President Biden’s LAST BIRTHDAY as president, so we need to do EVERYTHING we can to make it a special day. We need 5,000 signatures so the President knows how much we are thankful for his leadership. [So please, sign our card to wish President Biden a happy birthday before midnight arrives!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70081c84-82c2-45a1-aec1-79d224e75ee4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84542f8a-2f49-4569-9af2-d70525b1784b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
We actually had a lot of encouraging and exciting updates since Election Day – and we would never want to gatekeep our sources of optimism...| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97362995/513190148/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241120news_N_CD_90DO_6_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxNDRlNWI3LTQ3YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dBblDQ7FiJT30cKfbooy2TmHr2Kd6dq30t-EQnwuF98=)
---
Hi Peter,

Throughout 2024, we supported 80 pro-choice women candidates from 23 states + 1 U.S. territory against their extremist, anti-choice opponents. While we are quite concerned by the results of the presidential election, **we wanted to share the good news of exciting – and important – wins from the 2024 election cycle.**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97362997/513190151/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241120news_N_CD_90DO_6_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxNDRlNWI3LTQ3YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dBblDQ7FiJT30cKfbooy2TmHr2Kd6dq30t-EQnwuF98=)
---
Across the country, many Her Bold Move candidates won their elections, including:

🗳️ Molly Cook for Texas State Senate

🗳️ Maggie Douglas for Nebraska State Board of Education

🗳️ Ruwa Romman for the Georgia State House

🗳️ Quantá Crews for Arizona House of Representatives

_...and so many more!!_

🗳️ 44% of our _winners_ were women of color

🗳️ 47% of our _winners_ came from abortion ban states

🗳️ Almost ALL of our winners shattered a glass ceiling with their victory, including Emma Curtis, who will serve as the first openly trans City Councilmember in the entire state of Kentucky!

Additionally, abortion rights won in Missouri, Nevada, New York, Colorado, Maryland, Arizona, and Montana. **This election proves once again that most Americans believe abortion should be accessible and legal. Any legislators passing abortion bans are doing so against the will of the majority of their constituents.**

Our candidates dealt with sexism, misogyny, sexual harassment, and even death threats on the campaign trail. They stayed in the fight because they knew how desperately the women and girls of our country need their representation in government. At Her Bold Move, we believe that the fight must continue.

**We hope you’ll join us in that fight. With Trump re-elected and a GOP trifecta in Washington, it has never been more important that we have pro-choice women in these powerful rooms. That fight is as important as ever RIGHT NOW,**__TODAY__** , as elections are ALWAYS happening in states across the country.** [**Help us continue to endorse and support pro-choice women who will protect our rights by rushing $25 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97362999/513190154/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241120news_N_CD_90DO_6_G_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxNDRlNWI3LTQ3YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dBblDQ7FiJT30cKfbooy2TmHr2Kd6dq30t-EQnwuF98=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97363000/513190157/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241120news_N_CD_90DO_6_G_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxNDRlNWI3LTQ3YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dBblDQ7FiJT30cKfbooy2TmHr2Kd6dq30t-EQnwuF98=)

name: MassGOP
subject: Republican Leadership Drives Progress in Emergency Assistance Commission Report
body:
| | | | |
---
| [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bvOHCHMakddkZhmR7Xtb7bYwk84R3aSwryc1ouRsZsVbT4frJXWl5vHZV6IAvvFFNliS9n1WTtsBhPIr-afja0HbOsSAYbtalKXpcpiuL0rmuKNn-_764EFzlSk5BAZFsdkHTH4snnD_YrEM0pC17Q==&c=tnM7_LoEBXUR9u1ukRiyAkWHkI9iczrjI-bJrxDOav2hSJUk-QFvhQ==&ch=rJA-HNwoNoIjF4I6BBhOe9uhen4Qq0jwkTcUHTChf4LEANh5o5EQnQ==)
---
| Republican Leadership Drives Progress in Emergency Assistance Commission Report
---
---
| Boston, MA- Republican proposals were successfully integrated into the Emergency Assistance Commission's final report--a significant victory for common-sense reform. Among the recommendations for the emergency shelter program, which is projected to exceed $1 billion in costs this fiscal year and drain billions more in the coming years, were the following:

1. Codify Governor Healey's August 1, 2024, Emergency Assistance Placement Prioritization Directive which were originally proposed by the Republicans in the state legislature such as priority preference to veterans seeking emergency shelter.
2. Establish a six-month residency requirement for Emergency Assistance (EA) shelter applications.
3. Reduce the EA length-of-stay policy to six months.

These reforms, championed by Senator Ryan Fattman (R-Worcester and Hampden) and Representative Paul Frost (R-7th Worcester)--the only Republicans on the 12-member commission--represent a major step toward accountability and fiscal responsibility. Their leadership has compelled Democrats to confront and consider long-overdue reforms to the EA system. It is now up to the legislature to adopt these much needed reforms.
Senator Ryan Fattman emphasized the urgent need for action, stating: "Come January 1st, the funding pool sustaining the migrant crisis will be depleted. This leaves the Democratic supermajority with two choices: raising taxes or slashing critical programs that directly impact Massachusetts residents. The only viable solution is reform, and it's clear that Democrats are finally beginning to recognize this reality. While their acknowledgment comes about 18 months too late, we're encouraged to see progress in the right direction."
Representative Paul Frost echoed Senator Fattman's call for urgent reform, stating: "As it stands, people from out of state or out of country can arrive in Massachusetts and immediately gain access to extensive and costly services and push current Massachusetts families in need aside for our emergency housing system. This legislative session, reform is not just an option--it's a necessity. Implementing a six-month residency requirement for emergency housing eligibility is critical to refocusing on protecting Massachusetts residents and upholding the original intent of the right-to-shelter program."
###
---
---

clean_body: Join us in calling upon the House Ethics Committee to release their report on Matt Gaetz’s allegations. | | | | Team — We cannot let alleged sex offender Matt Gaetz become our country’s next Attorney General. The House Ethics Committee has been investigating Gaetz over various allegations including sex with minors, use of illicit drugs, accepting bribes, misusing campaign funds, and sharing inappropriate images on the House floor. There are currently no plans to release the House Ethics Committee’s report findings after Gaetz resigned from Congress last week. This is wildly inappropriate for our nation’s chief law officer to skirt accountability. Someone with such disregard for the rule of law should not be able to “fail up” and lead our nation’s Department of Justice. — NV Dems The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ## ‘Did Not Expect Hitler to Get So Many Meeting Requests’ – RedState
CNN contributor Scott Jennings mocked the left's constant messaging to their supporters that Donald Trump is a fascist, only to turn around and quickly start kissing his ring following the election. The sudden normalization of the president-elect began when Joe Biden hosted Trump for a cordial White House meeting, [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ffe02948e3574a36b9819781e82968ba&_e=DV1nFJEFwNsEFCJNMFsvTbfN8fgOvGpUNhaa08jQz0q67vOAmOQnKmg4Kx7BDrqKPp9YqmJKo-6Sglyx7wEELcoST7L4vebQFnUfXC7j5eQCER6fiWrLq2rF5jQDtVx2RG0SEXtWAvXBcInb9r3Q1wFAaEzOo1ad7O_EE8GcLhzZpwAMKSxAuKniTihgk_waadubI3G1exwstDSUj5giY5ck39wYbDkPZVurQlP2NJob2c02km25N5UkMQv5EoM4HRGpvW2SIrHhnIikx0Y1RJyZ7P5601pwm1BCHJv1-NU%3D)

## Democrats Are Losing Working-Class Voters of Color—But Can They Win Them Back? – RedState
For decades, the Democratic Party prided itself on being the voice of the working class, especially among minority voters. Yet, if the 2024 election taught us anything, it’s that this isn’t the party of the little guy anymore. Latino, Black, and Asian American voters—once reliably Democratic—are peeling off in numbers big enough to tip [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ffe02948e3574a36b9819781e82968ba&_e=DV1nFJEFwNsEFCJNMFsvTbfN8fgOvGpUNhaa08jQz0pbyGQkkQLAyprft_l5ypXWxovQGBuCsf0MSwdLs0EzpWKD6Hid1cTYb-hkWjh0XqsL-JOX_rtCNuzHKqssH3hXO5yEWGD9vZ4GUJk1Fty8pWS9VCc6CVea2cwJ05z6SjhagBlw0uGVTfxLUuSHz_h-SASLSJsBB_MSN4BQgR0HP-8B2jctVM-3PQmwQxObImCRrQQOFr-65-1eWF2-ndRXt_7OfJAW54V_9pYvq50w7GHPASE5BxJjyeYur607gBBiBvAFEfh2k17cFT6NyiNP)

## We Were First to Call the Election – RedState
Election Day 2024 will go down in history as the day Republicans saved America from the clutches of the radical left. America voted, and we're sending Donald Trump back to the White House as the 47th President of the United States. The anticipation on election night was high, and [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ffe02948e3574a36b9819781e82968ba&_e=DV1nFJEFwNsEFCJNMFsvTbfN8fgOvGpUNhaa08jQz0pJxBwDvN5c_ucimDtq-BN-dI2Ba45UDGq5pEccT514tXKHlFjK6_HKnwM2TJue5CMgJQy4bIHbxRZg7peA2LhVC26yoTakQtJqR85uoXst9ikklcKhc3makVy8o5PlOkR_RmttmPVbuxycmBxuVxDZqo8lMcvOkngJa01h8qoiPgGhPuSYhjNEg7ubbNRMCXPDlJuoOmHKEC5DCD_HjTbVZ_IEer8mCuXSI402t3sNmA%3D%3D)

It’s been positively spine-tingling to watch the multiple meltdowns over President-elect Donald Trump’s picks for Cabinet posts and other positions. It’s going to be a fun four years mocking and humiliating these frothing-at-the-mouth, fear-mongering “journalists”—and what makes it more "joyful" is that after Trump’s landslide win, they have lost much of their power.
