name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Republicans are trying to win by suppressing votes
body:
Peter: it’s tough.
I’m not going to lie to you. Our lead in Arizona continues to shrink, and there are still a considerable number of uncounted ballots across my state.
I don’t want to rile you up unnecessarily after everything you’ve been through over the last week, but I need all hands on deck now to ensure we hold the line.
I need you to chip in to my campaign as we fight to the final result. We have to secure this seat. Split $25 with The Real Texas PAC to help us get there. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?refcode=111024_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC and Ruben Gallego will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?express_lane=true&refcode=111024_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?express_lane=true&refcode=111024_1&amount=10]

Thank you,
Ruben

Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

subject: Official 2024 Exit Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This poll won’t be complete without your response

|
---
| | | Dear Friend,

_**We need your help to continue making history.**_ As a trusted ally, I'm inviting you to participate in an extremely comprehensive Exit Poll hosted by House Republicans. **Your input will be instrumental in shaping the future of our nation and our party.**

---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3bt8ktkpeutc87p9j2beh2lrv9qeku60fkeagt0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj68p76chh2bs "Official Exit Poll")
---

**EXIT POLL ID:** **[2024 - EP - dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zss6fir2s54peslt5lhnebgln8naqh5o7q2notoo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj68p76chh2bs "2024 - EP - dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
**REPRESENTING:** **[your state](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zir1ov6celgd4mm1mpfubhgo4l8c3a1ou0cojcbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj68p76chh2bs "your state")**

---
_***Closes at 11:59 PM***_

These few questions are key to future strategy. We need every Republicans to submit their response and help us continue WINNING.

**So, I'm asking you to take a few minutes to complete the Official House GOP Exit Poll.** Your input will be kept confidential, and you'll be represented as a valued member of our party.

---
| | | [TAKE THE EXIT POLL](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znvsl94mlk116efinf85alglak5akrou3jgdi0ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj68p76chh2bs "TAKE THE EXIT POLL")

_***Closes at 11:59 PM***_

Don't miss this chance to shape the narrative and make a real difference. _**This poll will close at 11:59 PM.**_

God Bless,

subject: Does calcium really protect your bones?
body:
---
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE1vwjAMhn9NeqOKHZe2hxy2se6ANk2waezofmQUJbQkpRX8-gnGuNqP_T562fW2NSct0keBuG3rIBCFehCIh-_J-ePOLV9mqVztZof5m0suW3y6oSPe4X3FyeF9DedN4JDBudqU1o9wx4dT39zhW2jcOG7tZZouolorU0uKGg2pQgBSlERbjUQ55yybXFYJcEOGMgmZKdmwySmJWo0SCQAlUAIJxQYyAjNXVDObMqsFyWtOzK7xbcUQhom97zoXV52LrN4OQx-uYoXAYvJdvD9WtjmGv7OqcwKLm7LAYhRYfH0-L1XNpVsLVVxLU4vzxKsP1792kdd1P7XWtmGeCpI__2-iUeNvAAAA___Fym_n)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | | **WARNING** \- _“You’ve been lied to about Calcium!”_
Ask anyone how to prevent bone loss and breaks, and they're likely to answer, "Get more calcium."
Bad news...
According to a 2013 Harvard publication... Men who took over 1,000 mg of calcium supplements daily were **20% more likely to develop heart issues** than those who didn't take supplements.
A meta-analysis of clinical trials found that calcium, vitamin D, or both supplements were not associated with a lower risk of bone breaks in older adults!
But there's good news... Because a unique protein seems to act like glue inside your bones — helping to halt age-related bone loss. **[Try this protein swap instead](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jsGOmzAQhp9muIE8MwZ7Dz5sF9FKlapqe9jt0WBTvMKJA4QoefrKUZTLaGb-T_o_G9McxqsB9Q2IpuBWIAJ-BaLT30tczl_x5_dSifev8tT8inVO6e2B7vSED4OtT7__4O1ztavG2_DZz8uOT3y7Jv-EH6WVjzbM-avawhkenZCFN6iYECXLupiM61mLwTfa9zyyJKU8a-f8C0l88bovgiFBEpEEyhprWY2oJY4NS2ft2GsHUtx7Khv9EgaL63axy3I8xmo4xmI207al9S7WAXVjXx3sFnaf7DZlAqhbXB5VmhJwtwYH3KJoaqAmnXvglqSoFQM1A-br4VO-dh_vJWohckLA7duPj7wycJuzYjEuXcI8h7VRIMW_u2aW2g39DwAA__-zPHWb)**.
So, if you want to STOP bone loss...
And blow your doctor away with your next DEXA scan results...
**[⇒ Try this unique protein instead.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jsGOmzAQhp9muIE8MwZ7Dz5sF9FKlapqe9jt0WBTvMKJA4QoefrKUZTLaGb-T_o_G9McxqsB9Q2IpuBWIAJ-BaLT30tczl_x5_dSifev8tT8inVO6e2B7vSED4OtT7__4O1ztavG2_DZz8uOT3y7Jv-EH6WVjzbM-avawhkenZCFN6iYECXLupiM61mLwTfa9zyyJKU8a-f8C0l88bovgiFBEpEEyhprWY2oJY4NS2ft2GsHUtx7Khv9EgaL63axy3I8xmo4xmI207al9S7WAXVjXx3sFnaf7DZlAqhbXB5VmhJwtwYH3KJoaqAmnXvglqSoFQM1A-br4VO-dh_vJWohckLA7duPj7wycJuzYjEuXcI8h7VRIMW_u2aW2g39DwAA__-zPHWb)**

body:
My team needs your help to ensure every Pennsylvanian has their voice heard.
| | |
---
Hello, friend.

This Senate race is still too close to call, and my team needs your help to ensure every Pennsylvanian has their voice heard.
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97373127/513219638/1089970663?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2542-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2FlMmRiYjYtNGVhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=giVBzx3xoK_was-uzK2n9WOq-iPWdSQ4cnm78ZQjUwY=)

It has been made clear there are tens of thousands of votes still to be counted. Pennsylvania is where our democratic process was born. We must allow that process to play out. That is what Pennsylvania deserves.
My team is working hard to make sure Pennsylvanians' voices are heard, but we’ll need the resources to make sure we can keep up this work.
**[So please, split $5 or more between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and myself today to ensure we have what it takes to keep this operation running.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97373131/513219643/1089970663?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2542-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2FlMmRiYjYtNGVhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=giVBzx3xoK_was-uzK2n9WOq-iPWdSQ4cnm78ZQjUwY=)**

name: John Rich
subject: This is an unusual favor, but I have to ask you
body:
Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists?

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztgime2an80aa58kvluand6put36e8krmb082b2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, “Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?”

It’s not Woke teachers (although they don’t help).
It’s not even school boards.
It’s Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like _Where the Red Fern Grows_ , _Huckleberry Finn_ , and other classics.

Scholastic is now promoting books like _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfvs78u8i733hiomtpho4k3ghap8bgitv3v3roq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7hp2votk7jrqicl65mke88dopm7jpob81bkd998_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)
SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic.

Here’s how you can help.

[Please help us promote new book fairs in schools to replace Scholastic. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree? I am hoping to raise $50,000. Click here to donate any amount today. >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zthia9r5qhps67fkf11lb7kbvtn1maiblc8hsqmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)

SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za8hdib1ghi1trlilf6rtvb8sapllp9857bppdlo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8i5ckni816rmun2ijjs5hf66c5du2mco932nd18_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)
SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances.

It’s the same with our kids’ literature.

[My goal is to raise $50,000 this month to bring SkyTree book fairs to more public schools across the country. clean_body: Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | "SkyTree Book Fairs" Friend, Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools. But have you ever wondered, “Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?” It’s not Woke teachers (although they don’t help). It’s not even school boards. It’s Scholastic Book Fairs. Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows , Huckleberry Finn , and other classics. Scholastic is now promoting books like Welcome to St. Hell , which promotes trans ideology to kids. SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic. Here’s how you can help. SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you. SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances. It’s the same with our kids’ literature. Thank you, and God bless, John Rich SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: The New York Sun
subject: The New York Sun is different
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWkPmutWoN

For a limited time, join for just 1¢.
In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've
experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad
journalism

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWkPmutWoN

FROM THE
DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ

Dear
Friend,
In over
sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand
the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly
the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things
right.

In
today's media landscape there are far too many publications that
get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political
implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New
York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over
politics and people over party.

Its
in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President
Trump serve as a case in point.

When I
defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an
avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to
fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's
deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky
and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the
Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be
first rate.

It will
be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can
be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that
its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments
in American journalism.

I've been
impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an
uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun's
success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of
truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage
you to join the Sun today.

Every
person matters in this effort.

Don't
wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.

Join the
Sun Now →

Alan
Dershowitz
Columnist
for The New York Sun

The New
York Sun Company, LLC, 300 Park Ave, 2nd Floor, New York, NY
10022, United States

Too many
emails? Manage your email preferences or unsubscribe.

Done with
the Sun for good?

name: Riley Gaines
subject: This evil is widespread
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn8n5usb6bucqmjm9kfj2pa4nk15sti452kaqoh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4gme6uu51ighd5davrbc7o9i7bt1pck4fc9vda8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmsck8i7v6bne735gong52nbc06l931gsi3fcvno_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvag92eqi4i7debvp38nto0f9i44agud8lfhr99g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z63iuqaujpfokn7qft3sdcdp1gb7plaih6nkreko_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8igq5aqpno23lessti339bfndi3sgmusb69lpa8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjrdjl43s22ldtenmvgebt8ittjp4is1rqs31buo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0mkk7l3cb506s50dl2ka13ftj64suf62th2e86g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3d5p3hurcbvcfbifbpkbeesn6ev52ien4r3dep8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z514s77bs0919fdiat5ghuqabt384l22ii652o9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcefgets24a9dvfaa8ofh9r6r6gb6efkh3q8uk40_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg7s0h380goobgae8g7qrb020uonp89icrrkl52g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."
---
[ **Donate**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1helggd40blh74tknd4gdff3as98lascqlq2i10_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7d2op5bvp67hbgpg1l8eisffocd2rc4qefvttpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)
---
The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
---
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3dqnhhcsh7d4erkelcjunfefl84gdasn7hth120_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)
---
PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251
---

---
|
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zedak5echop5f2bro7c6jf90qanju1nsg3uujujg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshj66o31cpgm48d245p25oh4ctj64p36c9ge8p724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlhclsscaggibn5bhj6sr6df8nj1bqus137ipm7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zav9katf7jqgi8fei4sc7jtk6mdqsgcn1geeem2o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6c9i6coj0shie49fg)

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen
subject: 🗣️ Tell Congress: Prioritize climate defense
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
It's up to all of us to protect the progress we've made
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3050011/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi Friend,

As the reality of a Trump presidency starts to settle in, there's no sugarcoating the challenges that our movement will be up against.

But, this isn't the first time our movement has had to fight hard to preserve progress. **As we prepare for the long resistance ahead, Democrats in Congress have the power to cement and defend the progress made over the past four years.**

[**Send a message urging Congress to defend our climate and our future by protecting our hard-won progress.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3050012/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3050013/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Though Trump and his Project 2025 are poised and ready to dismantle bedrock environmental safeguards, it doesn't mean our fight for a safer climate future ends here. In fact, it means we have to fight harder than ever to protect hard-won gains like the Inflation Reduction Act and Biden administration standards to cut carbon pollution.

Now is not the time to lose hope and give up. **It's the time to fight for what we believe in: a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future for all.**[**Are you with us?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3050014/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
| Thanks for raising your voice in this critical moment, |
---
| | |
---
### Lena Moffitt
Executive Director
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3050015/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---

clean_body: It's up to all of us to protect the progress we've made | | | | | ---|---|--- | Hi Friend, As the reality of a Trump presidency starts to settle in, there's no sugarcoating the challenges that our movement will be up against. But, this isn't the first time our movement has had to fight hard to preserve progress. As we prepare for the long resistance ahead, Democrats in Congress have the power to cement and defend the progress made over the past four years. | | Though Trump and his Project 2025 are poised and ready to dismantle bedrock environmental safeguards, it doesn't mean our fight for a safer climate future ends here. In fact, it means we have to fight harder than ever to protect hard-won gains like the Inflation Reduction Act and Biden administration standards to cut carbon pollution. Now is not the time to lose hope and give up. It's the time to fight for what we believe in: a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future for all. | | Thanks for raising your voice in this critical moment, | | | | Lena Moffitt Executive Director Evergreen Action * | Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- 1250 Connecticut Ave NW, Suite 700, Washington DC 20036 | | content © 2024 Evergreen Action and paid for by Evergreen Action. All rights reserved.Contributions or gifts to Evergreen Action are not tax deductible.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: It’s not about swimming, it’s about God’s Truth
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zasad15cifo60sjv2jhl8fc10hjevco8mlhkbk80_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o70cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfgr5en83t23m0vvhb1qme7c1jd121oci443op90_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o70cjh2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhi3je4p70a17bhoater5bq02c2oqcmcejuudko0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o70cjh2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z313tlm17n080i8d3tv7qg93k3a7p55lmi4u7d7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o70cjh2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4c96frl95ht5thhmfns6vbggfjpvh0m3j8jf4t0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o70cjh2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7ht7rra4mb056dtfq4qdbcok0f707p2vkpkrnu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o70cjh2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg01vdauani1uppjq7jkp70sg42gsl1ogmqp32k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o70cjh2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2ldbvaa9r7dhgva6te717t7qbodl2oqg9qlmjn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o70cjh2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrg00nrvv3vfq67624bh4sgscercj7f0st9rre8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o70cjh2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv0to42vtqhia3m9mfbkuoojte3h9bfio72llfj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o70cjh2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z488se9vo3i907p7edml7blml81o3a59shaf46p0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o70cjh2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0s0fk1go81454o9h6h2ktc7tadd27g3tm2v7ld8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o70cjh2bs)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."
---
[ **Donate**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2vo49a9h7p36o9ht7hgftq15dq4cdnt7nsaffh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o70cjh2bs)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zctvo434ni4ob6365g8vhqqhf8rpvp1i9naehl7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o70cjh2bs)
---

name: John Rich
subject: I’m not emailing you about my music
body:
Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists?

|
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6cg9mb72duhtiuev4os790iuun000fqstjudqo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, “Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?”

It’s not Woke teachers (although they don’t help).
It’s not even school boards.
It’s Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like _Where the Red Fern Grows_ , _Huckleberry Finn_ , and other classics.

Scholastic is now promoting books like _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfado7dts7tk1s4g0gp93v7u40q8cgmk7jn1bs20_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs7ofq9309q2mqi830r74jsgeh63fmv6e7d88gk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)
SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic.

Here’s how you can help.

[Please help us promote new book fairs in schools to replace Scholastic. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree? I am hoping to raise $50,000. Click here to donate any amount today. >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zos1aurlfeeh3m98f5eaa8i6s481t5umdpcd7dvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)
[Donate $10 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znhfdvuqdtr6flba1ajoljp0r6lac04o65461n78_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zit8u185c5hfleokaqtnf3q7nvjjn08livtg4vfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zea77tc8mdaoikemsao68el2g7eues66uhcuvjt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6mlra8atcjeqmi71p8q8hrcdpgq1utds2ska2q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvq9nv7trjodq5bo2u46b9bp969qaf9vpl4rqc0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z25pk0o1sfoludoponcs3q0c34u37plf9pokg1po_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr6pgf7ghf4c0aki3i25r5h91q6brdt5p2pa3ca0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdu96pikps52mf8962de7hakkle4vbml468hd5lo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)
SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4171shdva76m1c54220irdepehaog3tm1crv7eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs) [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdc75kbjmbt7uh2a6dcckhc44lgivphiairk8dvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)
SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances.

It’s the same with our kids’ literature.

[My goal is to raise $50,000 this month to bring SkyTree book fairs to more public schools across the country. It costs roughly $4,500 for SkyTree to host a book fair.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2oltc7ele8pjac6n8dp37nji1dbtukrl6drp1ho_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs) [Donate $10 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztoefmshpg1vkbri9eek51krg4ua4nsh1kq563s8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z05u987kep38lqpcecl6cjoeedu5os0mqfshia7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zob4vmv7g4vu4jvq6cuae6na6tca94dhcdgbttm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8nda1f5538cu5j6gos7podap3jrk64pupi7rm08_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqs1p7cqijd7jnadtlblkl3otcj6kk66vamm47p0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo2p2up9eno3ak5lpcgri2gulspl31ee90ikf42o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrtfsvhlupbklp24vvrnoehhbqd1sgdpa9hashco_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3fc12lca9davrb3e5q2oi3o6bo2gq3gln1qu9o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj64o74cjh2bs)
Thank you, and God bless,

John Rich

clean_body: Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? | | | "SkyTree Book Fairs" Friend, Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools. But have you ever wondered, “Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?” It’s not Woke teachers (although they don’t help). It’s not even school boards. It’s Scholastic Book Fairs. Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows , Huckleberry Finn , and other classics. Scholastic is now promoting books like Welcome to St. Hell , which promotes trans ideology to kids. SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic. Here’s how you can help. SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you. SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances. It’s the same with our kids’ literature. Thank you, and God bless, John Rich SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Raja is the hardest working person I know.
He fought tirelessly for protections for frontline healthcare workers like me.
He went after companies for targeting e-cigarette campaigns at young kids like ours.
And at the end of every day, he still finds time to be a dedicated husband and father.
[_**I’ve never been prouder of my husband. He’s fighting hard for families like yours and mine every day. And I know he doesn’t like asking for money. So I hope today, you’ll listen to my request instead. I know we need strong people like my husband in Congress, and I’m asking you to support Raja however you can. Anything you could chip in, whether it’s $5 or $25, would be greatly appreciated by both of us. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97376439/513229162/-1810142050?amount=14&refcode=20241120_em_fr_b1_raja_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2M1MjNlZS01MWE3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuZ9xow0mgyuAHFgTNoS_OicfoLzPwlhmy3DC_N7c-w=)
One of the things I love most about Raja is that this isn’t about politics for him.
It’s deeply personal.
It’s rooted in his experience as a child of immigrant parents.
It’s rooted in his role as a father who wants the best for every child.
It’s rooted in the same values I’ve watched him champion for decades.
I couldn’t be prouder of him -- as a congressman, husband, and father.
That’s why I wanted to email you today. I hope you see in Raja what I do -- and I hope you don’t mind me asking you to support him however you can. Will you join us?

name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: We must fight back against Matt Gaetz
disclaimer_text: Paid For By GIFFORDS; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We can't trust him to be our nation's top law enforcement official.
#

Friends -
Here at GIFFORDS, we are mounting a strong opposition to Donald Trump’s nomination of former Congressman Matt Gaetz to be the next Attorney General of the United States.
As you may have seen in the news recently, Gaetz has multiple allegations of sexual misconduct against him, which is one of many reasons he is wholly unfit to step into this role. His nomination is also a direct threat to all the progress we’ve made in our gun violence prevention movement. On top of that, he would threaten the historical and key independence of the Department of Justice.
[**If you’re ready to join us in the fight to stop Matt Gaetz from becoming the next Attorney General, please rush a contribution to GIFFORDS:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-c4-em-nov24.HTgqwI&refcode=em241120-1-30&t=1&akid=9468%2E3935704%2E8JO0jj)
**[DONATE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-c4-em-nov24.HTgqwI&refcode=em241120-1-30&t=2&akid=9468%2E3935704%2E8JO0jj)**
Gaetz wants to dismantle the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF), which sits within the Department of Justice, and is the **only** federal agency tasked with enforcing our nation’s gun laws and providing a check on the gun industry. Without it, there would be no agency to enforce background checks, prosecute criminals with illegal guns, and fight gun trafficking.
Gaetz even introduced a bill in Congress to do as much and went so far as to say, "Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms should be the name of a chain of convenience stores in Florida, not a federal agency."
Gaetz is yet another MAGA extremist who claims to care about “law and order,” while making it harder to enforce our nation’s gun laws.
[**Matt Gaetz is a dangerous choice for Attorney General, and we must work together to make sure he isn’t confirmed. Will you please rush in a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS to join us in this fight?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-c4-em-nov24.HTgqwI&refcode=em241120-1-30&t=3&akid=9468%2E3935704%2E8JO0jj)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Riley Gaines
subject: I saved a copy of my book for you
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zu85mvjikqnhjrnn6ru6sgo48alfdmfir6m3ms28_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj62or4c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0vuee2c7ai6n4ho4th2rl12h5j1i4074u8i7vj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj62or4c3h2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr2ldt1en0lceqssvsis3tv4m8bhb60qe3pbki18_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj62or4c3h2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvn4a90p3t277n96ecd3k2j1n760e5ju65n59nso_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj62or4c3h2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zolvo819gk3b93i4nnj3tinbjlubejffdsfehg08_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj62or4c3h2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zk6e6mi8jr84gohe41ijpsjb20tahfre005v39p0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj62or4c3h2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zq099ghh8prg4o35la2qit6e6nn9krqo274gmvto_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj62or4c3h2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9g9gupl3ohmj7qs6ik3k8oq8q8vsslh7a22vhu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj62or4c3h2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zg9gr61n7ssmfiefe4vi6qe3tusfhkmn3ggupofg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj62or4c3h2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zd0170p83p34d4jqij1fhgtiv7a9kp4jb7fnd330_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj62or4c3h2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z24mk06fv2md2rc5njqceb4cvr0cd694p20l0500_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj62or4c3h2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zttte37rimna50kc99m2src8fec8rskst2tigm18_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj62or4c3h2bs)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."
---

clean_body: I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Becca Balint
subject: Honoring trans lives in memory and in action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
In these uncertain times, we honor those lost and recommit to the fight for justice.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97378265/513234562/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2VkMGFkOS01NGE3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ItnBJVT1ttabEyxZ4UeZwLznpMBzvxANijpGaEgyXAE=&emci=6c1ff5f4-c0a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=63ed0ad9-54a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=43402272) | Dear Peter, On this Trans Day of Remembrance, I’m honoring the countless Americans who have lost their lives to violence and discrimination because of their gender identity. This is a day for us to remember the courage and resilience it takes to live openly as a trans or nonbinary person. We have an obligation to push back against cruelty, violence, and discrimination. History has shown us time and time again – when we make progress, there will always be backlash. That’s why we need to be clear about protecting everyone’s inherent dignity. When we allow attacks on someone’s basic human dignity, we are all made more cruel. We compromise ourselves. As the first openly LGBTQ+ person to represent Vermont in Congress, know that I’m here standing up for _**all**_ Vermonters, including trans Americans who are scared right now. I will continue the work to protect our rights, dignity, and humanity. The progress we’ve fought for, from access to health care to civil rights, must be strengthened and defended. I’m fired up and ready to continue the fight for justice, equality, and safety for everyone in our community. Every American, regardless of their identity or background should be able to live as their authentic selves without fear or threat of violence. Today, as we remember those we’ve lost, let’s also honor their memory with action, organizing, and a commitment to protecting and uplifting everyone. With love and solidarity,
Becca Balint
---

Friend,
We are thrilled to invite you to this year’s Annual Advance in Charlottesville, where you’ll have the unique opportunity to hear from an incredible lineup of influential leaders who are shaping the future of Virginia!
Join us as we welcome:
* **Governor Glenn Youngkin**
* **Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears**
* **Attorney General Jason Miyares**
* **Our Congressional Delegation**
* **Senate Republican Leader Ryan McDougle**
* **House Republican Leader Todd Gilbert**
* **AND MORE**

This is a fantastic chance to engage with these key figures, hear their insights on the challenges and opportunities ahead, and be part of important conversations that will shape our state’s future. Whether you’re passionate about policy, leadership, or just want to connect with like-minded individuals, there’s something for everyone at this event.
Make sure to purchase your ticket NOW, and feel free to invite friends or colleagues who would enjoy this incredible event to buy their tickets!

clean_body: | | | | Secure your tickets today Friend, We are thrilled to invite you to this year’s Annual Advance in Charlottesville, where you’ll have the unique opportunity to hear from an incredible lineup of influential leaders who are shaping the future of Virginia! Join us as we welcome: Governor Glenn Youngkin Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Attorney General Jason Miyares Our Congressional Delegation Senate Republican Leader Ryan McDougle House Republican Leader Todd Gilbert AND MORE This is a fantastic chance to engage with these key figures, hear their insights on the challenges and opportunities ahead, and be part of important conversations that will shape our state’s future. Whether you’re passionate about policy, leadership, or just want to connect with like-minded individuals, there’s something for everyone at this event. Make sure to purchase your ticket NOW, and feel free to invite friends or colleagues who would enjoy this incredible event to buy their tickets! | Our room block at the Forum Hotel & Omni are officially full, but we still have a limited number of rooms available at our alternative locations. Click below to book your room now —and make sure to purchase your ticket at the same time to secure both your accommodation and event access! Reminder:** A ticket purchase is required to confirm your hotel reservation. Don't wait—book today to guarantee your spot! | Thank you for your continued support, and we hope to see you in December! The Republican Party of Virginia PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA ==

body:
Stand with Jack Smith, friend!!
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22552%2E4449941%2EBrTKAS)
---
_❌**DON’T SCROLL AWAY** ❌ _
_❌**DON’T DELETE THIS EMAIL** ❌ _
_**DROP EVERYTHING AND READ THIS _AWFUL_ HEADLINE:**_ **Trump is RELENTLESS in his attempts to intimidate Smith and sabotage the Special Counsel's work to hold him accountable.**

**Smith is even planning to resign before Trump can fire him! Now more than ever, he needs good Democrats like you to stand with him.** **[_Friend, sign our urgent petition standing with Special Counsel Jack Smith in his quest to hold Donald Trump accountable »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241120_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=22552%2E4449941%2EBrTKAS)** | [_30,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED ON OUR EMERGENCY PETITION:_ Stand with Special Counsel Jack Smith »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241120_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22552%2E4449941%2EBrTKAS)
---
Look, Jack Smith has done an amazing job as special counsel.

**But the GOP DOESN’T care.** They’re attacking Smith and his case from **_every angle_** in hopes of shielding Trump from justice!

We need to know that every Democrat in your state stands with Jack Smith – if he doesn’t get enough support, he won't be able to release his report before he steps down!
**[_Let’s set an example: Nobody threatens good, honest public servants like Jack Smith. Stand with Special Counsel Jack Smith in his quest to hold Donald Trump accountable »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241120_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=22552%2E4449941%2EBrTKAS)**

name: John Rich
subject: This is an unusual favor, but I have to ask you
body:
Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists?

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcfqj1aatdkjd19uf45h0p5vbsh4bhv97nsrd8po_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, “Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?”

It’s not Woke teachers (although they don’t help).
It’s not even school boards.
It’s Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like _Where the Red Fern Grows_ , _Huckleberry Finn_ , and other classics.

Scholastic is now promoting books like _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8anugkg9fan18a3hc49vaolhnpci1ojj302mrf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsoutb3cpb2lpg286t59277m12kkq9740tthvihg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)
SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic.

Here’s how you can help.

[Please help us promote new book fairs in schools to replace Scholastic. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree? I am hoping to raise $50,000. Click here to donate any amount today. >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhsr2qjl0lpfqji69ggge26m0cmjkkaqvcdr12j0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)
[Donate $10 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1nmekbr3nriq5vd4mjg7gi1okli6ttikkfte4o0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1dajt2pq9g5s55jn9srbu26ir3kvk5tlurl3g2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7bc0eqj1suibegv6vjqgplbpbh76f0gt1kks5h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg37150l2b4qrsv33rsdrb0sdu5h57geaunh82co_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhht9jk3ah20k9q6i0eleks97m59fuu6jl22vrp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znhf98qac2qgo7obfmhiscdngqdtbm2tq4op0m0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk3r9t0f2rr858f1jope37recd4065rik6p9hmn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2u8i1e0j643ih8g1rni65ak4tftm0fkf53mhj3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)
SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaf9j5pi7sp0pjqnokjt8gldnkifs9rv1luh3oh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs) [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zstbtm2fejomg5vgevqfchj2ik7t27fehl9sggg8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)
SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances.

It’s the same with our kids’ literature.

[My goal is to raise $50,000 this month to bring SkyTree book fairs to more public schools across the country. It costs roughly $4,500 for SkyTree to host a book fair.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4dv1vhueb1llsjjrkksis25uaise6oaskmc3ir8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs) [Donate $10 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrdtia6fmrbt3pl4lkgatlsnmau9o8el1sq1gmu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbnpcq5at1f5n34dn5tccnn27aavfgut6eq85a5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcebrl8nq8j1moqp702ckcu5gn7bbu4bk4ff8cgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl83cf95902hpedgldk8kf2h355brm151a5dvcs8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk786bc69cemr0u9t1gc7ndvpojqv5e7k86j4hn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpfvlepptnpqeqgd0gb2vlvju3hegvtqp0to2kmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuib9c3vsofpephk8epfokq472lg846jvucb0dsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zueuu0gkd6o0giplem9kcf704pk3qfj3hhn84jag_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj6apb0clh2bs)
Thank you, and God bless,

John Rich

| | **CA-13:**
Adam Gray (D) vs. John Duarte (R) **TOO CLOSE TO CALL**

Folks,
Right now, one of the most competitive House races in the country is still too close to call.
Former California Assemblymember and Democratic nominee in California's 13th District, Adam Gray, and his extremist opponent remain locked in a dead-heat in a race that could determine the House Majority.
With Donald Trump in the White House and extreme Republicans controlling the Senate, a Democratic House Majority would be our last line of defense against the extremist agenda.
[**Flipping CA-13 and the House Majority blue has never been more important. name: PA Dems
subject: our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

Our democracy only works when every voice is heard. As tens of thousands of votes are still being counted across the Commonwealth, we need the resources to fight back against efforts to disenfranchise Pennsylvania voters.
