name: Troy Downing
subject: It’s American Education Week!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter, it's American Education Week!

As a former educator, I know firsthand how important education is in our children's lives and how crucial it is for them to have great teachers and quality curriculum in our schools.

This week, let's celebrate and honor the hard work and dedication of our educators and anyone involved in creating a learning environment where our children can thrive.

While celebrating our achievements, we can also reflect on where our education system can improve. When I'm in Congress, I will fight to ensure every child has access to a quality education and a safe learning environment where they can grow and thrive.

This is where I'll need your help, Peter. **[Will you take a minute to answer our Education Survey? Your feedback on the state of our education system will help shape our children's future. Please take 5 minutes to respond:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._HwdK_diPL4aosd49syfA "Will you take a minute to answer our Education Survey? Your feedback on the state of our education system will help shape our children’s future. Please take 5 minutes to respond:")**

---
| [**TAKE THE AMERICAN EDUCATION SURVEY**** **](https://trk.emails.troydowning. "DONATE")
---

Thank you for your input on this important issue!

Best regards,
Troy Downing

---

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity” on DVD
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsi0YltWDN
Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced
persecution and hardship, and settled theological
disputes…
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osi0YltWDN

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

Learning
about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced
persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes
enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are
especially important today, as Christians face increasing
opposition from the culture.

But,
beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early
Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to
proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the
foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history,
can make understanding the most important historical points
difficult.

To
uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online
course, "Ancient Christianity," now available on DVD.

In this
course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first
four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways
the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you
help support this course so we can make it available to millions
of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your
support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for
any donations of $100 or more.

You can
watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of
"Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63856336:si0YltWDN:m:3:2627245898:829EE0A6E0AB055CBDB06F6F381D71A2:r

Thank you
for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story
of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best
regards,

Jeremiah
Regan, Ph.D.
Executive
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

name: Derek Tran
subject: I’m still in this fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T05f55993-af8c-466f-81f4-89f3ac436bcf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52ae55f7-fe13-40ac-ad63-d18b8398aba4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter – It’s Derek Tran. I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue. I wanted to reach out and give you and update you on our race: We just took the lead, but only 314 votes separate us and our opponent. Every ballot drop has brought us closer to taking the lead in this toss-up race, but victory is going to come down to counting every single vote. [We need to make sure every vote is counted in order to win, so I have to ask for your support. Will you split a contribution between our legal fund and Blue Amp Action to help us count every vote? Any contribution would go a long way in making sure every voice is heard.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te50e2451-6ee3-4e9f-b98d-25572242944e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you for standing by me, Derek

| | |

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0088bb9-c9b8-4ed8-9e12-b48a3c96a897/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Learn from Victor Davis Hanson

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2f854a8bbc8047a5abda31ec1e8a0bff&_e=a-ZRBQCrh_A9ZQPRFIvKLdWkQnq88T_cMF4FotExM7MSKvt5kyrp9EhcyC3KOVW3LO3gnlUUsh639nBh7CRpkQpihKul_Dcn1z_1kf4zVYxhniqjO7ayJNgll637SH4iCr99pjlV11kgsu8JF1wwi82AX449BMHPnFKA8L6aPC1AC6iz0G6NCFa7Ze9NywqlLlxo8vkKnTseX4c3pXXtzoZrHNi9haEALB1EGqnBNcZUV90_J21U7rARC_rfYAFfjD94vZxr5-_2XWz3w3d8OVIHnnGnJyBovSoma_7yT0H5b8WJLwBYRLHKWJtF5f_Xm-8KXk8xNalAN5ljOOSAXCWT_84D-VFwjuShSBr73YWemNwD2OLSRuuWRwA34baOLsvFoauZdB-tbEZBVUGDKM4fDIy81pbdNgKjMcHNwC9AwSUWV0nARRB4J-d6yyOk)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2f854a8bbc8047a5abda31ec1e8a0bff&_e=a-ZRBQCrh_A9ZQPRFIvKLdWkQnq88T_cMF4FotExM7MSKvt5kyrp9EhcyC3KOVW3LO3gnlUUsh639nBh7CRpkQpihKul_Dcn1z_1kf4zVYxhniqjO7ayJNgll637SH4iCr99pjlV11kgsu8JF1wwi82AX449BMHPnFKA8L6aPC1AC6iz0G6NCFa7Ze9NywqlLlxo8vkKnTseX4c3pXXtzoZrHNi9haEALB1EGqnBNcZUV90_J21U7rARC_rfYAFfjD94vZxr5-_2XWz3w3d8OdxHch-0FQh6uMfHWldabl1Jn8Wdxk-7vVoKTTcLfx5HjO9Bp3kSmROMdtldTVjAebZjaip6KtYExLLqEMdJ_mG5C1Amcvm0fqfEDDww9SXy9nwsYFX8jIOPrgEsbOqdNIJAiWspCw6anM8qPoUAPzyb3Zf8cYZT9JNPJeT94NaC)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2f854a8bbc8047a5abda31ec1e8a0bff&_e=a-ZRBQCrh_A9ZQPRFIvKLdWkQnq88T_cMF4FotExM7MSKvt5kyrp9EhcyC3KOVW3LO3gnlUUsh639nBh7CRpkQpihKul_Dcn1z_1kf4zVYxhniqjO7ayJNgll637SH4iCr99pjlV11kgsu8JF1wwi82AX449BMHPnFKA8L6aPC1AC6iz0G6NCFa7Ze9NywqlLlxo8vkKnTseX4c3pXXtzoZrHNi9haEALB1EGqnBNcZUV90_J21U7rARC_rfYAFfjD94vZxr5-_2XWz3w3d8OTWrSb7far-946AeiIxVqV5kSMmtUK4oCjGOPaF8UKkaCYzDliPMo4td_uypjO_eVp87aW61k6qnsuEeNYozZZoMnv0CvMOCB7gsxQ5n_lLQy2Wf-Ke0QarN4BXHw0g1KWm1KHSGjIVFZ7HAxRLQnp3AoGgzHZaQTZKk3PWIAIdp) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Official 2024 Exit Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This poll won’t be complete without your response

|
---
| | | Dear Friend,

_**We need your help to continue making history.**_ As a trusted ally, I'm inviting you to participate in an extremely comprehensive Exit Poll hosted by House Republicans. **Your input will be instrumental in shaping the future of our nation and our party.**

---

---
_***Closes at 11:59 PM***_

These few questions are key to future strategy. We need every Republicans to submit their response and help us continue WINNING.

**So, I'm asking you to take a few minutes to complete the Official House GOP Exit Poll.** Your input will be kept confidential, and you'll be represented as a valued member of our party.

---

God Bless,

Newt Gingrich

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97383124/513250699/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjBkMjlhZi01Y2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hkpc16S58FjDdE5DhOY8Q2Sa2oG2mOyuYRUxX1eQh0M=&emci=e491ce5b-5ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=db0d29af-5ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=26261389)

| | Since Election Day, I've been busy, and I want to take you along the journey with me. The night right after Election Day, I promised my boys that we'd have a Star Wars movie. A New Hope is what we all need. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97383128/513250703/-1197072038?refcode=2024-11-20-senate&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=db0d29af-5ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjBkMjlhZi01Y2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hkpc16S58FjDdE5DhOY8Q2Sa2oG2mOyuYRUxX1eQh0M=) Then, I got my welcome package to start up in the Senate! We started orientation last week, and I've been quickly getting up to speed. There was no time for a breather, but I'm ready to get to work. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97383133/513250708/-1197072038?refcode=2024-11-20-senate&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=db0d29af-5ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjBkMjlhZi01Y2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hkpc16S58FjDdE5DhOY8Q2Sa2oG2mOyuYRUxX1eQh0M=) I met with a few of my new colleagues, including Maryland Senator-elect Angela Alsobrooks, California Senator-elect Adam Schiff, Michigan Senator-elect Elissa Slotkin, Arizona Senator-elect Ruben Gallego, and Delaware Senator-elect Lisa Blunt Rochester – and a majority of them are familiar faces from the House. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97383137/513250712/-1197072038?refcode=2024-11-20-senate&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=db0d29af-5ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjBkMjlhZi01Y2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hkpc16S58FjDdE5DhOY8Q2Sa2oG2mOyuYRUxX1eQh0M=) We are ready to serve our nation. Ready for the Senate. Ready for this moment. Finally, a few days ago, I moved into my new Senate office. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97383140/513250717/-1197072038?refcode=2024-11-20-senate&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=db0d29af-5ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjBkMjlhZi01Y2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hkpc16S58FjDdE5DhOY8Q2Sa2oG2mOyuYRUxX1eQh0M=) Yes, it's a bare wall, windowless transition space in the basement that looks like the set of the show Severance, but that won't stop me from being proud of what it took to get here to the Senate and excited for the opportunity. **I'm ready to get to work in the Senate for New Jerseyans.** Again, I can't thank you enough for all you've done to get us here. I hope you're taking time to rest, recover, and then get back up and join me in our movement to deliver results. Together, we can ensure we move our country forward. Onward, _Andy_ [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97383144/513250721/-1197072038?refcode=2024-11-20-senate&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=db0d29af-5ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjBkMjlhZi01Y2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hkpc16S58FjDdE5DhOY8Q2Sa2oG2mOyuYRUxX1eQh0M=) |

name: John Rich
subject: This is an unusual favor, but I have to ask you
body:
Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists?

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z91hp6keuhgr1nougot2sunqqmtseinvneemagm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, “Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?”

It’s not Woke teachers (although they don’t help).
It’s not even school boards.
It’s Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like _Where the Red Fern Grows_ , _Huckleberry Finn_ , and other classics.

Scholastic is now promoting books like _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zi1tv81ltl0ki4i8e60e7bmo9lmhe3ptog9n0bo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs)[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zniru07ka787q2c7o015tmck56nhk3r9gp7ibmm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs)
SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic.

Here’s how you can help.

[Please help us promote new book fairs in schools to replace Scholastic. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree? I am hoping to raise $50,000. Click here to donate any amount today. >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zuv7fsnl1sd5r9uir96pfonktlqn8t7mmbttnuq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs)
[Donate $10 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zheade6a2egdjumilkt43c77h09lk8c5ca0edr9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqjmkat9cjs7lviogh45f0hp21vj9jrc0ildvpp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmujt5e44l4li214schrduhfehghc7rmt5jhmhlg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5rca1rcnl2fvt4l57vcctp2mmug1dfh2ooapjno_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zut89ulfnldqug80hadm6rspjsi5dsl9qhiu0m90_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z55ggu3o6ereeo7i4qfdi070l05v4g1rakvhgf4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmg6jru0qiq57gc0fme4vjofklannia2t5iqsdgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zma9mpgu58bt90hrfq1i5pnjontvoju6lgg4smgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs)
SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you.
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcdo8stkv2addosal9mgbhs2vhh48091lspkmtt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs) [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zphcpi9l5nq6s4vmp2bnoa71a8g6tdr3t6lrnkvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs)
SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances.

It’s the same with our kids’ literature.

[My goal is to raise $50,000 this month to bring SkyTree book fairs to more public schools across the country. It costs roughly $4,500 for SkyTree to host a book fair.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4q6easd2ognv5567n2ot6tff9r62arc005e9i48_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs) [Donate $10 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8oi3f4qitpuc8rmq1kc20n3du5p2prjqkm0cpe0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chj61oj4c9h2bs)

clean_body: Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | "SkyTree Book Fairs" Friend, Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools. But have you ever wondered, “Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?” It’s not Woke teachers (although they don’t help). It’s not even school boards. It’s Scholastic Book Fairs. Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows , Huckleberry Finn , and other classics. Scholastic is now promoting books like Welcome to St. Hell , which promotes trans ideology to kids. SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic. Here’s how you can help. SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you. SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances. It’s the same with our kids’ literature. Thank you, and God bless, John Rich SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Mark Pukita, GFI Ohio
subject: 🆘 Health Freedom Urgent CALL TO ACTION!
body:
Health Freedom Urgent CALL TO ACTION! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=029343ba01&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7c6ce1a182&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | **
HEALTH FREEDOM ALERT!
WE NEED YOUR HELP!
THIS IS AN IMPORTANT "ASK"!
PLEASE READ THIS & TAKE ACTION!
(1st Request)**

---
| **HEALTH FREEDOM
Call to Action**
**Please call Steve Huffman today at 614-466-6247 and ask him, “Will you stand with the people and doctors of Ohio and adopt the most recent version of HB 73 and CALL it to a VOTE during the first scheduled health committee meeting? When is the first committee meeting scheduled?”**

**HB 73 ("The Dave & Angie Patient and Health Provider Protection Act", Sponsors: Gross & Loychik) is a bill that:**
* guarantees doctors the right to prescribe any off-label drug that is FDA approved, legal in the state of Ohio, and not a controlled substance, without the threat of losing their license.
* ensures medical free speech.
* guarantees patients a pathway to access off-label drugs prescribed by their provider in both outpatient and inpatient settings.
* has a provision to protect patients from being denied food or fluids while in the hospital.
* has a provision that states the World Health Organization has no jurisdiction in the state of Ohio and that no rule, mandate, or order shall be enforced or funded by any state agency.

The members of the Ohio House of Representatives apparently understood that. That’s why HB 73 passed overwhelmingly by a vote of 75-16 ([https://legislature.ohio.gov/legislation/135/hb73/votes](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=eef50add98&e=5c740fa3e2)), with bipartisan support **18 months ago**.

Unfortunately, the Huffmans, **cousins Matt & Steve**, don't seem to respect that God-given right—and therefore demonstrate that they respect neither God nor their constituents. Steve won’t let it out of the Senate Health Committee and Matt doesn’t want to bring it to the floor for a vote. Why? **One might conclude it's because they are heavily-funded by the healthcare industry.**

**Time is running out. If it doesn’t get out of committee in this session - it dies & must be reintroduced next year. These are your employees. TELL THEM what you expect them to do! Together we can get action!**

Here is your call to action:

First, contact Senate Health Chairman Steve Huffman and ask him “Will you stand with the people and doctors of Ohio and adopt the most recent version of HB 73 and CALL it to a VOTE during the first scheduled health committee meeting? When is the first committee meeting?”

📬 SHuffman@ohiosenate.gov
☎️ (614) 466-6247

Second, contact the Senate Health Committee and **your personal senator**(**[find them HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=5c04bcc815&e=5c740fa3e2)**) to let them know why HB 73 is important to you.

⬇️ EASY CUT & PASTE EMAILS HERE ⬇️

SHuffman@ohiosenate.gov,
johnson@ohiosenate.gov,
antonio@ohiosenate.gov,
Romanchuk@ohiosenate.gov,
hackett@ohiosenate.gov,
Ingram@ohiosenate.gov,
roegner@ohiosenate.gov

News you can use. Brought to you by: [https://www.ohioamf.org/](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=79c7412a50&e=5c740fa3e2)

**Please call Steve Huffman today at 614-466-6247 and ask him, “Will you stand with the people and doctors of Ohio and adopt the most recent version of HB 73 and CALL it to a VOTE during the first scheduled health committee meeting? When is the first committee meeting scheduled?”**

---
|
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d1e391dfa4&e=5c740fa3e2)

**Mark Pukita

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=3fc4a6829a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=3fc4a6829a).

Peter, is there ANYTHING that I can say right now to convince you to make a contribution to my campaign?

**What if I told you** that more than 40,000 people lost their lives to gun violence last year while the gun lobby strengthened its vice grip on GOP leaders?

**What if I told you** that GOP leaders across the nation are rapidly stripping away our reproductive freedoms – but as long as I’m attorney general, New York will _always_ be a safe haven for all who need reproductive care?

**And if I told you** that the most powerful and corrupt forces in our country who I work to hold accountable are rooting for me to fail so they can continue to act without consequence?

**Peter, truly, the list could go on and on. There are so many reasons why I need your support right now to start this new year, so I’m humbly asking:[Can I count on you to chip in $5 to my campaign right now so I can keep New York protected from far-right extremism and corruption?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97384447/513254435/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1752-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njc1ZmM3Ny01ZmE3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V5bA0tHHNdgKETcEU7-85ADStTeb7-XRGMEVhQTpY_0=)**

clean_body: | | | = Peter, is there ANYTHING that I can say right now to convince you to make a contribution to my campaign? What if I told you that more than 40,000 people lost their lives to gun violence last year while the gun lobby strengthened its vice grip on GOP leaders? What if I told you that GOP leaders across the nation are rapidly stripping away our reproductive freedoms – but as long as I’m attorney general, New York will always be a safe haven for all who need reproductive care? And if I told you that the most powerful and corrupt forces in our country who I work to hold accountable are rooting for me to fail so they can continue to act without consequence? Peter, truly, the list could go on and on. There are so many reasons why I need your support right now to start this new year, so I’m humbly asking:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for being a fearless fighter for justice with me. Your continued support means more than you know. Letitia | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’ve seized all my money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=380c5491e75c404e81575234043f0866&_e=RCILvYWR6f_-o77ZarH9-6OEAl7uElY5y1KyKoFDvqP7eCmLxD8BhZ57QkS0TXh-g676OLrMwnj9RRvId3BJ2WLaZ62mbNJDnM_p0XRKFew-JFDURLX4-vAbk7nrMkT6UePYmQE2J57PRc0umXDsYruGdJzvPF7gTkNYoGQmxPf2_VJBMAkfh3EtpBBnyi2y9bsSUQpr32cjGTNYVTWBVCoVxPkzCdV-AREHIFQZdSBz463xUAS5UKdgi1UvKsNtsdpbkGqorcrpDzNUCUcOQMu-NVX8bJKso9zAn7GN_QOtjyMPE222HPFDu7zrTlTAmL_Hz_iaQ7aaoPv_rJj4Y9SkJIFqc-b-tQs5cEO_biDHH7kaI_rVixrBDyU1ymU7XxYTQFAL--a_MG7AqRZOrA%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there’s one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That’s a LIE.**_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---
And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story.
---
But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen.
---

clean_body: But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice. But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice. | Dear Friend, Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account. Imagine all of your money being seized. That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me. I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH... As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been taken away from me! But there’s one thing I want to make clear... ...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust. That’s a LIE. The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that. And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story. But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just my own freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: Let’s finish strong

body:
I’m counting on you.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4880%2E552475%2EtFcjRB)
Peter,
We’ve done such incredible work together. Today, I’m asking you to keep working with us.
I’ve always stood up for the people of our Commonwealth — and I believe every person’s voice should be heard.
That’s why we have to see this across the finish line.
[**I’ll never stop fighting for Pennsylvania, but I need you with me to help us keep going:****Will you help us fight to ensure that every Pennsylvanians' voice is heard by donating $****5****or more right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241120-2?refcode=em20241120-2&refcode2=4880_552475_tFcjRB&akid=4880%2E552475%2EtFcjRB)

Democracy means ensuring everyone's voices are heard and that they matter. Pennsylvania is the birthplace of democracy, and I’m not giving up that fight. I hope you’re not ready to give up either.
**Let’s finish this strong:[Invest $5 or more in the fight to ensure every PA voter's voice is heard.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241120-2?refcode=em20241120-2&refcode2=4880_552475_tFcjRB&akid=4880%2E552475%2EtFcjRB)

Bob Casey

| Look, Republicans may be in control of the House, Senate, White House, and even Supreme Court...

**_But there’s still _one thing_ we can do to keep Trump in check:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241120_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=18078%2E878179%2ETDMLSu) **[URGENT ACTION REQUIRED: DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241120_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=18078%2E878179%2ETDMLSu)** | [**15,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED TODAY: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241120_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=18078%2E878179%2ETDMLSu)

Folks, we _cannot_ safeguard our Democracy if Trump is NEVER held accountable — but thanks to his MAGA Supreme Court picks, he’s practically a KING!

**We can still stop Trump from causing irreparable damage over the next 4 years,_but we must act FAST:_**

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Dear Friend,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there’s one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That’s a LIE.**_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---
And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story.
---
But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, because even after EVERYTHING the Left has done to me, I will _NEVER_ SURRENDER the fight for freedom and justice. **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9e9630e8e073490b9b5ac68586c9eb9b&_e=Dg1Z45INdp0gsAh3KzfSfsOc0txl4k_R29vURsIOrBFcUKokSkJ3vwwrIMHDtP2uaJEyRIkuLWv3KUxArunJMMH0_67k5w0mtrLtbQYdaXQT_HzYbGoum3LewPrGxKf_hlrnjgQB1Voraxla5sy0NPXHA8xFbjWUYHhy7FfQFw8wORWrN5HafwGurWA8GQXyrJVC7feadWHnxpfO0BbpnZZ_doyzgf84x8KDVsRNnmymyO3sDCGAnvzeuvb1kpJvjzixAdS8UJnoPQcpcteQupQMUlyFyArQEsY182EqzDn3OgwUOWwzwKKB3OcYaZ8ddXEgrOV-DmfOism8rxqcKPAmSakvbZFhzacQVwxmVDA2Sa3uIj0lWOKe80yQalr2tV8ThpQBz0csx678NUE2pg%3D%3D)

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. An image of a rooster on a haybale, crowing in the golden dawn light. The text on the image reads "In the darkest hour, Raise Your Voice. You're a part of the dawn."
Friends,
It's been fifteen days since the election. Before getting into my thoughts about what's happening at the national level, let me share good news first!
**I 'm excited to announce my candidacy for appointment to the Washington State House of Representatives**, serving the 33rd LD!
The appointment process is quick - the King County Council will make the final decision on **December 10th**.
There are several things you can do to help, no matter where in King County you live! 1. Spread the word on **social media** \- tag @KCCouncil and [my social accounts](https://substack.com/redirect/a4d91f83-b204-4679-9293-edb933722e14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg),
2\. If you live in the 33rd, **write** to the Chair of the 33rd LD Dems supporting my candidacy (email template [here](https://substack.com/redirect/8b1e3809-b252-489d-a545-7f16c55a2fbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- it's quick to fill it in!),
3\. >From anywhere in King County, **email** (or call!) the King County Council ([here's](https://substack.com/redirect/5473e1ee-ce70-4e1a-b18d-3eff43614abc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a pre-filled template, just fill in the blanks!), and
4\. If you can, **attend meetings** in solidarity -- all the details are on the new website, [here](https://substack.com/redirect/82772592-442c-4712-9243-428db845a6cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (tab over to Support!).
Your support has been essential to our historic campaign for Congress, where we achieved record voter engagement (offering materials in 14 languages!) and an extraordinary **89,000+** votes in a few short months.
Together, we've proven that people-powered campaigns **can** and**do** make a difference. Let's keep building momentum for bold, progressive leadership in Washington State!
[Share "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/redirect/49078e28-82e0-44b5-b05c-060c6725974a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Back to the current state of the country, and the world... what a tumultuous two weeks it's been, and Trump hasn't even taken office yet.
**Here are a few items I 've been reading lately,** which have helped deepen my understanding of what happened, and where we go from here.
_(Sharing does not constitute a full endorsement; only that I found these items thought-provoking enough to be valuable.)_
"[How Joe Biden Can Still Slow MAGA Fascism and Save American Lives](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid/p-151378609)"
The President can put in place substantial protections for vulnerable groups before Donald Trump takes office. Will he?
(Or will he enable a "[smooth transition](https://substack.com/redirect/f16361a5-ed3e-42c3-9c22-235b5593547b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" to Trump and only take action to [amplify the conflict](https://substack.com/redirect/03c5e228-9416-42fa-9e4a-650e77e124a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) between Russia and Ukraine, putting NATO countries at risk - despite a [majority of Ukrainians](https://substack.com/redirect/f97459e0-462e-4590-92ec-bb59a3830564?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) wanting an end to the fighting?)
"[How Hitler Used Democracy to Take Power](https://substack.com/redirect/b29f8ed2-e6aa-486c-b611-1c125c55075c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
Historically speaking, it is quite common for authoritarians to rise to power democratically - and then destroy, in their wake, the institutions that they used to ascend so that no one else can follow them. Adolf Hitler is a prime example.
_" The big joke on democracy is that it gives its mortal enemies the tools to its own destruction." \- Joseph Goebbels_
"[Bernie Would Have Won](https://substack.com/redirect/9211dfe3-7e6a-4988-816b-9fdcaa7c18e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
The Democrats ensured the rise of Trump's authoritarian nationalism by refusing to be the party of the working class. Thoughtful analysis spanning the last ~30 years.
"[How Republicans *Actually* Stole the 2024 Election](https://substack.com/redirect/ddb494e2-560f-415a-b720-c413ca2da287?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
Extensive, persistent, and horribly successful structural disenfranchisement of Black and brown voters is not a conspiracy theory, but a fact - and it helped Republicans win this election despite deeply unpopular policies.
"[The Politics of Cultural Despair](https://substack.com/redirect/a2d6f252-e16e-4bf1-bbfd-557b74b58ce5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
When the majority of people feel disenfranchised, ignored, defrauded, and deprived of basic decency and the opportunity to create a better life, of _course_ cult leaders arise - and the more bombastic, egotistical, and disconnected from reality they are, the more popular they become. We fix this, by fixing the basic human dignity, meaning, and sustenance of _**work.**_
"[Immigration is a mess. Here's how to fix it.](https://substack.com/redirect/bc639a87-f85d-4616-ad4f-ac769971f3bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
Ten reasonably common-sense suggestions for a balanced, structured, systematic, and socioeconomically supportive approach to improving our immigration system.
"[We were lied into the Gaza genocide. Al Jazeera has shown us how.](https://substack.com/redirect/1b8cdfb6-78d6-48ce-94c2-af76e2c52fcd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
In a commercial media and information space chronically deprived of true journalism and accountability, Al Jazeera has reliably provided real reporting - which Western journalists consistently ignore. Their latest is an expose on the atrocity propaganda that arose in the wake of October 7, and a detailed analysis of what really happened.
"[The End of Inevitability](https://substack.com/redirect/d5929ae8-3278-47eb-8965-2a1b8489f428?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
It can't be assumed that human progress is inevitable, or that the good guys always win. Despite generations of meaningful progress on many global metrics, something else is ascendant in the United States. How do we make meaning from this? How do we go forward with decency, dignity, and courage, and put our efforts towards _making_ good outcomes happen?
"It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWxpc3NhNGNvbmdyZXNzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.-hqVomYnA5_NQCz6QU4GsiBf7cth_p59f9aKlKcVg54?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=151790787)
* * *
There's a lot to be said about the current state of America, and most of it isn't good. From record-setting levels of [credit card debt](https://substack.com/redirect/cdbe8868-bad3-4f5c-9a6a-bbd418d6ec91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [economic inequality](https://substack.com/redirect/45d3cfe7-ff82-4c7d-8ade-0edc3eaf5f4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), to a bloated military budget allocated to an entity - the Pentagon - that [can't pass an audit](https://substack.com/redirect/e3ad25da-10c8-4f5c-b6c8-f76e96316d4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when rank-and-file servicemembers qualify for [food stamps](https://substack.com/redirect/81a9dba5-274f-41ff-b13b-51d9ad2ce337?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (and our tax dollars [continue to fund](https://substack.com/redirect/5e66d993-4225-4987-a2ba-df64ccb7c316?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) an ongoing [genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/f4005ed4-3f63-40b7-aa68-23ced419b4b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and campaign of [ethnic cleansing](https://substack.com/redirect/78cd8ee1-a78f-4642-b37b-0533c0f33b3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), a [housing crisis](https://substack.com/redirect/4c3d5185-91fa-4ee1-bce4-b30c6db64a79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a broken [student loan](https://substack.com/redirect/69d86187-effa-4518-91e1-bdf837ce220f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) system, stubbornly high [food costs](https://substack.com/redirect/c0d2cc74-031c-4692-b9fc-823c67fece51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) impacting millions of families every day, and more... we live in difficult times. As civic participants, beyond our personal concerns - how should we handle this state of affairs?
Our first challenge is not to fall into toxic partisanship. By and large, our fellow Americans want the same things we do and [believe in the same fundamental principles](https://substack.com/redirect/30b88e32-d92d-4805-996f-73f055238523?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) even if we disagree on their proper application. If we stop talking to each other, we lose perspective, and we lose the ability to build the essential relationships of trust, collaboration, and mutual support that will provide alternative structures for resilience for us all.
Beyond that - despair is counterproductive, and I personally believe it's off the table for me. As a parent, I **must** be constructively engaged in working towards a better future. Anger, grief, dissatisfaction, disappointment - these can be constructive, if harnessed effectively - but what are we motivating ourselves _**towards?**_
When I consider how to approach my own life, in this time and place, I choose to fall back on first principles.
Liberty. Justice. Equality. Truth.
The goal of human decency and kindness. Respect and personal responsibility.
The duty of the strong to protect the weak. The duty of the powerful to provide for the vulnerable. The duty of the privileged to work to reduce inequality and empower those who've been left behind.
For me, these are non-negotiable. They're soul-deep necessities that are intrinsic to my existence, and essential to humanity's - and America's - future. When I ignore or abandon these imperatives, I rapidly fall into depression, doom, self-disgust, and a puny and wasteful helplessness. When I work in a way that honors these principles, I'm nourished and restored from the inside out.
Which is what I wish for all of you.
[Get 10% off forever](https://substack.com/redirect/db50549b-e9ac-4ff9-aced-d0394d1b4f96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Let me close with a short story my husband shared with me today:
"A man bought a rooster at the market.
When they got home, the man said 'If you crow tomorrow morning, I'll kill you and eat you.' So, in the morning, the rooster didn't crow - it stretched and flapped its wings, instead.
That day, the man told the rooster 'If you stretch and flap your wings tomorrow, I'll kill you and eat you.' So the next day, the rooster neither crowed, nor stretched its wings - it stretched its neck, instead.
Then, the man told the rooster, 'If you stretch your neck tomorrow, I'll kill you and eat you.' The following morning, the rooster neither crowed, nor flapped its wings, nor stretched its neck... then the man said 'Very good. Now, if you want to live, lay an egg.'
The rooster began crying. The man asked the rooster why. It said, 'I was fooling myself that I could escape my fate. I wish I'd crowed loud and clear the first day. That way, at least I would have died with my dignity intact.'"
Moral of the story: **Raise your voice**. Even - and especially - when you're given reason to fear, raise your voice. Crow loud and clear.
Let's let the whole world know we're here.

Two weeks on from the 2024 elections, we face critical questions: 1. What happened? 2. How should we respond? | | | Nov 20 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- An image of a rooster on a haybale, crowing in the golden dawn light. The text on the image reads "In the darkest hour, Raise Your Voice. You're a part of the dawn." Friends, It's been fifteen days since the election. Before getting into my thoughts about what's happening at the national level, let me share good news first! I 'm excited to announce my candidacy for appointment to the Washington State House of Representatives, serving the 33rd LD! The appointment process is quick - the King County Council will make the final decision on December 10th. There are several things you can do to help, no matter where in King County you live! 1. Spread the word on social media \- tag @KCCouncil and , 2\. If you live in the 33rd, write to the Chair of the 33rd LD Dems supporting my candidacy (email template \- it's quick to fill it in!), 3\. >From anywhere in King County, email (or call!) the King County Council ( a pre-filled template, just fill in the blanks!), and 4\. If you can, attend meetings in solidarity -- all the details are on the new website, (tab over to Support!). Your support has been essential to our historic campaign for Congress, where we achieved record voter engagement (offering materials in 14 languages!) and an extraordinary 89,000+ votes in a few short months. Together, we've proven that people-powered campaigns can anddo make a difference. Let's keep building momentum for bold, progressive leadership in Washington State! Back to the current state of the country, and the world... what a tumultuous two weeks it's been, and Trump hasn't even taken office yet. Here are a few items I 've been reading lately, which have helped deepen my understanding of what happened, and where we go from here. (Sharing does not constitute a full endorsement; only that I found these items thought-provoking enough to be valuable.) "" The President can put in place substantial protections for vulnerable groups before Donald Trump takes office. Will he? (Or will he enable a "" to Trump and only take action to between Russia and Ukraine, putting NATO countries at risk - despite a wanting an end to the fighting?) "" Historically speaking, it is quite common for authoritarians to rise to power democratically - and then destroy, in their wake, the institutions that they used to ascend so that no one else can follow them. Adolf Hitler is a prime example. " The big joke on democracy is that it gives its mortal enemies the tools to its own destruction." \- Joseph Goebbels "" The Democrats ensured the rise of Trump's authoritarian nationalism by refusing to be the party of the working class. Thoughtful analysis spanning the last ~30 years. "" Extensive, persistent, and horribly successful structural disenfranchisement of Black and brown voters is not a conspiracy theory, but a fact - and it helped Republicans win this election despite deeply unpopular policies. "" When the majority of people feel disenfranchised, ignored, defrauded, and deprived of basic decency and the opportunity to create a better life, of course cult leaders arise - and the more bombastic, egotistical, and disconnected from reality they are, the more popular they become. We fix this, by fixing the basic human dignity, meaning, and sustenance of work. "" Ten reasonably common-sense suggestions for a balanced, structured, systematic, and socioeconomically supportive approach to improving our immigration system. "" In a commercial media and information space chronically deprived of true journalism and accountability, Al Jazeera has reliably provided real reporting - which Western journalists consistently ignore. Their latest is an expose on the atrocity propaganda that arose in the wake of October 7, and a detailed analysis of what really happened. "" It can't be assumed that human progress is inevitable, or that the good guys always win. Despite generations of meaningful progress on many global metrics, something else is ascendant in the United States. How do we make meaning from this? How do we go forward with decency, dignity, and courage, and put our efforts towards making good outcomes happen? "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. There's a lot to be said about the current state of America, and most of it isn't good. From record-setting levels of and , to a bloated military budget allocated to an entity - the Pentagon - that when rank-and-file servicemembers qualify for (and our tax dollars an ongoing and campaign of ), a , a broken system, stubbornly high impacting millions of families every day, and more... we live in difficult times. As civic participants, beyond our personal concerns - how should we handle this state of affairs? Our first challenge is not to fall into toxic partisanship. By and large, our fellow Americans want the same things we do and even if we disagree on their proper application. If we stop talking to each other, we lose perspective, and we lose the ability to build the essential relationships of trust, collaboration, and mutual support that will provide alternative structures for resilience for us all. Beyond that - despair is counterproductive, and I personally believe it's off the table for me. As a parent, I must be constructively engaged in working towards a better future. Anger, grief, dissatisfaction, disappointment - these can be constructive, if harnessed effectively - but what are we motivating ourselves towards? When I consider how to approach my own life, in this time and place, I choose to fall back on first principles. Liberty. Justice. Equality. Truth. The goal of human decency and kindness. Respect and personal responsibility. The duty of the strong to protect the weak. The duty of the powerful to provide for the vulnerable. The duty of the privileged to work to reduce inequality and empower those who've been left behind. For me, these are non-negotiable. They're soul-deep necessities that are intrinsic to my existence, and essential to humanity's - and America's - future. When I ignore or abandon these imperatives, I rapidly fall into depression, doom, self-disgust, and a puny and wasteful helplessness. When I work in a way that honors these principles, I'm nourished and restored from the inside out. Which is what I wish for all of you. Let me close with a short story my husband shared with me today: "A man bought a rooster at the market. When they got home, the man said 'If you crow tomorrow morning, I'll kill you and eat you.' So, in the morning, the rooster didn't crow - it stretched and flapped its wings, instead. That day, the man told the rooster 'If you stretch and flap your wings tomorrow, I'll kill you and eat you.' So the next day, the rooster neither crowed, nor stretched its wings - it stretched its neck, instead. Then, the man told the rooster, 'If you stretch your neck tomorrow, I'll kill you and eat you.' The following morning, the rooster neither crowed, nor flapped its wings, nor stretched its neck... then the man said 'Very good. Now, if you want to live, lay an egg.' The rooster began crying. The man asked the rooster why. It said, 'I was fooling myself that I could escape my fate. I wish I'd crowed loud and clear the first day. That way, at least I would have died with my dignity intact.'" Moral of the story: Raise your voice**. Even - and especially - when you're given reason to fear, raise your voice. Crow loud and clear. Let's let the whole world know we're here. | Get more from Melissa Chaudhry in the Substack app ---|--- Available for iOS and Android You 're currently a free subscriber to "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry. To support the mission and access the full experience, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Melissa Chaudhry 6727 Martin Luther King Jr Way S, Suite M, #1117 Seattle, WA 98118 ? ?

name: Holiday Meals via USO
subject: Your MATCHED gift can make Thanksgiving special for our heroes
body:
Help our service members enjoy a delicious meal
[](https://www.uso.org)
[MATCH YOUR GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---

Dear USO Supporter,
As we gather with our loved ones to celebrate Thanksgiving, let's take a moment to remember our heroes in uniform who won't be at their family's dinner table this holiday. For our service members deployed far from home, Thanksgiving can feel especially lonely -- knowing their loved ones are gathering without them to share a turkey dinner, watch the parade or enjoy a tradition like playing football in the yard.
But together, we have the power to bring them a little piece of home.
This Thanksgiving, the USO is determined to provide programs and services, including at least 2,500 holiday meals at military bases and USO Centers around the world, creating a warm, familiar space filled with joy and gratitude. **And for a limited time, every dollar you give toward this goal will be MATCHED by our partners at the NFL:** [**Please rush $37.50, which can help provide one holiday meal!**](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-LPBj~Ly2ta/NUMyQ1JNUktrcnBzN0ROTG1DaGd6M25vVHRkYUttdUZmeDE5OWlDQWE2elBUUitaMkVNL3pZek5JeGdKVGpjWmVoNEZ3TEVxUnVod2I5MmlHT0hVbHdHWGFPK3d2QzZDMmVGVGFXdjNwSlk9S0/MmQ1eXNYa2V6ZkVDSEJ4Qkswc3VOa3BnbXJTQmJLdEY2eXIxODR1dWNFTTVLQVBQeGZTUXpmVjRCa0pWMFVLY2k3OGRhb3lpcE1jUVQzeWtFY2xmUW8zbkFvdjZvT1RsS0)
[$37.50 (BECOMES $75) CAN HELP PROVIDE
A THANKSGIVING MEAL**](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/0d-ehpL64_S9/NUMyQ1JNUktrcnBzN0ROTG1DaGd6M25vVHRkYUttdUZmeDE5OWlDQWE2elBUUitaMkVNL3pZek5JeGdKVGpjWmVoNEZ3TEVxUnVod2I5MmlHT0hVbHdHWGFPK3d2QzZDMmVGVGFXdjNwSlk9S0/MmQ1eXNYa2V6ZkVDSEJ4Qkswc3VOa3BnbXJTQmJLdEY2eXIxODR1dWNFTTVLQVBQeGZTUXpmVjRCa0pWMFVLY2k3OGRhb3lpcE1jUVQzeWtFY2xmUW8zbkFvdjZvT1RsS0)
---
Imagine, **without the USO** : A service member might find themselves alone in the barracks, their thoughts drifting to family memories and the special recipes they're missing. But **with your support, we can offer them a holiday meal that feels like home** : laughter shared over a traditional Thanksgiving spread, a chance to relax as football plays on a big screen, and the comfort of camaraderie in place of the loneliness.
[MATCH YOUR GIFT TO SUPPORT OUR HEROES
THIS THANKSGIVING AND YEAR-ROUND](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/A-VKBb06wVHL/NUMyQ1JNUktrcnBzN0ROTG1DaGd6M25vVHRkYUttdUZmeDE5OWlDQWE2elBUUitaMkVNL3pZek5JeGdKVGpjWmVoNEZ3TEVxUnVod2I5MmlHT0hVbHdHWGFPK3d2QzZDMmVGVGFXdjNwSlk9S0/MmQ1eXNYa2V6ZkVDSEJ4Qkswc3VOa3BnbXJTQmJLdEY2eXIxODR1dWNFTTVLQVBQeGZTUXpmVjRCa0pWMFVLY2k3OGRhb3lpcE1jUVQzeWtFY2xmUW8zbkFvdjZvT1RsS0)
---
**We may not be able to bring our service members home or fully understand their challenges -- but we CAN make sure they enjoy a warm and festive Thanksgiving meal**. [**That 's why we're asking: Will you rush $37.50 right now, which can help provide a Thanksgiving meal for our heroes in uniform?**](https://links.e.uso.)
[$37.50 (BECOMES $75) CAN HELP PROVIDE
A THANKSGIVING MEAL**](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/0d-ehpL64_S9/NUMyQ1JNUktrcnBzN0ROTG1DaGd6M25vVHRkYUttdUZmeDE5OWlDQWE2elBUUitaMkVNL3pZek5JeGdKVGpjWmVoNEZ3TEVxUnVod2I5MmlHT0hVbHdHWGFPK3d2QzZDMmVGVGFXdjNwSlk9S0/MmQ1eXNYa2V6ZkVDSEJ4Qkswc3VOa3BnbXJTQmJLdEY2eXIxODR1dWNFTTVLQVBQeGZTUXpmVjRCa0pWMFVLY2k3OGRhb3lpcE1jUVQzeWtFY2xmUW8zbkFvdjZvT1RsS0)
---
Thank you for being a lifeline to our service members, especially during this season of giving. Together, let's make this Thanksgiving a special one for all those who serve our country.
With gratitude,
The USO
United Service Organizations, Inc. (USO) is a nonprofit 501(ς)(3) organization (EIN/Tax ID: 13-1610451) and not part of the Department of Defense (DOD). The appearance of DOD visual information does not imply or constitute DOD endorsement.
*The NFL is matching all gifts to the USO through a USO Direct Mail, email and text message campaign, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000, through December 15, 2024.
**Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families.
Photos by the USO and Petty Officer 1st Class Carmichael Yepez.

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Timeless lessons to the young and old alike
body:
_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bf007f6cfc494c4da6077d293f7ca1e9&_e=vy4HoWfGPL9GJZN20QiGALpUPh6ewJb6zUCVARTPg7CofxneDeEjBKDvaiL6QmRRGBmxyvUipgiKPMvt_fLd_WjOStqsCsm6dPKYrCNQDsysIMQhc2bjY4fYEaUmI-I4qfX2P09_SOEksCmwb3uM9JfqPLLmktgWwhd_p_mlDM16GIiiBt9uLKD646dJnlwIMRo5XjvDN4idBl3qSxNzZ0BVvRz_J4muFMgSteM0Zs-z9tws9EB9A7-JEhPuLS0veEFOi8YWJEBS9PVMkpvGs2e6Tc1-wr3SHLw7Y8IBvyxwIk9MsB_1Lk7OmVBiHRzx8QPHp1FABhUgGMZ1_mmoh93VRnc6EHTsGQPyfmskoQApZEYGHZvyYUjo70t9fU0f_rVe4lG10ZZHOITVOyUhEHUyGFKJ0YkphJhxulDCpa0Duf6VW83-5AC1kN5crRz_otx4B__6W9pjlpC6rLhpLNG9IwLfIA8eOOyroAr7eeP1LmjasuSF-TBCh0dtGLI8)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, Classic children’s literature is being ignored and eliminated from our nation’s classrooms at an alarming rate. Beloved classics like _The Wind in the Willows_ , _Treasure Island_ , and _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ are just a few of the foundational books that are rarely being taught to our nation’s children today. Not only does this rob young people of classic tales of adventure and friendship, but they also rob children of fundamental lessons about the world and how best to live.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College released a free online course titled **“Classic Children’s Literature.”** Perhaps you’ve had a chance to watch a few lectures. **Today, I’m excited to tell you that the course is now available on DVD! And you can get your very own box set right now!** [**“Classic Children’s Literature”**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bf007f6cfc494c4da6077d293f7ca1e9&_e=vy4HoWfGPL9GJZN20QiGALpUPh6ewJb6zUCVARTPg7CofxneDeEjBKDvaiL6QmRRGBmxyvUipgiKPMvt_fLd_WjOStqsCsm6dPKYrCNQDsysIMQhc2bjY4fYEaUmI-I4qfX2P09_SOEksCmwb3uM9JfqPLLmktgWwhd_p_mlDM16GIiiBt9uLKD646dJnlwIMRo5XjvDN4idBl3qSxNzZ0BVvRz_J4muFMgSteM0Zs-z9tws9EB9A7-JEhPuLS0veEFOi8YWJEBS9PVMkpvGs2e6Tc1-wr3SHLw7Y8IBvyxwIk9MsB_1Lk7OmVBiHRzx8QPHp1FABhUgGMZ1_mmohxfhtu_N8RvVt3l_jtdKAA6WD8zFGYmXylJEF5PnYt9TpidcPSF7j8FY3CgUFnUnaKQ0rZ8K2zrLL3RlOjrUG--2-ZJrDidmHYvWXgZoKxXzK5V2iwYJJeg8DW3KlUMHly7gnOe5lLF0Fv5_uXrSadk9z14ZJdz55c2TkIEET9nN) explores some of the greatest works of children’s literature, from Aesop and the classic fairy tales to _Treasure Island_ and _Winnie-the-Pooh_ , and so much more. When you get your box set today, you will not only delight your family, but also evoke a sense of wonder while teaching timeless lessons to the young and old alike.
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bf007f6cfc494c4da6077d293f7ca1e9&_e=vy4HoWfGPL9GJZN20QiGALpUPh6ewJb6zUCVARTPg7CofxneDeEjBKDvaiL6QmRRGBmxyvUipgiKPMvt_fLd_WjOStqsCsm6dPKYrCNQDsysIMQhc2bjY4fYEaUmI-I4qfX2P09_SOEksCmwb3uM9JfqPLLmktgWwhd_p_mlDM16GIiiBt9uLKD646dJnlwIMRo5XjvDN4idBl3qSxNzZ0BVvRz_J4muFMgSteM0Zs-z9tws9EB9A7-JEhPuLS0veEFOi8YWJEBS9PVMkpvGs2e6Tc1-wr3SHLw7Y8IBvyxwIk9MsB_1Lk7OmVBiHRzx8QPHp1FABhUgGMZ1_mmohw3N4WmBKKOeS4Gg8SHvIxMeYZR8hvQZ58MBZ1QMmBiErCQlqhQnZLk8h8NLC9987rWazxwiJp7s5hDDWKd3ap3oGQBQvqWIUozugU42604ntlVzEP4ypuyEecN7f4v5J8kWhQrRQW-1iykHuL4HeRYUmZrEu-KIFS0Wbo5mY72m)
---
| | Speaking from my own experience, this course has brought great joy to my family. It has inspired us to read the classic works covered in this course together. And I hope you can share this same experience with your loved ones as you learn more about what makes these beloved stories so important. **You can get your DVD box set of “Classic Children’s Literature” by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link:** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bf007f6cfc494c4da6077d293f7ca1e9&_e=vy4HoWfGPL9GJZN20QiGALpUPh6ewJb6zUCVARTPg7CofxneDeEjBKDvaiL6QmRRGBmxyvUipgiKPMvt_fLd_WjOStqsCsm6dPKYrCNQDsysIMQhc2bjY4fYEaUmI-I4qfX2P09_SOEksCmwb3uM9JfqPLLmktgWwhd_p_mlDM16GIiiBt9uLKD646dJnlwIMRo5XjvDN4idBl3qSxNzZ0BVvRz_J4muFMgSteM0Zs-z9tws9EB9A7-JEhPuLS0veEFOi8YWJEBS9PVMkpvGs2e6Tc1-wr3SHLw7Y8IBvyxwIk9MsB_1Lk7OmVBiHRzx8QPHp1FABhUgGMZ1_mmoh5roiQSL0U8Gcn7RnpyN_8EYIGKIUHydJe_p5jBjwQgX00SPCchB0LeJiOxI7Jvnxu3GFipfFGbkSroBETwEOvYA_jm9qXnYZXZWk_pnOlFNpdrcteDaPJ1w8j6pra3Sj7SLm2Hf3MQBcCfT9DP-mZ1_xJRklM2ZONGNdeunqHkG) And when you do, you’ll also help expand nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, such as:
* Increasing the number of students taking free online courses.
* Growing the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Restoring excellence to K-12 education through an American classical curriculum.
* Promoting constitutional education through social media and the radio.

Thank you again for your support of Hillsdale College and for partnering with us to educate our fellow citizens, especially our youngest citizens. Without you, Hillsdale could not offer these courses free of charge to anyone willing to learn. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. These DVDs are an excellent gift for parents, homeschool families, and anyone who cherishes these timeless stories. **Get your DVD box-set of “Classic Children’s Literature” by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link:** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bf007f6cfc494c4da6077d293f7ca1e9&_e=vy4HoWfGPL9GJZN20QiGALpUPh6ewJb6zUCVARTPg7CofxneDeEjBKDvaiL6QmRRGBmxyvUipgiKPMvt_fLd_WjOStqsCsm6dPKYrCNQDsysIMQhc2bjY4fYEaUmI-I4qfX2P09_SOEksCmwb3uM9JfqPLLmktgWwhd_p_mlDM16GIiiBt9uLKD646dJnlwIMRo5XjvDN4idBl3qSxNzZ0BVvRz_J4muFMgSteM0Zs-z9tws9EB9A7-JEhPuLS0veEFOi8YWJEBS9PVMkpvGs2e6Tc1-wr3SHLw7Y8IBvyxwIk9MsB_1Lk7OmVBiHRzx8QPHp1FABhUgGMZ1_mmoh7UtaM8Td8YHHjKcPDNGrtrVZfvTArNVRmHOGhvmP5eaP6OAPSETL-vOYFx5MhDmD_z_z3xa2tEieDL_IU8tTJdP0v2fQHQMtqgVqHMc08yJbqela9O6W_QoLN_AQBoo1onQjNSdMI304go-ZbEaXA80KeSUtmHaSlnN6d4T60ca) [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=bf007f6cfc494c4da6077d293f7ca1e9&_t=dE0YqjcVuOWORBVkBOo6fZpbuJjqTJEXJDwr7Ld7V9zb-B4gbgKrFPjlqjnoQJ5WJeJog-CRP7rv3-WRqxCOrh5noYFus_k2nxaigUX8YjU4N62d7KB6ep-NJTTSOjd2)

You can get your DVD box set of “Classic Children’s Literature” by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link: And when you do, you’ll also help expand nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, such as: Increasing the number of students taking free online courses. Growing the readership of Imprimis , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty. Restoring excellence to K-12 education through an American classical curriculum. Promoting constitutional education through social media and the radio. Thank you again for your support of Hillsdale College and for partnering with us to educate our fellow citizens, especially our youngest citizens. Without you, Hillsdale could not offer these courses free of charge to anyone willing to learn. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. These DVDs are an excellent gift for parents, homeschool families, and anyone who cherishes these timeless stories. name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Peter,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=30b7b36cf13e4cfbb82079cf7ab22abb&_e=HoD90GjTibDy0PwtXh3oH3OUu6tm85g6xnVNePt3IZQxMa83s-D-XsC2Y53px3wAgyc1aZifjjEel0v1n2wwsQ1M1Xn3rDgX7wX_s6gV2lCb6N7dyFUtKqcDfxS1Qx3sSZx-lSpABK9LUZqUZ4kn_0pDRiTsroLybD3Is_WEAeVoqrpOVU65l_KcTkl1LSkEB7e3G2usaxXcnnKpEfJzYpsB72Hsv-v8IZFxgFopOyje4PNSIipW9R5bNMGR4azfn5-ATuV2b1nhgsAYZh-yvueK1qX98p3wQbmqZ5YAxm_5LRiV3piuAJGgw9xAH6mEtK61Ww23BhcMkGveWV61mZfvqMk1UFZUW7gsbGLaDoZIb34E-BdFJp4zVb2b3K4lUImmjXinBXBmUrB9qnNXpQ%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=30b7b36cf13e4cfbb82079cf7ab22abb&_e=HoD90GjTibDy0PwtXh3oH3OUu6tm85g6xnVNePt3IZQxMa83s-D-XsC2Y53px3wAgyc1aZifjjEel0v1n2wwsQ1M1Xn3rDgX7wX_s6gV2lCb6N7dyFUtKqcDfxS1Qx3sSZx-lSpABK9LUZqUZ4kn_0pDRiTsroLybD3Is_WEAeVoqrpOVU65l_KcTkl1LSkEB7e3G2usaxXcnnKpEfJzYpsB72Hsv-v8IZFxgFopOyiUjkhPILq9naCcpUIxy6qSXnQ4izp8lMmMGwy_fwdUugia3GzzXmXr2Jie8ZqE2siaFlY09HfJLL6nAfqjM0nBGZE0x3PGnPv9XmI3ArvI9ZcIdi9Zqr66HkhVZM5M3jm-veyJOrDa9T-RPnFS930JjU22_pGbLe12iAlWbeRYLQ%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=30b7b36cf13e4cfbb82079cf7ab22abb&_e=HoD90GjTibDy0PwtXh3oH3OUu6tm85g6xnVNePt3IZQxMa83s-D-XsC2Y53px3wAgyc1aZifjjEel0v1n2wwsQ1M1Xn3rDgX7wX_s6gV2lCb6N7dyFUtKqcDfxS1Qx3sSZx-lSpABK9LUZqUZ4kn_0pDRiTsroLybD3Is_WEAeVoqrpOVU65l_KcTkl1LSkEB7e3G2usaxXcnnKpEfJzYpsB72Hsv-v8IZFxgFopOygVx8b4z-Flr2byDYczrJOevQ7U7jz2da5DV41bQJ631GCIeDlMKGcLRea3_eUBVbtIsaPKkvOkiw0dwXdeXNV-Z6jT7si7zVC4gqBMBkl6uM0x3v_ZBysl6zaoQ94rItv5VrG_veIxbcXxIn89n4LXwsh_kyJtKZ-RSPLohLZ2BQ%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=30b7b36cf13e4cfbb82079cf7ab22abb&_e=HoD90GjTibDy0PwtXh3oH3OUu6tm85g6xnVNePt3IZQxMa83s-D-XsC2Y53px3wAgyc1aZifjjEel0v1n2wwsQ1M1Xn3rDgX7wX_s6gV2lCb6N7dyFUtKqcDfxS1Qx3sSZx-lSpABK9LUZqUZ4kn_0pDRiTsroLybD3Is_WEAeVoqrpOVU65l_KcTkl1LSkEB7e3G2usaxXcnnKpEfJzYpsB72Hsv-v8IZFxgFopOyjBrPOqNNg2R3SjIbEqKFU-YlTBdlBOYJbWXr4UYqL4x_S2ToyNIznn7Esjnfvz24HwX8_3QE55eCX9Y_Bk3j4DYij2PCTwGSPfHkLY9tqNHgUvGs0S0iEr1fh48VcrjQWEGeUgZzWt0-DU8YEDdxZzbv_75vhvhSJG6g9d5t2uzA%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=30b7b36cf13e4cfbb82079cf7ab22abb&_e=HoD90GjTibDy0PwtXh3oH3OUu6tm85g6xnVNePt3IZQxMa83s-D-XsC2Y53px3wAgyc1aZifjjEel0v1n2wwsQ1M1Xn3rDgX7wX_s6gV2lCb6N7dyFUtKqcDfxS1Qx3sSZx-lSpABK9LUZqUZ4kn_0pDRiTsroLybD3Is_WEAeVoqrpOVU65l_KcTkl1LSkEB7e3G2usaxXcnnKpEfJzYpsB72Hsv-v8IZFxgFopOygY-GitvqKqM0ghvuCF9109bgIWVLLi3JqrtetGKWdfb4wTiVnvXLuA5M2-UcvVXQ7q4xw38QKzPNSaoRfOaVZqalKTXc5zV4qOom5HEq3P4O59fwj1Q_3qMsLQ7FMjrGAcnhwV2vF21cAqHvdUqxGppwrQL2HteUjJnHFxjaC94g%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=30b7b36cf13e4cfbb82079cf7ab22abb&_e=HoD90GjTibDy0PwtXh3oH3OUu6tm85g6xnVNePt3IZQxMa83s-D-XsC2Y53px3wAgyc1aZifjjEel0v1n2wwsQ1M1Xn3rDgX7wX_s6gV2lCb6N7dyFUtKqcDfxS1Qx3sSZx-lSpABK9LUZqUZ4kn_0pDRiTsroLybD3Is_WEAeVoqrpOVU65l_KcTkl1LSkEB7e3G2usaxXcnnKpEfJzYpsB72Hsv-v8IZFxgFopOygE-dMR_9hEcc6J4A61RV6tVc1Pizv5F4q7np5Vxo3Jlzj7hwNMl3wCJMV5Np3Srh1eNfQ8eitquGf71t21yKd8GlXqsj02-Cm-aTt-4et1z0bEN6FBiqiDGDqKQTqY-8p8mZlQYkZunmeZpgog4MS-jepKZD9vGN9VeS80SU7Tow%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=30b7b36cf13e4cfbb82079cf7ab22abb&_e=HoD90GjTibDy0PwtXh3oH_qedjPrfnVarMOk17bpZx-y2HDNSefYB_KQfixb06sf-JLZbawd-olC4q9FIYx1nln6-NLG-TbM6Ux56cv-uQ6_GHtM5hxsrC-OsrHe2R_S_sEh2agq2lxrnB4givTJ11AYTM-TzAsR2vM7P-AjX1oNl0rL7qXP8yZZWjbfX-KkfesGZckJI8dayqR3kQO1dQ%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click here to [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=30b7b36cf13e4cfbb82079cf7ab22abb&_t=sjc1ozn6h8qTDl8qvI9Q6mtZKMjNc6kOsLmMv_ZKUyijbFU1hsNI-3zk3t5BeX-UkLR4GfFUjjm03xO3KhOjL8FW0GjokEABIzjc_yKw_PZCa0OE0mLS81yimMKKSH-l)
