name: Team Cooper
subject: It’s not hurricane relief — it’s a GOP POWER GRAB
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
North Carolinians need help. Republican legislators only want to help themselves.

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97388908/513267483/823540626?refcode=ea.8136e4f5-63a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.8136e4f5-63a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTM2ZTRmNS02M2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CbAEdlo72-vhXwysU8OhvwKKFmNX4iobU4Qv84xFITw=&emci=ea222b1a-4ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=8136e4f5-63a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=1049176)
Peter — When natural disasters strike our communities, we need leaders to put politics aside and commit to the hard work of rebuilding. But instead of providing much-needed aid to victims of Hurricane Helene, Republican legislators are staging a shameful power grab in the aftermath of this month’s elections. Failing to provide critical funding and support to western NC right now will have serious consequences for years to come. Our legislators need to do their jobs and help western North Carolina rebuild. **[We’re urgently asking all our Team Cooper supporters to sign our petition calling on the legislature to focus on getting relief where it’s needed >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97388909/513267484/-1949792903?refcode=ea.8136e4f5-63a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.8136e4f5-63a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTM2ZTRmNS02M2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CbAEdlo72-vhXwysU8OhvwKKFmNX4iobU4Qv84xFITw=&emci=ea222b1a-4ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=8136e4f5-63a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=1049176)** Instead of prioritizing disaster recovery, Republicans are apparently spending the final months with their veto-proof supermajority securing their own hold on power and subverting the will of North Carolina voters. **They are abandoning the people they’re supposed to serve — especially the people who still need help after Helene.** **[Please join us and urge the legislature to prioritize real disaster relief — not blatantly political power grabs >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97388910/513267485/-1949792903?refcode=ea.8136e4f5-63a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.8136e4f5-63a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTM2ZTRmNS02M2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CbAEdlo72-vhXwysU8OhvwKKFmNX4iobU4Qv84xFITw=&emci=ea222b1a-4ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=8136e4f5-63a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=1049176)** clean_body: North Carolinians need help. Republican legislators only want to help themselves. | Peter — When natural disasters strike our communities, we need leaders to put politics aside and commit to the hard work of rebuilding. But instead of providing much-needed aid to victims of Hurricane Helene, Republican legislators are staging a shameful power grab in the aftermath of this month’s elections. Failing to provide critical funding and support to western NC right now will have serious consequences for years to come. Our legislators need to do their jobs and help western North Carolina rebuild. Instead of prioritizing disaster recovery, Republicans are apparently spending the final months with their veto-proof supermajority securing their own hold on power and subverting the will of North Carolina voters. They are abandoning the people they’re supposed to serve — especially the people who still need help after Helene. | Thanks for standing with us, Team Cooper = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. Josh is an ardent protector of Jersey Values – standing up for what’s right, like reproductive freedom, clean air and clean water, LGBTQ+ rights, lower health care and housing costs, child care, and commonsense gun safety. As Co-Chair of the bipartisan Problem Solvers Caucus, he is willing to work with anyone to get stuff done for Jersey – if it’s good for our state and doesn’t compromise our values.

**We know that Josh has what it takes to deliver for our state, but we need your help to show that the people of Jersey are behind him.**

[**Become a founding donor today to help us show the grassroots strength of our campaign!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97389145/513268121/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20241120_FR_LaunchFollowUp_0_3MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_1.1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODcyOWY5ZC02NGE3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GIGSLWy0bZBGwSzzo2koKNxVt8KQHARD7pFT8Z7qpCA=&emci=8b36e4f5-63a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=58729f9d-64a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=37438246)

clean_body: | | Team, you’ve probably heard by now that Josh is running to be the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Lowering Taxes and Lowering Costs will take big ideas, tough calls, and might ruffle a few feathers. But Josh is the person who can handle it. Early grassroots support is critical for the success of a campaign. | | | | | | | Josh is an ardent protector of Jersey Values – standing up for what’s right, like reproductive freedom, clean air and clean water, LGBTQ+ rights, lower health care and housing costs, child care, and commonsense gun safety. As Co-Chair of the bipartisan Problem Solvers Caucus, he is willing to work with anyone to get stuff done for Jersey – if it’s good for our state and doesn’t compromise our values. We know that Josh has what it takes to deliver for our state, but we need your help to show that the people of Jersey are behind him. Thank you, Team Gottheimer | Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. name: OKGOP
subject: Our elections are under attack...
body:
| [ ](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=urG6o0YzHACIJY0G92IOaIOiUFGhm1XQHaiZ59fvCoY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_our_elections_are_under_atta&n=1)
---
Peter -- Oklahoma law requires the Chairman of each political party to notify the Secretary of the State Election Board by the end of November the year before an election year to determine whether the party will be a closed primary or an open primary allowing non-party members to vote in their elections. I hand delivered my letter last year letting them know the Oklahoma Republican Party will NOT allow non-party members to vote in our elections. The Republican primary is for Republicans. It should be as simple as that. However we face a new battle before us. There are those who are pushing for “open primaries”. Some may presume that just because it contains the word “open” that it is a good & positive thing. But open primaries are a terrible idea. It’s as much of an oxymoron as calling someone an honest thief! Why in the world would we allow DEMOCRATS to vote in Republican primaries? That’s what is accomplished with their “open primary” plan. It would be like letting an atheist vote for who your next church pastor should be! Allowing leftists, democrats, & people who hold totally contrary views to vote in the Republican primaries is beyond ludicrous. Unfortunately several elected officials who are registered Republicans have been pushing for this ridiculous idea. Some may question how true of Republicans they are based on this policy. But I want to be abundantly clear, ANY Republican elected official that is pushing for an open primary system means they are ACTIVELY WORKING AGAINST the Republican Party. If they want Democrat votes in the primary, they can get them by registering & running as a Democrat! Not by trying to allow democrats to vote in our Republican elections. The three elected Republicans who are publicly supporting and actively pushing this plan against the Republican Party are:
OKC Mayor David Holt
Tulsa Mayor G.T. Bynum
Labor Commissioner Leslie Osborn
If they continue to push this misguided & damaging plan in order to get those democrats votes they so desperately seek, we should all encourage them to make the switch to the democrat party rather than allow them to continue trying to destroy our Republican primary elections from within. I encourage you to contact each of them & firmly yet politely express your displeasure & disagreement with this terrible course they have set out on. We at the OKGOP will do everything we can to protect the integrity of our Republican primaries & ensure only REPUBLICANS can vote in our Republican elections. We ask that you unite with us. Together we can stop this lunacy. For the People,

Nathan Dahm
OKGOP Chairman

Unfortunately several elected officials who are registered Republicans have been pushing for this ridiculous idea. Some may question how true of Republicans they are based on this policy. But I want to be abundantly clear, ANY Republican elected official that is pushing for an open primary system means they are ACTIVELY WORKING AGAINST the Republican Party. If they want Democrat votes in the primary, they can get them by registering & running as a Democrat! Not by trying to allow democrats to vote in our Republican elections. The three elected Republicans who are publicly supporting and actively pushing this plan against the Republican Party are: OKC Mayor David Holt Tulsa Mayor G.T. Bynum Labor Commissioner Leslie Osborn If they continue to push this misguided & damaging plan in order to get those democrats votes they so desperately seek, we should all encourage them to make the switch to the democrat party rather than allow them to continue trying to destroy our Republican primary elections from within. I encourage you to contact each of them & firmly yet politely express your displeasure & disagreement with this terrible course they have set out on. We at the OKGOP will do everything we can to protect the integrity of our Republican primaries & ensure only REPUBLICANS can vote in our Republican elections. We ask that you unite with us. Together we can stop this lunacy. For the People, Nathan Dahm OKGOP Chairman Contact information & social media: OKC Mayor David Holt email: mailto:mayor@okc.gov Phone: tel:405-297-2424 Website: Facebook: Twitter: Tulsa Mayor G.T. Bynum email: mailto:mayor@cityoftulsa.org Phone: tel:918-596-7411 Website: Facebook: Twitter: Labor Commissioner Leslie Osborn email: mailto:Labor.Commissioner@labor.ok.gov Phone: tel:405-521-6100 Website: Facebook: Twitter:

# [Trump's Victory Came Down to Issues](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=151933506&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxOTMzNTA2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzIxMjU0NDMsImV4cCI6MTczNDcxNzQ0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.bl3SSXSsLg50JL44L0nCig9TfMI1__CeZAqUAX6UmUo)
### Democrats Have Yet to Grasp This
| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---
| Nov 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---

---

November 20, 2024
Most Democrats and their acolytes in the media believe Harris lost due to deficiencies in her campaign and the racism and sexism of American electorate. Let's look at these myths individually:
**Myth 1: Harris was a poor candidate.** This is simply not true. Given the hand she was dealt, she ran an excellent campaign. Although a San Francisco liberal with a voting record to the left of Bernie Sanders, she quickly abdicated her previous positions and morphed into a moderate Republican knowing that the fawning Press would be shaking Pom Poms while they covered up her blatant lies.
Harris was polished, poised and looked presidential. She clobbered President Trump in their debate. She worked like a dog behind the scenes, contacting big money donors and raising $1,000,000,000 in a few weeks along with another $600,000,000 in soft money. She outspent President Trump three to one.
She attracted celebrity endorsements from huge stars such as Taylor Swift, Bruce Springsteen and Oprah Winfrey. The speeches at her rallies were uplifting to her audience and with a shift of just a few points in the swing states, she would have won.
**Myth 2: President Biden should have left the race earlier.** After the disastrous debate with President Trump, even the mendacious media and the lying Democrats could no longer hide Biden's decreased cognitive function. Immediately, they called for Biden to withdraw. For several weeks, he refused to do so.
Nancy Pelosi theorized that had Biden been a good boy and did what he was told immediately, the Democratic Convention would have had time to pick the strongest candidate.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b6bdd3a-18f9-4e9d-a6a4-85fc2d213f43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A Happy President Biden Wearing a MAGA Hat
But this strategy would have been very risky. Conventions with multiple opponents can quickly turn into vicious fights that split the party irretrievably. Imagine a three-way Convention fight between the vicious Kamala Harris, the ruthless Hillary Clinton and the entitled Gavin Newsom. Machete salesmen would be coining money.
The calamitous Democratic Convention in 1968 caused Hubert Humphrey to lose a nail-biter to Richard Nixon. Reagan's challenge of Ford in 1976, Ted Kennedy's challenge of Carter in 1980 and Pat Buchanan's challenge to George H. W. Bush in 1992 all contributed to the losses of these incumbent Presidents. A united party behind an imperfect candidate is better than a fractured party trying to coalesce behind a stronger candidate.
**Myth 3: The voters are racist and sexist.** It is not unusual to see some liberal pundit on CNN or MSNBC saying that white American would not accept a Black woman president. But there is a problem with this analysis. President Obama won two elections easily. Did America become racist in only twelve years?
Furthermore, Trump received [a higher percentage](https://substack.com/redirect/b6508557-d2d4-4f08-9226-c69882b1899f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the Black vote of any Republican in recent memory. Up to 16% from 9 % in 2020 with a whopping 23% of Black men. Hispanics also showed a huge shift towards Trump, with 56% of Hispanic males voting for Trump and 40% of Hispanic women.
But it is the liberal pundits who are the real racists. They believe that minorities are stupid because they voted for their own interests. They believe that minorities should have been loyal to a Black women whose administration caused rampant inflation, increased crime and dumped illegal immigrants in their neighborhoods while keeping them out of the affluent white suburbs.
But one question will never be answered. What would have happened if Biden never debated President Trump? Why did Biden's handlers allow this? They obviously knew he was demented. They were with him all the time. Maybe they were afraid that if Biden and Trump debated in mid-October, the exposure of his dementia would have propelled Trump in the White House. Why not do a test debate before Biden has the nomination?
But this makes little sense too. Biden's handlers could have simply refused to debate President Trump once both candidates were officially nominated. They could have said "We will not give a forum to a convicted felon and sexual predator who tried to overthrow our democracy."
The obsequious media would have echoed this across the land while Biden hid in the basement just like in 2020. Trump may not have gathered enough momentum to defeat the well-oiled Democratic machine. Then Biden would simply resign after reelection due to "newly diagnosed Parkinson's Disease" and Kamala Harris would have assumed the presidency.
We will never know. But one thing is for sure. Even in Biden's demented state, he is undoubtably gloating behind the scenes and screaming at Pelosi, George Clooney and Obama "I would have won you idiots! I beat him before, and I would have beaten him again!"
No wonder he looked so happy wearing that MAGA hat.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: The fight continues
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
While I won’t be returning to Congress next term, I’m not done fighting. MAGA extremism remains a threat to the lives of all Americans.
Team,

When I announced my campaign for New York’s 17th Congressional District, I knew we had an uphill battle ahead of us. But with everything from our democracy to reproductive freedom to our economy on the line, I couldn’t just sit on the sidelines.

While the results weren’t what we hoped for, I’m incredibly proud of the work we did amid the onslaught of super PAC spending and a red wave that swept the nation. Together, we built a historic movement to bring real leadership back to the Lower Hudson Valley. I can't thank you enough for being part of it.

While I won’t be returning to Congress next term, I’m not done fighting. MAGA extremism remains a threat to the lives of all Americans. The work to defend our democracy, lower costs, restore reproductive freedom, combat climate change, and so much more continues.

That’s why I’m continuing the fight with my fundraising committee, Policy is Personal PAC. My PAC is working to elect more leaders who understand the struggles everyday families are facing because they’ve lived them. Leaders who will listen to everyday Americans and pursue bold and pragmatic policy solutions to our nation's greatest challenges.

**[If you’re still with me, please chip in to Policy is Personal PAC to help me defeat MAGA extremism and elect leaders who will fight for the issues that matter to us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97391807/513273913/-1360538196?refcode=em24_241120_thanks_fnd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_241120_thanks_fnd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=b991e13e-69a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTkxZTEzZS02OWE3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nwBPJ19ItpDHBdZPiPT6Em0sP8CZ1KBrpkctU_m2BqA=)**

Thank you,

Mondaire

name: United College Park
subject: How the College Park Council Stole Christmas (Parade) 🎄
body:
| |
---
When tradition meets chaos, the spirit of the holidays is at stake. Here’s what you need to know about the council’s Grinch-like move. | | [View in browser](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzODY2MDc2NDc2LFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiYTgwODA5MGRhNTkwNDEyNSJ9)
| | |
---
|
---
**[](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzODgwNzU2NTQyLFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiOTIzMTkyZTdlYTk3MDhkYSJ9)****On Main Street each year, where the lights always glow,** **The parade brings us joy, as the holidays grow.** **But up on a ladder, the Grinch made a plan,** **To move all our cheer with a wave of his hand.** **“Let’s take it away, it’s no harm, no foul!** **We’ll move it to Godby, it’s fairer,” he’d howl.** **But the Whos down in College Park know what is right—** **Tradition expands, it’s not meant for a fight.**
|
---
********A Change of Course****

|
---
**[](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzODg3MDQ4MDAwLFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiMzg0NzM4ZTYzZmRlZWNiOCJ9)** The holiday season is supposed to bring joy, unity, and the comfort of tradition. But at the last city council meeting, a decision was made that feels like the opposite of everything this season stands for.
[At Monday's meeting](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzODkzMzM5NDU3LFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiOTcwNTY2YTdmNzM4NzM3NiJ9), the council—spearheaded by Joe Carn (Ward 2), with the backing of Tracie Arnold (Ward 3) and Roderick Gay (Ward 4)—voted to relocate the cherished College Park Christmas Parade from Main Street—a location it has called home for decades—to Godby Road. What’s worse is that this decision was made knowing [embattled Ward 1 councilperson](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzODk5NjMwOTE0LFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiYTJmMjIzMjFjNTM0NGE3ZCJ9), Jamelle McKenzie, was on vacation and unable to participate.
**Let** **us be clear:** expansion and [new opportunities for the Godby Road](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzOTA1OTIyMzc0LFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiMTU5MjNiZDY5OWJiZTk3NCJ9) corridor are amazing ideas, and we fully support them. But that progress should not come at the expense of dismantling a beloved tradition in another area. This is about building up our city, not pitting one community against another.
**The council decision isn’t about fostering unity** or creating something new to include everyone. It’s about uprooting something beloved in one part of town and forcing it into another without foresight, resources, or a plan. Instead of working with their massive budgets to create new holiday experiences that bring joy to all parts of College Park, the council has chosen to dismantle an established tradition for no clear reason other than to make a statement.

| | |
---
|
---
| | Join the conversation on Speak Up College Park! | | | | [ Speak Up! ](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzOTExMTY1MjU1LFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiZDJhMzIzYmI1NzcyOGJkMyJ9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**What’s most frustrating is how this impacts our community:**
* The residents of Godby Road weren’t consulted on whether this is something they want or are prepared to host. To safely host the parade, entry to and exit from several apartment complexes along Godby Road will be restricted during the event.
* Parade participants and businesses who’ve been committed for months are left scrambling to adjust—or may even back out entirely.
* Our shared sense of tradition is being treated as disposable, rather than something to be nurtured and celebrated.

| | |
---
|
---
**This is not leadership.**_This is chaos_ , dressed up as change. Our city deserves better. We can expand and create opportunities without tearing down what already exists. Take, for example, Joe Carn’s suggestion to move the [College Park Main Street Association’s Tinsel Trail ](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzOTE1MzU5NTYzLFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiYzA3YjhhNTc5YjJlZTMxOCJ9)Christmas Tree display to Godby Road. The Tinsel Trail is a fundraiser specifically designed to engage businesses on Main Street, bringing attention and focus to that vital area of commerce. Instead of subtracting from its purpose, imagine if our council focused on expanding its reach. We could replicate the Tinsel Trail across the entire city, engaging businesses along Old National and Godby Road, while still preserving its original intent.
Let’s make sure everyone understands what’s happening. Share this email. Talk to your neighbors. And let’s make our voices heard before more traditions are tampered with.
Wishing you a holiday season filled with the community spirit that our council seems determined to overlook.
|
---
**Final Thoughts**
|
---
[](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzOTIwNjAyNDQ1LFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiMDJjN2M2M2Y4NWI0NmMzYSJ9)This year, the “new” council and their choice for City Manager have repeatedly demonstrated an [inability to maintain transparency](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzOTI0Nzk2NzUyLFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiOTlkZmE5MzI4NDhiZTE0OSJ9) with the very community that voted them in. However, even their actions on Monday caught many of us by surprise. At their first opportunity, they chose disloyalty to each other. According the McKenize she was blindsided by the decision to move the Christmas Parade from Ward 1 to another part of the city and only learned of it upon landing in Los Angeles from a trip abroad.
The approval for this parade, along with other upcoming events, was [initially included on the agenda for the November 4th](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzOTI4OTkxMDU4LFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiOWRhZmU4OTFkNmI4ZjQzYiJ9) meeting. Despite all council members being present, the motion to approve failed because no one moved it forward for a vote. There was no discussion or debate explaining why they were unprepared to vote. Yet, just one meeting later, the parade was added back to the agenda with seemingly no changes.
[During the workshop preceding the meeting](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzOTM1MjgyNTE2LFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiN2FkYmIyNjM5YTk2YTJiYSJ9), Councilmembers Joe Carn (Ward 2) and Tracie Arnold (Ward 3) worked together to relocate the parade route away from Ward 1, fully aware that Jamelle McKenzie, the Ward 1 representative, was absent and unable to defend what would undoubtedly be a significant change for her constituents. Was this planned? Where is the loyalty?
To add insult to injury, while they swiftly moved the parade out of Ward 1, they decided to table McKenzie’s request regarding the [Ward 1 bathrooms](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzOTQxNTczOTczLFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiMjA2M2I5ODZlNTcyYTBhZCJ9), claiming they needed her input to make a decision. So, they moved the parade without hesitation, but couldn’t decide whether toilets should remain accessible to the community during the winter?
**Make it make sense.**
|
---
****[](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzOTQ2ODE2ODU0LFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiMzBjY2IwYjc0MTZjOGE0NSJ9)**Will they meet once again, to undo what’s been done?** **Will the cheer return home, where it first had begun?** **Will the lights shine once more, down Main Street so bright?** **Or will whispers of change keep us lost in the night?** **The holidays call for a spirit of grace,** **For unity’s touch in this cherished place.** **But cheer doesn’t stop where Main Street may end—** **It’s a gift to expand, to include and extend.** **Imagine the joy spreading far and wide,** **From Old National’s glow to Godby’s pride.** **It’s not just about one place to appear—** **It’s about creating a season of cheer.** **The Whos down in College Park wait to see—** **Will the council choose unity and opportunity?** **Let’s reflect, let’s grow, let’s make spirits align,** **To spread the holiday magic and let the city shine.**
|
---
| | **Visit UnitedCollegePark.com to learn more** | | | | [ Click Here ](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzOTUyMDU5NzM2LFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiZjJlNDMwNjlhMGZhZWQ4YiJ9)
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzOTU2MjU0MDQzLFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiMTlhZWEyNGI1YWU2NDBlZSJ9) | [ ](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM4NTQ0MjQzOTYwNDQ4MzQ4LFwiclwiOjEzODU0NDI1NjI3OTExOTE2M30iLCJzIjoiNjdmMjc5Yzg1NmRlNDYyNSJ9)

clean_body: | | When tradition meets chaos, the spirit of the holidays is at stake. Here’s what you need to know about the council’s Grinch-like move. | | | | | | Main Street each year, where the lights always glow, The parade brings us joy, as the holidays grow. But up on a ladder, the Grinch made a plan, To move all our cheer with a wave of his hand. “Let’s take it away, it’s no harm, no foul! We’ll move it to Godby, it’s fairer,” he’d howl. But the Whos down in College Park know what is right— Tradition expands, it’s not meant for a fight. | ******A Change of Course | The holiday season is supposed to bring joy, unity, and the comfort of tradition. But at the last city council meeting, a decision was made that feels like the opposite of everything this season stands for. , the council—spearheaded by Joe Carn (Ward 2), with the backing of Tracie Arnold (Ward 3) and Roderick Gay (Ward 4)—voted to relocate the cherished College Park Christmas Parade from Main Street—a location it has called home for decades—to Godby Road. What’s worse is that this decision was made knowing , Jamelle McKenzie, was on vacation and unable to participate. Let us be clear: expansion and corridor are amazing ideas, and we fully support them. But that progress should not come at the expense of dismantling a beloved tradition in another area. This is about building up our city, not pitting one community against another. The council decision isn’t about fostering unity or creating something new to include everyone. It’s about uprooting something beloved in one part of town and forcing it into another without foresight, resources, or a plan. Instead of working with their massive budgets to create new holiday experiences that bring joy to all parts of College Park, the council has chosen to dismantle an established tradition for no clear reason other than to make a statement. | | | | | | Join the conversation on Speak Up College Park! | | | | | | | | What’s most frustrating is how this impacts our community: The residents of Godby Road weren’t consulted on whether this is something they want or are prepared to host. To safely host the parade, entry to and exit from several apartment complexes along Godby Road will be restricted during the event. Parade participants and businesses who’ve been committed for months are left scrambling to adjust—or may even back out entirely. Our shared sense of tradition is being treated as disposable, rather than something to be nurtured and celebrated. | | | | This is not leadership.This is chaos , dressed up as change. Our city deserves better. We can expand and create opportunities without tearing down what already exists. Take, for example, Joe Carn’s suggestion to move the Tree display to Godby Road. The Tinsel Trail is a fundraiser specifically designed to engage businesses on Main Street, bringing attention and focus to that vital area of commerce. Instead of subtracting from its purpose, imagine if our council focused on expanding its reach. We could replicate the Tinsel Trail across the entire city, engaging businesses along Old National and Godby Road, while still preserving its original intent. Let’s make sure everyone understands what’s happening. Share this email. Talk to your neighbors. And let’s make our voices heard before more traditions are tampered with. Wishing you a holiday season filled with the community spirit that our council seems determined to overlook. | Final Thoughts | year, the “new” council and their choice for City Manager have repeatedly demonstrated an with the very community that voted them in. However, even their actions on Monday caught many of us by surprise. At their first opportunity, they chose disloyalty to each other. According the McKenize she was blindsided by the decision to move the Christmas Parade from Ward 1 to another part of the city and only learned of it upon landing in Los Angeles from a trip abroad. The approval for this parade, along with other upcoming events, was meeting. Despite all council members being present, the motion to approve failed because no one moved it forward for a vote. There was no discussion or debate explaining why they were unprepared to vote. Yet, just one meeting later, the parade was added back to the agenda with seemingly no changes. , Councilmembers Joe Carn (Ward 2) and Tracie Arnold (Ward 3) worked together to relocate the parade route away from Ward 1, fully aware that Jamelle McKenzie, the Ward 1 representative, was absent and unable to defend what would undoubtedly be a significant change for her constituents. Was this planned? Where is the loyalty? To add insult to injury, while they swiftly moved the parade out of Ward 1, they decided to table McKenzie’s request regarding the , claiming they needed her input to make a decision. So, they moved the parade without hesitation, but couldn’t decide whether toilets should remain accessible to the community during the winter? Make it make sense. | ** they meet once again, to undo what’s been done? Will the cheer return home, where it first had begun? Will the lights shine once more, down Main Street so bright? Or will whispers of change keep us lost in the night? The holidays call for a spirit of grace, For unity’s touch in this cherished place. But cheer doesn’t stop where Main Street may end— It’s a gift to expand, to include and extend. Imagine the joy spreading far and wide, From Old National’s glow to Godby’s pride. It’s not just about one place to appear— It’s about creating a season of cheer. The Whos down in College Park wait to see— Will the council choose unity and opportunity? Let’s reflect, let’s grow, let’s make spirits align, To spread the holiday magic and let the city shine. | | | Visit UnitedCollegePark.com to learn more** | | | | | | | | ---|--- United College Park 3799 Main Street Box 87398 College Park, GA 30337 United States of America You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

70% of the people slaughtered in Gaza have been women and children. The
biggest single category of victims is kids between the ages of five to
nine years old. And now, aid groups are sounding the alarm that mass
starvation is imminent.

38 days ago, the U.S. government told Israel it had 30 days to increase
the flow of humanitarian aid into Gaza, or risk losing military aid. And
Israel ignored it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20465?t=1011&akid=7276%2E5885482%2E94BzGg ][IMG]

Then the Biden administration announced that Israel will face no
consequences. If they’re not going to do anything, we will.

Bernie has introduced a resolution to halt $20 billion of U.S. weapons
sales to Israel and finally force the Israeli government to stop the
slaughter. The vote is happening TODAY and will be the first time Congress
votes directly on blocking an arms sales to Israel.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20465?source=email-112024&t=1012&akid=7276%2E5885482%2E94BzGg ]Will you stand with Bernie and help rally as much support in Congress
as possible?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20465?source=email-112024&t=1013&akid=7276%2E5885482%2E94BzGg ]ADD YOUR NAME

A coalition of humanitarian groups warned this week that “Israel not only
failed to meet the U.S. criteria that would indicate support to the
humanitarian response, but concurrently took actions that dramatically
worsened the situation on the ground.”

Despite the aid groups’ assessment, the U.S. government held a press
conference announcing that it would not limit arms transfers to Israel.
It’s a moral outrage. And the terrifying thing is that it may only get
worse.

Netanyahu and his cabinet have made it no secret that they’re thrilled
with Trump’s victory. In his last term, Trump supported the expansion of
settlements and turned his back on a two state solution. And this week,
Israel’s far-right Finance Minister ordered preparations for the
annexation of the occupied West Bank, hoping that the incoming Trump
administration will let them get away with it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20465?t=1014&akid=7276%2E5885482%2E94BzGg ][IMG]

We have to do something NOW. And Bernie is leading the way with a path
forward to end our government’s backing of Netanyahu’s devastating,
immoral war.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20465?source=email-112024&t=1015&akid=7276%2E5885482%2E94BzGg ]Together we can show Congress that the public will not rest until it
does something to finally stop Netanyahu. But it’s going to take ALL of us
standing with Bernie to finally stop the U.S. from enabling Israel’s wars.
Will you add your name?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

subject: It’s an honor of a lifetime being the new House Republican Conference Chair.

body:
I look forward to working with President Trump and my House GOP colleagues to deliver on our mandate from the American People.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf810d5c4c4c4048875cec7e71db714f&_e=Cq10rSb-hTdHNzSsBggxBPZ3CPscANllhMZI5QuWmDTXRPInS5RCnz2200-HhmTirJ_Zdf8pgZ1hXWgdtcXUnH3xHyLE5vPzOFm-u6fCOJ94k_eC1lGtBfwwdGoU1IuJDyrJ2HNEpximlcmurM_Xep4CETzrNeVz2lqtgd3ISH6ct7ONmbw5nCuhs-Q4FW1SFG5YMq4omyQ5UeLcw9WEFCk4H3uB6N2M8cFNcKkiG3WWfvpf6aY3O-hg799mlTUMVSV-nuwzLfyFlk4qbHlQOg7uhi0Pc7wOeQ2LPS_3oy-yt9seyW0W4RvCaQeCjX5D42w811U2ZcWwNXLArY_gK6-iu4oZV3dPNtS9y7G-Ht1FnjBd7zeIyGK4YaVIhgA6h6NYd-yWg97wC1sdrWGHBWZT3u1yxuLzoDohyKCkkfGhgA8lAYy9sQO9M-hNphJxuTbyH-XkQUzqCAxw6HzgWg%3D%3D "Lisa McClain")

Hi - it's Lisa McClain.

**It is the honor of a lifetime to tell you I am the NEW House Republican Conference Chair. **

I look forward to working with President Trump and House Republicans to deliver on our mandate from the American People. **_[Now, I want to know what you think the new Congress should do on its FIRST DAY.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf810d5c4c4c4048875cec7e71db714f&_e=Cq10rSb-hTdHNzSsBggxBPZ3CPscANllhMZI5QuWmDTXRPInS5RCnz2200-HhmTirJ_Zdf8pgZ1hXWgdtcXUnH3xHyLE5vPzOFm-u6fCOJ94k_eC1lGtBfwwdGoU1IuJDyrJ2HNEpximlcmurM_Xep4CETzrNeVz2lqtgd3ISH6ct7ONmbw5nCuhs-Q4FW1SFG5YMq4omyQ5UeLcw9WEFCk4H3uB6N2M8cFNcKkiG3WWfvpf6aY3O-hg799mlTUMVSV-nuwzLfyFlk4qbHlQOg7uhi0Pc7wOeQ2LPS_3oy-yt9seyW0W4RvCaQeCjX5DL9RMOMugilr8A_N-VVWUg9AyZTQlYV0RivPbucntL-aA0E1JS9yNCx4Umt1WEf_U8LsZcM95IuGE0bNoCuUqhcxVKKm7IcR-MtRmsFPMcqHXObm1MJtngHHYmabcqxVwW-WXJvxsoDQOg0wRwf4wNw%3D%3D "Now, I want to know what you think the new Congress should do on its FIRST DAY. ")_**

There is no time for gimmicks or games. There's too much at stake. That's why I am partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to get this survey out to our best supporters immediately.

_You 're in charge - use this link to help set the agenda for 2025: _
| | [PLEASE RESPOND NOW](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf810d5c4c4c4048875cec7e71db714f&_e=Cq10rSb-hTdHNzSsBggxBPZ3CPscANllhMZI5QuWmDTXRPInS5RCnz2200-HhmTirJ_Zdf8pgZ1hXWgdtcXUnH3xHyLE5vPzOFm-u6fCOJ94k_eC1lGtBfwwdGoU1IuJDyrJ2HNEpximlcmurM_Xep4CETzrNeVz2lqtgd3ISH6ct7ONmbw5nCuhs-Q4FW1SFG5YMq4omyQ5UeLcw9WEFCk4H3uB6N2M8cFNcKkiG3WWfvpf6aY3O-hg799mlTUMVSV-nuwzLfyFlk4qbHlQOg7uhi0Pc7wOeQ2LPS_3oy-yt9seyW0W4RvCaQeCjX5Deg_WdUUhmJ8TfO2r1vW4Uvnci_TSnRNt9GThmBHYwhA53fogGJ21Liz8kyWG3p377HG5T5fpKk0npqf4GB8pg8bL49t-wUGds6J9qnQjYSYeyYVPmpmvjHVqPApVt2SpaqCmhoFKiMHmT8ZXOkkRcw%3D%3D " PLEASE RESPOND NOW")
---

I am humbled that my colleagues in the House put their faith in me. Now it's time to get to work delivering President Trump's America First agenda.

**You will be a great partner in this endeavor.** I want you to be our guide in how we lead our Conference starting on DAY ONE of the 119th Congress.

Together - we will take our country back, slash illegal immigration, cut taxes for families, lower inflation, secure our elections, and deliver on the mandate we've been entrusted with by the American People.

_**[As I step into this new role- and as Republicans begin the new Congress - your guidance will be mission-critical to the success of our House Majority.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf810d5c4c4c4048875cec7e71db714f&_e=Cq10rSb-hTdHNzSsBggxBPZ3CPscANllhMZI5QuWmDTXRPInS5RCnz2200-HhmTirJ_Zdf8pgZ1hXWgdtcXUnH3xHyLE5vPzOFm-u6fCOJ94k_eC1lGtBfwwdGoU1IuJDyrJ2HNEpximlcmurM_Xep4CETzrNeVz2lqtgd3ISH6ct7ONmbw5nCuhs-Q4FW1SFG5YMq4omyQ5UeLcw9WEFCk4H3uB6N2M8cFNcKkiG3WWfvpf6aY3O-hg799mlTUMVSV-nuwzLfyFlk4qbHlQOg7uhi0Pc7wOeQ2LPS_3oy-yt9seyW0W4RvCaQeCjX5D_cRSsubt2CuMT1-PVfLtim7C3qCl2lCTLd91M7JiAM4ob2e0iOExhpHlaDe8-UZka9-6j9DndDvAvlbNW5r0YA5zlGj1XIPfjj_wc2wxYUvDJUjcB2h8yFEaleNeCiE_FT1s2hoNABItW_PP5W4frw%3D%3D "As I step into this new role – and as Republicans begin the new Congress – your guidance will be mission-critical to the success of our House Majority. I want to correct a mistake in my last email: **33 cents a day is $10 a month.** We are sorry for the confusion, but hope we gave you a laugh! Thank you to our members who helped us catch this silly mistake. Sarah Kline
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97393829/513278614/2043095679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhZDdmZDRiLTZjYTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FcNWw9peXlNXq6JbKK8TqMlo2fz6n8D-HLDibmvCOjQ=&emci=6deceeaa-69a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=3ad7fd4b-6ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, 3 cents a day. That’s right. That’s all it takes to be an invaluable part of our organization and the fight for Oregon’s future. [**With 3 cents a day you become a member of OLCV’s Sustainer Circle!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97393830/513278620/2043095679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhZDdmZDRiLTZjYTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FcNWw9peXlNXq6JbKK8TqMlo2fz6n8D-HLDibmvCOjQ=&emci=6deceeaa-69a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=3ad7fd4b-6ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Our monthly donors are extremely valuable parts of our community, because a recurring commitment we can count on allows us to put more of your contribution towards protecting Oregon’s natural legacy. A monthly donation ensures that we spend less on fundraising, administrative costs and other resources, saving trees in the process! To put it simply, a monthly gift of any amount has a _larger impact_ on our ability to fight for Oregon’s climate, clean air and water, and environment we all depend on. It doesn’t take much to become a member of our Sustainer Circle. [**You can start at $5 or $10 a month, which is less than the cost of most streaming services! And did you know that a gift of $10 a month is just about 3 cents a day?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97393831/513278621/2043095679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhZDdmZDRiLTZjYTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FcNWw9peXlNXq6JbKK8TqMlo2fz6n8D-HLDibmvCOjQ=&emci=6deceeaa-69a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=3ad7fd4b-6ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) These **smaller recurring donations are easier for you to manage** , and great for us to budget properly towards funding candidate campaigns, recruiting volunteers, building community, and doing the important work of getting climate bills passed. If you haven’t already heard, we’ve made some changes to our Sustainer Circle this year, to offer our monthly donors exclusive benefits such as a subscription to the Sustainer E-Newsletter which details all of our work and progress, insider access to the OLCV Election Report and Environmental Scorecard, and timely opportunities to take action on urgent and important issues. I know many of us are still feeling the uncertainty and fear after the results from the presidential election, but we’re not afraid to step up in this fight like we have before. It’s during times like these that we need to turn to our communities and rise up. This is why our Sustainer Circle members are invaluable for us - they are a central part of our community who make a large impact every day. Our community members remind us that as long as we have each other, there is still hope. That’s why all of us are still in this fight. [**Would you join us?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97393832/513278622/2043095679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhZDdmZDRiLTZjYTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FcNWw9peXlNXq6JbKK8TqMlo2fz6n8D-HLDibmvCOjQ=&emci=6deceeaa-69a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=3ad7fd4b-6ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) The work ahead of us is going to take all of us doing whatever we can. [**OLCV is ready to fight relentlessly for our climate, and you can join us at just $5 or $10 a month! Are you with us?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97393833/513278623/2043095679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhZDdmZDRiLTZjYTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FcNWw9peXlNXq6JbKK8TqMlo2fz6n8D-HLDibmvCOjQ=&emci=6deceeaa-69a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=3ad7fd4b-6ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97393834/513278624/2043095679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhZDdmZDRiLTZjYTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FcNWw9peXlNXq6JbKK8TqMlo2fz6n8D-HLDibmvCOjQ=&emci=6deceeaa-69a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=3ad7fd4b-6ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) By joining our Sustainer Circle, your donation will go towards:
* Passing a transportation package that centers climate and equity;
* Advancing solutions for more affordable clean energy, including funding popular climate programs and protecting Oregonians from sky-high rate hikes;
* Tackling the climate crisis by strengthening our communities’ climate resiliency and protecting Oregonians from extreme weather;
* And, fighting for life sustaining essentials like our clean water – from what we drink to our rivers and streams to the ocean that hugs our coastline.

[**A monthly gift will help fuel the fight for climate action in 2025. Your gift will fund our work to safeguard the future of our family, friends, animals, and natural places. None of our work is possible without you.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97393835/513278625/2043095679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhZDdmZDRiLTZjYTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FcNWw9peXlNXq6JbKK8TqMlo2fz6n8D-HLDibmvCOjQ=&emci=6deceeaa-69a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=3ad7fd4b-6ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Think of what your gift can do today. I hope you’ll join us! Sincere gratitude,
Sarah Kline
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator |

name: COURIER
subject: NBC Poll: Trump won because of less-engaged voters
body:
We urgently need to reach independent voters and we need your help.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97393985/513278876/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2U2NDczODYtNmNhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pXJ_sMzzyQBBj_ZulND11xXcdATGtH2L1XXzrGtNKu4=&emci=dbf6c4e0-5fa7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=ce647386-6ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
A new NBC poll of 2024 voters revealed a stark divide between those who voted for Kamala Harris and those who voted for Donald Trump.
**According to the poll, Harris was +5 among voters who followed politics closely. But voters who didn’t follow politics closely went overwhelmingly for Trump—a +14 advantage.**
[**We’ll explain why that matters and what we can do about it in a moment, but first, if you support COURIER’s mission to take on the right-wing media, can you chip in $25 now so we can keep expanding our reach?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97393987/513278878/-593472309?refcode=20241120-EM-EngagedVoters&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2U2NDczODYtNmNhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pXJ_sMzzyQBBj_ZulND11xXcdATGtH2L1XXzrGtNKu4=)
The 2024 election results have made one thing clear: trust in legacy media like _The New York Times_ and CNN has been eroding for decades, especially among independents and voters on the right.
While many on the left still look to these outlets for factual journalism, Trump and the MAGA right have long since filled that void with a sprawling, online media empire—Fox News, X, Tucker Carlson, and a vast network of podcasts and influencers—designed to spread fear, conspiracies, and disinformation.
**These platforms target disengaged voters with a relentless drumbeat of lies, amplifying fringe ideas and reshaping public opinion. **
And, in 2024, we saw that it works.
At COURIER, we’re fighting back and we need your help.
We were founded to provide a progressive counterweight to right-wing media. Our goal is to protect democracy by delivering factual, local reporting where voters need it most. Here’s how:
* **Targeting Key Battlegrounds:** Our 11 state-based newsrooms are embedded in battleground states and ‘news deserts,’ where quality local news is often missing.
* **Delivering Critical Reporting:** Our reporters tackle the issues that matter most to local communities, offering fact-based, values-driven reporting to correct right-wing misinformation and cut through the noise.
* **Meeting Voters Where They Are:** We publish our stories on the platforms people actually use—social media feeds, podcasts, and email inboxes—countering right-wing propaganda head-on.

The results speak for themselves: with 4.5 million followers and nearly 2 billion social media impressions in the 90 days before Election Day, COURIER is reaching Americans where they are, providing the factual reporting they need to stay informed.
**But with Trump’s allies amplifying propaganda and shaping the narrative, our work has never been more urgent. **
The right isn’t slowing down, and neither can we.
[**COURIER’s reporting is always free to access—but that means we rely on grassroots supporters like you to keep the presses running. Can you chip in $25 now to help us expand our reach and fight back**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97393989/513278880/-593472309?refcode=20241120-EM-EngagedVoters&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2U2NDczODYtNmNhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pXJ_sMzzyQBBj_ZulND11xXcdATGtH2L1XXzrGtNKu4=)
Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: We urgently need to reach independent voters and we need your help. Peter – A new NBC poll of 2024 voters revealed a stark divide between those who voted for Kamala Harris and those who voted for Donald Trump. According to the poll, Harris was +5 among voters who followed politics closely. But voters who didn’t follow politics closely went overwhelmingly for Trump—a +14 advantage. = The 2024 election results have made one thing clear: trust in legacy media like The New York Times and CNN has been eroding for decades, especially among independents and voters on the right. While many on the left still look to these outlets for factual journalism, Trump and the MAGA right have long since filled that void with a sprawling, online media empire—Fox News, X, Tucker Carlson, and a vast network of podcasts and influencers—designed to spread fear, conspiracies, and disinformation. These platforms target disengaged voters with a relentless drumbeat of lies, amplifying fringe ideas and reshaping public opinion. And, in 2024, we saw that it works. At COURIER, we’re fighting back and we need your help. We were founded to provide a progressive counterweight to right-wing media. Our goal is to protect democracy by delivering factual, local reporting where voters need it most. Here’s how: Targeting Key Battlegrounds: Our 11 state-based newsrooms are embedded in battleground states and ‘news deserts,’ where quality local news is often missing. Delivering Critical Reporting: Our reporters tackle the issues that matter most to local communities, offering fact-based, values-driven reporting to correct right-wing misinformation and cut through the noise. Meeting Voters Where They Are: We publish our stories on the platforms people actually use—social media feeds, podcasts, and email inboxes—countering right-wing propaganda head-on. The results speak for themselves: with 4.5 million followers and nearly 2 billion social media impressions in the 90 days before Election Day, COURIER is reaching Americans where they are, providing the factual reporting they need to stay informed. But with Trump’s allies amplifying propaganda and shaping the narrative, our work has never been more urgent. The right isn’t slowing down, and neither can we. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thank you for standing with us in the fight for truth. In solidarity, The COURIER Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: Mike Soboleski's MiaPAC
subject: MiaPAC Update on Office of New Americans and Border Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MiaPAC | Rep
body:
Reports From the Northern and Southern Border
| | |
---
|
# [wwww.issuesandaction.org](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016JmdS4xc3YV92K9CKJD_BHqbyH3DpCAcd9snwWGeBDgusA-cIQXSA5fzdPZRb17OjkebchBG_tHQbRvzLWyjasHRdTM9ZAKI_kI0IwcsdFdCa505A7k5S-uEURRDq50znghyiRMJ88WSV9d_6hIK2Ewj-CHc98qM&c=sQdUydTKC1ZsHx5oIY_KnJap07yrl4MU95TMISaWuSPGtLlCRZsvyw==&ch=qfAQMkcv5A3QIyOqB050UKEfqpEJO-T2QTqanklgZOY2_HbjYb1G9w==)

|

---
|

Maine Issues & Action PAC Update
Mainers,
The 132nd Maine Legislature is quickly approaching with new and returning members taking their oath in early December and work starting in January. Maine Issues & Action PAC has been working hard on fixing the rules for the new Paid Family Medical Leave Act that businesses will have to comply with at the start of the new year. We are excited to see the final rules and how many suggestions were adopted in them. MiaPAC will be tracking this in the weeks leading up to the start of the Legislature and let you know what we find.
Today, I'm writing to update you on the work that MiaPAC has been doing with regard to border security and the Governor's Office of New Americans.
In mid-October I traveled to the southern border in Texas with several colleagues from the Maine House. Our tour was guided by experts in border enforcement and a coalition of Sheriffs. [You can read about it on the Maine Wire here.](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016JmdS4xc3YV92K9CKJD_BHqbyH3DpCAcd9snwWGeBDgusA-cIQXSAy-5JAhmWGrQPFEEaYua-jnGTrrNktLPlPsv0Vrj4PlulO4pU-_HYQp1PhUCjLlbkG_G7cNHeBCfQ8nqLwmULs0RxpjQfuvr_VKI7y8ZKuF8p0m9rwDdyAdgmo8a165-VKpf5EZMpukZ7a65dBFhDuFY4OEXQyGkKw1KQT9gYgD381uWya2LX64=&c=sQdUydTKC1ZsHx5oIY_KnJap07yrl4MU95TMISaWuSPGtLlCRZsvyw==&ch=qfAQMkcv5A3QIyOqB050UKEfqpEJO-T2QTqanklgZOY2_HbjYb1G9w==)
Days after the re-election of President Trump I travelled to our northern border in Maine and toured the facilities in Jackman. Several fellow Representatives attended, and we had a great opportunity to speak with some great Maine based law enforcement officers dedicated to keeping our state safe and arresting drug smugglers. [You can read about it on the Maine Wire here. ](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016JmdS4xc3YV92K9CKJD_BHqbyH3DpCAcd9snwWGeBDgusA-cIQXSAy-5JAhmWGrQLM4jNOHwO8yZYmo7SPUUFM7mleHXnElrxAWP4XWk1IY3i-Fdbn8Arfset69xr2hs1-29iX5OFiVSu9UvvXUIYDWBdH6_KSrGJ5Wp91WUHDrAa0bulaZZFRPvUG2OGafFltU-lhv74u25ECGyVYwQiabJjqr6Q-ULA7oy_bIfm6w5th36Kxm3MA==&c=sQdUydTKC1ZsHx5oIY_KnJap07yrl4MU95TMISaWuSPGtLlCRZsvyw==&ch=qfAQMkcv5A3QIyOqB050UKEfqpEJO-T2QTqanklgZOY2_HbjYb1G9w==)
Lastly, our research and policy team has been doing some incredible work uncovering how the Governor's Office of New Americans came into being without ever having a debate or vote on the floors of the Maine House and Senate. Currently, the ONA lives in the Governor's Office of Policy and Innovation. Look for it to become permanent and permanently funded piece of Maine's bureaucracy with bills in the 132nd legislature. MiaPAC will be tracking and doing all we can to stop that. [You can read about it on the Maine Wire here. ](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016JmdS4xc3YV92K9CKJD_BHqbyH3DpCAcd9snwWGeBDgusA-cIQXSAy-5JAhmWGrQeD1HzQtgy3HLPE-YwZUzHlU-x__LideKOJaE3S2JLYn5vB83_AtONipjMTLwfnNFQ9AKqB2kQOw2QSQPBi6MG0Lw_dCYXYUrxoWR30ud8qbEwqNTJ9-wkxJASUrRs7u_BfpspHO55vvXHiFp9ACnyV2i6LB9h1Cwp_sLrtevlFDQnBfK78LKxQ==&c=sQdUydTKC1ZsHx5oIY_KnJap07yrl4MU95TMISaWuSPGtLlCRZsvyw==&ch=qfAQMkcv5A3QIyOqB050UKEfqpEJO-T2QTqanklgZOY2_HbjYb1G9w==)
MiaPAC will be working to keep you updated on policy and rulemaking as the new legislature approaches. I want to thank you for reading and your continued support as we identify the issues facing Maine and take action to fix them!
Stay safe, Mike
---

name: Working Families Party
subject: This bill could hand Trump new powers to go after political enemies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Republicans are back at it, Peter. Today or tomorrow, the House will vote on **H.R. 9495** — a bill that would hand Donald Trump sweeping new powers to target his political enemies. If passed, it would allow his Treasury Department to strip tax-exempt status from any nonprofit they decide to label as __ “terrorist-supporting,” without the need for evidence, oversight, or _even_ an explanation. In Trump’s hands, this power could be weaponized to stifle free speech, crush opposition, and pave the way for authoritarian abuse of power. Human rights organizations, civil liberties groups, universities, student associations — any Trump opponent could be targeted. **The worst part? When this bill was first introduced last week, 52 Democrats voted alongside Republicans to advance it.** We can’t let that happen again. Let’s flood Congress with calls before it’s too late. It’s time to remind our representatives that they work for the people. Text **CALL** to**30403** to call your representative.
> You can say something like: _“My name is Peter, a concerned constituent in Cresco, and I’m urgently requesting that you**vote NO on H.R. 9495** to prevent Donald Trump from gaining dangerous new powers."_
>
__ __This isn’t just another bad bill. It’s a loaded weapon, gift-wrapped for Trump to use against anyone who stands in his way or dares to hold him accountable. Think about the consequences:
* News outlets that report the truth.
* Government watchdogs exposing corruption.
* Human rights organizations calling for a ceasefire in Gaza.
* Reproductive health providers like Planned Parenthood providing abortions.
* Environmental groups fighting climate change.

**If H.R. 9495 passes,****_any_****of them could lose funding, face retaliatory investigations, or worse. With one stroke of a pen, he could make them all disappear.** We can stop this, but only if we act now and make our voices impossible to ignore, Peter. Text **CALL** to **30403** to call your rep and tell them to **vote NO on H.R. 9495** , protect our democracy and stop Trump’s power grab.

clean_body: | | | Republicans are back at it, Peter. Today or tomorrow, the House will vote on H.R. 9495 — a bill that would hand Donald Trump sweeping new powers to target his political enemies. If passed, it would allow his Treasury Department to strip tax-exempt status from any nonprofit they decide to label as “terrorist-supporting,” without the need for evidence, oversight, or even an explanation. In Trump’s hands, this power could be weaponized to stifle free speech, crush opposition, and pave the way for authoritarian abuse of power. Human rights organizations, civil liberties groups, universities, student associations — any Trump opponent could be targeted. The worst part? When this bill was first introduced last week, 52 Democrats voted alongside Republicans to advance it. We can’t let that happen again. Let’s flood Congress with calls before it’s too late. It’s time to remind our representatives that they work for the people. Text CALL to30403 to call your representative. You can say something like: “My name is Peter, a concerned constituent in Cresco, and I’m urgently requesting that youvote NO on H.R. 9495 to prevent Donald Trump from gaining dangerous new powers." This isn’t just another bad bill. It’s a loaded weapon, gift-wrapped for Trump to use against anyone who stands in his way or dares to hold him accountable. Think about the consequences: News outlets that report the truth. Government watchdogs exposing corruption. Human rights organizations calling for a ceasefire in Gaza. Reproductive health providers like Planned Parenthood providing abortions. Environmental groups fighting climate change. If H.R. 9495 passes,**anyof them could lose funding, face retaliatory investigations, or worse. With one stroke of a pen, he could make them all disappear. We can stop this, but only if we act now and make our voices impossible to ignore, Peter. Text CALL to 30403 to call your rep and tell them to vote NO on H.R. 9495 , protect our democracy and stop Trump’s power grab. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . Hi - it's Lisa McClain.

**It is the honor of a lifetime to tell you I am the NEW House Republican Conference Chair. **

I look forward to working with President Trump and House Republicans to deliver on our mandate from the American People. **_[Now, I want to know what you think the new Congress should do on its FIRST DAY.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38bf3e2f933d4943a6c55a3873e5298a&_e=4Bg1cky2eFSsDuvSKVA_mzPKt3ECAZmj2ofsmjfekjVXjMbHaHw4h9PYi0gSTGjCnEkDVZsUNppaV2hGFBWUGyB_HzpLPtKg2O_7VqEXNPOyh5R4y00VEEhuaBxBYEpm-WPWi0K1vVtVrbxMIjweEUTqk_21w9gVf0iQt3m2FEOCo5qcPxzNRiiZs9zruyb763VjKMUYcxSIKiRiGDPktwigp_WLjQm7k7I9YdRfY4zfNEaCTZdFW_hi9dHyHjq2FPv7WK_aG9LkqIvy0zi9JlClchHE8_wfJ7Dfl7ikPfQ4Mj9IQZypAHRotf8-WL1GMt_VsU7M9GQ-y1sMLGOY7OMC6zJhmPQMvjS3OF2fe-rHdQNt-vJNt8gVVeT_OuE3EjKI3Eel3x39jePxyO_KZcKM3npZSYd8Uf8Q-XGJlAGojZ-uoQaciqSEPQ4ipQnQNuAypxwTAOqhn_iqlGWw9A%3D%3D "Now, I want to know what you think the new Congress should do on its FIRST DAY. ")_**

There is no time for gimmicks or games. There's too much at stake. That's why I am partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to get this survey out to our best supporters immediately.

_You 're in charge - use this link to help set the agenda for 2025: _
| | [PLEASE RESPOND NOW](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38bf3e2f933d4943a6c55a3873e5298a&_e=4Bg1cky2eFSsDuvSKVA_mzPKt3ECAZmj2ofsmjfekjVXjMbHaHw4h9PYi0gSTGjCnEkDVZsUNppaV2hGFBWUGyB_HzpLPtKg2O_7VqEXNPOyh5R4y00VEEhuaBxBYEpm-WPWi0K1vVtVrbxMIjweEUTqk_21w9gVf0iQt3m2FEOCo5qcPxzNRiiZs9zruyb763VjKMUYcxSIKiRiGDPktwigp_WLjQm7k7I9YdRfY4zfNEaCTZdFW_hi9dHyHjq2FPv7WK_aG9LkqIvy0zi9JlClchHE8_wfJ7Dfl7ikPfQ4Mj9IQZypAHRotf8-WL1GLEDS3giFh_dORtAAZPI2fA35JJd06E2MeZoaMQDDSdwxTHUq7xF_z2NcQ8fhKLL8jedFWyktv2XidFvkOpWHvQMSBdYkeUzU6luhBZUghyYQ4PIb6YOkceIktVMHosXwsu5NCDQ9-iN_Rhps6Vi5jw%3D%3D " PLEASE RESPOND NOW")
---

I am humbled that my colleagues in the House put their faith in me. Now it's time to get to work delivering President Trump's America First agenda.

**You will be a great partner in this endeavor.** I want you to be our guide in how we lead our Conference starting on DAY ONE of the 119th Congress.

Together - we will take our country back, slash illegal immigration, cut taxes for families, lower inflation, secure our elections, and deliver on the mandate we've been entrusted with by the American People.

_**[As I step into this new role- and as Republicans begin the new Congress - your guidance will be mission-critical to the success of our House Majority.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38bf3e2f933d4943a6c55a3873e5298a&_e=4Bg1cky2eFSsDuvSKVA_mzPKt3ECAZmj2ofsmjfekjVXjMbHaHw4h9PYi0gSTGjCnEkDVZsUNppaV2hGFBWUGyB_HzpLPtKg2O_7VqEXNPOyh5R4y00VEEhuaBxBYEpm-WPWi0K1vVtVrbxMIjweEUTqk_21w9gVf0iQt3m2FEOCo5qcPxzNRiiZs9zruyb763VjKMUYcxSIKiRiGDPktwigp_WLjQm7k7I9YdRfY4zfNEaCTZdFW_hi9dHyHjq2FPv7WK_aG9LkqIvy0zi9JlClchHE8_wfJ7Dfl7ikPfQ4Mj9IQZypAHRotf8-WL1Gld5_b4KWVtYDBxv4uz6p_ku4N2TfeM8DtMj6EaCXhqdlMWxiKpJ5OLYFsKyJdMjYCpAzeM2y4UvUCmcFiuoqtXN4LNnOHMj-qUd_lf3936Z3oq0Ys2denktUdsLJbfbf020_IR7TxkM5gByT0CExdw%3D%3D "As I step into this new role – and as Republicans begin the new Congress – your guidance will be mission-critical to the success of our House Majority. name: Team Ruiz
subject: Dr. Ruiz wants to hear from you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=gfVjBgIwxEhV6pGHOwov4PkOpoY14q7DRg7JQ0Fq0f0lD3Gg6dWdvV%2FDtkWrWQ5WVwF76IYrZoL6wHh2Sv6%2Bqbsl3H2vTMrhdq4EZF7%2FAkPQnRMxqTfvaPo4vrC0edm3nQFzMZyBq6UHdivQb%2FfYRP1hc%2FHaR%2Bflv6i61dj73soMl3gz%2FyQiTQSwgg6J7W9DGt55lZzpm0O6bx%2F055JynN3AdxkksYT4soMIjuCLn53jwfLL083qfkHT2ZDtghvNy3N5flp7whpYEMQQ9dG%2BLlwDSVK%2BEbBuUnkWc%2B30e%2FM20LoVsccW3g4tZtt2cV%2B43uQvT%2B3%2BHasyazSjZmnvYJ6zvt7PHgHFN6TS5Mcm%2F5zpnLtatAwvkcgVyUVNB6T5MZv2UnHL9gRA5kynS%2F3YSVVCVTGsII6jkrWQzpg9mygUQEfk9hFbDCxVmZHQeW0Z]

# [#]
Hi there, it’s Team Ruiz.

Now that we’re through the general election, we’re rolling up our sleeves here at Ruiz HQ to get back to work for the people of California’s 25th like never before.

Dr. Ruiz is ready to lead the charge in Congress, but first, he wants to hear from you.

We’ve put together a short survey for you, and would appreciate it if you took just a few minutes to let us know what you’re thinking &MDASH; about the election, the path forward, issues you are about — you name it.

If you’re on board, click here to take our 2024 Post Election Survey. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dp7rANcA_kSQaC3jzh9iHA2]

Thank you!

— Team Ruiz

TAKE ISSUES SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dp7rANcA_kSQaC3jzh9iHA2]
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer] CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]

[https://drraulruiz.com/] LEARN MORE » [https://drraulruiz.com/]

name: Voter Action Project
subject: A major consequence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We desperately need a " private right to action " to protect voting rights. All that phrase means is that we, the people, can bring forward a lawsuit ourselves when we see wrongdoing in our elections.
This 8th Circuit decision strips us of that -- in a world where most legal action around voting rights comes from groups like ours and our partners, not from the U.S. Department of Justice(DOJ). And we're about to face four years of DOJ's Civil Rights division facing attacks from a hostile presidential administration.
There's so much at risk, Team. RUSH $25 or more right now so we have the resources we need to fight rulings like this one and protect our right to vote across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112024_1&amount=25]
AP: Federal appeals court deals a blow to Voting Rights Act, ruling that private plaintiffs can’t sue [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112024_1&amount=25]
Folks,
We're still assessing the consequences of this election, but this ruling by the federal 8th Circuit stands out like a sore thumb. It's one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years .
If you missed the details, the impact is pretty simple to understand: In the eight states impacted by the ruling, voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws.
Whether the nomination for former Congressman Matt Gaetz goes through for Attorney General or we get stuck with another anti-voting MAGA acolyte, do any of us really think that the DOJ is going to protect voting rights over the next four years?
Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112024_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112024_1&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112024_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112024_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112024_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112024_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112024_1&amount=35]
This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling.
We won’t sugarcoat this: This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this ruling is not overturned by a higher court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand.
Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone.
We can't do this alone. Help defend our right to vote with $25 or however much you can today and make every voice heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112024_1&amount=25]
VAP Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112024_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112024_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112024_1&amount=25]

subject: New Whistleblower Claims FEMA Employee Pressured Supporters To Remove Trump Signs, Says Rep. James Comer
body:
And ‘Celebration Of Collective Power’: DoD Contractor Pushes ‘Climate
Action’ With Org That Seeks To Defund US Military

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z88rqc8oiks49lqleehq0khm0d7s1br1o3j3gvk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chgmeoj2cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7k9r7b9jhe9qb0t9jkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuj72sjkm1qjf8jl64qb4t9m65rucdjnqkqr8d5hmngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpicdjnqpon4t5gekqb2df4c9imcpr1ccj3ctunmcpjct9heng669hmevajcs3lsmq39cdn6lpr49fg

| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
