---

One of the most significant issues during the 2024 Presidential campaign revolved around Israel's siege on Gaza. Finally in mid-October the Biden administration issued (another) ultimatum to Netanyahu--stop bombing civilians in Gaza within 30 days and allow aid to enter Gaza, or the United States would cut off offensive arms to the Israeli military. Those 30 days have now passed, Netanyahu has continued to bomb Gaza, and aid has still not entered Gaza.
Sadly, President Biden has done nothing but continue to arm Netanyahu, even as he commits war crimes. How do we grapple with this massive injustice, and where do we go from here? **Let 's Address This**.
I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I welcome your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..MI_0B0alFlMfTD7rpzI_kA9-YLFOuqlbh0B1Vry3ie0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=151679258)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/67514447-dcc7-4d30-b2c6-9b4dc43ecfe9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Joe Biden. Credit: BBC
### The Previous Ultimatum
In April of 2024, Joe Biden issued an ultimatum to Netanyahu. Stop bombing Palestinian civilians or the United States will uphold the Leahy Laws and stop sending offensive arms to Israel. Netanyahu refused to comply. Two State Department reports confirmed that Netanyahu was committing war crimes against Palestinian civilians, including the crime of withholding aid. ProPublica published a detailed report [documenting the following](https://substack.com/redirect/c484c88c-fd13-4309-a8af-0322b09ce099?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> The U.S. government's two foremost authorities on humanitarian assistance concluded this spring that Israel had deliberately blocked deliveries of food and medicine into Gaza. The U.S. Agency for International Development delivered its assessment to Secretary of State Antony Blinken and the State Department's refugees bureau made its stance known to top diplomats in late April. USAID sent Blinken a detailed 17-page memo on Israel's conduct. The memo described instances of Israeli interference with aid efforts, including killing aid workers, razing agricultural structures, bombing ambulances and hospitals, sitting on supply depots and routinely turning away trucks full of food and medicine.
A UN Office of Human Rights report went on to document a horrific statistic about the Israeli military's mass murder of children, [stating](https://substack.com/redirect/df5207d9-eb7a-4f63-8db1-68fea84ac8af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> According to figures verified by our Office, close to 70 percent of those killed in Gaza by strikes, shelling and other hostilities were children and women. The age group most represented in verified fatalities was children from 5 to 9 years old.
Inexcusably, despite knowing full well that Netanyahu was committing war crimes with US funded weapons and mass murdering children, days later, Blinken delivered a carefully worded statement to Congress that said, "_We do not currently assess that the Israeli government is prohibiting or otherwise restricting the transport or delivery of U.S. humanitarian assistance_."
Blinken lied to Congress, and Biden backed him up. And the genocide continued. Indeed, in what world does a war of alleged self-defense mass murder 5-9 year old children as its most represented fatality?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..MI_0B0alFlMfTD7rpzI_kA9-YLFOuqlbh0B1Vry3ie0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151679258)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7af658dd-e1bb-46aa-99e7-8ebb5590c2fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### The Current Ultimatum
In October, weeks before the Presidential election and with pressure mounting on VP Harris to act, Biden once more sent an ultimatum to Netanyahu. This time, once again telling him he had 30 days stop bombing Palestinian civilians and allow aid to enter Gaza, or he would suffer the consequences of restricted arms. In that time the UN Office on Human Rights released this [assessment](https://substack.com/redirect/fe63c900-6658-453f-a43f-48f744ec512e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Israel's warfare in Gaza is consistent with the characteristics of genocide, with mass civilian casualties and life-threatening conditions intentionally imposed on Palestinians there. Since the beginning of the war, Israeli officials have publicly supported policies that strip Palestinians of the very necessities required to sustain life -- food, water, and fuel. These statements along with the systematic and unlawful interference of humanitarian aid make clear Israel's intent to instrumentalise life-saving supplies for political and military gains.
I repeat, "_Israel 's warfare in Gaza is consistent with the characteristics of genocide_." And despite this, when the 30 day window concluded, the Biden administration claimed--contrary to the evidence available for the world to see--that Netanyahu had allowed aid to enter Gaza. Therefore the United States [would not cut off offensive arms to Netanyahu](https://substack.com/redirect/f264d13e-55f5-426c-ab22-d7cd216a3f8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). A thorough UN report confirms that [insufficient aid has reached Gaza during the 30 day period](https://substack.com/redirect/cbe9a89b-333b-4769-adaf-db83e510b755?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> The main UN aid agency in Gaza says Israel has failed to meet a US deadline to boost aid to the territory or risk a reduction in American military aid. Last month, in a strongly worded letter, the US secretary of state gave Israel an ultimatum of 30 days to ensure more aid trucks reached Gaza daily. The deadline expires on Tuesday. The amount of aid getting into Gaza is at its lowest level in a year, the UN says. A UN-backed report recently warned that there was an imminent likelihood of famine in northern Gaza, where hardly any aid has entered in the past month.
The BBC reports that Israel rejected the UN report, and instead claimed [that](https://substack.com/redirect/cbe9a89b-333b-4769-adaf-db83e510b755?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "Israel has substantially increased the amount of aid getting into Gaza, and accuses aid agencies of failing to adequately distribute it." A reminder that Israel has made this accusation before, without evidence, and independent US investigations found that [in fact the Israeli military itself was guilty of blocking aid or helping destroy the aid](https://substack.com/redirect/9c78227b-cd59-4111-ad12-2de173f28acb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). So what became of the alleged aid that Israel claims reached Gaza? Haaretz, Israeli's oldest newspaper, confirms, perhaps unsurprisingly, [that Israeli soldiers themselves set fire to the aid and destroyed it](https://substack.com/redirect/5862f6f2-67bb-48f5-b7d9-29f07376f792?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> A Gaza School Burned Down Hours After Aid Arrived. Witnesses Say Israeli Soldiers Started the Fire: Witnesses said soldiers forced civilians away from the area, preventing them from collecting aid from the first convoy to reach the area in over a month. A video seen on social media, taken by an IDF soldier, showed two Israeli armored vehicles leaving the school as it was engulfed in flames.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..MI_0B0alFlMfTD7rpzI_kA9-YLFOuqlbh0B1Vry3ie0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151679258)
### What Does The Future Hold?
President Biden has left U.S. foreign policy in a precarious situation. Now, with Donald Trump returning to office, Biden has set the precedent that US Leahy Laws don't matter, that US State Department reports confirming war crimes don't matter, and that UN reports of genocide don't matter. It should be no surprise, therefore, that [Donald Trump has already promised to lift all military restrictions on Israel to bomb Palestinian civilians, his very first day in office](https://substack.com/redirect/f6955e65-e7df-467b-af0c-62c3d73a0b6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> [President-elect Donald Trump ](https://substack.com/redirect/62b9c515-f844-4e16-b96f-928b9a6116e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)has promised to lift all restrictions and delays on the supply of military equipment and ammunition to Israel immediately after his inauguration, Israeli Channel 12 News reports. The assurance from Trump's team came as Israel is considering a 60-day cease-fire with Hezbollah, which would provide a window until Trump takes office and implements the promised changes.
Those of us who have called out these injustices over the last several years will continue to call them out. When we called them out prior to the election, we were told that doing so would "help Trump win," even though the facts demonstrated the opposite was true. The vast majority of Americans--[more than 61% across the political spectrum and more than 77% of Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/de3f8eaa-c398-4195-b425-f6858866b693?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--called for an end to offensive arms to the Israeli military, and that doing so would make them 5-8 times more likely to vote for Harris. Biden refused to listen to the will of the American people, much less uphold American and international human rights law. Now, with Trump at the helm, it will be that much more difficult to hold him accountable when he can point to Biden's precedent of ignoring his own State Department's reports that Netanyahu is committing war crimes.
Our responsibility remains clear--continue to raise our voices for justice, and continue to support those demanding accountability. Contact your member of Congress regardless of party affiliation, and demand our elected officials uphold US and international law. Silence is not an option, as that enables further war crimes, and in this case, genocide. You have my commitment to continue to speak up relentlessly at every opportunity, even when it isn't popular to do so, because human rights are not a popularity contest, they are a fundamental obligation upon all of us to protect.

name: Election Reform Petition (Via Team Fry)
subject: What your signature can do:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRY FOR CONGRESS ](https://links
body:
Same-day election results, Voter ID requirements, and much more...

| | | | [ ](https://links.fryforsc.com/els/v2/V3YXT3gjewSm/RWdMNGZtWUlpMXR6UE4vMW5TbzYrcFpXblVjbGU0Um1RdjZLMzIvdzdBOVVOTWZyOTlCUzRnUklvTFd3OHpTaGhTTFJpK0NHTlBOeHRSTnp3R2lMcXc5NHNoZHU3Ykp0V0xOYTdEc2ZENmM9S0/)
---
| | This is a question that needs to be answered, Peter.
---
| | Why in the world are some states still __counting ballots_****_**2 WEEKS after Election Day?** These drawn out counting procedures are fanning the flame of public doubt when it comes to the integrity of America’s elections. [_**How could we expect the American people to trust results that take WEEKS to produce?**_](https://links.fryforsc.com/els/v2/_j64SkWaL0hY/RWdMNGZtWUlpMXR6UE4vMW5TbzYrcFpXblVjbGU0Um1RdjZLMzIvdzdBOVVOTWZyOTlCUzRnUklvTFd3OHpTaGhTTFJpK0NHTlBOeHRSTnp3R2lMcXc5NHNoZHU3Ykp0V0xOYTdEc2ZENmM9S0/)
---
| | | [ REFORM AMERICA'S ELECTIONS ](https://links.fryforsc.com/els/v2/v_bNH~G3_zck/RWdMNGZtWUlpMXR6UE4vMW5TbzYrcFpXblVjbGU0Um1RdjZLMzIvdzdBOVVOTWZyOTlCUzRnUklvTFd3OHpTaGhTTFJpK0NHTlBOeHRSTnp3R2lMcXc5NHNoZHU3Ykp0V0xOYTdEc2ZENmM9S0/)
---
| | Florida has the**3rd largest population of any state in the nation,** yet their statewide officials were able to produce same-day election results shortly after polls closed. The fact that the election was on November 5th and we STILL don’t have concrete results in all 50 states is both _unexplainable_ and ___ridiculous_. Peter,**** it’s safe to say that Russell and all of us here at Team Fry are **SICK** of the “counting” for weeks on end after Election Day. | | Congressman Russell Fry, South Carolina’s Seventh Congressional District Congressman, is honored and humbled to represent the Pee Dee and Grand Strand areas in Washington, D.C. Russell Fry is the successful product of the American Dream. He learned from his parents that there is no such thing as a free lunch and that success comes from hard work and determination. Russell self-funded his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina and then earned his law degree at the Charleston School of Law. In law school, he served as Student Bar Association president, helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation, and received the prestigious Civility Award. For over a decade, he practiced law all along the Grand Strand. Russell has always been a public servant and an advocate for the conservative movement. Prior to his election to U.S. Congress, Russell Fry represented Horry County in the South Carolina General Assembly. As Chief Majority Whip in the State House, he fought to lower taxes, defend the unborn, and safeguard the 2nd Amendment. Additionally, Russell fought to put 18 policy initiatives into law in his time as Chairman of the SC House Opioid Abuse Prevention Study Committee. This legislation provided funding for education on opioids, opioid prevention, and opioid treatment. Russell and his wife, Bronwen, have one son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their beloved chocolate lab, Jasper.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Today the Senate will vote on a proposal to suspend arms transfers to Israel.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I’m urging my Senate colleagues to support these resolutions.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241120-4527-footer&t=1&akid=4527%2E420207%2E4zr_q6)
Peter,
Later today, the Senate will vote on Bernie Sanders’ joint resolutions to suspend offensive weapons aid to the Israeli government. **I’m encouraging my Senate colleagues to support these resolutions.**
I have been deeply alarmed by the Israeli military’s conduct in Gaza, where independent human rights monitors have documented the use of U.S.-provided weaponry in violations of international law.
I believe the U.S. should use all available leverage, including the suspension of offensive weapons transfers, to de-escalate the violence and protect the lives of hostages, including Americans, Palestinian civilians, and all those impacted by the ongoing conflict. I believe we must do this while continuing to condemn the tragic killing and hostage-taking during Hamas’ brutal October 7th attacks and advocate for a ceasefire that ensures the safe return of all hostages.
According to a report from the Biden administration, “it is reasonable to assess” that Israeli forces have used weapons supplied by the United States in violation of international law. And Donald Trump’s return to the White House will only embolden Netanyahu and his far-right ministers.
That’s why I am urging Senators today to support these joint resolutions to block specific offensive arms sales to Israel, which upholds U.S. law that prohibits arms transfers to countries that engage in a consistent pattern of gross violations of internationally recognized human rights or restrict the delivery of U.S. humanitarian assistance.
There are some who will criticize this vote, stating it harms our ability to combat terrorists. I disagree. You do not effectively combat terrorism by starving innocent children, bombing hospitals, and blocking humanitarian aid. That’s what this vote is about.
We must do everything we can to safeguard civilian lives, secure a lasting ceasefire, and advance a pathway toward peace.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241120-4527-footer&t=2&refcode2=4527_420207_4zr_q6&akid=4527%2E420207%2E4zr_q6)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

body:
Here’s what we’ve done. And here’s what we’re going to do.| | | Peter, I’ve spent a good amount of the past couple of years asking for your support of other Republicans campaigns — for turning Virginia red and electing Republicans up and down the ballot. Today, I’m asking for myself. **I’ve officially announced I’m running for re-election as Virginia’s Attorney General, and I need you with me in my re-election campaign.**
---
[**SUPPORT JASON MIYARES’ CAMPAIGN**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=69b463d9e4c7448d81c10170a2486635&_e=UpMZ3zh3mdarIIHYjlz24rLhEd1jjcXJlotQKpJOYXbwQBmf8vyoCtrf3z6NDAMtJQSXqOQ5f4OtblMCQ6cy-G31nIOVBheAqk0bG0mluL_YiqqF9wY-J7cQ1bfaPjQ9cX1D2OpEunC32N9Z_IwN-eOaTDTUuv8iOv7QEgEP0xeXpEmSiE8sENj3RNMBwaZpn711Z4QLeNK3FcYgYSyex3g5cc5MCTwMQvo0BErJ9iu-B9PaFuL9hopggamblSalFADPnZY636WLGtgnjgP62cVrrdFNHkuP3laQwOW3B_c2Nz6Qbf_VRSaWsMLNKTb_OIiEWh6TjH88a6qdTbGYnTq_CQEmykdAlB4VV7MJyWOpbhWkNYXHfKB-Vjh016u8OMBJ6SYYX5A9orghXEXBJhUoV4iOuNgWBX258bhwgDM%3D)

Peter, we’ve gotten an incredible amount done in under four years.
* We secured some of the largest settlements in Virginia history against bad corporate actors in the **opioid crisis** —and used those settlements to give back to the communities harmed.
* We stood against the lawlessness at our **southern border** and held the Biden Administration accountable for their attempts to weaken the border even further.
* We launched Operation Ceasefire, **tackling violent crime** among serious, repeat offenders—and saw dramatic results, with Virginia’s murder rate now down 30%.
* We **fought the Biden Administration’s overreach** when they tried to force mask mandates, COVID vaccine requirements, and ban gas-powered vehicles.
* _**And we stood up to the Biden-Harris DOJ when they tried to force us to put non-citizens back on the voter rolls—**** _and won._**_

**[Notice how I’m saying “we” for all of these accomplishments, not “I”? That’s because all of this work was possible because of your support, Peter. ](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=69b463d9e4c7448d81c10170a2486635&_e=UpMZ3zh3mdarIIHYjlz24rLhEd1jjcXJlotQKpJOYXbwQBmf8vyoCtrf3z6NDAMtJQSXqOQ5f4OtblMCQ6cy-G31nIOVBheAqk0bG0mluL_YiqqF9wY-J7cQ1bfaPjQ9cX1D2OpEunC32N9Z_IwN-eOaTDTUuv8iOv7QEgEP0xeXpEmSiE8sENj3RNMBwaZpn711Z4QLeNK3FcYgYSyex3g5cc5MCTwMQvo0BErJ9iu-B9PaFuL9hopggamblSalaiA9jN9mjGXsBLOFPU-2OcQtr7NBAdAPDIOq_Xj-Bnq1oWjO49x5HSkh2cXJCylohO1mYq0Uqync6ncRG6gt_ZSLSCKotnBplNE2kJNzVZslchXzPkkPZNv3elIPquzSJYeCgttlzjc4Dhi2dTCMIUczczZZ0NZ6GLwDplexCHY%3D)** **
Let’s keep going. I need you with me from Day 1 on this re-election campaign. Can I count on you to join our team as a Day One Defender?**

clean_body: Here’s what we’ve done. And here’s what we’re going to do.| | | Peter, I’ve spent a good amount of the past couple of years asking for your support of other Republicans campaigns — for turning Virginia red and electing Republicans up and down the ballot. Today, I’m asking for myself. I’ve officially announced I’m running for re-election as Virginia’s Attorney General, and I need you with me in my re-election campaign. Peter, we’ve gotten an incredible amount done in under four years. We secured some of the largest settlements in Virginia history against bad corporate actors in the opioid crisis —and used those settlements to give back to the communities harmed. We stood against the lawlessness at our southern border and held the Biden Administration accountable for their attempts to weaken the border even further. We launched Operation Ceasefire, tackling violent crime among serious, repeat offenders—and saw dramatic results, with Virginia’s murder rate now down 30%. We fought the Biden Administration’s overreach when they tried to force mask mandates, COVID vaccine requirements, and ban gas-powered vehicles. And we stood up to the Biden-Harris DOJ when they tried to force us to put non-citizens back on the voter rolls—** and won. Let’s keep going. I need you with me from Day 1 on this re-election campaign. Can I count on you to join our team as a Day One Defender? Thank you, Jason Miyares Attorney General of Virginia | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Celebrate the Season with Us at the Annual MassDems Holiday Reception!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
As the holiday season approaches, I’m thrilled to invite you to join me, Governor Healey, and Lieutenant Governor Driscoll at our annual MassDems holiday reception! Let’s come together to enjoy cocktails, refreshments, and the wonderful company of our community.
This year’s event will take place on Wednesday, December 18th, at 5:30 PM at the Omni Parker House . In addition to celebrating our shared successes and looking ahead to the opportunities before us, we will take a moment to honor the invaluable contributions and leadership of the legislators who will be leaving the Massachusetts State House and Senate.
It’s a time to reflect on their impact and thank them for their service as we prepare to continue building a brighter future together.
You’ll find event details on the formal invite below, and you can RSVP by clicking the button below:
RSVP here! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday24?]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday24? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday24?]
I can’t wait to see you on December 18th as we toast to the season, and the road ahead!
Onward,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]

Boston, MA 02108

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Support LGBTQ+ youth this Trans Day of Remembrance and Resilience
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
I won’t stop fighting for people of all sexualities and genders (including people who are agender and gender non-conforming) to have the protection and freedom that we all deserve, surrounded by safety and love. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWJJZOshAlOIUWRVgPilrp5A6uB7aTA-YrSla8unOjNtzlC_ar1w2ht7eTB-dOTdW0vdnXrW6fqKetA2dJnEj2elIDsfJB_lSLejNfHAI44YuI0eniQ6K8LO6GA4RstpZy8aTzRtes_7q7C_9WI_iqx91u3hCPPAKnUSpM3SctAxSoTYYtrNYGDPGe9sajE_BvmXiKe9xSq-nNEQMgK1ziyzkWNveRj6E0p8OUwzSv6XOhDNfb_UyfRTcWVF8__yMA/4bm/LP0f6tsgST6nkuOrin_sKg/h0/h001.Ff11DCfgjpEx4SIfq66mbhZvkaWTPxpuc9WdfgAg4Tw)
---
Friend, Today is Trans Day of Remembrance and Resilience, a day to honor transgender people whose lives have been cut short due to transphobic violence, and a day to uplift trans people’s power and strength—including people who are still here, whose very existence is resistance. **Transgender people are beloved members of our communities.** If you are trans, non-binary, or gender non-conforming, I want you to know that I love and value you and I have your back. I won’t stop fighting for people of all sexualities and genders (including people who are agender and gender non-conforming) to have the protection and freedom that we all deserve, surrounded by safety and love. After Trump got re-elected this year, one hotline for LGBTQ youth saw a 700% spike in calls and texts. Trump has said that he’d reverse Biden’s pro-trans policies on “day one” of his second term and he supports a federal ban on gender-affirming care for trans youth, which doctors affirm is medically necessary and significantly reduces suicide risk. Right-wing lawmakers have also introduced hundreds of state-level policies to deny trans people rights and access to lifesaving healthcare, bathrooms, and more.**In the midst of this growing backlash, allies must keep speaking up and defending trans people.** Today I want to uplift a local organization that’s transforming the lives of LGBTQ young people, providing them with the resources and support they need to thrive.**The Ruth Ellis Center provides life-changing services and housing for LGBTQ+ young people who are experiencing homelessness and instability.** These resources are urgently needed because LGBTQ+ youth have a 120 percent higher likelihood of experiencing homelessness compared to others. [**For today’s Trans Day of Remembrance and Resilience, please donate to the Ruth Ellis Center to help create a world where LGBTQ+ young people are safe and supported no matter where they are.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJegzuJd3sDNU57ud8NlN9bHJXQ2F5HQSrAv8bCwVC56wPu05UryZ6gcyhsy5yMS382bX0atErwYM7PazdDluPhxDV_sZGti2i5TD9vWB8X6TRSQZqSi4rn5jsw2S02XBH1N-QLzTSb7TwPTZAiv_DJrDeIjh_1lBhGtNi8SxR81FHyxmgcBXJUTxJ0D0mKyLUjJKW2Pm1wluQo1Y4_mDwwbLJ2nzexmuCb6VvjSHFka19TzufMsNy47LHVpIK39v7HaHLPzmrSJF0KRXZyEla9HBqfA9pfdi3ObhAroIQDc4halmvTPsfCb0qkS31dPmTDL--cHuiFzZo1VvB8g6LBcU_9tpk5HzS8vlPR5zIFaIDDVMyt8-B6la6xz7XOaxFkKwtcYXxwZIeUbvcXTKLeA/4bm/LP0f6tsgST6nkuOrin_sKg/h1/h001.bmlvmN2m2tk-xMxFZZ__B_I82GEfnm6uZRNDVJ2vU-o) | [DONATE TO RUTH ELLIS CENTER](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJegzuJd3sDNU57ud8NlN9bHJXQ2F5HQSrAv8bCwVC56wJZ8qVZcvRifCaYfbWUv0nf10o0kszyYz8ucv0Qekw5VSDXo5cPwJ5bvvTMbThETwYNf_3hgHHVTDzuf-YVFxXlx_xpA2Q3RbY1jYm8q8RpmcgXOqf7CGBkTyii74VQUGAF3bFGzRTLe1oxjdNrf1uI4ZcXQXnvXZBsrckikKlguqA48UwwOZJDexDEtZxFotygxGnc31o_2teFSzrUDhp9t3ouQldCXuUPlNxg4J0uy-JWIirkpBdl0YrVHT1CzCCzHhlTGvDiNts33RZJ1mBsqG0_sGZeaOFFRKe90754mWtSEqzaS52_PpD0C62E7J1eQdMzLBy8toDzeJIQZYYCUJg9ySYZ-zAgQCOjOhizA/4bm/LP0f6tsgST6nkuOrin_sKg/h2/h001.LdDH3skwCChLNL7RssGI1cquarvvz4vIW07vBC4w8C0)
---
Trans people are fighting back against growing backlash and oppression, building a world where everyone can thrive and no one has to fear violence for just being who they are.
Trans and queer people have always been here, as demonstrated by Ruth Ellis herself, a Black lesbian who came out in 1915. Beginning in the 1930s, Ruth provided shelter and support for people whose race, sexual orientation, or both set them apart from the dominant culture. Her home became known as a refuge for LGBTQ+ young people.
**In addition to providing housing for young people in need, the Ruth Ellis Center offers a drop-in safe space with critical services** like peer support and food and showers, **a health and wellness center that provides quality and culturally competent healthcare at no cost** for hundreds of LGBTQ+ youth experiencing homelessness in Metro Detroit, **HIV prevention** and skills workshops, and advocacy to create more welcoming systems of care for LGBTQ youth and families nationwide.
[**Please honor Trans Day of Remembrance and Resilience today by helping LGBTQ+ young people thrive with a donation to the Ruth Ellis Center.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJegzuJd3sDNU57ud8NlN9bHJXQ2F5HQSrAv8bCwVC56y5TxEhFBrqZ-gUiBYeRwhpx1SbO2zVZ_0ZYBlb3cySfSTspCqb8zaZ10eXwx-OY8WzSLwqHgBM_l0N8waLwATckZJulgGf7Udst6z2J7A1O-H7FBF_13yr4v-vUEDpFBnuUNQ81QElKVNM9MJsaednaayBwQdqWV04ShuvLPa3XxSleAN3LQbRFJHEpiSx4yxRDl4r6BypipscEz__6G_k8OvOgxyDh5WX80y-jOKpnZAEJ6X0_7vHm3pVmFgNpTrovp_Uc96dZ40avhd0xo1sn0zn6WJfYy_VXPLd_T8Da5iQFcu3j3b9tyoiQhN3XCPb2c0JD0pUar3jQ4trRI8z08UX-AJRQDO8zx8mwJHdGw/4bm/LP0f6tsgST6nkuOrin_sKg/h3/h001.GBBDe2iqFYeU43r-cOMVuejVqcoOOtYnq4tE3Pg7kWM)

In solidarity and service,
Rashida Tlaib
P.S. If you’re a trans or non-binary adult in crisis, the Trans Lifeline’s Hotline is a peer support line at 877-565-8860. clean_body: I won’t stop fighting for people of all sexualities and genders (including people who are agender and gender non-conforming) to have the protection and freedom that we all deserve, surrounded by safety and love. | | | Friend, Today is Trans Day of Remembrance and Resilience, a day to honor transgender people whose lives have been cut short due to transphobic violence, and a day to uplift trans people’s power and strength—including people who are still here, whose very existence is resistance. Transgender people are beloved members of our communities. If you are trans, non-binary, or gender non-conforming, I want you to know that I love and value you and I have your back. I won’t stop fighting for people of all sexualities and genders (including people who are agender and gender non-conforming) to have the protection and freedom that we all deserve, surrounded by safety and love. After Trump got re-elected this year, one hotline for LGBTQ youth saw a 700% spike in calls and texts. Trump has said that he’d reverse Biden’s pro-trans policies on “day one” of his second term and he supports a federal ban on gender-affirming care for trans youth, which doctors affirm is medically necessary and significantly reduces suicide risk. Right-wing lawmakers have also introduced hundreds of state-level policies to deny trans people rights and access to lifesaving healthcare, bathrooms, and more.In the midst of this growing backlash, allies must keep speaking up and defending trans people. Today I want to uplift a local organization that’s transforming the lives of LGBTQ young people, providing them with the resources and support they need to thrive.The Ruth Ellis Center provides life-changing services and housing for LGBTQ+ young people who are experiencing homelessness and instability. These resources are urgently needed because LGBTQ+ youth have a 120 percent higher likelihood of experiencing homelessness compared to others. | Trans people are fighting back against growing backlash and oppression, building a world where everyone can thrive and no one has to fear violence for just being who they are. Trans and queer people have always been here, as demonstrated by Ruth Ellis herself, a Black lesbian who came out in 1915. Beginning in the 1930s, Ruth provided shelter and support for people whose race, sexual orientation, or both set them apart from the dominant culture. Her home became known as a refuge for LGBTQ+ young people. In addition to providing housing for young people in need, the Ruth Ellis Center offers a drop-in safe space with critical services like peer support and food and showers, a health and wellness center that provides quality and culturally competent healthcare at no cost for hundreds of LGBTQ+ youth experiencing homelessness in Metro Detroit, HIV prevention and skills workshops, and advocacy to create more welcoming systems of care for LGBTQ youth and families nationwide. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Ruth Ellis Center | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your support. Our fight for LGBTQ+ rights is connected to our fight for human dignity for marginalized people, and we cannot back down. In solidarity and service, Rashida Tlaib P.S. If you’re a trans or non-binary adult in crisis, the Trans Lifeline’s Hotline is a peer support line at 877-565-8860. For LGBTQ+ young people under 25 years old, the Trevor Project offers support if you call 866-488-7386, text START to 678678, or by . Thank you for being you and expanding possibilities for all of us to be our full, free selves. If you’re an ally and want to do more to support your LGBTQ+ neighbors and loved ones, here’s from the Trevor Project about being an ally to trans and non-binary youth and here are from Advocates for Trans Equality to frequently asked questions about trans people. You can also read about and memorialize trans people we’ve lost this past year at . Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . subject: Flip, Hold, Build
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Campaigns are won in the off-year. It’s that simple.

|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97399276/513289289/664569763?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-11-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDJjNjU2Yi03NGE3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tcOV033yrVHt7cfmSYQhlm8VlfdCTNs8oHSzhQoBLCc=)

| First, thank you for opening this email. After the election, most people just check out, but we keep working. Honestly, just knowing that you’re reading this is a huge boost. We’re switching to far fewer emails at this point because it’s a less intense time in the campaign, but the building still has to happen. It’s hard to overstate, actually, how essential it is that it happens now.

Campaigns are won in the off-year. It’s that simple. We won this seat, but it took spending nearly $3 million in the span of 4 months–with ads, staff, and gas in our cars. We didn’t raise it all in 4 months, though. We built it over the course of two years, slowly, steadily, and with intention.

Believe me when I say–our earliest supporters in the re-election mean the world to me. While most Americans tune out and forget about elections until October 2 years from now, I’m still here working. It can get lonely. Having folks like you in my corner as we rebuild means so much.

We face difficult challenges ahead. With a Republican House majority, making progress on the most important issues to Michiganders–including lowering costs and safeguarding reproductive rights–will be a tougher battle.

[_**I plan to use these next few weeks to recharge, strategize, and prepare to deliver results for Michiganders and lay out the building blocks for our next victory. In the meantime, I hope you’ll stick around and support our efforts with a contribution of any amount.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97399277/513289292/664569763?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-11-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDJjNjU2Yi03NGE3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tcOV033yrVHt7cfmSYQhlm8VlfdCTNs8oHSzhQoBLCc=)

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Peter,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=26884258196141389753162000c6e3c0&_e=0DvjSjOoXuaO8451E5CXO1EEzXmpRnNILXzBCip4sScsAdm2uYP2hrRpbS52vJ1v5Phy9ZZgxHlfBZ2ZO7NkvNV0xHpiRA40ZzpVgpSz5mvVmdHAwSundTlgcdMzhHSaxLab-q8xJgCzMV_GfWcbaJdJMVeRO3T0O0PQIPhcrd-t5QddG46iT6Z3hWhavTNVkOmv1oyprj2xlAqMirPUOtMDMw6nJBUSCxNzhrFgMSEEcG_SQ8yLrdVj072_7LLj3wSYBru0JUhsW8cUPwv_3rH-DU6GHXzNhihGeb9btfD6Y3riKIthFmQXjyqAmH6fLcbGcTiShQ9l3FxjZrJfjRgylxaWqKiIyqL0ccA8mMTNtpxGfop1ujGPKC-OFxWKhTlgaXORDx0HNVADnJrEZw%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=26884258196141389753162000c6e3c0&_e=0DvjSjOoXuaO8451E5CXO1EEzXmpRnNILXzBCip4sScsAdm2uYP2hrRpbS52vJ1v5Phy9ZZgxHlfBZ2ZO7NkvNV0xHpiRA40ZzpVgpSz5mvVmdHAwSundTlgcdMzhHSaxLab-q8xJgCzMV_GfWcbaJdJMVeRO3T0O0PQIPhcrd-t5QddG46iT6Z3hWhavTNVkOmv1oyprj2xlAqMirPUOtMDMw6nJBUSCxNzhrFgMSEEcG_SQ8yLrdVj072_7LLjiRN11jizPv2NdelvhN2loPsau98Fn2Qy8qQ2kBP7dYj_ClgED9-P9anddF2MLkNgohSICLJOztw9v3zoi6ue0VvCNUM0P5paYGEhVPV6XIv-yvDAalpPaQpbXCLIrOd-0HF-CBuvrhsuAHtJ9-d16Q%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=26884258196141389753162000c6e3c0&_e=0DvjSjOoXuaO8451E5CXO1EEzXmpRnNILXzBCip4sScsAdm2uYP2hrRpbS52vJ1v5Phy9ZZgxHlfBZ2ZO7NkvNV0xHpiRA40ZzpVgpSz5mvVmdHAwSundTlgcdMzhHSaxLab-q8xJgCzMV_GfWcbaJdJMVeRO3T0O0PQIPhcrd-t5QddG46iT6Z3hWhavTNVkOmv1oyprj2xlAqMirPUOtMDMw6nJBUSCxNzhrFgMSEEcG_SQ8yLrdVj072_7LLjWtha0bEAp0II5bVi-i0ORId-esQUDumP7c4RcS09VvLoWKkRkCHPMvQlHpuj5z3NRDqiOQTmKk5LgosMAcxupS4cyf_c_4r_gj-kjVihsqJ1TSEzwSSnPg_LsiDzj7E76KW2f5JOhcbwff0exm-9-A%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=26884258196141389753162000c6e3c0&_e=0DvjSjOoXuaO8451E5CXO1EEzXmpRnNILXzBCip4sScsAdm2uYP2hrRpbS52vJ1v5Phy9ZZgxHlfBZ2ZO7NkvNV0xHpiRA40ZzpVgpSz5mvVmdHAwSundTlgcdMzhHSaxLab-q8xJgCzMV_GfWcbaJdJMVeRO3T0O0PQIPhcrd-t5QddG46iT6Z3hWhavTNVkOmv1oyprj2xlAqMirPUOtMDMw6nJBUSCxNzhrFgMSEEcG_SQ8yLrdVj072_7LLjEGGtjXhCFIvGnacELnMH-pT9oOCdeGcaKfw0TfXLAblNRq4jQUfed-9JARAARBiYgiY-EJUkVd1On8wotKuu7xDtpXvwzncr1pPxK8Kliv4ZMc4puoro1sCNQCMRSWCkJTkegjM9AkAeFRSLCxigAw%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=26884258196141389753162000c6e3c0&_e=0DvjSjOoXuaO8451E5CXO1EEzXmpRnNILXzBCip4sScsAdm2uYP2hrRpbS52vJ1v5Phy9ZZgxHlfBZ2ZO7NkvNV0xHpiRA40ZzpVgpSz5mvVmdHAwSundTlgcdMzhHSaxLab-q8xJgCzMV_GfWcbaJdJMVeRO3T0O0PQIPhcrd-t5QddG46iT6Z3hWhavTNVkOmv1oyprj2xlAqMirPUOtMDMw6nJBUSCxNzhrFgMSEEcG_SQ8yLrdVj072_7LLj9io_AUWseLbyZh7mxO4gU5YjpFks6qFfh2HXUkWZ1y0BBhPBbr_Jqkb4zC-FoZ4Znx-EuKeRKIvl9Ifi13ghQo1-rUMg6lnE_qqgSWNdh7bxeQnaBnCPLOidV1ub0_UmOuJrSZ-cFMci5rqTt1iMIQ%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=26884258196141389753162000c6e3c0&_e=0DvjSjOoXuaO8451E5CXO1EEzXmpRnNILXzBCip4sScsAdm2uYP2hrRpbS52vJ1v5Phy9ZZgxHlfBZ2ZO7NkvNV0xHpiRA40ZzpVgpSz5mvVmdHAwSundTlgcdMzhHSaxLab-q8xJgCzMV_GfWcbaJdJMVeRO3T0O0PQIPhcrd-t5QddG46iT6Z3hWhavTNVkOmv1oyprj2xlAqMirPUOtMDMw6nJBUSCxNzhrFgMSEEcG_SQ8yLrdVj072_7LLj2z_IxhN-7feOxqUZe3bQDj7HaaT2Rfr_et7MKRrdK8VMuVQMCAlzpyMnv6-BfXTUSloG65pwmXatQUIw6_SjwUqBYRcavCeO3XBF7pzfilS7gvT613FMSZW9ET9HXqyRi8WTF-t07QYeV-zABzbM4g%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

clean_body: My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. Dear Peter, My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him. Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy. He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy. I was so proud that night. Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch. – but first, let me explain what happened. Our nightmare started in October of 2020. Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory. Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge. When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter. Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car. Then it happened. Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car. After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn... Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy. They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death. The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder. Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison. Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. Gratefully, Patti Reilly P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: MAGA's dangerous deportation plan
body:
This is a threat to American values.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vhf3s-il0o3m-kyd76rh7/)
---
# **MAGA's Dangerous Deportation Plan**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vhf3s-il0o3n-kyd76rh8/)
---
| | | | folks, Donald Trump’s plan to deploy the U.S. military for mass deportations is not only reckless but a betrayal of the principles that define America. Even Republican Senator Rand Paul has denounced the idea, calling it a “huge mistake” and a blatant misuse of our military. Think about it: soldiers in uniform marching into cities, tasked with rounding up immigrants—including people who’ve built their lives here for decades, contributed to their communities, and raised families. It’s a dystopian image straight out of a nightmare, and one that has no place in a free and democratic society. For over 100 years, it’s been illegal to use the military in domestic law enforcement, and for good reason. America’s armed forces are meant to defend our country—not to police it. Deploying them in this way sets a chilling precedent and tarnishes their honor. It’s a gross overreach of executive power and a direct attack on the values of liberty and justice. Even Paul, a conservative and sometimes Trump ally, is warning against this disastrous plan. “I don’t see the military putting [a housekeeper] in handcuffs and marching her down the street to an encampment,” he said. And yet, that’s exactly the kind of scene Trump is pushing for. This is about more than just policy—it’s about who we are as a nation. Using the military to target undocumented immigrants is a dangerous step toward authoritarianism. It erodes trust, divides communities, and sets the stage for widespread fear and abuse. The fight to stop this starts now. It’s time to stand up for American values—compassion, fairness, and the belief that everyone deserves a shot at the American dream. Together, we must resist these draconian measures and ensure that no president uses our armed forces to carry out their personal vendettas. Let’s make our voices heard. Let’s fight for the America we believe in. [**_Our most powerful weapon right now is our microphone, so we need to use platforms around the country to hold MAGA accountable! Join us in our fight today._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vhf3s-il0o3o-kyd76rh9/)
---

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: We're running out of time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4881%2E552475%2Eqw5_pn)
⏰ Time is running out ⏰ Pennsylvania voters’ voices must be heard — and we’re running out of time. **[Please rush a contribution right now to power our work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241120-3?refcode=em20241120-3&refcode2=4881_552475_qw5_pn&akid=4881%2E552475%2Eqw5_pn)** **[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241120-3?refcode=em20241120-3&refcode2=4881_552475_qw5_pn&akid=4881%2E552475%2Eqw5_pn)**
---
Peter,
We won’t stop fighting to ensure that every Pennsylvanian’s voice is heard. With a razor-thin margin, we need resources ASAP.
The fight for Pennsylvania’s Senate seat is still on, but time is running out. Our team is working hard to ensure Bob Casey stays in the Senate fighting for us.

clean_body: Peter—Did you get this email? We're reaching out to you because this moment demands urgent action. We are clear-eyed about the steep, uphill battle that lies ahead of us as a result of the U.S. election. Abortion bans have put people across the country in life-threatening situations, with some forced to travel hundreds of miles to access basic health care. These threats to our rights will only increase under a second Trump administration, but with you by our side, we are ready for the next phase of this fight. For you and for anyone who will ever need reproductive care, we refuse to back down. Sincerely, Gabriella Morris Chief Development Officer * From: Gabriella Morris <info@reprorights.org> Sent: Monday, November 18, 2024 10:36 AM To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Subject: ❗3X MATCH ALERT | Dear Peter, Right now, the United States is in a nationwide health care crisis. Together, we have the power to change this. That's why we're excited to announce that a generous Center for Reproductive Rights supporter has stepped up to match every gift you make, up to $50,000! | "$25 = $75" "$50 = $150" "$100= $300" "$250 = $750" "TRIPLE MY GIFT" The Center is fighting every day to protect abortion, contraception, IVF access, and all the essential reproductive care that millions of people depend on. Take action now and help change the dangerous trajectory the U.S. is on. Onward, Gabriella Morris Chief Development Officer P.S. If you've read through the heartbreaking stories of the Center's plaintiffs and thousands of others across the world, you'll know how devastating abortion bans have been for countless women and families. "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. © Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

_Climate scientists are warning us..._ As President Trump nominates Doug Burgum for Interior Secretary, Chris Wright for Secretary of the Department of Energy, and Lee Zeldin for the EPA, our planet’s future hangs in the balance. These individuals are climate change deniers with troubling financial entanglements in the fossil fuel industry. body:
The Radical Left's relentless assault on our values, our economy, and our very way of life demands a swift and decisive response.
COMPLETE NOW

|
---
| | | Friend - Our nation is at a crossroads, and the fate of our democracy hangs in the balance. The Radical Left's relentless assault on our values, our economy, and our very way of life _**demands a swift and decisive response.**_

That's why I'm joining House Republicans and issuing a call to action to all patriots who refuse to surrender to the forces of socialism and tyranny. _**Participating in the America First Agenda Audit is your chance to join the fight and shape the future of our nation.**_

---
| | [COMPLETE MY AMERICA FIRST AGENDA AUDIT](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2622b6e0f7e744ebab7a1d1fab5300da&_e=fA0857M7zkTgJ2cDh2ci74TH_zGnzH1tUELvhW8Ph8wPfsZUl79dwPz1hRNOTQ1Y7XTKQcvw1nHN03cf7kSLOddfvQet7Cn3rcZ20c7QmQWn76CPzL-DnbwqRjScQkdk5zE_PqbT4uONFOYCRGhFsV0XEMNBwSw0bIYYb1gIRH7ukX2z0CzXg3e2dD7dvpmTbtIKYNxHgCncpxLe78Q6sNABaxm-dqhUvJEyQnonTv57U1QcbrZVSjjeF2OfROJdWKviR0XMRKPBqZRjm8rY373FXyHnVzAAFEl0cP_jw_DcTGRE0odIgtQHvM0JBOQW14A9qUWXHbxH2curYdFUX2XJQ4SmKrNh8zSkBPNwsd6MXy4As3ilZRJRuawdUiHwDAvRY2H3NXRBdYLiWSo7ZT-QXV9-CQtm-OoJGyiVNQQ%3D "COMPLETE MY AMERICA FIRST AGENDA AUDIT")

**This is your opportunity to send your thoughts with House Republicans on the future of our country.**

---
| | [TAKE THE AMERICA FIRST AGENDA AUDIT](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2622b6e0f7e744ebab7a1d1fab5300da&_e=fA0857M7zkTgJ2cDh2ci74TH_zGnzH1tUELvhW8Ph8wPfsZUl79dwPz1hRNOTQ1Y7XTKQcvw1nHN03cf7kSLOddfvQet7Cn3rcZ20c7QmQWn76CPzL-DnbwqRjScQkdk5zE_PqbT4uONFOYCRGhFsV0XEMNBwSw0bIYYb1gIRH7ukX2z0CzXg3e2dD7dvpmTbtIKYNxHgCncpxLe78Q6sNABaxm-dqhUvJEyQnonTv57U1QcbrZVSjjeF2OfROJdWKviR0XMRKPBqZRjm8rY3-Rf0YPgiH6pZCD9wTC3YRk2BDnVG586S58TJjp-WSvbRdh9ZV29KiZchG7dlcKJp2d-1ByAt9GxSeS7KUgRYmXYS0PRtBnosNp0zq_b-pxdAwy3K-2O9wpGy1O_cc5DeRIuBIePp9AXjdKq-AbUNaM%3D "TAKE THE AMERICA FIRST AGENDA AUDIT")

Newt Gingrich

name: George Latimer
subject: New Member Orientation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
Last week I joined Members-elect from around the country in Washington D.C. for New Member Orientation.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=iQMCHv1npLe4s9IhBYt%2BZdyn8gvyYYkY%2FJfYQIKBqKvgWLd4JEYR2%2BqXTZS2FY8iOs3g1gEl6LU86%2BkWrwHIo0qrT08rEl1zE8JpPlwmU5CXnV5OyZRbUanSsbEzW9XTelqwP9RpuMOthY4dF8g9aPd0z7zwTeb%2FnZnwygpCyi4ipOwla1JNgs3UuLWcox5o1TQSWxvlw4D4ZcplyV%2B6l3j9xjTTcKcySAUZHV6DIwFqUyy3sb0tnFoBDfvRdm61ouaJnxCKmLBNG6UjnaE09AJFVATT%2BLi%2B8h3i3tCK7HsRMMVY9ZM%2B%2FwDeM9temyO3fToHQzsPEF9XB91IuCAsofNpRqB%2Fs8DvyaFTVL5TqDNuUeMFtYDGFgbQ%2BQdZTbZpVmcFLz29BF70o%2BlVcMQhQ3lirp1w2uWjPDASWQQ9iD2yhLFhIQiOVmaZtxMQxtW6)
---
| |
---
Peter — Last week I joined Members-elect from around the country in Washington D.C. for New Member Orientation. I was especially honored to join the New Dems Coalition alongside 21 other members-elect for the New Dems Freshman Orientation! With a strong coalition of 108 members, we will work together to lower costs, fix our broken immigration system, make our communities safer, defend our freedoms, and push a solutions-oriented approach to solving the problems Americans face. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97400692/513291243/1087608062?amount=5&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_NTLNDRS_112024_1_1_NewDems&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2U5NDFlOTQtNzdhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PgcSqTO1K6bUYL2VPwxeI5HOE3DotwHm3UKWl61wlGE=) I know this is not necessarily how we expected the 119th Congress to look — with Democrats in the minority in both the House and the Senate, but I remain committed to fighting relentlessly for every resident of this district. I have promised to deliver real results for NY-16, and I will follow through with that promise — no matter the obstacles. And Peter, I’m no stranger to tough fights. As Westchester County Executive, I successfully led the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican county, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. I’m committed to fighting for you and honored to be your Congressman-elect. [This fight is far from over, so will you join me in expanding Democratic progress by chipping in $5 or any amount today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97400693/513291244/1087608062?amount=5&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_NTLNDRS_112024_1_1_NewDems&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2U5NDFlOTQtNzdhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PgcSqTO1K6bUYL2VPwxeI5HOE3DotwHm3UKWl61wlGE=) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97400694/513291245/1087608062?amount=5&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_NTLNDRS_112024_1_1_NewDems&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2U5NDFlOTQtNzdhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PgcSqTO1K6bUYL2VPwxeI5HOE3DotwHm3UKWl61wlGE=)
---
Thank you,
George
* * *

For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

clean_body: Last week I joined Members-elect from around the country in Washington D.C. for New Member Orientation. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter — Last week I joined Members-elect from around the country in Washington D.C. for New Member Orientation. I was especially honored to join the New Dems Coalition alongside 21 other members-elect for the New Dems Freshman Orientation! With a strong coalition of 108 members, we will work together to lower costs, fix our broken immigration system, make our communities safer, defend our freedoms, and push a solutions-oriented approach to solving the problems Americans face. = I know this is not necessarily how we expected the 119th Congress to look — with Democrats in the minority in both the House and the Senate, but I remain committed to fighting relentlessly for every resident of this district. I have promised to deliver real results for NY-16, and I will follow through with that promise — no matter the obstacles. And Peter, I’m no stranger to tough fights. As Westchester County Executive, I successfully led the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican county, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. I’m committed to fighting for you and honored to be your Congressman-elect. = | = Thank you, George * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

| | Fellow Patriot, We did it!Your faithfulness, hard work, and dedication to conservative principals helped bring about the greatest political comeback in American history. And friend, now we begin the work of installing every America First policy we can, as quickly as we can. **[And that’s why I need your support for our PUNISH and DEPORT THE CRIMINALS advocacy operation right away.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=768b0db7ccea44b28941793b8c364659&_e=VgQtkDpTvRCavl8bZkrs3b4qc379BIa0978SnkxBbwYxLa93cFfcfeFkZ9AW1dv3rJhoxdII-ke6AWWc07izV3jGGaD3Ot-cBAANxJ0cSM4l2o2c3FppZxiKEvF12bmNk1t5LwaLb9rBSc1eKerJcA1jBVozhS-j2dFApohD9Sb9cRlj0CmT6OfISx1LEys3wxc7ufGhrjK-ufi0K2kBb_YQFVOm9sTX6OG_WE2VPGlnHN2_Hs4wKNWh8Rw9w4mIn164nYHkF9SloyP54aQcgHhHRrhwb-cjWNG9nL_ixA6_0_sAVCo6APf4IukbOLsuIS6iQxnypVnuhDY3yQ11BuApVn7nFDquVi3lL2qT6o-XL3QZcg2iamjPyhxCO_NDKbfuAzHD1Q1dxRKguXPX40CukkNvk5TnZ8ynJfz4yZU%3D) **Your speed is so critical because we MUST hit the ground running. Friend, you know we can count on President Trump to close the border on day one.You also know we can count on the Left to attack him with a vengeance when he then makes a move to deport the dangerous criminals who’ve entered our country illegally.We’re talking about terrorists, rapists, drug dealers, and child traffickers. But the Left is already crying about fascism and racism.And they are going to do everything in their power to convince your neighbor, your family member, and even you......that deporting criminals is immoral in their continuing effort to paint President Trump as a villain.My friend, we must continue to stand united and strong. To protect the rule of law...To protect our communities and our loved ones...We must PUNISH AND DEPORT THE CRIMINALS.And President Trump will need our support on _day one_.That’s why your support _today_ is so critical. Between now and Inauguration Day on January 20th, AMAC Action is doing everything in our power to rally unwavering support in Washington for removal of criminal aliens from our communities on day one.Friend, my name is Bob Carlstrom – President of AMAC Action. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with Republican control in Washington with only razor thin margins, our advocacy is more critical than ever before.My friend, we have got to get out ahead of the radical Left. Because this defeat will only serve to radicalize them further. And they will do anything and everything they can to push back on conservative priorities, fear-monger to American citizens, and undermine this administration at every step of the way.Remember when they were hysterical parroting lies about kids in cages and border patrol agents whipping immigrants? That will pale in comparison to their outrageous claims about internment camps and the mass deportation of legal immigrants.Because the Left doesn’t care about the truth.But with your help, AMAC Action is ready to confront their lies head-on. **[That’s why today, right now, I’m asking you to click this link to make an emergency membership donation to AMAC Action.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=768b0db7ccea44b28941793b8c364659&_e=VgQtkDpTvRCavl8bZkrs3b4qc379BIa0978SnkxBbwYxLa93cFfcfeFkZ9AW1dv3rJhoxdII-ke6AWWc07izV3jGGaD3Ot-cBAANxJ0cSM4l2o2c3FppZxiKEvF12bmNk1t5LwaLb9rBSc1eKerJcA1jBVozhS-j2dFApohD9Sb9cRlj0CmT6OfISx1LEys3wxc7ufGhrjK-ufi0K2kBb_YQFVOm9sTX6OG_WE2VPGlnHN2_Hs4wKNWh8Rw9w4mIpbWVQi4TIGvzsv5UF8EAzWaP-vgiHdyfvZ_0zWi76cw_33DrWDaiHhT7rpqcJenSWWfIeZ6NACbYtYZjK7z1zL883PzJtgz_rNsdSQ6x35BFSoTqKCYClwhvqx9YmeR_RUza6Agw96nPOWaK0DetITEf1fzPkgM-Zjw33bl1tfg%3D) **Friend, thanks to your commitment to our shared conservative values, we have every reason to feel hopeful about the future of our country.But we can’t rest on our laurels.To truly usher in a new era of greatness for our nation, the Trump-Vance Administration needs our continued efforts.Because if not us, then who?The left-leaning AARP certainly isn’t going to lift a finger to promote Trump-Vance America First policies. They side with the dangerous radicals like George Soros......they take millions from an unholy alliance with UnitedHealth as Senator Rand Paul has pointed out......and they do it while claiming patriotic Americans like you agree with them!But I know that American seniors like you are ready for major change and a conservative restoration!That’s why I’m so grateful that our army of AMAC members has accomplished so much already!From helping Governor Glenn Youngkin secure election integrity in Virginia... ...to helping Wisconsin voters amend their state Constitution to disallow “Zuckerbucks” in local elections and ensure that only authorized public officials can manage the election process, and everything in between......AMAC Action’s amazing members have reclaimed the conservative values and ideas that have made America the greatest nation on earth. Now our chapters, delegates, 350,912 volunteer advocates, and over 2 million AMAC members will be using our full power to protect parents’ rights against radical schools, promote drug price transparency, preserve tax cuts, keep boys out of girls’ sports and locker rooms......and PUNISH AND DEPORT THE CRIMINALS. And friend, AMAC Action is taking steps now to protect the interests of you and your family – but we can’t do it without you. **[That’s why I’m asking you to join with the AMAC Action army with your very best emergency membership donation for our DEPORT THE CRIMINALS advocacy operation right away!](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=768b0db7ccea44b28941793b8c364659&_e=VgQtkDpTvRCavl8bZkrs3b4qc379BIa0978SnkxBbwYxLa93cFfcfeFkZ9AW1dv3rJhoxdII-ke6AWWc07izV3jGGaD3Ot-cBAANxJ0cSM4l2o2c3FppZxiKEvF12bmNk1t5LwaLb9rBSc1eKerJcA1jBVozhS-j2dFApohD9Sb9cRlj0CmT6OfISx1LEys3wxc7ufGhrjK-ufi0K2kBb_YQFVOm9sTX6OG_WE2VPGlnHN2_Hs4wKNWh8Rw9w4mIN69hyQtR-VlyqMLk_9WB35IUXAJSPQIdNKevAx2SxpAlFT6F4tSVmEI9l9UlJ6HNHeo5kRemlkjC-kd6CoEG28CB-1-IBa21wY-9NBK4UO_X-At9jYUDxC0Czz2_GV9V3puE-mJl0dS3wM-xVYG-njsjGTd4_5PqdOmbPEAnBhg%3D) ** This battle to PUNISH AND DEPORT THE CRIMINALS who are terrorizing our citizens, will be the first and most vicious fight facing the Trump-Vance administration.Let’s send a message to the radical Left that Election Day was just the beginning.With over a 1 million voices, we can reject policies that have made America and Americans less safe! Friend, I want to thank you for everything you as a conservative patriot have done so far. But as we move on to this next chapter of the American story, I’m asking you to **[**join with the #1 most influential advocacy group for conservative seniors to make sure we make the most of this incredible opportunity for change.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=768b0db7ccea44b28941793b8c364659&_e=VgQtkDpTvRCavl8bZkrs3b4qc379BIa0978SnkxBbwYxLa93cFfcfeFkZ9AW1dv3rJhoxdII-ke6AWWc07izV3jGGaD3Ot-cBAANxJ0cSM4l2o2c3FppZxiKEvF12bmNk1t5LwaLb9rBSc1eKerJcA1jBVozhS-j2dFApohD9Sb9cRlj0CmT6OfISx1LEys3wxc7ufGhrjK-ufi0K2kBb_YQFVOm9sTX6OG_WE2VPGlnHN2_Hs4wKNWh8Rw9w4mI4P65qJTByOb6I3fK4adMB-_pHRmIkAd1wAKdLGCoWCUEIQV2nzHxdAmJf2Gr_O3kXcNrFhZIPVPmNOV5n1d-a54Sc72MrHLjSKxJwjlwBRTtdFQ-K3X4d6nMxfcvCR04bvwFyhm1H47dl5wDjx0-fIycMfYqJkUvIIq9optDwp8%3D)** Thank you, friend.

Bob Carlstrom, PresidentAMAC Action

clean_body: | | | | Your speed is so critical because we MUST hit the ground running. | | | | | | Fellow Patriot, We did it!Your faithfulness, hard work, and dedication to conservative principals helped bring about the greatest political comeback in American history. And friend, now we begin the work of installing every America First policy we can, as quickly as we can. Your speed is so critical because we MUST hit the ground running. Friend, you know we can count on President Trump to close the border on day one.You also know we can count on the Left to attack him with a vengeance when he then makes a move to deport the dangerous criminals who’ve entered our country illegally.We’re talking about terrorists, rapists, drug dealers, and child traffickers. But the Left is already crying about fascism and racism.And they are going to do everything in their power to convince your neighbor, your family member, and even you......that deporting criminals is immoral in their continuing effort to paint President Trump as a villain.My friend, we must continue to stand united and strong. To protect the rule of law...To protect our communities and our loved ones...We must PUNISH AND DEPORT THE CRIMINALS.And President Trump will need our support on day one.That’s why your support today is so critical. Between now and Inauguration Day on January 20th, AMAC Action is doing everything in our power to rally unwavering support in Washington for removal of criminal aliens from our communities on day one.Friend, my name is Bob Carlstrom – President of AMAC Action. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with Republican control in Washington with only razor thin margins, our advocacy is more critical than ever before.My friend, we have got to get out ahead of the radical Left. Because this defeat will only serve to radicalize them further. And they will do anything and everything they can to push back on conservative priorities, fear-monger to American citizens, and undermine this administration at every step of the way.Remember when they were hysterical parroting lies about kids in cages and border patrol agents whipping immigrants? That will pale in comparison to their outrageous claims about internment camps and the mass deportation of legal immigrants.Because the Left doesn’t care about the truth.But with your help, AMAC Action is ready to confront their lies head-on. Friend, thanks to your commitment to our shared conservative values, we have every reason to feel hopeful about the future of our country.But we can’t rest on our laurels.To truly usher in a new era of greatness for our nation, the Trump-Vance Administration needs our continued efforts.Because if not us, then who?The left-leaning AARP certainly isn’t going to lift a finger to promote Trump-Vance America First policies. They side with the dangerous radicals like George Soros......they take millions from an unholy alliance with UnitedHealth as Senator Rand Paul has pointed out......and they do it while claiming patriotic Americans like you agree with them!But I know that American seniors like you are ready for major change and a conservative restoration!That’s why I’m so grateful that our army of AMAC members has accomplished so much already!From helping Governor Glenn Youngkin secure election integrity in Virginia... ...to helping Wisconsin voters amend their state Constitution to disallow “Zuckerbucks” in local elections and ensure that only authorized public officials can manage the election process, and everything in between......AMAC Action’s amazing members have reclaimed the conservative values and ideas that have made America the greatest nation on earth. Now our chapters, delegates, 350,912 volunteer advocates, and over 2 million AMAC members will be using our full power to protect parents’ rights against radical schools, promote drug price transparency, preserve tax cuts, keep boys out of girls’ sports and locker rooms......and PUNISH AND DEPORT THE CRIMINALS. And friend, AMAC Action is taking steps now to protect the interests of you and your family – but we can’t do it without you. This battle to PUNISH AND DEPORT THE CRIMINALS who are terrorizing our citizens, will be the first and most vicious fight facing the Trump-Vance administration.Let’s send a message to the radical Left that Election Day was just the beginning.With over a 1 million voices, we can reject policies that have made America and Americans less safe! Friend, I want to thank you for everything you as a conservative patriot have done so far. But as we move on to this next chapter of the American story, I’m asking you to Thank you, friend. | | For Freedom, Bob Carlstrom, PresidentAMAC Action P.S. Friend, congratulations again to all of us in the conservative movement for this momentous victory. The radical Left will manufacture hysteria over the deportation of rapists, drug deals, and child traffickers. We have to be ready to counter their lies and lay the groundwork for policy wins on day one of the Trump-Vance administration! Thank you. –Bob | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 1904 Thomas Avenue, Suite 103,Leesburg, FL 34748 | |

clean_body: | | Let me pull back the curtain on where things stand. → As of this morning, there are still House races in swing districts that are too close to call. → There are still thousands of votes left to be counted. → But Republicans are betting that Democrats will give up in despair. = I know many of us may be feeling helpless right now. But I am urging you to stay focused on the task at hand. = It all depends on what we do at this moment. Winning battleground House races could be the difference between an emboldened MAGA Majority... Or a historically TINY majority that hampers Trump’s dangerous Project 2025 agenda. It is paramount that Democrats pull together to ensure every last vote is counted FAIRLY – but for this, we need resources. = = | | = = = = = Thank you, NANCY | Volunteer with Team Pelosi to ensure every last vote is counted! | Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support? = Nancy Pelosi is counting on you.
