| | The thing about Movement Labs and our signature project, Contest Every Race, is that our work doesn't stop after Election Night. **We organize through wins and we organize through losses.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97401010/513292270/-327605227?refcode=2024-11-20-stop&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6d9355e2-78a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDkzNTVlMi03OGE3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tfnmKyWaOinWR6q16Au-zxMiOq10gdWjv4Wgi6GFS-o=) And this one was a tough loss across the board. But each time an election doesn't go our way, we put in the work to gain more and more votes until we finally get that win. And to do that, organizing can't just happen in the three months before an election. It has to happen all year long. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97401011/513292271/-327605227?refcode=2024-11-20-stop&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6d9355e2-78a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDkzNTVlMi03OGE3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tfnmKyWaOinWR6q16Au-zxMiOq10gdWjv4Wgi6GFS-o=) Here's what that looks like for us:
* Giving $500 grants each quarter to our over 300 county Democratic parties that actively participate in the program
* Recruiting thousands of people to run for Mayor, City Council, State Rep, and more in the off-year elections
* Supporting rural and red district Democrats with time, money, and infrastructure
* Putting thousands of volunteers on the doors to develop face-to-face relationships with voters over the long haul

We will always be an on-the-ground-365-days-a-year organization! _Sarah_ Sarah Long
Director of Development

name: Josh Hawley
subject: The mainstream media is in a tailspin, and it's a beautiful thing to see
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0cee5610da6a495d9d1ec0c98e520f8c&_e=LQns2cBMFb-jLGsOuZm3LdDHIZtJwEmObYBWcct1vLvwl37b5AzoC4TgIw6js7yAijG-k8g1TOjSmGrWfTQdT_sXeYSsMapFwKGTat7K30QTPp9q9YAj4ZSsMEIqXKvnJnk9mcB1IFhVillLpmQs0zZYb8QiAxYsljJetbFA09pXd_-rXL3dRu5EJgcy7RIAYSgqzLFzKgWv26326S8TpDP3JYu6FyWKdNCKY8uVF68m8dBRw04507f7rDZDyf3nMVa-30Yab7xjgsTS-DqEwRcZqOQGoXUvgeTgB92o2NsQ3fVwTtHg0mx7Qtr51Jf_dlSgJ-031i6okTjE_iHuGV7WRZjQ0fU16GhVKLuwheiI8LxCyWOpBSLU1WSmbzPY)

Friend, The mainstream media is in a tailspin. For the past two weeks, we've witnessed public meltdowns, total delusion, and a rejection of reality. Left-wing talks shows are watching ratings tank, and networks are scrambling to cling to whatever relevance they have left. It's a beautiful thing to see. Even more beautiful—people are emboldened to show their support for President Trump and unafraid to proclaim their political values. At nearly every sporting event, athletes are showing off their best Trump dance moves, and even college students are doing "the Trump." In an interview with Fox News, NFL Hall of Fame linebacker Brian Urlacher perfectly summarized the shift, "People were scared for a while. You don’t want people to talk bad about you, how we’ve been talked about the last four years if you’re a Donald Trump supporter. I think now, no one’s scared anymore. It’s nice to see these guys coming out and everyone who’s a silent Trump supporter... I think they’re just excited now that he got the job done."
---

| My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District.

When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country.

This year, I know that we can finish the job.

Right now, our race is _**still too close to call**_ and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote.

**I’ve been part of close races before, and we knew this year’s race would be another one.** As votes continue to be counted, I just want to say how thankful I am to have your support.

**Let’s finish the job. That means counting every single vote.**

[**This isn’t over. Please split a donation of $10 or more between our recount fund and New Dems. name: Bob Casey
subject: Standing up for the people of Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard.
| | |
---
Folks, my priority has always been standing up for the people of Pennsylvania.
Across our Commonwealth, close to 7 million people cast their votes in a free and fair election. Our county election officials will finish counting those votes, just like they do in every election.
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard. The American democratic process was born in Pennsylvania, and that process must and will play out.
**_[I’m here to tell you that the process is _not_ done, and this race is _not_ over. subject: BRAND NEW Yellow Jacket OTF Knife - Get Yours NOW!
body:
Small in size - big on impact...
| |

| | _November 20th, 2024_
---
|
---
| | | | | | | When it comes to everyday carry (EDC), there’s no room for compromise.

You need a blade that’s quick, reliable, and built to handle whatever life throws at you. Introducing the ****[****Yellow Jacket OTF Knife****](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19157/6374453/f1993a17a7a9417189cda27373260a5427ba5056/4f0346f6d184a568be84946a77d530d22d257810)************ —the ultimate tool for anyone serious about their gear.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19157/6374453/f1993a17a7a9417189cda27373260a5427ba5056/4f0346f6d184a568be84946a77d530d22d257810)
| | | Here’s Why You Need This Knife in Your Arsenal: ****
**> Lightning-Fast Deployment**: With the Out-The-Front (OTF) mechanism, this knife is ready to go in an instant. Perfect for when every second counts. ****
**> Superior Blade Quality**: Crafted with high-quality steel, this blade is sharp, durable, and designed to maintain its edge, making it a reliable companion in any situation. ****
**> Rugged, Tactical Design**: [Built to withstand the toughest conditions, the Yellow Jacket OTF Knife](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19157/6374453/f1993a17a7a9417189cda27373260a5427ba5056/4f0346f6d184a568be84946a77d530d22d257810) is as tough as you are. It’s not just a knife; it’s a statement. ****
**> Compact & Concealable**: Designed to be discreet yet always within reach, it’s the perfect size to fit comfortably in your pocket or clip onto your gear. ****
**Limited Stock Alert:**
These knives are in high demand, and we’ve got a limited quantity available. Don’t miss out on owning one of the most versatile and dependable OTF knives on the market. ****
**Special Offer Just for You:**
For a limited time, we’re offering an **exclusive discount** to our loyal subscribers. Don’t wait—this deal won’t last forever.******_**_******_**__**_******_**_**********
[**Claim Your Yellow Jacket OTF Knife Here!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19157/6374453/f1993a17a7a9417189cda27373260a5427ba5056/4f0346f6d184a568be84946a77d530d22d257810)

This is more than just a knife—it’s a piece of gear you’ll be proud to carry every day. Whether you’re in the field, on the job, or just out and about, the Yellow Jacket OTF Knife is the edge you need.

Stay sharp, stay prepared.

_~John G._ _Gunner Gear_
__
P.S. **Don’t wait!** Our stock is limited, and once these knives are gone, they’re gone. [Grab yours now before they sell out!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19157/6374453/f1993a17a7a9417189cda27373260a5427ba5056/4f0346f6d184a568be84946a77d530d22d257810)

Elon Musk wasn't on the ballot, team -- but **he's already acting like Trump's co-president!**

**Will this be _Trump's_ second presidency, or _Musk's first?_** No matter which of them is in charge, we need Democrats across the nation ready to stand against their _twisted_ agenda. **Our records are still missing your response to our URGENT Live Poll, so please confirm now:**

# [Meet the Team: Andy Roth](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=151937471&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxOTM3NDcxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzIxMzM3MDYsImV4cCI6MTczNDcyNTcwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.q-8Atn3fUm1Rr7NGEXgOb_MWi-5cKhyWBpoj6FwU75w)
### Bet you didn't know...
| | [Dana Parish](https://substack.com/@danakparish)
---
| Nov 20| | | ∙| | Guest post
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/@danakparish)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=151937471&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxOTM3NDcxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzIxMzM3MDYsImV4cCI6MTczNDcyNTcwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.q-8Atn3fUm1Rr7NGEXgOb_MWi-5cKhyWBpoj6FwU75w)

| | [](https://substack..BqgVss5j0EOZHpVkMY5OrDYsy1SYXpl3iOwY75mxQgM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/meet-the-team-andy-roth?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Friends,
The State Freedom Caucus Network has grown rapidly over the last three years, so we thought it would be a good idea to introduce ourselves to all the new supporters and followers. Up first is a short Q&A with the Network's President, Andy Roth.
* * *
**Where are you from originally? Where do you live now?**
I'm originally from Salina, KS. It's a small town in the middle of the state. It's usually the place where people stop to get gas if they are driving West to Denver or East to Kansas City.
I tell people that I currently live in DC, because like most people who live in this area, it's the easiest way to explain it. But in reality, I live in "Real America" across the river in the Virginia suburbs just outside the swampy beltway.
**Tell us about your family! And pets!**
I've been married to my beautiful wife, Kortney, for over 13 years, and I have two wonderful girls, Abbie (11) and Ava (9). We have a cat, Lloyd, whom the girls adore, and my wife and I respectfully tolerate.
**What's the best part of your job?**
This is easy. It's an absolute thrill to watch state freedom caucus members succeed. When we started the Network, we knew that conservative lawmakers across the country have the deck stacked against them. They've been marginalized and treated with deep hostility by both parties in the Swamp. Helping freedom caucus members win is an overwhelming joy that is hard to describe. And it's all because of their hard work (since they are on the front lines) and that of our state directors who are on the ground with them.
**How did you come to SFCN? What did you do before?**
Coming out of college, I was a stock trader for almost 7 years. But shortly after the dot com bubble burst in 2001, I moved to DC to get my master's in economics at George Mason University - one of the very few schools in the country that taught free market economics. From there, I spent 18 years at the Club for Growth, most recently as their VP of Government Affairs and then running their new foundation. In that capacity, I had been working extensively with the amazing members of the House Freedom Caucus and our friends at the Conservative Partnership Institute. For years, we had been discussing the idea of helping state lawmakers form their own state freedom caucuses, and we finally did it in December 2021 when we launched the State Freedom Caucus Network.
**Who or what most shaped your political philosophy/ideology?**
As a Gen Xer, it should come as no surprise that I was heavily influenced by Ronald Reagan and Milton Friedman. But as I got older and dug a little deeper, my views on the world were more heavily influenced by men like Frederic Bastiat, Jude Wanniski, and Ludwig von Mises. However, everything I've learned from them is merely foundational. I have gained FAR more knowledge and understanding about policy and politics from the interactions I've had with others in the conservative movement. When you're in the trenches fighting for freedom, the best way to strengthen your grasp on policy and test your resolve is through endless conversations with people in the movement. I'm a big believer in Proverbs 27:17 - "iron sharpens iron".
**What 's Your Favorite Quote?**
I have three of them and they all describe the same thing - the forces of evil don't immediately take hold of someone. It's done in a very quiet, subtle manner. It's a good reminder considering the fact that I see evil slowly stick its hooks into people in my line of work.
* _"The safest road to hell is the gradual one - the gentle slope, soft underfoot, without sudden turnings, without milestones, without signposts."_ **\- C.S. Lewis**
* _"We cannot expect the Americans to jump from capitalism to communism, but we can assist their elected leaders in giving Americans small doses of socialism, until they suddenly awake to find they have communism. "_ \- **Nikita Khrushchev (probably)**
* _"I believe there are more instances of the abridgment of the freedom of the people by gradual and silent encroachments of those in power, than by violent and sudden usurpations "_ \- **James Madison**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a28b6e2e-018f-4adc-9b8a-968af9449b4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[ DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/d73437cc-4c3c-45da-b641-cbadda9e5d0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Keep fighting,**

**Dana Parish**
_VP of Development
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider [a contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/d73437cc-4c3c-45da-b641-cbadda9e5d0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
[](https://substack.com/profile/271767878-dana-parish)| | A guest post by[Dana Parish](https://substack.com/@danakparish?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)|

# [6 Photos That Define the 1950s](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn9mz5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

| T he 1950s were a time of profound change and contrast, both in American society and globally. These complexities were captured in the period’s photography, from celebrity snaps by the burgeoning paparazzi to powerful images of the Civil Rights Movement taken by experienced photojournalists. Here are six photos that encapsulate the spirit and struggles of the decade, and have become iconic images of the 1950s.

As I transition into my role as your representative and prepare to navigate the tough challenges ahead, it’s clear we have a long road ahead to make progress on the issues that matter most.

Whether your top concern is lowering costs, safeguarding reproductive rights, or making healthcare accessible and affordable, I want to hear your thoughts. name: Jenna Burns
subject: She’s trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life
body:
You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=789d8eb09d6d47d7a5884a1528c867b1&_e=JFZAcWvmKY3gh4h39uvP_Ig-BcJuy5nQWXfjrWWgEIuxLQLVHGBwvhyixS8_xrRnwmdDybwuZuEmdlb1TWwbjJFMSaTnwEgyVmhggEOEfUk7t9voxWKfOA9vzc9mncpTyod4RqzX73ctzZP6haeL35GG_9Lj4YbD8oXcga0qCRaudDWmGybuTnifYrxeLrfpgHil8gl4BYUi9ODrNBiL0qsMwYg1Wwy3yJ1QpzBWDNNEPooQtCTNtjSsJ83dmXo1olTd3ygWx36W0P5t9-3DzrG4NAnSgTI-UznN2y2Wd5kf8OObQ8GxCA1daLZQNeDEn9wvgcCOgRT-zblS00sgxFl23XwuhxCvxkxplQ8y1sd8ZyKip7aWziZsVt-6GknR)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=789d8eb09d6d47d7a5884a1528c867b1&_e=JFZAcWvmKY3gh4h39uvP_Ig-BcJuy5nQWXfjrWWgEIuxLQLVHGBwvhyixS8_xrRnwmdDybwuZuEmdlb1TWwbjJFMSaTnwEgyVmhggEOEfUk7t9voxWKfOA9vzc9mncpTyod4RqzX73ctzZP6haeL35GG_9Lj4YbD8oXcga0qCRaudDWmGybuTnifYrxeLrfpgHil8gl4BYUi9ODrNBiL0qsMwYg1Wwy3yJ1QpzBWDNPY47NOcYr1FsFOpFHJNMQ-5IsG1beohpXkV-r_iHhm9h_1UQ6oY2W-m2xaYHNSmGU0KGThuveq8F9hNoRCN_YWAxQGHDfn0hMuHcr5U6MlgBE_dvXBvI_s8KeIUznKsX8b9t6HVkinBPHG54QSAOae)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=789d8eb09d6d47d7a5884a1528c867b1&_e=JFZAcWvmKY3gh4h39uvP_Ig-BcJuy5nQWXfjrWWgEIuxLQLVHGBwvhyixS8_xrRnwmdDybwuZuEmdlb1TWwbjJFMSaTnwEgyVmhggEOEfUk7t9voxWKfOA9vzc9mncpTyod4RqzX73ctzZP6haeL35GG_9Lj4YbD8oXcga0qCRaudDWmGybuTnifYrxeLrfpgHil8gl4BYUi9ODrNBiL0qsMwYg1Wwy3yJ1QpzBWDNNleqa4zOaBsagyS6DTFxQjYqF7gjgJhyUkTMLHQMdP3mxrB2tolRm77d0Tg3P2NxaQvPGnu1vqdbngG0hASCNggN5WZI_V6KA9XyXMxuJju0JDkZk4m9C25t5D5CdEZ7JeSt5rIbnEdXn9leVe5ZjF)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=789d8eb09d6d47d7a5884a1528c867b1&_e=JFZAcWvmKY3gh4h39uvP_Ig-BcJuy5nQWXfjrWWgEIuxLQLVHGBwvhyixS8_xrRnwmdDybwuZuEmdlb1TWwbjJFMSaTnwEgyVmhggEOEfUk7t9voxWKfOA9vzc9mncpTyod4RqzX73ctzZP6haeL35GG_9Lj4YbD8oXcga0qCRaudDWmGybuTnifYrxeLrfpgHil8gl4BYUi9ODrNBiL0qsMwYg1Wwy3yJ1QpzBWDNM5EJ8qAvbwLEX4vhvGeuIhCqiP1xg0xgo067G_XGGW4qkLvt7JthpwAJ4nQ-meXVVC62adDP1XdFyQ1OHSA7Py-UgwDloNsWbvK2AIKqxDJp0vmOnK49qH2AhSAnK1vCMXazgCgDqr6A4jasUF8EJV)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=789d8eb09d6d47d7a5884a1528c867b1&_e=JFZAcWvmKY3gh4h39uvP_Ig-BcJuy5nQWXfjrWWgEIuxLQLVHGBwvhyixS8_xrRnwmdDybwuZuEmdlb1TWwbjJFMSaTnwEgyVmhggEOEfUk7t9voxWKfOA9vzc9mncpTyod4RqzX73ctzZP6haeL35GG_9Lj4YbD8oXcga0qCRaudDWmGybuTnifYrxeLrfpgHil8gl4BYUi9ODrNBiL0qsMwYg1Wwy3yJ1QpzBWDNPStKdEnzwgIWZfgtkUEDgo5Yy8JXGTnam5X_nNfkklg7oVF5aFS7Cs3gTBLJydmOv_bupg84VpA5hacq8fNty_VAgwS4IN3t-aeUDw8lySicgLDMs24vGtW9eJUjYlwRBijBdUzmRZwufQKcVWVaUd)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

clean_body: You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. Dear Fellow Patriot, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! ## [**Fetterman Caught on Camera Encouraging Potential Voter Fraud**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1oy6x7st7gb2ssbimabr87108y0jejzhnllw3aid06ppf7irvzomewrl4ycjr1ml8tnlcdsdhtsxrr5940rnmfc7ssn7oy52vpk2d2ta8xob4dy9tll4tbms8vzsdfleshylskqhuq29c5ojo4han3x8cj7yrl3bwqkpnw9d3t2ajmmucxszkl8ebbxtn89f7aapetagsbizdjq8m63625v&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn9n8r&__onlt=h)

Pennsylvania Senator John Fetterman has thrown his weight behind the Democrats’ scandalous decision to count invalid ballots in the contentious Senate race, thumbing his nose at the rule of law and the will of the people.

The brazen maneuver came to light when Democrats on the Bucks County Board of Commissioners, who were hellbent on tipping the scales in favor of the Democrat incumbent Bob Casey, voted to count misdated and undated ballots.

clean_body: In what can only be described as a blatant affront to the sanctity of American democracy. Pennsylvania Senator John Fetterman has thrown his weight behind the Democrats’ scandalous decision to count invalid ballots in the contentious Senate race, thumbing his nose at the rule of law and the will of the people. The brazen maneuver came to light when Democrats on the Bucks County Board of Commissioners, who were hellbent on tipping the scales in favor of the Democrat incumbent Bob Casey, voted to count misdated and undated ballots. subject: This evil is widespread
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e97444eb929e48a0a12c0fdf0b696663&_e=qv1J5fGG8ojex_scPwj8JWRZBh7CYYBfWMbC8UYoyYX7cZ0Gq9AhwT5L7xQMSnqIQgvcGBY9evQstyN4cAwOXa4QsIgJyochVFsdWaTuhjlvcRa9RI5SXGn1-GdVNdG8ZA-Xv65GKVZMj3ZXsq4tktXR9VTlUZ_P6QKuQv0usa1gtUtzfMybaYYCgNDltrD_cIBdLJgffG3ftcMtE4Gq7riU0AyVaPSTvShDfGR-ECk6fk92K992lJr25XPUXr5MKoHlFZetgOMHywg8Ehqo4Bf4LS_ERYPJlqT1E3mQhMLZiCoH5ABn6JwI9gnInWq2PaSM7gAyk2vFK_6BPQLAkXouAMMZCmHNW48O1oyqzf4lp1PFijli0zMtrH3WKUDfBv_UKEPDdJr6GIuQd_71SA%3D%3D)

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit. And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e97444eb929e48a0a12c0fdf0b696663&_e=qv1J5fGG8ojex_scPwj8JWRZBh7CYYBfWMbC8UYoyYX7cZ0Gq9AhwT5L7xQMSnqIQgvcGBY9evQstyN4cAwOXa4QsIgJyochVFsdWaTuhjlvcRa9RI5SXGn1-GdVNdG8ZA-Xv65GKVZMj3ZXsq4tktXR9VTlUZ_P6QKuQv0usa1gtUtzfMybaYYCgNDltrD_cIBdLJgffG3ftcMtE4Gq7riU0AyVaPSTvShDfGR-ECk6fk92K992lJr25XPUXr5MCl1bJL_dv23gIui9_-w5Qq9jR4npLwoYRiWueJqjYyp2al9Mm50ZDTWw4mRhfx59GM5eqZDdczR51OHvTiOepDDZ5dSIF-ErkzxD3YSAwIn4FfhFdTzyf6XMyDBB3Fd5--Cfi_pspHAyaoZ2pwMG6w%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e97444eb929e48a0a12c0fdf0b696663&_e=qv1J5fGG8ojex_scPwj8JWRZBh7CYYBfWMbC8UYoyYX7cZ0Gq9AhwT5L7xQMSnqIQgvcGBY9evQstyN4cAwOXa4QsIgJyochVFsdWaTuhjlvcRa9RI5SXGn1-GdVNdG8ZA-Xv65GKVZMj3ZXsq4tktXR9VTlUZ_P6QKuQv0usa1gtUtzfMybaYYCgNDltrD_cIBdLJgffG3ftcMtE4Gq7riU0AyVaPSTvShDfGR-ECk6fk92K992lJr25XPUXr5MAgZwkb3u6AW-C98ysRPudpxHKzvfYNyFHNvNOv7YbDGnSNex8V738a8mUkAd4DnQTz8mrIfLov61Sewic2vg5a73eavMGZ9UUwAPqUX__gP2URhcdcAk9BbXuI_u0m-Y8s_vDhjT9Fvxq4mSxys9kA%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide. It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare." _Now abortion is a "right" and "women 's healthcare." And if you don't support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word." _Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it. **God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God's truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance. **Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e97444eb929e48a0a12c0fdf0b696663&_e=qv1J5fGG8ojex_scPwj8JWRZBh7CYYBfWMbC8UYoyYX7cZ0Gq9AhwT5L7xQMSnqIQgvcGBY9evQstyN4cAwOXa4QsIgJyochVFsdWaTuhjlvcRa9RI5SXGn1-GdVNdG8ZA-Xv65GKVZMj3ZXsq4tktXR9VTlUZ_P6QKuQv0usa1gtUtzfMybaYYCgNDltrD_cIBdLJgffG3ftcMtE4Gq7riU0AyVaPSTvShDfGR-ECk6fk92K992lJr25XPUXr5Mgp7KTMa1OGrbFlQjFdaYMD3HpS37gV5x3jWz_BTh3LMkOCkLn13kaRpGHa80CKj0WqKeNif0nGeRhLs9uOBkmI4hOw82KvKGrolLbm_jmUU9FOYNazEGnbFWrp31CrvNDFaX0OuAYC0c4fOMdIKqDg%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents." I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery. >> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide. And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e97444eb929e48a0a12c0fdf0b696663&_e=qv1J5fGG8ojex_scPwj8JWRZBh7CYYBfWMbC8UYoyYX7cZ0Gq9AhwT5L7xQMSnqIQgvcGBY9evQstyN4cAwOXa4QsIgJyochVFsdWaTuhjlvcRa9RI5SXGn1-GdVNdG8ZA-Xv65GKVZMj3ZXsq4tktXR9VTlUZ_P6QKuQv0usa1gtUtzfMybaYYCgNDltrD_cIBdLJgffG3ftcMtE4Gq7riU0AyVaPSTvShDfGR-ECk6fk92K992lJr25XPUXr5M_vr-1z31YKMtnCSQ5a9A_EiTHCvZnj8swZa3izTke_8WRMN8188ceOTYuDM1SmYmA7X5Pbu_WnPeIccN3BVAjuUt3MgJRSCfmJzT8AiZyxbXQ-6te-lWPxqhNVFX_sZEBeJiPmO8Gk58fXN1cMSouQ%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that's the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex. And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e97444eb929e48a0a12c0fdf0b696663&_e=qv1J5fGG8ojex_scPwj8JWRZBh7CYYBfWMbC8UYoyYX7cZ0Gq9AhwT5L7xQMSnqIQgvcGBY9evQstyN4cAwOXa4QsIgJyochVFsdWaTuhjlvcRa9RI5SXGn1-GdVNdG8ZA-Xv65GKVZMj3ZXsq4tktXR9VTlUZ_P6QKuQv0usa1gtUtzfMybaYYCgNDltrD_cIBdLJgffG3ftcMtE4Gq7riU0AyVaPSTvShDfGR-ECk6fk92K992lJr25XPUXr5M0jtM0bk-ETypgcgXRXSPbQwdjjpz2tvTxDCq8cdxrYnW5b_SZ3WhOx6BwFQYw4oTcDzxQDpiWH8rRAiLcL7YgqedR2YhXX3hH4kvvmI1uqDLOOhqV03TY9BzFl_0VbLVFXWO-XNwARuUUsPYFfme2Q%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e97444eb929e48a0a12c0fdf0b696663&_e=qv1J5fGG8ojex_scPwj8JWRZBh7CYYBfWMbC8UYoyYX7cZ0Gq9AhwT5L7xQMSnqIQgvcGBY9evQstyN4cAwOXa4QsIgJyochVFsdWaTuhjlvcRa9RI5SXGn1-GdVNdG8ZA-Xv65GKVZMj3ZXsq4tktXR9VTlUZ_P6QKuQv0usa1gtUtzfMybaYYCgNDltrD_cIBdLJgffG3ftcMtE4Gq7riU0AyVaPSTvShDfGR-ECk6fk92K992lJr25XPUXr5M7F_hKVgwT0NlEL9c54xFU95_-Xm7Hfe_sUMm4pxX9Ueaom4-RYri8MPxZh2Td7Etw0raj22wfa7UwQ9e9k7gvu-kMsmBPh8hZwIbWR7PB0GfNZKa5V0bCKzjgIucXM8nW3H0J0WjscLfUfSic8lqtQ%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA. This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom. And she was the one punished! **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e97444eb929e48a0a12c0fdf0b696663&_e=qv1J5fGG8ojex_scPwj8JWRZBh7CYYBfWMbC8UYoyYX7cZ0Gq9AhwT5L7xQMSnqIQgvcGBY9evQstyN4cAwOXa4QsIgJyochVFsdWaTuhjlvcRa9RI5SXGn1-GdVNdG8ZA-Xv65GKVZMj3ZXsq4tktXR9VTlUZ_P6QKuQv0usa1gtUtzfMybaYYCgNDltrD_cIBdLJgffG3ftcMtE4Gq7riU0AyVaPSTvShDfGR-ECk6fk92K992lJr25XPUXr5MOY4_33k9nDYbUPy2cQYsskrCUtXy7o5FvvWKUQb8577Q_YKd5VpgTlcEjZM8tSRVjp7iBqUWi69YDbzn3sbPH3kGRRiHX7dWCrTvJIsI5q644JW8BD0PniBnZHVbJRkXSZmTlSKOS06lpvR6toBAIA%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. **[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e97444eb929e48a0a12c0fdf0b696663&_e=qv1J5fGG8ojex_scPwj8JWRZBh7CYYBfWMbC8UYoyYX7cZ0Gq9AhwT5L7xQMSnqIQgvcGBY9evQstyN4cAwOXa4QsIgJyochVFsdWaTuhjlvcRa9RI5SXGn1-GdVNdG8ZA-Xv65GKVZMj3ZXsq4tktXR9VTlUZ_P6QKuQv0usa1gtUtzfMybaYYCgNDltrD_cIBdLJgffG3ftcMtE4Gq7riU0AyVaPSTvShDfGR-ECk6fk92K992lJr25XPUXr5Mz4UKblnyatX54cojEgaFq6X-sM41pbSICbSpqVmq8lV10rVPpL5wHIsqwqMzSTAEtMXOP8QGeF8hbvV3uvWF2V_u1ruP9qjP0Xq4Ae26fq4LM0B3SQvYn6MNTtJ3QwM1CuoMl6Na_VeyV-sM8rqeIQ%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in. And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e97444eb929e48a0a12c0fdf0b696663&_e=qv1J5fGG8ojex_scPwj8JWRZBh7CYYBfWMbC8UYoyYX7cZ0Gq9AhwT5L7xQMSnqIQgvcGBY9evQstyN4cAwOXa4QsIgJyochVFsdWaTuhjlvcRa9RI5SXGn1-GdVNdG8ZA-Xv65GKVZMj3ZXsq4tktXR9VTlUZ_P6QKuQv0usa1gtUtzfMybaYYCgNDltrD_cIBdLJgffG3ftcMtE4Gq7riU0AyVaPSTvShDfGR-ECk6fk92K992lJr25XPUXr5MfFSIBjY1PHhRHeUnsNh58FZzikj8_ZcxFtosJYcEu9sFVGoI4EjmCEDvIW3B9nG2KjWwz75jhlxH0c6X7H8GPxQIPZahiAnMMM4MlToBTUfm7cJIdfi78A7f4TPPKdYSLPU3H-tcELDzNkCj3pmoRA%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you. Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours. Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines

clean_body: I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit. And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide. It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare." Now abortion is a "right" and "women 's healthcare." And if you don't support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word." Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it. God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God's truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance. Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents." I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery. >> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide. And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that's the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex. And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA. This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom. And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in. And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you. Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours. Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

Hello,

There are still key pickup opportunities for Democrats that remain _**too close to call.**_

Right now, Democrat Derek Tran in CA-45 is just **314 votes** over his extreme, anti-choice opponent – with thousands of ballots yet to count... **There are still ballots to be counted, and with a race this close, we need to ensure that every voice is heard.** [**That’s why we’re asking: Will you split a donation between Fight for Reform to elect state and local Democrats and Derek Tran’s recount fund today to help count every vote?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57361?t=7&akid=22555%2E4449941%2Edm3p4R) | [DONATE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57361?t=8&akid=22555%2E4449941%2Edm3p4R)
---
We have always known a race this close would come down to the wire, but now, really every vote could make a difference.

[**Will you help Democrats secure this last line of defense by splitting a donation to Derek Tran’s legal fund and Fight for Reform to elect state and local Democrats?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57361?t=9&akid=22555%2E4449941%2Edm3p4R)

subject: Preserving and strengthening America's families
body:
We are witnessing a brutal, unceasing, and deadly assault currently being waged against American families—especially the traditional nuclear family. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=4630bf68b848480da3f8b5edb16088d3&_t=pV__k9hB4KsL4PLDI-DfTBDuuO-R5o0F0J07BXzLU8XwaMZyZ8bcnJgIz3HA_wv7pYFDU8T_QF8f9AeUXFi-g3iQLeuWuHhWgLM7yogUirHLjel_rgmcDRJK7yBSLl8s)_

---
| | | [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=4630bf68b848480da3f8b5edb16088d3&_e=1zxorbnlVqXzzf3dqL8zhIOlIZeXnPPLQjWJwBncTpVSM2gJ-fcwH9El4ZUwk88r4NBwgFK9WWmw63woq-3ojUH4YEOIz53mmELNac4ThPtE5gMTqqPXG9TZF_-jmS89N3XSM-dlQAwZOwAZxhuPxHNj_XCa3V8JJpeFPTbGTklLpN-gKsaM1119SvWOMsymnir8gN7gNYBTC2MI_gzPr664QpcfJ55M040AQ5JyFNyRHhB2G34G2EnE_-GKi3vDgitGYWH6Kio5eqMtI-0WEy9EvfPsYywFRxYEIC24a8tc0c3ziL6jWpBL4rmsA0Z2i3vXRppi7F2qRTiEYHCQdK154WEe_THCWn_aJCw7TgNi2pIC8OUDBVg9-re8RzTfhZ4uLFjUyDIvZJJWAgjPqg%3D%3D)
---
| From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Dear Fellow Patriot,

We are witnessing a brutal, unceasing, and deadly assault currently being waged against American families--especially the traditional nuclear family. I'm sure you've felt it.

That's why I launched the American Cornerstone Institute--what I call a "think tank / do tank" -- in order to continue this perilous fight to protect, shore up, and support American families. [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=4630bf68b848480da3f8b5edb16088d3&_e=1zxorbnlVqXzzf3dqL8zhIOlIZeXnPPLQjWJwBncTpVSM2gJ-fcwH9El4ZUwk88r4NBwgFK9WWmw63woq-3ojUH4YEOIz53mmELNac4ThPtE5gMTqqPXG9TZF_-jmS89N3XSM-dlQAwZOwAZxhuPxHNj_XCa3V8JJpeFPTbGTklLpN-gKsaM1119SvWOMsymnir8gN7gNYBTC2MI_gzPr664QpcfJ55M040AQ5JyFNyRHhB2G34G2EnE_-GKi3vDJZhDa2cub94MO-DojB9hBEPp3Zn764XExhpiQ3hk7CE5oq-xmcFDBhryx0yrf71f_sow4muvXsDsXvPK3ry9Xy4q-O7-kO6tCMnR1iHNWLf-uAejm135cHMOftH1VlCeHmzDLiPGJkA5adz8YoTkkQ%3D%3D) Your gift of $100 or more to ACI today will help strengthen the bonds of our communities by lifting up the virtues of faith, liberty, community, and life.

Will you give today to support these cornerstone principles? They are essential to the success of our nation--principles that can be bolstered immeasurably and immediately by strengthening our families. To show my appreciation for your gift of $100 or more, you will receive an advanced signed copy of my new book "The Perilous Fight: Overcoming Our Culture's War on the American Family".

And to help pass down these important pillars to the next generation, I'lll also send you a free copy of my children's book "Why America Matters" that celebrates our great country and reminds us what a blessing it is to be an American.

You can make your secure gift here: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/the-perilous-fight](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=4630bf68b848480da3f8b5edb16088d3&_e=1zxorbnlVqXzzf3dqL8zhIOlIZeXnPPLQjWJwBncTpVSM2gJ-fcwH9El4ZUwk88r4NBwgFK9WWmw63woq-3ojUH4YEOIz53mmELNac4ThPtE5gMTqqPXG9TZF_-jmS89N3XSM-dlQAwZOwAZxhuPxHNj_XCa3V8JJpeFPTbGTklLpN-gKsaM1119SvWOMsymnir8gN7gNYBTC2MI_gzPr664QpcfJ55M040AQ5JyFNyRHhB2G34G2EnE_-GKi3vDZNwm37gE2W8B-Hg3puLubiUUSj-iWtBfbxrZVeJdLEpK9r1F9aziA7UiikSXnAge8IY_a09k0zHNutNMHaXUcRkK43MokqYAO21Bi-G5MI_BpliXkfPu3XmAFHkn22XqAX_2k0TUhu-2dnNPrnr72w%3D%3D)

Thank you for your interest in preserving and strengthening America's families!

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---

---

That's why I launched the American Cornerstone Institute--what I call a "think tank / do tank" -- in order to continue this perilous fight to protect, shore up, and support American families. Your gift of $100 or more to ACI today will help strengthen the bonds of our communities by lifting up the virtues of faith, liberty, community, and life. Will you give today to support these cornerstone principles? They are essential to the success of our nation--principles that can be bolstered immeasurably and immediately by strengthening our families. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: How’d we do it?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
From the very beginning I knew my campaign was going to need to set our own path to win.
#

Hey, Peter, it's Ruben.
I've been going through orientation in the Senate over the last week since we won, and as you might expect, a lot of people want to know how we pulled it off in Arizona.
It's a big question, and it was a lot of work, but the answer isn't as complicated as you might expect. [**I talk about it here, in this article in the New York Times.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/3139?t=1&akid=3570%2E734936%2E0ALUbn) Check it out — but I'm also happy to talk it through with you.
From the very beginning I knew my campaign was going to need to set our own path to win. If I was going to connect with voters they were going to need to understand who I was.
I'm the son of immigrants. I grew up poor. I worked hard to support my family. I got into Harvard, I served in the Marines, and I did my best to support my family and serve my country after I came home.
I understand what it's like to struggle to make ends meet. I know how hard it is when it feels like you're letting your family down. And I knew that in Arizona, a lot of people felt like that.
As much as people are coming down on "identity politics" right now, you have to tell people who you are if you're going to build trust. And my identity — a first generation Latino, a Marine, a father, somebody who grew up poor — helped me connect. You have to be real with people because they won't trust you to solve their problems if they don’t know who the hell you are in the first place.
But that's just one piece.
The other part is taking that trust, that understanding, and showing them what you're going to do for them. We have to connect the dots between good policy and how it's going to solve the problems that people are facing.
Until people actually feel something — higher wages, lower costs, more security — you’re not going to get credit no matter how good your plans are.
You do that, you have as good a chance as anyone to win. That's how we did it in Arizona, and I am incredibly proud that I'll be able to represent my people in the Senate when they really need a fighter.
But now, we have to deliver. And I aim to do that.
So, as we buckle down and face the challenges ahead, I hope you're still with me.
[**If you are, could you become a sustaining monthly donor to my campaign? We're working on a budget based on our monthly recurring donations right now, and it would give me a lot of peace of mind as I work in Washington to know that I've got a big team backing me up at home. Can I count on you?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1259?c0=ruben-em-nov24-re.-b06ga&refcode=em241120-1-30&t=2&akid=3570%2E734936%2E0ALUbn)
[BECOME A SUSTAINING DONOR](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1259?c0=ruben-em-nov24-re.-b06ga&refcode=em241120-1-30&t=3&akid=3570%2E734936%2E0ALUbn)
I’ll never forget that I wouldn’t be in this position if it wasn’t for your support. So, as I get ready to take office next year, thank you so much for helping me get here.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=4&akid=3570%2E734936%2E0ALUbn). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=3570%2E734936%2E0ALUbn). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=3570_734936_0ALUbn&akid=3570%2E734936%2E0ALUbn)

body:
Pennsylvania is on the frontlines of the fight for voting rights.

|
#
---
_Pennsylvania's Senate race is not yet finished. My friend, Bob Casey, is in a dead heat against his Republican opponent. The race is so close and Pennsylvania law requires a recount. I know you have done so much for me and for progressive policies, but**[please consider donating to support Bob](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97403482/513299704/1468470916?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20241120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjZlZmU4OC04MWE3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIK7rfImG85OFbUKAPB54b3D6x6yEzra2DWmPgQDe68=)** as they work to ensure every vote is counted. _
* * *
| | _Pennsylvania's Senate race is _not over._ We need your help to re-elect Bob Casey._ | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97403483/513299705/1468470916?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20241120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjZlZmU4OC04MWE3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIK7rfImG85OFbUKAPB54b3D6x6yEzra2DWmPgQDe68=)

Peter,
If we’re going to protect our fundamental freedoms, we must re-elect Bob Casey. Bob has always stood up for women’s rights, workers’ rights, and voting rights — and he’s not going to stop now.
Our democracy only works when every voice is heard. We need the resources to fight back against efforts to disenfranchise Pennsylvania voters.
**[So please, split whatever you can between Bob Casey’s campaign and Mazie's today so we can keep up the fight to protect voting rights and our democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97403484/513299706/1468470916?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20241120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjZlZmU4OC04MWE3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIK7rfImG85OFbUKAPB54b3D6x6yEzra2DWmPgQDe68=)**

I know you have done so much for me and for progressive policies, but= as they work to ensure every vote is counted. | | Pennsylvania's Senate race is not over. We need your help to re-elect Bob Casey. | = Peter, If we’re going to protect our fundamental freedoms, we must re-elect Bob Casey. Bob has always stood up for women’s rights, workers’ rights, and voting rights — and he’s not going to stop now. Our democracy only works when every voice is heard. We need the resources to fight back against efforts to disenfranchise Pennsylvania voters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mazie Hirono and Bob Casey will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you so much, Bob Casey HQ Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

name: Eliza Walton
subject: The Owyhee needs you!
body:
The clock is ticking for the Owyhee Canyonlands, and we only need a second of your time. | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97404824/513304244/1266236453?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0MmIwMTNiLTg1YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=25nO1tHpDHYNQ10VwhJmsnTj495DlXKlHkFUTECNmmA=&emci=cc5080c6-61a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f42b013b-85a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, I only need a moment of your time to take action for a magical place in Oregon - the Owyhee Canyonlands. If there ever was a time to act for the Owyhee, it is now. [**Can you take a second to send a message to your senators? We need protection for the Owyhee before it’s too late.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97404825/513304245/1266236453?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0MmIwMTNiLTg1YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=25nO1tHpDHYNQ10VwhJmsnTj495DlXKlHkFUTECNmmA=&emci=cc5080c6-61a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f42b013b-85a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) There’s a reason we’ve prioritized our fight for the permanent protection of the Owyhee this year. It’s Oregon’s last great unprotected natural treasure and [73% of Oregonians](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97404827/513304247/835257482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0MmIwMTNiLTg1YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=25nO1tHpDHYNQ10VwhJmsnTj495DlXKlHkFUTECNmmA=&emci=cc5080c6-61a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f42b013b-85a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) support an Owyhee Canyonlands National Monument. Now the clock is ticking, as we near the end of President Biden’s presidency and await for Donald Trump to assume office and a Republican dominated U.S. House and Senate. Before the election, there were two paths to achieve protection for the Owyhee Canyonlands: passing [Senator Wyden’s Malheur Community Empowerment for the Owyhee Act (S 1890)](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97404829/513304249/-1443505139?emci=e272bfc3-969f-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=fa4d5fba-38a0-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=1246005&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0MmIwMTNiLTg1YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=25nO1tHpDHYNQ10VwhJmsnTj495DlXKlHkFUTECNmmA=), or a national monument designation. With the election results, it will be much harder - if not impossible - to pass Senator Wyden’s bill. Congress has already failed to act on Senator Wyden’s bill before, and they will do it again. Now is the time to get President Biden to designate a national monument for the Owyhee before he steps out of office. [**Send a message to Senators Wyden and Merkley now to urge them to go into full monument mode!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97404831/513304251/1266236453?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0MmIwMTNiLTg1YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=25nO1tHpDHYNQ10VwhJmsnTj495DlXKlHkFUTECNmmA=&emci=cc5080c6-61a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f42b013b-85a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97404833/513304253/-940096265?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0MmIwMTNiLTg1YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=25nO1tHpDHYNQ10VwhJmsnTj495DlXKlHkFUTECNmmA=&emci=cc5080c6-61a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f42b013b-85a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Why take action now? Yesterday there was a hearing with the committee of Natural Resources on Representative Bentz’s bill (HB 10082), which was developed to be an alternative to Senator Wyden’s bill. Representative Bentz’s bill does not center the long-term ecological health of the Owyhee, neglecting to investigate livestock land use in the Canyonlands, and burdening the Burns Paiute Tribe with financial obligations. That’s why [OLCV opposes Bentz’s bill](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97404835/513304255/-1959272842?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0MmIwMTNiLTg1YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=25nO1tHpDHYNQ10VwhJmsnTj495DlXKlHkFUTECNmmA=&emci=cc5080c6-61a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f42b013b-85a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) and is continuing to push for a national monument. We urge you to take action now, since our Senators will already be discussing the Owyhee Canyonlands. [**Let’s show them that a national monument designation has our full support!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97404837/513304257/-940096265?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0MmIwMTNiLTg1YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=25nO1tHpDHYNQ10VwhJmsnTj495DlXKlHkFUTECNmmA=&emci=cc5080c6-61a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f42b013b-85a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Thank you for supporting the permanent protection of the Owyhee Canyonlands. Sincerely,
Eliza Walton
OLCV Coalition Director _P.S.:[To get more involved and show more support for the protection of the Owyhee Canyonlands, sign up to write a letter to the editor here!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97404840/513304259/-600427321?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0MmIwMTNiLTg1YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=25nO1tHpDHYNQ10VwhJmsnTj495DlXKlHkFUTECNmmA=&emci=cc5080c6-61a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f42b013b-85a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Our organizing team will be in touch with you shortly. _ |

clean_body: The clock is ticking for the Owyhee Canyonlands, and we only need a second of your time. | | | Hi Peter, I only need a moment of your time to take action for a magical place in Oregon - the Owyhee Canyonlands. If there ever was a time to act for the Owyhee, it is now. There’s a reason we’ve prioritized our fight for the permanent protection of the Owyhee this year. It’s Oregon’s last great unprotected natural treasure and support an Owyhee Canyonlands National Monument. Now the clock is ticking, as we near the end of President Biden’s presidency and await for Donald Trump to assume office and a Republican dominated U.S. House and Senate. Before the election, there were two paths to achieve protection for the Owyhee Canyonlands: passing =, or a national monument designation. With the election results, it will be much harder - if not impossible - to pass Senator Wyden’s bill. Congress has already failed to act on Senator Wyden’s bill before, and they will do it again. Now is the time to get President Biden to designate a national monument for the Owyhee before he steps out of office. Why take action now? Yesterday there was a hearing with the committee of Natural Resources on Representative Bentz’s bill (HB 10082), which was developed to be an alternative to Senator Wyden’s bill. Representative Bentz’s bill does not center the long-term ecological health of the Owyhee, neglecting to investigate livestock land use in the Canyonlands, and burdening the Burns Paiute Tribe with financial obligations. That’s why and is continuing to push for a national monument. We urge you to take action now, since our Senators will already be discussing the Owyhee Canyonlands. Thank you for supporting the permanent protection of the Owyhee Canyonlands. Sincerely, Eliza Walton OLCV Coalition Director P.S.: Our organizing team will be in touch with you shortly. | ---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. | ---|---

Friend,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, “Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?”

It’s not Woke teachers (although they don’t help).
It’s not even school boards.
It’s Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like _Where the Red Fern Grows_ , _Huckleberry Finn_ , and other classics.

Scholastic is now promoting books like _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.
[](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyU0LGOozAQxvGnMR3IYxMghYuTENIVuSbFlWhiBhgFY8s2rPbtV5GSB9j2V3z66_t_G2_IG-_LP3RkOKUxptGHPKbnd45EZWS7ljOePo5KqroEKJUcoZjMRUE3dwUZaLWCGmQji9W0nQRbdy1Rc32gbVFq1U1Uz429anttCjavHQAlFWgJUNWEKGHWF2wvczsrUcsjTJip4j3xRMl6H4LfOLNNlY9LsZk155CE_iPUINTwaX14_yxn5JiqSOdZWS_UELCc_I6ZhB6O7EaLLiAvu9D9KwNAqObljiY-nNB9pDOtGOnt2Qrd_73fy0_225M_oiWh-4BvsX7PtGehe3a4EBTRTOGLt41T04paLg55q6x3Rf7N06dRPwEAAP__GHOIkA)[](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyU0L2q3DAQxfGnkTsbzUj-aFwEzEKKm-YWKc1ceeQdrmUJSeuQtw8Luw-Q9lcc_pzfH-sHySHn_osCz1LKmssaU13L99-amdss7t56umJeUaNtAVrUKzTb3CNMfmp4htEgWNCDbu6z9fxluTdDj70nbdC7bfST34bJTqOFRubnDgBqBKMBOstEGrzpaez96FFZ_UgbVe7kLLJxcTGmFA-p4koX894c873WVJT5ofCm8PZu_Yrxu_UkuXSZr6tzUeEtUbvFkyorc3vUsDoKiWQ_lVmeGQAKh6cH3uQRlFkyX-VOmV9enTLLz8_P9p398hIf2bEyS6KXuHhWPqsyiwTaGZs8b-mPHIeUYVRW74Hk6FwMTf2fp68Z_wUAAP__HXSIjw)
SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic.

Here’s how you can help.

[Please help us promote new book fairs in schools to replace Scholastic. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree? I am hoping to raise $50,000.
