clean_body: Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? | | | - "SkyTree Book Fairs" Friend, Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools. But have you ever wondered, “Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?” It’s not Woke teachers (although they don’t help). It’s not even school boards. It’s Scholastic Book Fairs. Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows , Huckleberry Finn , and other classics. Scholastic is now promoting books like Welcome to St. Hell , which promotes trans ideology to kids. SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic. Here’s how you can help. SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you. SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances. It’s the same with our kids’ literature. Thank you, and God bless, John Rich SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. Inside Scoop Politics PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Sarah Elfreth
subject: And it has begun!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
I spent the last ten days with new members of the 119th Congress, where we came together to discuss how to effectively communicate with our constituents, how to build a stellar team, how to deliver for our communities, and much more!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97405426/513305775/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-11-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDE1MjU4Zi04N2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMAf36xRVvW85hGjobsPaekBlB07Lrf4tZQRLCW-a6I=)
---
| I spent the last ten days with new members of the 119th Congress, where we came together to discuss how to effectively communicate with our constituents, how to build a stellar team, how to deliver for our communities, and much more!
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97405433/513305777/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-11-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDE1MjU4Zi04N2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMAf36xRVvW85hGjobsPaekBlB07Lrf4tZQRLCW-a6I=)
On January 3rd, I will join my colleagues from across the nation and – with a duty to our constituents and passion for our communities in our hearts and minds – swear an oath to uphold and protect the Constitution of the United States._**In the meantime, I wanted to share highlights from orientation:**_

🔵 Joined my first House Democratic Caucus meeting, debriefed with Congressman John Sarbanes, and attended more seminars on how to build an effective team and office culture.

🔵 I celebrated Elect Democratic Women’s wins of this cycle and participated in more bipartisan discussions on navigating a freshman term.

🔵 We took a class photo on the steps of the Capitol and visited the floor of the House (sorry, no photos allowed), where we heard from Speaker Johnson, Leader Jeffries, and incredible stories from the House Historian.

🔵 We are all focused on forging strong relationships with colleagues from across the nation, so we brought a taste of the 3rd Congressional District to Washington for a bipartisan reception! We also learned how to register a vote on the floor and the rules and procedures of the House.

🔵 I was proud to join #TeamMaryland to discuss our collective strategy to fight for Maryland priorities & champion Maryland values.

These incredible moments set everything else into context. I’m excited to approach this new role with humility. Regardless of which party holds the majority, the hard work of governing well must and will go on. But I need your support to help us get things done in Congress.

[_**Will you contribute $10 or more to show your support as I gear up to get to work in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97405434/513305785/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-11-20_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDE1MjU4Zi04N2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMAf36xRVvW85hGjobsPaekBlB07Lrf4tZQRLCW-a6I=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97405435/513305786/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-11-20_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDE1MjU4Zi04N2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMAf36xRVvW85hGjobsPaekBlB07Lrf4tZQRLCW-a6I=)
---
Grateful,
Sarah Elfreth

* * *

name: HAPPY BIRTHDAY, JOE BIDEN! (via VPP)
subject: You haven't signed the card?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This is your LAST chance before he leaves the White House:
| Today is President Biden’s birthday — _his last birthday in the White House!_

We thought Democrats would step up in DROVES to sign our card to President Biden, **but you’re one of 21 local supporters who STILL hasn’t signed...

_Surely this is a mistake!_**

We need to make sure President Biden has his BEST birthday ever before he leaves office! [**This is the last time we’ll ask: WISH PRESIDENT BIDEN A HAPPY BIRTHDAY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Biden_Birthday?source=VPP_20241120_EMCARD_E2_T0_NS&t=6&akid=18079%2E878179%2E1em7cD) | [SIGN THE CARD: HAPPY BIRTHDAY, PRESIDENT BIDEN! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Biden_Birthday?source=VPP_20241120_EMCARD_E2_T0_NS&t=7&akid=18079%2E878179%2E1em7cD)
---
Thank you,

_The Voter Protection Project_
**–BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE–**
**President Biden’s birthday is this Wednesday!** [**We want to make sure he has the BEST birthday ever — QUICK, sign our card before it closes at 5,000 signatures! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Biden_Birthday?source=VPP_20241120_EMCARD_E2_T0_NS&t=8&akid=18079%2E878179%2E1em7cD)
[SIGN THE CARD FOR PRESIDENT BIDEN! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Biden_Birthday?source=VPP_20241120_EMCARD_E2_T0_NS&t=9&akid=18079%2E878179%2E1em7cD)

**We couldn’t be prouder to call Joe Biden our president.**

He’s made INCREDIBLE strides for the American people these last 4 years!

This is his LAST birthday in the White House, so we want to make sure it’s his MOST SPECIAL yet!

[**Friend: Add your name to President Biden’s card right now before space runs out! You can even include an optional message! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Biden_Birthday?source=VPP_20241120_EMCARD_E2_T0_NS&t=11&akid=18079%2E878179%2E1em7cD)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18079%2E878179%2E1em7cD). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18079%2E878179%2E1em7cD).**

Peter, Election Day was over two weeks ago, and our reality still feels raw. We have a Democratic minority in the House and the Senate. We are rapidly approaching another Trump presidency. We are undoubtedly facing a tumultuous era full of uncertainty. **But, Peter, we must celebrate our victories — and use them to our advantage.** Especially here in North Carolina, where I am re-entering the House with 3 Democrats by my side — Don Davis of NC-01, Deborah Ross of NC-02, and Alma Adams of NC-12. We are also ushering in Democratic governor Josh Stein, Lieutenant Governor Rachel Hunt, Attorney General Jeff Jackson, Secretary of State Elaine Marshall, and Superintendent of Public Instruction Mo Green. Additionally, we are leaning towards another Democratic victory with Allison Riggs, who is slated to be our Supreme Court Associate Justice after a very tight race. **This election has proved more than ever how _every single vote matters_ , Peter.** It is a reminder about how showing up is the most important thing we can do. And I can assure you, I will continue to show up and show out every day in Congress. I am committed to fighting for your future, defending our rights, and uplifting the common good. I have never backed down, and never will — especially now. Now, the fight continues. But, I need your help to keep progress at the forefront in Congress. name: Dan Carr
subject: Restoring Faith in American Values:
body:
Why the Constitution Still Matters Today

| |
---|---|---
|
# Restoring Faith in American Values:
### Why the Constitution Still Matters Today
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Nov 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
The United States Constitution, ratified in 1788, is more than just a document; it is the foundation of American governance and liberty. Over two centuries later, its relevance endures, providing a roadmap for safeguarding freedom and democracy in an ever-changing world. At a time when debates about rights, governance, and national identity dominate the public square, it is critical to revisit the Constitution's timeless principles and the wisdom of those who crafted it.
[Click Here To Finish Reading:](https://substack.com/redirect/1304f807-6506-4c01-9ac0-5d5c25876920?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Orlando Sonza
subject: Our Closing Argument - Sonza for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sonza For Congress
body:
This past year, it was an honor to campaign for the First Congressional District of Ohio. As our campaign has officially come to a close... | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | Peter,

**This past year, it was an honor to campaign for the First Congressional District of Ohio.**

As our campaign has officially come to a close, I want to extend the utmost gratitude to those who were a part of Team Sonza at any point along the way. While the result was not what we hoped for, I will continue to work everyday to serve Southwest Ohio in whatever capacity I can.

To all our supporters, volunteers, and friends: your hard work, dedication, and belief in our mission fueled every step of this journey. Thank you for your time, energy, and passion. We couldn’t have done it without you. This movement is just the beginning. Onward!
---
| | **There is only one small order of business left - rounding up our 4x8 signs:**

If you know of the location of any large, 4x8ft Sonza signs, please let us know at info@orlandosonza.com. We will come and pick up the sign and poles within 48 hours of notice! Also, feel free to drop them off at our campaign headquarters located at **506 W Main Street, Mason OH** until December 1st.

**See below for an example of what our 4x8's look like:**
---
|
---
|
---
| | Peter, it has been a pleasure to campaign across this district for the past year, and thank you for your help, it was an honor to have become deeply connected in our community here in Southwest Ohio.

Thank you, and God Bless!

Orlando

clean_body: | BREAKING: Key Iowa House race officially goes to a RECOUNT Folks, Right now, the margin in IA-1 between Democrat Christina Bohannan and Republican Mariannette Miller-Meeks is down to just afew hundred votes. This race is too close to call and is OFFICIALLY headed to a recount. Every single ballot could determine the outcome, and we need to make sure every voice is heard. But the process isn't over yet, and ensuring every vote is properly counted takes resources. That’s why your support – right now – is so important. We need to ensure we have the resources to protect the integrity of this election and make sure every vote is counted fairly and accurately. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | =** Thank you, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . subject: Opinion survey: Statehood for D.C.

body:
WaPo Opinion: D.C. statehood is a voting rights issue [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/WaPo_DC_Statehood_VotingRights.png]
If Washington, D.C. was a state, the U.S. Senate would look different and the landscape for critical legislation would definitely be altered. While it doesn't have the square mileage of other states, D.C. would actually be ahead of Wyoming and Vermont in terms of population ( according to the 2020 census ).
We want to hear from 82 more voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should Washington, D.C. be a state?

name: Democratic National Committee
subject: ️️️️️️⛅ We're counting on all Democrats 🇺🇸
body:
Please don’t click away.
---
️ ⛅ To all Democrats: 🇺🇸 ️We know you may be tired and disappointed, but please don’t click away from this message. We’ll get straight to the point.
As you read this, Trump and his allies are working on the agenda they will roll out as soon as they’re sworn in. If their proposed cabinet nominees and Project 2025 agenda are any indication, we know we are in for disastrous policies that will move this country backward. We cannot sit back and let Trump and a Republican Congress do whatever they want without a fight.
We’ll need a strong and robust Democratic Party to fight back, organize, and stop the worst impulses of a second Trump administration and an emboldened Republican Party under Trump’s control. Unfortunately, the truth is that less than 1 percent of the people receiving these messages pitch in. That’s why we’re counting on all Democrats who know how important this moment is to step up right now.
[**If fighting back against Trump and electing Democrats at all levels of government matters to you, then we’re asking you to pitch in $3 to help us be the strong Democratic Party we need.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241120_2343_fr&refcode2=2347_22930333_iy4HLU&akid=2347%2E22930333%2Eiy4HLU) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241120_2343_fr&refcode2=2347_22930333_iy4HLU&akid=2347%2E22930333%2Eiy4HLU)**

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97407234/513311115/-822722586?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20241120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2E2ZjllMi04Y2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C_7aFzIpCL1wqXDwzQp7rs_bmES9-KBmfI4GbMWAg9I=)

Team — Earlier this week, Nikki took to the House floor to urge her colleagues to pass the **Social Security Fairness Act** — a bipartisan bill to restore benefits to millions of Americans. Educators, police officers, firefighters and more are being cut short in their benefits, and Nikki was proud to cast her vote to support our hardworking public servants. Working people who dedicated their professional lives to public service are being unfairly punished. **This crucial piece of bipartisan legislation will fix this, restoring the benefits that they have worked hard for throughout their careers. ** **[If you agree that working people deserve the Social Security benefits they’ve earned, sign our petition and join Nikki in supporting the Social Security Fairness Act.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97407235/513311117/1072616441?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20241120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2E2ZjllMi04Y2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C_7aFzIpCL1wqXDwzQp7rs_bmES9-KBmfI4GbMWAg9I=&emci=d8b557ca-80a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=e3a6f9e2-8ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=13891387)** | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97407238/513311119/1072616441?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20241120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2E2ZjllMi04Y2E3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C_7aFzIpCL1wqXDwzQp7rs_bmES9-KBmfI4GbMWAg9I=&emci=d8b557ca-80a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=e3a6f9e2-8ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=13891387)

This crucial piece of bipartisan legislation will fix this, restoring the benefits that they have worked hard for throughout their careers. | Thank you, Nikki HQ | **= Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

name: Justice Democrats
subject: The establishment wants to blame groups like us instead of AIPAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, a recent
opinion piece in the New York Times claims that the Democratic Party’s
problem is with progressive groups like Justice Democrats rather than
corporate, right-wing super PACs like AIPAC.

We can’t say we’re surprised. This op-ed is yet another attempt to point
fingers at the left after the Democratic Party failed to stop a second
Trump presidency by moving to the right.

The piece blames people-powered, grassroots groups like us and our friends
at Sunrise Movement and Working Families Party for holding Democratic
candidates accountable to our values of justice and human rights,
ridiculously blaming our push for criminal justice reform and
compassionate immigration reform for the Party’s losses this November.

As AOC pointed out, the op-ed completely fails to mention AIPAC, despite
the pro-Israel lobby group using tens of millions of dollars from its MAGA
billionaire donors to spend more than ever before against two Democratic
incumbents this cycle:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241120?refcode=em20241120-36166&refcode2=36166_1203867_k1V24Y&akid=36166%2E1203867%2Ek1V24Y ]Tweet by AOC: If people want to talk about members of Congress being
overly influenced by a special interest group pushing a wildly unpopular
agenda that pushes voters away from Democrats then they should be
discussing AIPAC

Our progressive movement won’t be lectured by the same Democratic
establishment that has prioritized corporate interests and high-dollar
donors at the expense of the working class people of this country who are
tired of the status quo.

It’s time for the Democratic Party to clean house and for the
corporate-backed, consultant class in power to step aside and make way for
bold, new leadership.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241120?refcode=em20241120-36166&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36166_1203867_k1V24Y&akid=36166%2E1203867%2Ek1V24Y ]If you agree, make a grassroots contribution of $5 or
whatever you can to fund our efforts to recruit the next generation of
Justice Democrats for Congress in 2026 so we can transform the Democratic
Party from the ground up →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241120?refcode=em20241120-36166&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36166_1203867_k1V24Y&akid=36166%2E1203867%2Ek1V24Y ]Contribute $5

The number of working class, progressive candidates we can find and
support to run depends directly on how much money we raise from emails
like this one, so thanks for anything you can give to support our fight.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241120-36166-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36166_1203867_k1V24Y&akid=36166%2E1203867%2Ek1V24Y

Friend, thank you. I am deeply grateful to each and every one of you for placing your trust in me to continue fighting for working families, creating good-paying jobs, protecting healthcare for everyone, and securing Social Security and Medicare so Ohioans can retire with dignity. This campaign has always been about the strength and resilience of our communities, and today we celebrate not just a victory but a renewed commitment to the belief that what America makes and grows, makes and grows America. Together, we have delivered for Northwest Ohio, reinvesting in our communities, our industries, and our people. I am inspired by the hardworking people across our district who fuel our economy every day and pledge to continue our work to grow jobs here at home, strengthen our manufacturing sector, and ensure dignity and stability for everyone who works hard and plays by the rules. It is time to put partisanship aside and get back to work for America’s ‘Big Middle.’ — Marcy

name: AOC
subject: Barbarism.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
That's not a life.
#
If we do not assert ourselves and enshrine our rights — and demand healthcare, and education, and dignity — the alternative is barbarism, which is what we are contending with now.
The fact that people are choosing between medicine and rent is barbarism.
The fact that people are worried about whether they will be on the streets every 4 weeks is barbarism.
The fact that every time a person has an ache or a pain, and they’re scared that it could either be a sore joint or cancer, but they can’t find out because they can’t afford the doctor? **This is barbarism.**
If we do not demand — and not only demand, but win — unions, healthcare, wages, and ending endless war, then we will condemn ourselves to barbarism.
I refuse to give up. I refuse to submit myself to that future. That’s not a life.
**And so to live, we have to fight for each other. We have to stand with each other. We have to fight for this vision and this world.**
[If you can, will you make a $5 contribution – or any amount that is meaningful to you – to help power our fight for transformative change? Every donation will make a difference.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241120.EImWs6&refcode=em20241120-7615-P_FND_CTR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7615%2E2526796%2EPMCYWU)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241120.EImWs6&refcode=em20241120-7615-P_FND_CTR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7615%2E2526796%2EPMCYWU)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241120?refcode=em20241120-7615-P_FND_CTR_MIS&t=21&refcode2=7615_2526796_PMCYWU&akid=7615%2E2526796%2EPMCYWU)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241120-7615-P_FND_CTR_MIS&t=22&akid=7615%2E2526796%2EPMCYWU)**

name: Jenna Burns
subject: It’s basically a death sentence
body:
Dear Peter,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=aa610ee842784db78dac4dbab803432f&_e=1YTIzSGkaRbh6dkUGDhmohAhSLpDp7vjIpKjhEg0LPb15OTscyqobzzjvjfJFFDQDd_oXZgliWJdMn9ibESyieho2NLwNzUkMo0iugzar3KgtEYqfbBP_pW3qq2QmV3O3ZYc8kC0w9hr8bxWUx00ocpX4DqkD-zcMcGnl1AB117VB-80dckWlQ1m1lIEo18e9lgiOKBnB09kvbM0QZLXJq6mAM0nJ7I6kB2mLiHuwBI_tfRExU4HCSgNvu0ybhXEvcNPHbeQwL6t4IdXeDcgllXVMtzh82WDx3lMD27fhgj3b3jIYOkboFJT3npX_ZevslaHt6uouHfwweQHSVJP8aryLJiwtfnuWebp7kEEzMqt9rB7zkk9DkSpnC82VTp9a1ZG4wk0mdDA1-yHjZcxcQ%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=aa610ee842784db78dac4dbab803432f&_e=1YTIzSGkaRbh6dkUGDhmohAhSLpDp7vjIpKjhEg0LPb15OTscyqobzzjvjfJFFDQDd_oXZgliWJdMn9ibESyieho2NLwNzUkMo0iugzar3KgtEYqfbBP_pW3qq2QmV3O3ZYc8kC0w9hr8bxWUx00ocpX4DqkD-zcMcGnl1AB117VB-80dckWlQ1m1lIEo18e9lgiOKBnB09kvbM0QZLXJq6mAM0nJ7I6kB2mLiHuwBLi4JePKXKAEgJkRtQ0ArQgnRLd_JyhHg_8bBoyfNF9y_1LH2-GzvyyF25AoEatpD_unmwFZ4-uGfq_eJy-00MY0U6m-ekQTNAhN6wTQLtmP247irIUVVyCO9ntM4bN_qkerRagA_jkdCtoR1sMKb1KFt9Zpuc9Oumeud-Roo7zqA%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=aa610ee842784db78dac4dbab803432f&_e=1YTIzSGkaRbh6dkUGDhmohAhSLpDp7vjIpKjhEg0LPb15OTscyqobzzjvjfJFFDQDd_oXZgliWJdMn9ibESyieho2NLwNzUkMo0iugzar3KgtEYqfbBP_pW3qq2QmV3O3ZYc8kC0w9hr8bxWUx00ocpX4DqkD-zcMcGnl1AB117VB-80dckWlQ1m1lIEo18e9lgiOKBnB09kvbM0QZLXJq6mAM0nJ7I6kB2mLiHuwBI9VaKceZzEAfIijKHEmcGZYYdq0zlDHjctz9PQdysVFUCNt3bPD8iWWRE6KCDTV9s8LojAw9AgYKlNiVoKOw0XdxsRNb1es3BfaqWZNn9XJNkn1qfddJDEtNCId2wjGGLSHRkvUjr36y9yQxedk8JZdSreGt07lmB-mqwfjRUMsw%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=aa610ee842784db78dac4dbab803432f&_e=1YTIzSGkaRbh6dkUGDhmohAhSLpDp7vjIpKjhEg0LPb15OTscyqobzzjvjfJFFDQDd_oXZgliWJdMn9ibESyieho2NLwNzUkMo0iugzar3KgtEYqfbBP_pW3qq2QmV3O3ZYc8kC0w9hr8bxWUx00ocpX4DqkD-zcMcGnl1AB117VB-80dckWlQ1m1lIEo18e9lgiOKBnB09kvbM0QZLXJq6mAM0nJ7I6kB2mLiHuwBKprWZrWpPWTwBu72dgyUexv8Brq-5nIH244giuOLGraElKrVuzSzlWWKCnLA4d74rxQXz3Y7kSq6iJXKyYiXixavqpNty7AHqmiNgNwSy5UoUV6ndzxKz-6GUx_WubT5C8ZbRRFFxidw-gr318NtaZHnDEDmTf5L88bVNzu7--pw%3D%3D)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

clean_body: Dear Peter, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=830c2f14404b442082979ab03761aaaa&_e=EpSdZxWMz2l9I9m2YRtjgwZ4kAwVKZMB3VUIFSm3abV1i9YTXbocKpOw8l-qjg2MfhhEYEm1GLSRGP5UNGS8xqQqE2nora_c_sgs9Un2Ddx6d-kRBAhmpAYRcGspEtSfVAmTPi0jVLL1-svk7GFuBalKaByqHXc4tV2TppKe7v_SlnVeoDkBwJ_SfsSdtg5xxgl48GDrv5tmBAxt02AZenkH30UG7R_6ZD7_EiO2OSrhWgpOKCioqQ3fGul-e4af-WLTEXjVRohXcTC0-1CbbzVFkEzlEn6YNRG0YSID9eNzk_5r4eTZC1NHuy-ES0sKyS5hW4JGgklidhpgOwoYJw%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team —

Free and fair elections are a cornerstone of our democracy. Although the result of the presidential election is a shock to so many of us, it is important that we accept the results and ensure a peaceful transfer of power. Donald Trump won the election and will be the next President of the United States.

This does not mean the fight is over.

Throughout my career, as an Army Ranger and a Member of Congress, I have sworn oaths to protect the future and security of this nation from those who wish it harm.

I swear another to you now: I will do everything in my power to protect Colorado, defend the Constitution, and stand against Donald Trump’s worst impulses. And I can’t do it without your support.

Will you donate today to strengthen our movement for the work that lies ahead? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-november-2024]

name: The Forward Party
subject: Big Wins in 2024—and What’s Next for Forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Big wins, exciting plans, and a growing movement—see what we’ve been up to and what’s next for the Forward Party!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward&n=1)
---
Wednesday, November 20, 2024 | Peter -- What a year it’s been! Thanks to your dedication, the Forward Party has made incredible strides in 2024. Together, we’ve shown what’s possible when people come together to demand something better from our politics. Here’s a quick look at what we’ve accomplished this year - after all, a picture is worth a thousand words.
### [**What We've Accomplished**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=kB45XuJbIaybua_uhXcc9p3GHOvxFcIOHqC8v0WARdZLIrtPSg57EbNOaocAFGRJ3DBDtuCOvzJ8UafVqRoOTMl2gMXne30W5F35MEwfAJc&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward&n=2)
**What’s Next?** 2024 was just the beginning. Here’s how we’re keeping the momentum going in 2025 and beyond:
* **Expanding State Support** : We’re growing our teams, training leaders, and building infrastructure in even more states.
* **Recruiting More Candidates** : We’re doubling down on finding incredible leaders who can bring Forward’s values to every level of government.
* **Sticking to Our Strategy** : We’re staying focused on building from the ground up. No shortcuts, no cults of personality—just real solutions for real people.

**Reform Had A Tough Election Night, But We Are Fighting Back** Well, we've got two pieces of _**great**_ __ news for you. **_First_** , just last night, [the repeal of Final Four voting in Alaska shifted and the votes for keeping this must-have reform are now winning!](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=r6XIlxJrUDlcB2rZg3ePD8kjlZyG15dAgcDD0m07rtftjGsLvdQl2VDHED8NNVg9Gz7ROQY2OIYzjyvwgjG2sX1lsJFPZqOiQa16cWrUeAzhQ4kMbE1NDvKJUfJpwadTrwOCv4sVqIJwH8RK2IDkBPz1OWdBtFHZNcIV5EjnJ2W6mfsueyA8HP1GWiisdbYk&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward&n=3) Because of how large the state is, Alaska takes up to 15 days to count all of its ballots from across the state. The vote to repeal the Final Four reform had been winning, but the voters who want to keep the reform have been gaining ground steadily since election day. Last night, with just 7,800 votes left to count in the state, the "keep" votes pulled ahead by just 192 votes. _**Second**_ , four days, ago two members of the House of Representatives, Marie Glusenkamp Perez (D-WA 3) and Jared Golden (D-ME 2), introduced a bill (H.Res 1573) to create a Select Committee on Election Reform. The committee would meet for the duration of one year and finish with the publication of a report and set of recommendations on the following topics:
* Multi-member districts
* Electoral reforms like RCV or Cumulative voting
* Open Primaries
* Independent Redistricting commissions
* Adjusting the members of the House of Representatives

Should this committee form, it would be an enormous win for reform advocates everywhere! You can [read the full text of the bill here](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=bnevg_4xmhM7dqcAHTeRPNNDMGp1djEoH_1PmfS3WpcVfRsWnn-7-WcqV940uubTwz86JEjYtilp8NXHh-HDkw2LG1WiQLIXXIWd-3y2c6E&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward&n=4). Forward is pushing into 2025 ready to keep building the party America needs. Every dollar helps ensure that Forward can reach the Americans like you who are ready for something new. Can you chip in today to help? | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward&n=5 "Donate $10 Today!") [Donate $10 Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward&n=5)
---
This party is only as strong as the people in it—so thank you for everything you’ve done to make this year a success. Let’s keep moving Forward, together.
With Thanks,
The Forward Party
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward&n=6)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward&n=7)[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward&n=8)
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward&n=9) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward&n=10) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward&n=11) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward&n=12) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward&n=13) Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. subject: These nominations are so unserious, team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
Brain worms and bears to lead the HHS??? |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97407967/513313371/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20241120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmIyZWIwMzktOTBhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o1UKHv_r5OT-hN-HZvUV5gQeUHcPk0lfIa89tY-lZYI=)
---
Team — We know that the reality of a second Donald Trump presidency will mean fighting back against nonsensical policies not based on any evidence, science, or precedent. We knew that his day one mission was to build a cabinet of MAGA mouthpieces who will amplify his dangerous policies — and as the nominations continue to roll in, we’re watching in real-time as Donald Trump builds a cabinet of yes-men. **[Donald Trump has nominated Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. to lead the Department of Health and Human Services. RFK Jr. is just one of many extremely unqualified nominations that Donald Trump has recently put forth, so we’re calling on the Arizona’s Senators to reject these extreme and unqualified candidates. Will you add your name and stand with us right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97407968/513313377/10148365?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20241120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmIyZWIwMzktOTBhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o1UKHv_r5OT-hN-HZvUV5gQeUHcPk0lfIa89tY-lZYI=&emci=72b4432a-7fa7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=bb2eb039-90a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=9307116)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97407969/513313378/10148365?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20241120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmIyZWIwMzktOTBhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o1UKHv_r5OT-hN-HZvUV5gQeUHcPk0lfIa89tY-lZYI=&emci=72b4432a-7fa7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=bb2eb039-90a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=9307116)
---
If you need a refresher on RFK Jr.’s stances on health and disease, don’t forget that:
* His organization, the Children’s Health Defense fund, spread misinformation alongside other vaccine groups that have been linked to measles outbreaks among underrepresented groups
* He’s described fluoride as “poison” and would advocate for U.S. water systems to remove fluoride, which the American Dental Association estimates has reduced our population’s tooth decay by **25%**
* He’s stood behind dangerous abortion bans and could sign off on extreme, national restrictions that would put people’s lives in jeopardy
* He’s consistently made comments attacking gender-affirming care and would be another piece that the next Trump Administration could use to attack trans folks nationwide

**[RFK Jr wouldn’t just be an unqualified candidate to lead the Department of Health and Human Services, he would be a dangerous one. clean_body: Brain worms and bears to lead the HHS??? | = Team — We know that the reality of a second Donald Trump presidency will mean fighting back against nonsensical policies not based on any evidence, science, or precedent. We knew that his day one mission was to build a cabinet of MAGA mouthpieces who will amplify his dangerous policies — and as the nominations continue to roll in, we’re watching in real-time as Donald Trump builds a cabinet of yes-men. | If you need a refresher on RFK Jr.’s stances on health and disease, don’t forget that: His organization, the Children’s Health Defense fund, spread misinformation alongside other vaccine groups that have been linked to measles outbreaks among underrepresented groups He’s described fluoride as “poison” and would advocate for U.S. water systems to remove fluoride, which the American Dental Association estimates has reduced our population’s tooth decay by 25% He’s stood behind dangerous abortion bans and could sign off on extreme, national restrictions that would put people’s lives in jeopardy He’s consistently made comments attacking gender-affirming care and would be another piece that the next Trump Administration could use to attack trans folks nationwide — Team ADP Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. subject: Celebrating Native American Heritage Month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
This Native American Heritage Month, we’re proud to celebrate all that Native American women across the nation have accomplished!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97408257/513314496/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-11-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmMzI2ODdkLTkxYTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h6_akklNYwXuFZAnILiv6zmJMIcLuFp0GlD7dkyzd_s=)
---
| Peter,

We honor this Native American Heritage Month with our Native American Emerge alums, including _**Crystal Martinez (Marin Community College Trustee), Annessa Hartman (OR HD-40), Shannon Pinto (NM SD-03), Gabriella Cazares-Kelly (Pima County, AZ Recorder).**_
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97408258/513314497/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-11-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmMzI2ODdkLTkxYTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h6_akklNYwXuFZAnILiv6zmJMIcLuFp0GlD7dkyzd_s=)
This Native American Heritage Month, we’re proud to celebrate all that Native American women across the nation have accomplished! Representation has never been more important in our democracy, especially with a historic number of Native American women serving in public office. But there’s still work to be done to build equity.

At Emerge, we’re committed to seeing more Native American women represented at every level of government. That’s why we’re asking for your support. name: Jane Fonda
subject: We can’t have healthy people on a sick planet.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
The fight against fossil fuels is a public health fight.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97408283/513314546/1328794144?refcode=ea.9e14de41-91a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.9e14de41-91a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllMTRkZTQxLTkxYTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V-3PFRGcF51QDouxLXiziSio5GY_NfoCnyYDfJ-kytY=&emci=7a89d029-86a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=9e14de41-91a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4823105)
---
In 2022, I received the news I was cancer-free. After four months of chemotherapy and the incredible care of doctors and nurses at Providence St. John’s Health Center, I felt overwhelming gratitude — not just for my recovery but for the breakthroughs in cancer research that made it possible. My experience as a cancer survivor informs my perspective as a climate activist. While we’re making remarkable strides in cancer research, we’re failing to make the same progress to protect our planet — and ourselves — from pollutants. We can’t ignore an unsettling truth: The same fossil fuels driving the climate crisis are also fueling a public health crisis. The numbers don’t lie. **In 2021 alone, fossil fuel-related air pollution caused over _8 million deaths_ globally. That’s more lives lost in one year than the entire COVID-19 pandemic.** Fossil fuels are making us sick. Toxic chemicals like dioxins, benzene, and naphthalene — byproducts of oil, gas, and coal — are contaminating our air, our water, and even our food. These poisons are so pervasive they’ve been found in the umbilical cords of newborns. And here’s what’s even more frightening: Donald Trump and his allies are doubling down on fossil fuels. His so-called _Make America Healthy Again_ rhetoric couldn’t be more disconnected from reality. Under his leadership, fossil fuel drilling and production would expand at an unprecedented pace, pumping even more toxins into our air, water, and soil. If they succeed, the public health crisis we’re already facing will spiral out of control. This is why I’m staying in the fight. I know you’re tired, and it feels like all hope is lost. I’m fighting those feelings, too — but despair is not an option. We owe it to our children and their children to demand better. We owe it to ourselves to end fossil fuel dependence and prioritize public health. Health care workers save lives every day. They are heroic in their efforts to heal people. It’s time we match that heroism and fight to protect the planet and prevent harm before it happens. **[Across the country, climate champions at the state and local levels are taking bold action to defend clean energy, strengthen pollution safeguards, and create healthier communities. Each victory pushes back against corporate polluters who put profits over people. But we can’t do it without your help. Will you donate a few dollars today to help us keep this fight alive and build a healthier future for all of us?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97408284/513314547/2105508926?refcode=ea.9e14de41-91a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.9e14de41-91a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllMTRkZTQxLTkxYTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V-3PFRGcF51QDouxLXiziSio5GY_NfoCnyYDfJ-kytY=)** | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97408285/513314548/2105508926?refcode=ea.9e14de41-91a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.9e14de41-91a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllMTRkZTQxLTkxYTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V-3PFRGcF51QDouxLXiziSio5GY_NfoCnyYDfJ-kytY=)
---
With hope and determination,
Jane Fonda

name: State Dems HQ (via DLCC.org)
subject: $7 today...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Every special election marks a chance to protect or expand Democratic power in statehouses nationwide – $7 helps our party make the most of every opportunity to build power. | | |
---
| |
---|---
$7. That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** _Seven_ special elections are on the horizon in states like Delaware, Louisiana, and Virginia – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** Every special election marks a chance to protect or gain Democratic seats in statehouses nationwide – $7 helps our party make the most of every opportunity to build power. **Reason #3:** State legislatures have an important role to play in protecting access to the ballot box, abortion rights, and more – $7 helps elect leaders who will stand up to the ultra-extreme MAGA agenda in our statehouses. [So what do you say? name: Alan Cohn
subject: Our Last Line of Defense
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97408630/513315644/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGI5ZjQxMmMtOTNhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hq1Yzav1TX0dA40BDoqOYOFEwRDp6KESZN4X9ndXZqE=&emci=805586f1-8da7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=0b9f412c-93a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
44-years.
A study by the University of Chicago Law School concludes it will be 44 years until a more moderate majority will emerge on the Supreme Court unless we change how we fill vacancies.
We’ve seen what the radical MAGA majority has already done in just a few short years, from taking away the rights of women to make their own health decisions to creating immunity for Donald Trump from prosecution, even though no such right exists in the Constitution.
Clarence Thomas, in between accepting luxury trips and favors from billionaires, has indicated re-visiting marriage equality is next.
Now, Trump has four more years to stack the court and create an even bigger majority of MAGA radicals basing their rulings on their politics.
Can anything be done?
Yes!
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court. We’re the national campaign working with 75 members of the House and Senate, including Adam Schiff, Hakeem Jeffries, and Sheldon Whitehouse, to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and enact 18-year term limits.
We’re already back at work building the needed resources to support candidates in the mid-terms who pledge to support the TERM Act. We’re mounting a major public pressure campaign to tap into the 70% of Americans who agree with us.
And we need your help because right now, there are no guardrails on Trump or the MAGA movement and their allies.
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97408632/513315646/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGI5ZjQxMmMtOTNhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hq1Yzav1TX0dA40BDoqOYOFEwRDp6KESZN4X9ndXZqE=)
[**> >>SCOTUS is the essential institution of our democracy. Without it, there would be no “Equal justice under law.”**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97408634/513315649/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGI5ZjQxMmMtOTNhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hq1Yzav1TX0dA40BDoqOYOFEwRDp6KESZN4X9ndXZqE=)
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97408635/513315650/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGI5ZjQxMmMtOTNhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hq1Yzav1TX0dA40BDoqOYOFEwRDp6KESZN4X9ndXZqE=)**

clean_body: Hi Friend, 44-years. A study by the University of Chicago Law School concludes it will be 44 years until a more moderate majority will emerge on the Supreme Court unless we change how we fill vacancies. We’ve seen what the radical MAGA majority has already done in just a few short years, from taking away the rights of women to make their own health decisions to creating immunity for Donald Trump from prosecution, even though no such right exists in the Constitution. Clarence Thomas, in between accepting luxury trips and favors from billionaires, has indicated re-visiting marriage equality is next. Now, Trump has four more years to stack the court and create an even bigger majority of MAGA radicals basing their rulings on their politics. Can anything be done? Yes! This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court. We’re the national campaign working with 75 members of the House and Senate, including Adam Schiff, Hakeem Jeffries, and Sheldon Whitehouse, to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and enact 18-year term limits. We’re already back at work building the needed resources to support candidates in the mid-terms who pledge to support the TERM Act. We’re mounting a major public pressure campaign to tap into the 70% of Americans who agree with us. And we need your help because right now, there are no guardrails on Trump or the MAGA movement and their allies. = = Alan Cohn Term Limit the Court The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court. Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court. =** = SPONSORED BY TERM LIMITS YES, INC. 7903 HAMPTON LAKE DR. TAMPA, FL 33647 Term Limits Yes, Inc. 7903 Hampton Lake Dr. Tampa, FL 33647 United States

body:
America needs a comprehensive plan to win this new Cold War...

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=7dbf842fe0c049df87d348169010bd54&_t=FImr47f3hMA4qo78wI3SnSi0cAYswvWKIthxYPA8pDSigsmhYpTK76k7nL-jCR-9HGOah8um6mVWUKuIsaFidZAuliMC1tY3PLpcH9w3ZJfdh9i2iertBlcPRf5g53Pw)_

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

The new Cold War is at hand.

While in the 20th century, America had to face off against the Soviet Union, today the Chinese Communist Party is America's greatest international threat.

America needs a comprehensive plan to win this new Cold War. Which is why we at The Heritage Foundation created this FREE eBook titled _5 Things America Must Do to Win the New Cold War._
---
|

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7dbf842fe0c049df87d348169010bd54&_e=ttNFwUY0m3cpa8ENuZivXMRYozSPL3kPuLa2OWd5Gyz8XgzQEUUd7xlrlumpVyotBVy3pbEo8Li4svlUBIKYX6SlO0jGIkTCpuG_10X_K2tJPjZ-Uhr4Wr-GtKkK0cl1OJK5D29S7HoBQYLqlX0h4GT9GgaqZ6R1Qjv-hVhGQisaLQ6Z4G1AxIih-miai4E8y4FRwkM-mgDC7k1nlMCVQIVRRbR5Vz5L6oVPLJyt1XBBJnQvDXuCE_MhEWnbIAvdT5fbfiWRimhaKGmZwfONnW5c14jWen2EOJW-geZhrpEZTbwUvescZDr1zZDPjJwhUDlCde4jgCqyrJbrw-pNWrE0IioDdxt-eHUkAiw26aRsFR-uXrCrGSODVoJP0GtSbTscdch2znWhddEQ82XYBQ%3D%3D)
---
| | This free resource details concrete policy actions the United States should implement that will strengthen our country and reduce China's influence on America and global politics.
**You can download your free copy using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/free-5-things-americans-must-do-to-win-the-new-cold-war/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7dbf842fe0c049df87d348169010bd54&_e=ttNFwUY0m3cpa8ENuZivXMRYozSPL3kPuLa2OWd5Gyz8XgzQEUUd7xlrlumpVyotBVy3pbEo8Li4svlUBIKYX6SlO0jGIkTCpuG_10X_K2tJPjZ-Uhr4Wr-GtKkK0cl1OJK5D29S7HoBQYLqlX0h4GT9GgaqZ6R1Qjv-hVhGQisaLQ6Z4G1AxIih-miai4E8y4FRwkM-mgDC7k1nlMCVQIVRRbR5Vz5L6oVPLJyt1XBBJnQvDXuCE_MhEWnbIAvdZAi3blOJeOuQgcv2-EcU8LHtW8dKygWTLk5fcTLTjWZjLp7ZJsarVBB6h19XBqtoEcRT0wQXXrJGW84bjqxNdQykdxmM5eh8g10-9X6UNlCN-ruUSOSN6RuYAEvaLwIeIavvtCGpGn3LRb8d5Wl4Sw%3D%3D)**

With China's threat being such a huge issue, Americans need to know that there are solutions to this new Cold War.

I hope this eBook gives you hope that the Chinese Communist Party's rise is not inevitable and that The Heritage Foundation is ready to fight on your behalf for these policy solutions. **Please download your free copy of _5 Things America Must Do to Win the New Cold War_ using this secure link right now: [https://secured.heritage.org/free-5-things-americans-must-do-to-win-the-new-cold-war/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7dbf842fe0c049df87d348169010bd54&_e=ttNFwUY0m3cpa8ENuZivXMRYozSPL3kPuLa2OWd5Gyz8XgzQEUUd7xlrlumpVyotBVy3pbEo8Li4svlUBIKYX6SlO0jGIkTCpuG_10X_K2tJPjZ-Uhr4Wr-GtKkK0cl1OJK5D29S7HoBQYLqlX0h4GT9GgaqZ6R1Qjv-hVhGQisaLQ6Z4G1AxIih-miai4E8y4FRwkM-mgDC7k1nlMCVQIVRRbR5Vz5L6oVPLJyt1XBBJnQvDXuCE_MhEWnbIAvdIKI3I3Hw0fkAhYBdqBJvj2QujjtMbJL8VGVHQ9aQlCa2uCc_RLUNq-Ctv4OicK6O4rIvP7ywExP9jcRmIbHlkFk09DbDdVEdoU6Oi4L9t-xw6KDzJhKGMOaA6tjXnZ1Yg3_kEGRrxhuNyTiHO0xTwA%3D%3D)** Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

Which is why we at The Heritage Foundation created this FREE eBook titled 5 Things America Must Do to Win the New Cold War. | | | This free resource details concrete policy actions the United States should implement that will strengthen our country and reduce China's influence on America and global politics. You can download your free copy using the secure link below. With China's threat being such a huge issue, Americans need to know that there are solutions to this new Cold War. I hope this eBook gives you hope that the Chinese Communist Party's rise is not inevitable and that The Heritage Foundation is ready to fight on your behalf for these policy solutions. Please download your free copy of 5 Things America Must Do to Win the New Cold War using this secure link right now: Sincerely, Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002 .

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: I knew I had a duty to take action.
body:
I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian. | | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---

| | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ab6ca417671042f7ac168ed96e2f2c1e&_e=GvEQYh29Q9MiwLoipYC1RNziC6XWKZtuC1o1pC_F9_8G1FiPSwe04tW8s0p8Hjw-13kqiZP8a75qXZHFFF6kjwfGxLzyZs_DN1ro2Tai4yrKxAFx0x_ANZqgN9wUiYt-7d1HZCtP5Kfzp9kDdnp7ISK3AxL1OSATnmQVH9zwtQKyrw4yAkRaqg-kOdMwZ-6vc9yAw-cktpRIFtWCX2oTBexXO3iE0mS89mpaKUyZPFM7mKdmUt_jeBBl-qxMt7TxMe0sebPsQzGZSBHvEQnZ9EfxKJVQXeY8WSgtZD-xRCdVBPz2tY1fI0jMgPMq88tHOAly881GlcZvpVOgfUHHwGakLBArARpvZk2uf2EyeSP045n6tEfvHqUAPgzQmR9cLHSJgw0EveYjg2EiBTNhHw%3D%3D)
