| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ab6ca417671042f7ac168ed96e2f2c1e&_e=GvEQYh29Q9MiwLoipYC1RNziC6XWKZtuC1o1pC_F9_8G1FiPSwe04tW8s0p8Hjw-13kqiZP8a75qXZHFFF6kjwfGxLzyZs_DN1ro2Tai4yrKxAFx0x_ANZqgN9wUiYt-7d1HZCtP5Kfzp9kDdnp7ISK3AxL1OSATnmQVH9zwtQKyrw4yAkRaqg-kOdMwZ-6vc9yAw-cktpRIFtWCX2oTBexXO3iE0mS89mpaKUyZPFNUKJ6M2MtAPKsoZhuzAf5c0t6ZM-L7XfY2HX3fGpwG8Buc4ITo10Cd2c0Aa8tzsAmpIqMwunSKeYWqlIsxjZVvOjqQWqEwbEQms2PD3cXMZuZjlxXGlH7xSJG_5n1A_giIhHO0rdPO5Lhu1cHNgk50otav-bDGGeF7XiLnDB4Kxg%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $150 or more today._..](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ab6ca417671042f7ac168ed96e2f2c1e&_e=GvEQYh29Q9MiwLoipYC1RNziC6XWKZtuC1o1pC_F9_8G1FiPSwe04tW8s0p8Hjw-13kqiZP8a75qXZHFFF6kjwfGxLzyZs_DN1ro2Tai4yrKxAFx0x_ANZqgN9wUiYt-7d1HZCtP5Kfzp9kDdnp7ISK3AxL1OSATnmQVH9zwtQKyrw4yAkRaqg-kOdMwZ-6vc9yAw-cktpRIFtWCX2oTBexXO3iE0mS89mpaKUyZPFMP-X1GQ5PQPs9AP-81FeUSw4TPHewOvN2APiuvhysBm5l26Pa0vEMXCnpWMyx3zj8bgGV7j8GCcwDxrWj5M8r1l_3zoj66rwUgaWvCSPfQDZ0DWTzTvfaUAyeas5iL9ZssN-xKQgPK5tra145TPjaUWljWR7-hL2H6jJ9E-x0VLg%3D%3D)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **_[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $175._](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ab6ca417671042f7ac168ed96e2f2c1e&_e=GvEQYh29Q9MiwLoipYC1RNziC6XWKZtuC1o1pC_F9_8G1FiPSwe04tW8s0p8Hjw-13kqiZP8a75qXZHFFF6kjwfGxLzyZs_DN1ro2Tai4yrKxAFx0x_ANZqgN9wUiYt-7d1HZCtP5Kfzp9kDdnp7ISK3AxL1OSATnmQVH9zwtQKyrw4yAkRaqg-kOdMwZ-6vc9yAw-cktpRIFtWCX2oTBexXO3iE0mS89mpaKUyZPFOslARYoVSTl7lI-neX-dojas_KZElN6U5UY02-7qLGzEOS8xYOmdU4H6DIu2F82VL9JwnkwoSGiR0Y9o1tL_vyuYpl0GAK--i6OJyhrNXQfrMwLVBENjprRnNqPpY4K8IBX3EhNZ17P4MKijaEWgpQaARmDWE4J7gGderwmVBWXQ%3D%3D)_** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ab6ca417671042f7ac168ed96e2f2c1e&_e=GvEQYh29Q9MiwLoipYC1RNziC6XWKZtuC1o1pC_F9_8G1FiPSwe04tW8s0p8Hjw-13kqiZP8a75qXZHFFF6kjwfGxLzyZs_DN1ro2Tai4yrKxAFx0x_ANZqgN9wUiYt-7d1HZCtP5Kfzp9kDdnp7ISK3AxL1OSATnmQVH9zwtQKyrw4yAkRaqg-kOdMwZ-6vc9yAw-cktpRIFtWCX2oTBexXO3iE0mS89mpaKUyZPFNXdsCEdepojwwvpqBj4241zy53Ash43rt5cdvQaG5y-YimQt8QMzYv8S7zyMlZli5_hHDY_jbSjbssWgX-mjqjqpg42MFSxCxDXWqJW8OJ5GtKPb8ojn9_A8lkjFoQAocYxgjrlFfhmtc8AkzyVJDaPrtPrqOd9mXvZ7rT0j-BmA%3D%3D)_**
---
[**DONATE **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ab6ca417671042f7ac168ed96e2f2c1e&_e=GvEQYh29Q9MiwLoipYC1RNziC6XWKZtuC1o1pC_F9_8G1FiPSwe04tW8s0p8Hjw-13kqiZP8a75qXZHFFF6kjwfGxLzyZs_DN1ro2Tai4yrKxAFx0x_ANZqgN9wUiYt-7d1HZCtP5Kfzp9kDdnp7ISK3AxL1OSATnmQVH9zwtQKyrw4yAkRaqg-kOdMwZ-6vc9yAw-cktpRIFtWCX2oTBexXO3iE0mS89mpaKUyZPFPhl35uRvOlJUzDumfVWG0HTY622xmMc9crbbNUQIAkLO1EG6sbKCJVrva1kug94RSmtJfP0knY5fTVZjXDYVxabMoSEgdosE8LXoxSBWeDgxnfDtkFgf4gOJ-jT74c-D9bsANchHG85c-oZOzJEEbpQ6scgALDtG-o-Al27Iu-sA%3D%3D)

Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,

clean_body: I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian. | | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. | | | | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;"> | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|---

body:
The AP called the race and named me the winner, but Democrats refuse to accept the results.
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=89c6356bb9914070815a448dd81251f7&_e=1IMDlMs805EDdxFEyxFHM2YUtFdu6dzULhAm-SNSY1ATO44g9HwxuPR36nBe09TYeFM0MAJxlU-TOtSirQ-8pIERXXqmVm7ShKt3piLvsJrQeqCjwdYK5vw8hAqzge5lnmdQ6G0bTKjdzbz5PrVi2YuMxuJz44Lz1fA1gkIFG7GyjGmJvn5vvAspbvjJV9ZH-PlyzNU46se5eoXFUPV3Kqz57SNlWtnOPMyEp8-GDkA6d9Ki6PE840p45L1iycb-cGN-5DpYB9DpwrJx6sGITetqCFNW2W0Y_qlAhbq3fBSNIk9buR-QA1p9cRw6j73MkDOzF79eLsQKKNXKxf66yQI3dGxjY3_GbfUgm5BWR6eTjr2dQ76kOm2TZSUFwvJhDgFytEYK7pwCVVH6tC7XYw%3D%3D)

Patriot,

**FIRST** , I first launched my campaign for U.S. Senate in battleground Pennsylvania. Pollsters had us down by double digits and said we'd never defeat an entrenched career politician like Bob Casey who has spent 18 years in Washington with nothing to show for it other than a record of voting with Biden/Harris 98% of the time.

**THEN** , people like you stepped up. We got to work and built a movement. We spread my message of bringing CHANGE to Washington.

✔️ We traveled thousands of miles on the campaign bus to all 67 of Pennsylvania's counties.
✔️ I joined forces with other political outsiders like President Trump and Elon Musk who love our country and want to bring real change to preserve the American Dream.

Our double-digit polling deficit turned into a DEADLOCK TIE in poll after poll. The national liberal elite, led by Chuck Schumer, spent hundreds of millions of dollars to try and defeat me. They brought out celebrities on the campaign trail and used media outlets like the _New York Times_ and CNN to spread lies about me and my family to eliminate any chance of me winning.

**NOW** , the election is over. The AP called the race and named me the winner.

But that hasn't stopped my opponent Bob Casey and the national Democrat machine from organizing and fundraising to force a recount.

But we're following the lead of President Trump. We are going to FIGHT! FIGHT! FIGHT!

**[But while votes continue to be counted, I'm asking for you to chip in today to help us keep up our fight.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=89c6356bb9914070815a448dd81251f7&_e=1IMDlMs805EDdxFEyxFHM2YUtFdu6dzULhAm-SNSY1ATO44g9HwxuPR36nBe09TYeFM0MAJxlU-TOtSirQ-8pIERXXqmVm7ShKt3piLvsJrQeqCjwdYK5vw8hAqzge5lnmdQ6G0bTKjdzbz5PrVi2YuMxuJz44Lz1fA1gkIFG7GyjGmJvn5vvAspbvjJV9ZH-PlyzNU46se5eoXFUPV3Kqz57SNlWtnOPMyEp8-GDkA6d9Ki6PE840p45L1iycb-CFWL80ils0wSWtkeoIzCva1L7fTLf8YpwWkbIyLqmRH_XgY6ff2DRoMPkr5kxRvxNkM8I49rSQZDfQUCC01luCVNUFRIjkSgnCjk9QhmSZSalXjkGld9zpNHpKfqcLzLaM8NVb8UBNA3YxqJXZJnZA%3D%3D)**

_If you are not in a position to give right now, please don 't._ I mean it.

But if you are able to give, [I'm humbly asking you to chip in any amount to help us fund whatever the Democrats will throw at us in the coming days.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=89c6356bb9914070815a448dd81251f7&_e=1IMDlMs805EDdxFEyxFHM2YUtFdu6dzULhAm-SNSY1ATO44g9HwxuPR36nBe09TYeFM0MAJxlU-TOtSirQ-8pIERXXqmVm7ShKt3piLvsJrQeqCjwdYK5vw8hAqzge5lnmdQ6G0bTKjdzbz5PrVi2YuMxuJz44Lz1fA1gkIFG7GyjGmJvn5vvAspbvjJV9ZH-PlyzNU46se5eoXFUPV3Kqz57SNlWtnOPMyEp8-GDkA6d9Ki6PE840p45L1iycb-J3Q8JwTD2pjWDx2zRplIHH8pUCozoMjQ81LiPRnHunnSBewmfvIvuB8ulTXPWBARvEInm1AxT3Sf-QpMpMWKJsFhiTRuJ8dQ0YZ7fTHmIn1gxUOZ6SELVB6nVHAEUFPVFtWoACmsSTsSf1ujZaW_cA%3D%3D)

Thank you for all of your support. We couldn't have done this without you!

Thank you,
Dave McCormick

name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79192d6dc40146929f38824aa20a8043&_e=zWi74HdMK2c4njNAymFMiLQJyqfoAT4gbecXtqwU3vR18AMIRERCN7P4uKGqlU5euhlFwuAIZrdQ55gu41g-hnZZKBZnLq0aZp5-dl_pINBPkpelmqmGSVLX_bfgSi4CAfVbOu9kkjGhwHJkF0jWpCARM8eIxU7vU4HFaue79WJXihgJS9i8OCS-kVY8Mz_ugizE9zWop6cJ2voDTXCCyDD1edkqu40Nn3F7PAjZiXGgb3EJmomGXSPRdNjEZ52rzjl03tSPKpkmlSWxXtAhuK_8NkScpruNhGZe31C98HiaUDsFIB6mdot2MoLb-wbNmw49yjo1wUTFW1FoG2LUwiv0qPg4bQ3W0D7dh9PZ9mvW86_jVwz1iD3ctBHIsBVqTHMi18f10sbW007390aAGQ%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79192d6dc40146929f38824aa20a8043&_e=zWi74HdMK2c4njNAymFMiLQJyqfoAT4gbecXtqwU3vR18AMIRERCN7P4uKGqlU5euhlFwuAIZrdQ55gu41g-hnZZKBZnLq0aZp5-dl_pINBPkpelmqmGSVLX_bfgSi4CAfVbOu9kkjGhwHJkF0jWpCARM8eIxU7vU4HFaue79WJXihgJS9i8OCS-kVY8Mz_ugizE9zWop6cJ2voDTXCCyDD1edkqu40Nn3F7PAjZiXFNoe9ObGsMnJ2U2mrTsPPeiGsZL46NxNQ342PtrWUZKlKNcPcvSt1MkZyTq-W6LJRtcN337Raoun6hvEG-HYdylfneZvipLAUxyFT0SaQdROWbM9QOp5alkqd8Dah42grrCSA1p7gvUAgeOTCf4a0j3ChDtfAIORHLq3W9FiZgOQ%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79192d6dc40146929f38824aa20a8043&_e=zWi74HdMK2c4njNAymFMiLQJyqfoAT4gbecXtqwU3vR18AMIRERCN7P4uKGqlU5euhlFwuAIZrdQ55gu41g-hnZZKBZnLq0aZp5-dl_pINBPkpelmqmGSVLX_bfgSi4CAfVbOu9kkjGhwHJkF0jWpCARM8eIxU7vU4HFaue79WJXihgJS9i8OCS-kVY8Mz_ugizE9zWop6cJ2voDTXCCyDD1edkqu40Nn3F7PAjZiXGRRk7NhwfpGCRbqq2T-sv8RwyuPf8JIf-pLQzBKv87IVh0XA6d8Esh7PpdDokod7NLCILuOZA_bsywNix_GPH99zChExTj9HOYLkhnmWWwYZaeTL21XVo0LbxBLFt8Mrx4ahrtiFPTTTrhvM3lU5317L7sWZCvYUK3TTW-R2AuwA%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79192d6dc40146929f38824aa20a8043&_e=zWi74HdMK2c4njNAymFMiLQJyqfoAT4gbecXtqwU3vR18AMIRERCN7P4uKGqlU5euhlFwuAIZrdQ55gu41g-hnZZKBZnLq0aZp5-dl_pINBPkpelmqmGSVLX_bfgSi4CAfVbOu9kkjGhwHJkF0jWpCARM8eIxU7vU4HFaue79WJXihgJS9i8OCS-kVY8Mz_ugizE9zWop6cJ2voDTXCCyDD1edkqu40Nn3F7PAjZiXHsX3uuuDk1QcFGnVhiP1bqe1mC5s5cX5ITrDSoKgVmI1vNxwT7Fimv9rNR_-FW7tLVkNZV3E7-eQByXvYoeRktodB_7MzGZfvDrEvuAh5D7xRGXcPgAmRqunReDrBP0cqdzL364qtny97H74uKo5pVuzttew0wficP1EXQM2kq6Q%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79192d6dc40146929f38824aa20a8043&_e=zWi74HdMK2c4njNAymFMiLQJyqfoAT4gbecXtqwU3vR18AMIRERCN7P4uKGqlU5euhlFwuAIZrdQ55gu41g-hnZZKBZnLq0aZp5-dl_pINBPkpelmqmGSVLX_bfgSi4CAfVbOu9kkjGhwHJkF0jWpCARM8eIxU7vU4HFaue79WJXihgJS9i8OCS-kVY8Mz_ugizE9zWop6cJ2voDTXCCyDD1edkqu40Nn3F7PAjZiXF0HLzLkoXsRSndM0Ps5L1njkOgwxgjC4baDASJCheHq6ASbQci2goMu2ICKlCriINLN-RfFH0ujodXYrBgnnhdaoLkuxCHPc1rWyIUMvXa3rmme2l8MsyR3BvgBTqjKhbp4V_AwiCUw_Llx6OQI8u5GIm80Bj7YjTKbVTrWWh3NA%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79192d6dc40146929f38824aa20a8043&_e=zWi74HdMK2c4njNAymFMiLQJyqfoAT4gbecXtqwU3vR18AMIRERCN7P4uKGqlU5euhlFwuAIZrdQ55gu41g-hnZZKBZnLq0aZp5-dl_pINBPkpelmqmGSVLX_bfgSi4CAfVbOu9kkjGhwHJkF0jWpCARM8eIxU7vU4HFaue79WJXihgJS9i8OCS-kVY8Mz_ugizE9zWop6cJ2voDTXCCyDD1edkqu40Nn3F7PAjZiXELkYiADKjFNSTRosCYV-tSb4Z0uz70ufOkJPOQ37ZQxW91GZJQ1MYHGKD5fhd6Hv654ZTEZy-VLxR8TQft0zOjRImMF_fhad9L1KHB2CZD30ICbBBINbJe69Qr50ncSP_1Gdwyo8Gd_kQhHdDRcUKyFhgVv5v3YCu2ggzixcHqMg%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

clean_body: My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. Dear Fellow American, My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him. Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy. He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy. I was so proud that night. Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch. – but first, let me explain what happened. Our nightmare started in October of 2020. Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory. Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge. When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter. Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car. Then it happened. Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car. After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn... Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy. They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death. The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder. Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison. Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. Gratefully, Patti Reilly P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! * **TOP NEWS**

"**State Board of Education signals support for Bible-infused curriculum,** " Texas Tribune's **Jaden Edison **-- "A majority of the Texas State Board of Education signaled their support Tuesday for a state-authored curriculum under intense scrutiny in recent months for its heavy inclusion of biblical teachings.

Ahead of an official vote expected to happen Friday, eight of the 15 board members gave their preliminary approval to Bluebonnet Learning, the elementary school curriculum proposed by the Texas Education Agency earlier this year.

The state will have until late Wednesday to submit revisions in response to concerns raised by board members and the general public before the official vote takes place Friday. Board members reserve the right to change their votes.

The curriculum was designed with a cross-disciplinary approach that uses reading and language arts lessons to advance or cement concepts in other disciplines, such as history and social studies. [Critics, which included religious studies experts, argue](https://substack.com/redirect/0210ad5d-b558-4d32-9d17-362c0f00035b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the curriculum's lessons allude to Christianity more than any other religion, which they say could lead to the bullying and isolation of non-Christian students, undermine church-state separation and grant the state far-reaching control over how children learn about religion. They also questioned the accuracy of some lessons.

The curriculum's defenders say that references to Christianity will provide students with a better understanding of the country's history.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/7aff04b8-5fc4-4150-ae75-25b32c2c75a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Texas school districts have the freedom to choose their own lesson plans. If the state-authored curriculum receives approval this week, the choice to adopt the materials will remain with districts. But the state will offer an incentive of $60 per student to districts that choose to adopt the lessons, which could appeal to some as schools struggle financially after several years without a significant raise in state funding.

Three Republicans -- **Evelyn Brooks** ,** Patricia Hardy **and **Pam Little **-- joined the board's four Democrats in opposition to the materials.

**Leslie Recine** -- a Republican whom Gov. **Greg Abbott** appointed to temporarily fill the State Board of Education's District 13 seat vacated by former member** Aicha Davis**, a Democrat who ran successfully for a Texas House seat earlier this year -- voted for the curriculum. Abbott handpicked Recine, potentially a deciding vote on the materials, to fill the seat through the end of the year days before the general election, bypassing Democrat **Tiffany Clark**. A majority of District 13 residents voted this election for Clark to represent them on the board next year. She ran unopposed.

Board members who signaled their support for the curriculum said they believed the materials would help students improve their reading and understanding of the world. Members also said politics in no way influenced their vote and that they supported the materials because they believed it would best serve Texas children.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/542dd1d4-7f23-48f5-8262-11559d106621?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"In my view, these stories are on the education side and are establishing cultural literacy," Houston Republican **Will Hickman **said. "And there's religious concepts like the Good Samaritan and the Golden Rule and Moses that all students should be exposed to."

The proposed curriculum prompts teachers to relay the story of The Good Samaritan -- a parable about loving everyone, including your enemies -- to kindergarteners as an example of what it means to follow the Golden Rule. The story comes from the Bible, the lesson explains, and "was told by a man named Jesus" as part of his Sermon on the Mount, which included the phrase, "Do unto others as you would have done unto you." [Many other religions](https://substack.com/redirect/a274fe15-a0ab-4800-a1e7-16ecf978beb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have their own version of the Golden Rule." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/f2bfcc8e-1d8a-4fb2-9bae-1686a0f80d30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "State Board of Education signals support for Bible-infused curriculum, " Texas Tribune's Jaden Edison -- "A majority of the Texas State Board of Education signaled their support Tuesday for a state-authored curriculum under intense scrutiny in recent months for its heavy inclusion of biblical teachings. Ahead of an official vote expected to happen Friday, eight of the 15 board members gave their preliminary approval to Bluebonnet Learning, the elementary school curriculum proposed by the Texas Education Agency earlier this year. The state will have until late Wednesday to submit revisions in response to concerns raised by board members and the general public before the official vote takes place Friday. Board members reserve the right to change their votes. The curriculum was designed with a cross-disciplinary approach that uses reading and language arts lessons to advance or cement concepts in other disciplines, such as history and social studies. the curriculum's lessons allude to Christianity more than any other religion, which they say could lead to the bullying and isolation of non-Christian students, undermine church-state separation and grant the state far-reaching control over how children learn about religion. They also questioned the accuracy of some lessons. The curriculum's defenders say that references to Christianity will provide students with a better understanding of the country's history. Texas school districts have the freedom to choose their own lesson plans. If the state-authored curriculum receives approval this week, the choice to adopt the materials will remain with districts. But the state will offer an incentive of $60 per student to districts that choose to adopt the lessons, which could appeal to some as schools struggle financially after several years without a significant raise in state funding. Three Republicans -- Evelyn Brooks , Patricia Hardy and Pam Little -- joined the board's four Democrats in opposition to the materials. Leslie Recine -- a Republican whom Gov. Greg Abbott appointed to temporarily fill the State Board of Education's District 13 seat vacated by former member Aicha Davis, a Democrat who ran successfully for a Texas House seat earlier this year -- voted for the curriculum. Abbott handpicked Recine, potentially a deciding vote on the materials, to fill the seat through the end of the year days before the general election, bypassing Democrat Tiffany Clark. A majority of District 13 residents voted this election for Clark to represent them on the board next year. She ran unopposed. Board members who signaled their support for the curriculum said they believed the materials would help students improve their reading and understanding of the world. Members also said politics in no way influenced their vote and that they supported the materials because they believed it would best serve Texas children. "In my view, these stories are on the education side and are establishing cultural literacy," Houston Republican Will Hickman said. "And there's religious concepts like the Good Samaritan and the Golden Rule and Moses that all students should be exposed to." The proposed curriculum prompts teachers to relay the story of The Good Samaritan -- a parable about loving everyone, including your enemies -- to kindergarteners as an example of what it means to follow the Golden Rule. The story comes from the Bible, the lesson explains, and "was told by a man named Jesus" as part of his Sermon on the Mount, which included the phrase, "Do unto others as you would have done unto you." have their own version of the Golden Rule." FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. * **TOP NEWS**

"**State Board of Education signals support for Bible-infused curriculum,** " Texas Tribune's **Jaden Edison **-- "A majority of the Texas State Board of Education signaled their support Tuesday for a state-authored curriculum under intense scrutiny in recent months for its heavy inclusion of biblical teachings.

Ahead of an official vote expected to happen Friday, eight of the 15 board members gave their preliminary approval to Bluebonnet Learning, the elementary school curriculum proposed by the Texas Education Agency earlier this year.

The state will have until late Wednesday to submit revisions in response to concerns raised by board members and the general public before the official vote takes place Friday. Board members reserve the right to change their votes.

The curriculum was designed with a cross-disciplinary approach that uses reading and language arts lessons to advance or cement concepts in other disciplines, such as history and social studies. [Critics, which included religious studies experts, argue](https://substack.com/redirect/a9c923d0-8136-4bfa-8e25-c439d4592fc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the curriculum's lessons allude to Christianity more than any other religion, which they say could lead to the bullying and isolation of non-Christian students, undermine church-state separation and grant the state far-reaching control over how children learn about religion. They also questioned the accuracy of some lessons.

The curriculum's defenders say that references to Christianity will provide students with a better understanding of the country's history.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/93830da3-b558-4134-8883-b453931ebd5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Texas school districts have the freedom to choose their own lesson plans. If the state-authored curriculum receives approval this week, the choice to adopt the materials will remain with districts. But the state will offer an incentive of $60 per student to districts that choose to adopt the lessons, which could appeal to some as schools struggle financially after several years without a significant raise in state funding.

Three Republicans -- **Evelyn Brooks** ,** Patricia Hardy **and **Pam Little **-- joined the board's four Democrats in opposition to the materials.

**Leslie Recine** -- a Republican whom Gov. **Greg Abbott** appointed to temporarily fill the State Board of Education's District 13 seat vacated by former member** Aicha Davis**, a Democrat who ran successfully for a Texas House seat earlier this year -- voted for the curriculum. Abbott handpicked Recine, potentially a deciding vote on the materials, to fill the seat through the end of the year days before the general election, bypassing Democrat **Tiffany Clark**. A majority of District 13 residents voted this election for Clark to represent them on the board next year. She ran unopposed.

Board members who signaled their support for the curriculum said they believed the materials would help students improve their reading and understanding of the world. Members also said politics in no way influenced their vote and that they supported the materials because they believed it would best serve Texas children.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/93830da3-b558-4134-8883-b453931ebd5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"In my view, these stories are on the education side and are establishing cultural literacy," Houston Republican **Will Hickman **said. "And there's religious concepts like the Good Samaritan and the Golden Rule and Moses that all students should be exposed to."

The proposed curriculum prompts teachers to relay the story of The Good Samaritan -- a parable about loving everyone, including your enemies -- to kindergarteners as an example of what it means to follow the Golden Rule. The story comes from the Bible, the lesson explains, and "was told by a man named Jesus" as part of his Sermon on the Mount, which included the phrase, "Do unto others as you would have done unto you." [Many other religions](https://substack.com/redirect/c793cabe-9c67-4a27-86bd-81ed672d93fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have their own version of the Golden Rule." name: Mark Takano
subject: Donald Trump’s cabinet picks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97409950/513318979/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjE1MTA3Mi05OWE3LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2ut0liNvbvmg88CufTT5QcpNT6IuI5gIU3HVq37EF9U=)
---
Peter, I know many of us have tuned out of politics after the losses we faced.

But Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies have wasted absolutely no time in re-creating the same chaos we saw from his team from 2017-2021.

In just the past week, Donald Trump has appointed:

**Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for Secretary of Health and Human Services** — a man who has spread numerous false conspiracy claims about everything from vaccines to HIV/AIDS.

**Republican Congressman Matt Gaetz for Attorney General** — one of the most despicable members of Congress, currently the focus of a House investigation looking into allegations of sex trafficking, sexual assault, and pedophilia.

**Pete Hegseth for Secretary of Defense** — a Fox News host who paid off a woman who had previously accused him of sexual assault, was barred from working President Biden’s Inauguration because the Pentagon deemed him an “Insider threat”, and has said that women should not serve in combat roles.

**Tulsi Gabbard for Director of National Intelligence** — a pick that Putin is reportedly “gleeful” about and who has parroted Russian propaganda enough to even concern Republicans.

The bottom line is, no matter how unqualified, corrupt, or vindictive these nominees are, there is one thing that unites them: **Unquestioning loyalty to Donald Trump.**

**That is an extreme danger to our democracy and rule of law. Even Republicans in the Senate know this, Peter – there are rumors some of Trump’s picks could get voted down, so we need your voice!**

[**Will you stand with me by signing our urgent petition to call on the Senate to reject these unqualified appointees? There is real momentum on our side to hand Donald Trump his first loss of his presidency. clean_body: | = Peter, I know many of us have tuned out of politics after the losses we faced. But Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies have wasted absolutely no time in re-creating the same chaos we saw from his team from 2017-2021. In just the past week, Donald Trump has appointed: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for Secretary of Health and Human Services — a man who has spread numerous false conspiracy claims about everything from vaccines to HIV/AIDS. Republican Congressman Matt Gaetz for Attorney General — one of the most despicable members of Congress, currently the focus of a House investigation looking into allegations of sex trafficking, sexual assault, and pedophilia. Pete Hegseth for Secretary of Defense — a Fox News host who paid off a woman who had previously accused him of sexual assault, was barred from working President Biden’s Inauguration because the Pentagon deemed him an “Insider threat”, and has said that women should not serve in combat roles. Tulsi Gabbard for Director of National Intelligence — a pick that Putin is reportedly “gleeful” about and who has parroted Russian propaganda enough to even concern Republicans. The bottom line is, no matter how unqualified, corrupt, or vindictive these nominees are, there is one thing that unites them: Unquestioning loyalty to Donald Trump. That is an extreme danger to our democracy and rule of law. Even Republicans in the Senate know this, Peter – there are rumors some of Trump’s picks could get voted down, so we need your voice! | We’re in this fight together, Peter. **New Jersey KNOWS: President Trump is "OUR GUY."**
We **CAN FLIP NJ** if we run a **TRUMP CONSERVATIVE** for Gov in 2025.
**New Jersey LOVES President Trump and his America First Agenda ...**
...in fact, in 2024, he got _**CLOSER** than **ANY** Republican in decades_ to winning the Garden State... coming within **JUST FIVE POINTS.**
**Here 's the thing: New Jersey knows that President Trump is _" our guy."_**
And if **ANYONE** is going to**FLIP THIS STATE,** it's going to be President Trump and the NJ, America First, conservatives who **FOUGHT** for him since the very beginning.
My name is Bill Spadea and I'm **THAT CANDIDATE** in NJ's 2025 Governor's race.
I face a tough Republican primary this spring against some anti-Trump opponents, and I need your help to make **SURE I WIN IT.**
Help me **BROADCAST** my America FIRST message to the people of New Jersey over the next year... and help me **FLIP THIS STATE >>**
**< < FLIP NEW JERSEY >>**
New Jersey has **NO TIME** for the Establishment GOP.
If we run an Establishment Governor candidate here next year, we **WILL** lose...
and New Jersey will swing firmly back to where it was under Clinton, Bush, and Obama.
New Jersey is screaming one message at the Republican Party:
**RUN CANDIDATES LIKE PRESIDENT TRUMP, AND WE 'LL VOTE FOR THEM!**
If I'm on the ballot next November, **I WILL WIN ...** and, with President Trump's help, we **WILL FLIP THIS STATE** for good.
We have a **TON** of work to make it happen... we need **YOU** to help us lay the groundwork to **FLIP THIS STATE,** just like we did this year in next-door Pennsylvania.
**< < JOIN THE FIGHT AND FLIP NEW JERSEY >>**
Thanks!
Bill Spadea

subject: Update: The NC Supreme Court race is headed to a recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Justice Allison Riggs leads her opponent by just over 700 votes and needs our support to get over the line.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97409970/513319003/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc5ODdkMTdmLTk5YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vD5X6heL6gcu5DWKWm6XTnNmW0ClakeV4NkiyX1gDMU=&emci=ac7fb75b-6ea7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=7987d17f-99a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=8431045)
---

Hi Peter, North Carolina was one of our key electoral priorities this cycle, and one of the most critical races there — for the state supreme court — is now going into a recount. We endorsed Justice Allison Riggs for the North Carolina Supreme Court because she has proven to be a fair-minded and independent voice on the court. She is a tenacious civil rights attorney who has been a champion of every American’s fundamental rights, including voting rights. **She leads her opponent by just over 700 votes — out of more than 5.5 million total ballots cast.** We knew that major state-level races this year could come down to just a few hundred votes, so everything this team does can make a real difference. And this is an important reminder that our work fighting for a fair democracy is far from over. In fact, given the extreme MAGA Republicans who will be leading the federal government, our work at the state level is more important than ever before. The NDRC is supporting count and cure campaigns on the ground in North Carolina while also gearing up for the next phase of our 10 Year Plan. [**Will you chip in right now to support the ongoing work the NDRC will do to fight for fair maps champions like Justice Allison Riggs?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97409971/513319004/1464966451?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AllisonRiggsRR_email_20241120-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggsRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241120-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggsRR_&utm_campaign=AllisonRiggsRR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc5ODdkMTdmLTk5YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vD5X6heL6gcu5DWKWm6XTnNmW0ClakeV4NkiyX1gDMU=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The Republican majority on the North Carolina Supreme Court has already had a massive impact on the state: The court removed constitutional guardrails on extreme partisan gerrymandering, brought back a voter ID law, and disenfranchised people with felony convictions.
Justice Allison Riggs’s reelection will ensure that critical pro-democracy leadership remains a force on this massively influential court — and we’ll avoid adding yet another extreme partisan voice to the court.
We need to do everything we can to get pro-democracy candidates in seats at the state level, to hold the line against extreme Republicans and their Project 2025 policies. **[We may be down, but we’re certainly not out. Are you with us?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97409978/513319011/1464966451?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AllisonRiggsRR_email_20241120-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggsRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241120-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggsRR_&utm_campaign=AllisonRiggsRR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc5ODdkMTdmLTk5YTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vD5X6heL6gcu5DWKWm6XTnNmW0ClakeV4NkiyX1gDMU=)**

clean_body: Justice Allison Riggs leads her opponent by just over 700 votes and needs our support to get over the line. | Hi Peter, North Carolina was one of our key electoral priorities this cycle, and one of the most critical races there — for the state supreme court — is now going into a recount. We endorsed Justice Allison Riggs for the North Carolina Supreme Court because she has proven to be a fair-minded and independent voice on the court. She is a tenacious civil rights attorney who has been a champion of every American’s fundamental rights, including voting rights. She leads her opponent by just over 700 votes — out of more than 5.5 million total ballots cast. We knew that major state-level races this year could come down to just a few hundred votes, so everything this team does can make a real difference. And this is an important reminder that our work fighting for a fair democracy is far from over. In fact, given the extreme MAGA Republicans who will be leading the federal government, our work at the state level is more important than ever before. The NDRC is supporting count and cure campaigns on the ground in North Carolina while also gearing up for the next phase of our 10 Year Plan. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The Republican majority on the North Carolina Supreme Court has already had a massive impact on the state: The court removed constitutional guardrails on extreme partisan gerrymandering, brought back a voter ID law, and disenfranchised people with felony convictions. Justice Allison Riggs’s reelection will ensure that critical pro-democracy leadership remains a force on this massively influential court — and we’ll avoid adding yet another extreme partisan voice to the court. We need to do everything we can to get pro-democracy candidates in seats at the state level, to hold the line against extreme Republicans and their Project 2025 policies. = Thanks so much — we’ll keep you updated on this one. Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, Suite #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

body:
We’re continuing to do everything we can to make sure we flip and protect these remaining seats.

| We’re continuing to do everything we can to make sure we flip and protect these remaining seats. Here’s where things stand:
1. Derek Tran JUST pulled ahead of Michelle Steel by a few hundred votes. **It is essential we keep up our ballot cure operation to grow our lead.**
2. Adam Gray is behind by just a few thousand votes. **We have people on the ground, ensuring every vote is counted so we can flip this seat blue.**
3. Jared Golden's race is going to a hand recount. **We need to ensure Jared has the resources he needs to protect ME-02.**

These races are going to come down to the margins. Winning these key seats will ensure Republicans have a slim majority and build up the blue firewall around Trump and his MAGA cronies. [_**Will you split $10 or more now between these recount funds and Fight for Progress? Your donation will go directly to ensuring these candidates have the funds to flip and protect these key House seats.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97410074/513319283/-1435857143?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-11-20_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzYTFiOGMxLTlhYTctZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IzY3NVEG6VF9npjTyy1sML6D72KOjnnGGiWItJ6ViW0=)
